name: hear.com
subject: Hearing aids just got their biggest upgrade...
body:
Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts

| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z17tk5gnl6plj9nost96a6b2jb2de37aovtfpqi0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1ge0o75cph2bs)
---
| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6ra3vllja5sgr3csf6iu99ekufh08573bja6pdo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1ge0o75cph2bs)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's hear.com's **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **hear.com's IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[Check if you qualify](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7j1qo93fejgff1n1dpusjopmgo0p3l8mudaep1g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1ge0o75cph2bs)
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4m6p61hrnpp87eo52vp9asqv0p4n0qnvmq0mlt0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1ge0o75cph2bs)
What makes hear.com’s IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that hear.com’s IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains hear.com founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. **Get started today.**
[Check if you qualify](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zeh5r8nqdlkct8aiktadsinq8csl7upub4cfekf0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1ge0o75cph2bs)

name: Scalise, Steve
subject: This isn’t a typical political email.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I know you’ve heard from me dozens of times at this point

Hey, it's Steve Scalise.

I know you've heard from me dozens of times at this point. But let me assure you - this isn't your typical political email.

_I 've talked to thousands of Conservatives from across the country and the vast majority of folks **1)** are very concerned about the Fake News Media coverage of President Trump, **2)** want to make the historic Trump Tax Cuts permanent, and **3)** strongly support deporting criminal illegal immigrants ASAP. _

**Those issues are at the top of my list too, but I was blown away by how many people had more to say. **

That's why I'm launching my _**[Pulse of America Check-In](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3u2atnp4endjg6nqad8u4n7t5cb8kqk0sqr29t8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1ge0o75cph2bs)**_ - the FIRST of its kind - to understand where the American People are on the most important issues facing the nation.

If you're receiving this email, I want to hear from you. I'm only reaching out to my closest grassroots advisors and - _based on your previous survey responses and feedback_ - I want you included in my final results.**_JUST RELEASED_****PULSE OF AMERICA CHECK-IN****
****Contact:** [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z72bhkvu9chprc75hgkk7j2bb4jtk3mn2o69p3d0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1ge0o75cph2bs)**Response:** INCOMPLETE**Deadline :** 9:00 AM Tomorrow[BEGIN IT HERE &goppr;
](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zejve6a80l2eff1rdrc4l3uhcg0mf3omakqer1ko_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1ge0o75cph2bs)I value your opinion.

My team and I will review your feedback tomorrow morning. What you say will determine the direction of our House Majority. With President Trump counting on us to pass his agenda, we NEED to be on the same page.

**Consider this your direct line of communication with me.**

I make my best decisions when I know what my best supporters think. Can I tell my team to look out for your response tonight?

_**[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zh3f8v57d7sbft4c8vk5uq9pcdqavu6mka9j1o9o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1ge0o75cph2bs "Please click any of these secure links to access your survey")**_[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhb303ef8t3sufhjj6e18d2sj8k6363dom96vo5g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1ge0o75cph2bs)[Please click any of these secure links to access your survey](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zb22r5g4nrnbob3849jlt1psttmn5gf7sj440048_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1ge0o75cph2bs)
Thank you and God bless,

Steve Scalise
* * *
\- Democrat Leadership formed an _anti-Trump task force_ \- More than a dozen Attorneys General are _suing_ the Trump Administration\- A House Democrat just introduced _7 Articles of Impeachment_[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1c79cv1lrn454qu5niei1lo3ipa46bjgvcvf10o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1ge0o75cph2bs) If they manage to strip us of our House Majority, they'll have the power to impeach, investigate, and bring his entire legislative agenda to a SCREECHING HALT!
**We're PLEADING WITH YOU to do your part to help SAVE our Pro-Trump House Majority:**[ DO YOUR PART: PITCH IN NOW
](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z52gkjvo47o3ap0e0d287iq0p3081c9aasq4dtt8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1ge0o75cph2bs)| | |

clean_body: Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts | | Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result. The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does. But now, a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry, and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade. It's new IX hearing aid. And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations. It’s no wonder IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America. What makes IX hearing aid so special? It’s one of the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing. This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small. The result? An unprecedented amount of power and clarity. This means that IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for unparalleled, crystal clear sound. “It's not just about volume,” explains founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.” In other words: with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design! Limited no-risk trials now available Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. Get started today. Pop Acta Media | First Look News PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Hillsdale College via Updates For Great Americans
subject: Now Available: “Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer”
body:
I am excited to announce that Hillsdale’s online teaching series, “Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,” is now available to own as a DVD box set.

This sponsored message from Updates for Great Americans is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zekhfoqk7kai2d7euo5asi5jtvs8j3iic0jiqfng_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1ge8pr2cth2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2znerus4s0bjvq6r5h8nmi2fgcnb3rn3fgv1rfpk8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1ge8pr2cth2bs) Dear Fellow American,

I am excited to announce that Hillsdale's online teaching series, ["Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,"](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zodvcetd8oklv0bphahk250dqcdjuioqci3pla1o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1ge8pr2cth2bs) is now available to own as a DVD box set.

In this series, you will discover how taxation, regulation, money, government spending, and trade influence our decisions and impact our lives. Joined by Steve Forbes, Stephen Moore, Larry Kudlow, Amity Shlaes, Brian Domitrovic, and Larry P. Arnn, Dr. Laffer explains how supply-side economics holds the key to unleashing American prosperity once again.

But we need the support of citizens like you to promote this series to millions of Americans along with our other nationwide outreach.

Will you partner with us to promote this free online teaching series from Hillsdale College and expand other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty? Your tax-deductible donation will help us to enroll thousands of Americans in this series.

And for a donation of $100 or more, we will send you this beautiful DVD box set of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer."

**To help support this course and get your copy of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer" on DVD, click the link below:**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/supply-side-economics-support-dvd](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zlvtno44s1sile6nji5runnmbk5tvr5pias6npug_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1ge8pr2cth2bs)

I hope you enjoy this teaching series. Thank you for your support.

Warm Regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers
body:
take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...

| | |
---
| | Dear Friend, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zaonma12s2q2p8s64libafsl056rn40j6dd91vg8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1ge4or2cph2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. [**Today, I'm inviting you to support the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zqs2ao98qkengudvjsurnopih8pq2ta02nj2ggt8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1ge4or2cph2bs) And it’s only possible with the help of grandparents and seniors like you. Introducing:_ Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children’s show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of the truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children’s show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[Because I can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zvetsk2mdsj148od4lfj270dj0rfhpifn0ig99f8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1ge4or2cph2bs)** Millions of families are already watching Season One of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ on our streaming service BRAVE+, YouTube, and on DVD. And the reviews from parents, grandparents, and kids are incredible. One Mom of three little girls told us: “Our family was struggling through a pretty difficult day. But I turned on _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ and that was exactly what my heart needed as much as theirs.” It’s amazing that your simple response to this letter can make that kind of difference for a family. Each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. [**That’s why I’m asking you to help us finish Season Two of**** _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_****by giving a gift of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z1ccakqfu82qgtpvvafd4na5ei4udcbpgs4lnt88_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1ge4or2cph2bs)**** Whether you can send $35, $25,000, anything in between, or anything higher or lower – please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As a special “Thank You” for your **[gift of $50 or more](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zccea5kld1og5mek3o3soadncu0c2tasli158as0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1ge4or2cph2bs)** , I’ll send you Season One of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ for your family to enjoy FREE on DVD. And with your [**gift of $100 or more**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zrse4l5qopdo2uuhdob21j1so2lftvklpm2l01hg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1ge4or2cph2bs), I’ll also send you a copy of my children’s book: Pride Comes Before the Fall which teaches children to be humble before God instead of prideful. I wrote Pride Comes Before the Fall with the great team at BRAVE books – the same God-focused conservative team that’s bringing _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ to life. Maybe you’ve seen me and other BRAVE Books authors on Fox News, Newsmax, TBN or other media outlets. Unabashed conservatives like Riley Gaines, Lara Trump, Kevin Sorbo, Missy Robertson, Dinesh D’Souza, John Solomon, Jack Posobiec, and so many more have written a BRAVE Book to stop the Hollywood groomers. Supported by you, BRAVE Books gives parents the tools they need to rebuild our families and reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon. Now I know there are a lot of places you can spend your money in the next ten minutes. **[But I hope you’ll be a part of history by supporting _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. ](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z6i52v07oksvrccfnbh3qd44aveep7e1rdlmem7o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1ge4or2cph2bs)** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth. Thank you for joining us in the fight.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z51dfhdslgou1kqsu06m466i9lhfn9tq2t9vnnao_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1ge4or2cph2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z4nd5ibb40ntotr81fs415nl8st9ndn61h4j551o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1ge4or2cph2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in history made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zd4e6bcesn46spkctsh6j4vc1djjgt70jf7ugrqg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1ge4or2cph2bs) **Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---
[ **DONATE ** ](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zpmhj9d8vgpe5j9dmaka61p63smsd16b8pb0t1ro_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1ge4or2cph2bs)
---
| | **Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304
---

---

name: Senate GOP HQ
subject: I’d be shocked if this email reaches your inbox
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Big Tech is doing everything they can to silence us

Friend, I'd be shocked beyond belief if this email actually reached your inbox.

It's Cameron at Senate GOP HQ and we just got word that for years, Big Tech has censored our communications from MILLIONS of Patriots like you!

body:

|

Shady Democrats in Washington, DC, are trying to bury the full-scale cover-up inside Biden's White House -- with help from the corrupt media running a full-throated gaslighting campaign to keep the truth from the American people.

**This wasn 't just a spin. This was an intentional deception on a national scale.**

**And now here 's the cold, hard truth:** If we lose the House next year, they'll get away with it. Full stop.

Every lie. Every cover-up. Every phony media hit job -- swept under the rug forever.

**House Republicans are the only thing standing between the American people and the biggest political scandal in modern history being buried.**

We're digging in. But without the resources to fight back and keep the majority,**we lose our ability to expose the full truth -- and the liars walk free.**

name: Laura Loomer
subject: I Stopped a Phony TV Doctor from Embarrassing Trump
body:
I'm here to drag them into the light and ensure Trump is surrounded by warriors

| [****](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdt1gp5ptscnol7tsl52lprc1gqst9on93847050_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1ge2ob4cdh2bs)
[****](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z16h36hbhth964h5ectib7j596d4eqr7ml8olcpg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1ge2ob4cdh2bs) Dear Patriot,

**DC is a swamp of self-serving snakes --politicians, profiteers, and fame-chasers who'd sell out President Trump for a pat on the head from the elite.. These swamp dwellers don't give a damn about America.**

They're motivated by greed, power, and their next TV hit.

**I'm Laura Loomer, and I'm here to drag them into the light and ensure Trump is surrounded by warriors who fight for YOU, not their egos.**

Last month, I exposed Dr. Janette Nesheiwat, Trump's pick for Surgeon General, as a pro-vaccine globalist with a medical degree from a Caribbean school she hyped as elite.

[**Please help me keep going by donating to support my work.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbbfi728e7gvgcehfu0evpginjsrq7dooduuqup8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1ge2ob4cdh2bs)

She wasn't a patriot--she was a Big Pharma darling, ready to push **propaganda for profit** while being deceptive about her medical credentials.

As a result of my investigation, **President Trump heard me and yanked her nomination** , saving us from an unqualified US Surgeon General.

[**I have so much work to do and need your help to keep up the fight.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z23s1q5pg3t9lcnilsqhqm7a6olo806qhip78oig_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1ge2ob4cdh2bs)

**President Trump needs the best people --patriots who will be loyal to the America First agenda rather than fame.**

The Swamp is thick with these traitors, and with your support, **I 'm wading through it to protect Trump's agenda.**

My work isn't cheap. I'm funding my travel--flights to DC, hotels, and databases to track the corrupt. The establishment wants me to be broke and silent, but I answer to you, not them. [**Your donations keep me free to fight.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znqdm9jnniues056ivlihlo31oq3dqivj6nlddjo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1ge2ob4cdh2bs)

[**Please chip in $25, $50, or $100 today to help me continue exposing the vetting crisis in DC.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5she88ibfb1216tthv0qgqsbr0ac4i9ucefi3u8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1ge2ob4cdh2bs)

Thank you so much for all that you do.

With Vigilance,

Laura Loomer

name: Fisico via 1600 Daily
subject: Control - Can't Sleep? Do This 20 Minutes Before Bed
body:
Finally, fix your sleep

Tell me if this sounds familiar...

It's 2am and you're still staring at the ceiling...

You just can't seem to shut your brain off...

Your mind races a million miles an hour...

Maybe you can't stop thinking about money issues, health problems, or even something embarrassing you did or said...

Then, perhaps you finally DO fall asleep...

...only to jerk awake at 4am, knowing the next day you're going to feel tired, worn-out, and like a brain-dead zombie.

Does any of that ring a bell?

Well, just months ago... that was me...

I never slept more than 4 hours...

I felt exhausted, groggy, and dog-tired all the next day, downing pots of coffee to get through work...

And I turn into a cranky "you-know-what" when I don't catch my zzz's... so I was getting into all of these stupid little arguments with my wife.

I had to do something... or I would spend the rest of my nights on the couch.

And that's when I stumbled on a discovery from leading MIT sleep researchers... and it changed everything.

You see, this discovery led to my research team and I developing a technique we call the "sleep signal reset."

Just [do this 20 minutes before you hop into bed...](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdb6r5ukm831lj94douhpd8u8mdfedluq9o6brno_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1ge2ob2c1h2bs)

And you'll gently activate your body's "go-to-sleep" hormones...

So you fall asleep faster than a baby riding in a car...

Sleep through the ENTIRE night...

...and wake up fully rested and chipper, ready to take on the day.

Best of all, it literally takes less than a minute...

It requires no dangerous drugs, meditation, valerian root, blackout shades, blue-blocking sunglasses, or any other weird stuff...

Just [do this about 20 minutes before bedtime](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztce0iha16i02d2n78r3179ul9eu2g2dok78auro_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1ge2ob2c1h2bs) and you'll get the peaceful, restorative sleep you deserve.

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqsggh0il7dr8phiqo9r61qpp71q1fhlau033ino_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1ge2ob2c1h2bs)

==> [**Can't Sleep? Do This 20 Minutes Before Bed...)**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zcan7qcd5a2gj7f5v5po9g8c87c4ir0bf4qdau20_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1ge2ob2c1h2bs)

And I turn into a cranky "you-know-what" when I don't catch my zzz's... so I was getting into all of these stupid little arguments with my wife. I had to do something... or I would spend the rest of my nights on the couch. And that's when I stumbled on a discovery from leading MIT sleep researchers... and it changed everything. You see, this discovery led to my research team and I developing a technique we call the "sleep signal reset." Just And you'll gently activate your body's "go-to-sleep" hormones... So you fall asleep faster than a baby riding in a car... Sleep through the ENTIRE night... ...and wake up fully rested and chipper, ready to take on the day. Best of all, it literally takes less than a minute... It requires no dangerous drugs, meditation, valerian root, blackout shades, blue-blocking sunglasses, or any other weird stuff... Just and you'll get the peaceful, restorative sleep you deserve. ==> Fisico Inc. 2303 Ranch Road 620 South Suite 160 #307 Austin, TX 78734 Pop Acta Media | 1600 Daily PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Victor Riches
subject: They told her daughter to lie. We can’t let them get away with it.
body:
What she discovered was SHOCKING!

|
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z92g12vh6h5t2gvi8k9i5qu2bq5ineq4gi0namg8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1ge6oj4clh2bs)
Friend,

When Amber Lavigne discovered a chest binder in her daughter’s bedroom, she did what any loving mother would do: She asked questions.
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z7hcjrqm6cppgajrnosrae588qq35dd6ev8aaplg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1ge6oj4clh2bs)
What she discovered was SHOCKING!

Public school officials in Maine **secretly provided her 13-year-old daughter with the chest binder** and encouraged her to _"socially transition”_ her gender, without Amber's knowledge or consent.

Even worse, a school counselor encouraged her daughter to _hide all of it from her mother_.

They didn’t treat Amber like a parent. They treated her like the enemy.

**That's why Amber turned to the Goldwater Institute.**

I am Victor Riches, President and CEO of the Goldwater Institute, the nation’s leading liberty organization. Our American Freedom Network of pro bono attorneys provides legal support to protect the constitutional rights of parents like Amber Lavigne.

We filed a lawsuit on Amber's behalf against the school district for violating her constitutional rights.

We need to make sure this never happens again.

But we can’t do it alone.

[We need your help to defend the rights of parents like Amber across the country.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zreb3ap61in61po5b45ivs5g28t020i274dmcr38_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1ge6oj4clh2bs)

Will you stand with us today?
[Stand With Parents](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zt0kc4b0vbu9236qj8h4m2hn340sinr9b48uebp0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1ge6oj4clh2bs)
Amber’s story is not an isolated one.

School districts nationwide have decided they — not the parents — should have the final say over children’s lives.

It's disturbing, it's unethical, it's wrong... and yes, it's _unconstitutional_.

For more than three decades, the Goldwater Institute has led the fight to protect liberty, including the rights of parents to raise and care for their children.

Now, we're leading the legal battle to protect parental rights and promote academic transparency in public education.

[Please pitch in a tax-deductible donation of $10, $35, or even $100 to help us fight for parental rights in every state >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zfp99jjk66mdhr7m78v6m60e3oo84t36khb2lqs8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1ge6oj4clh2bs)
[Donate $10](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0qc0i11eflbtvsa1vsb478sdu107261fckgafbg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1ge6oj4clh2bs)

[Donate $35](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zqotthfe69khf1pcruekiu4q4dgarm7de8342lg8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1ge6oj4clh2bs)

[Donate $50](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2za5t1at4lp32i2nb1vnq25l640bjj20066d94bdo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1ge6oj4clh2bs)

[Donate $100](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zs0vucenbg1pcoqovlsvfcvngghpt9efnvjha800_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1ge6oj4clh2bs)

[Donate $250](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zas6muuvmr1qeqtlaijvgfg8571me2eqqfan5qdo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1ge6oj4clh2bs)

[Donate $1,000](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z8g122f8in8l5kqqu990629qpennerl0rca4bkuo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1ge6oj4clh2bs)

[Donate Any Other Amount](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zcvr8cmr2pdt6mfcijnksb0kd24a7va72m0de46g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1ge6oj4clh2bs)
Amber's case has sparked national outrage – and earned her national support – from parents, legal experts, advocacy groups, and even attorneys general from multiple states.

But there are still school boards across the U.S. that have decided they know better than parents what’s best for kids, and they are cutting families out of the equation.

[Winning in court takes serious resources.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zk7n4mrmb11aef5rmtu8r332473n1tjpoh5ri3po_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1ge6oj4clh2bs)

That's where we need your help.

Your support powers this fight.

[Please help us fight for the rights of parents with a tax-deductible donation right away >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zrplhq7u0knd32l88ulaq3egm2anpsva7tklpbe8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1ge6oj4clh2bs)
[Donate](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zupddtt29u52ml1g5s6l41lhqr1fmirfdfcc2hqg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1ge6oj4clh2bs)
Thank you for standing with us in defense of parental rights.

Victor Riches
President & CEO
Goldwater Institute

_The Goldwater Institute is recognized by the Internal Revenue Service as a 501(c)(3) organization. Our federal identification number is 86-0597661._

name: Team Youngkin
subject: Honoring Our Heroes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by **Spirit of Virginia**
body:
---
| | | | | | View this email as a webpage [here.](https://view.go.spiritofvirginia.org/?qs=3378b950ff214462faf27682e8036f302e48bb5f3343db5004f00da68e87dab752e6677055b939474337eb14aa0cf4a6311f160858c93147e8518b71708546595b2fa1c82a42c31093be13221be8f24e)
---
| | | [ ](https://click.go.spiritofvirginia.org/?qs=99555f149a80e97514a1c12127bf497bd62e8c5ea021ffe47cb4f0aa656f90009bc3040c944b7b2215dcbf8a41deb6ae5cb37cfaf5e91274)
---
| |
---
| This Memorial Day Weekend, Governor Glenn Youngkin and First Lady Suzanne S. Youngkin join all Virginians and Americans in reflecting on the unforgettable sacrifices of the brave men and women who paid the ultimate price to secure the freedoms we enjoy as Americans.

Please take time this weekend to pause and remember the great Americans willing to lay down their lives to defend the liberties and way of life we hold dear. We pray for the families, friends, and loved ones of those who sacrificed everything for us, and we will Never Forget their service.
---
| |
---
| | [ ](https://click.go.spiritofvirginia.org/?qs=65c0fbbd627323916c5e97b703a4dee95c88ac13790ee90f4c17d86d3100a01f8bf6b8d25904b88520a1b5444f5f30db12f5561d19861420)
---
|
Governor Youngkin this week announced Iridium Communications Inc., a global satellite communications company, will invest over $13 million to expand their headquarters into a 55,000-square-foot space in Fairfax County. The project will support 117 new associates, expanding its Virginia workforce to nearly 400 in the coming years.

"Iridium's decision to expand its headquarters and create 117 new high-quality jobs in Virginia is a clear signal that the Commonwealth remains the destination of choice for global technology companies," said Governor Glenn Youngkin. "The proximity and access to top-tier talent, world-class infrastructure and federal partners offers a strategic advantage to companies like Iridium that are redefining innovation and connectivity. We are proud to support Iridium's growth in Virginia."

---
| | [READ MORE](https://click.go.spiritofvirginia.org/?qs=323a5739c296174bf6c3171ee7cbf8d64c54632a79065973f11db33a46ac37fdce774ea9074600acc1ed402cfe98f3165aa23408c18d7df7)
---
| |
---
|
Governor Youngkin recently launched the Safe Kids, Strong Families initiative, a bold effort to unify and advance Virginia's child welfare reforms. The initiative will fund a $1 million study to address systemic challenges such as child safety, permanency, workforce shortages, and reducing congregate care, as well as ensuring a clear roadmap for future reforms.

"The most amazing gift we have here in the Commonwealth are our children, because they are the ones who are going to build our future and realize our collective aspirations," said Governor Youngkin in launching the initiative. "We launched our Safe Kids, Strong Families initiative to build on the progress our Administration has achieved over the last three years on child welfare and to make sure every child in Virginia has the love and support they need to fulfill their God-given destiny. Thank you to Secretary Kelly and every hero who has stepped up to serve our collective mission-that every child in Virginia is safe and part of a strong family."

---
| | [READ MORE](https://click.go.spiritofvirginia.org/?qs=a8afe21c2597fc9ca6a27360dc526ce0cfd71343910bf39b3067c256efa635fe52929ef42370f24ff655b356536766d2ee1d37d8a786aa51)
---
| |
---
| |
---
| This Memorial Day and during Military Appreciation Month, we pause to honor those who gave their lives defending freedom in service to our nation. We also express our gratitude for the brave men and women who wear--and have worn--the uniform with courage and commitment.

Acknowledging the more than 110,000 female veterans living in the Commonwealth, First Lady Suzanne S. Youngkin, Governor Glenn Youngkin, Lieutenant Governor Winsome Earle-Sears, and Secretary of Veterans and Defense Affairs Craig Crenshaw gathered at the Executive Mansion for a special appreciation breakfast with women military leaders from across Virginia. These extraordinary women shared their stories and spoke about the unique needs of females who serve.

As we remember the fallen this Memorial Day, let us also recognize the continued sacrifice of many--and especially the trailblazing women shaping our Commonwealth and our country.
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Combating antisemitism in Virginia has been a top priority for Governor Youngkin since Day One. This week, Governor Youngkin doubled down on that commitment by signing Executive Order 48 to strengthen Virginia's efforts to combat antisemitism and anti-religious bigotry in our schools and universities.

"No one should be unsafe in the classroom or on campus or feel targeted because of their religion or heritage. This Executive Order reaffirms and strengthens the Commonwealth's commitment to safe educational environments free from discrimination and continues our actions against antisemitism and anti-religious bigotry in public schools and institutions of higher education," said Governor Youngkin. "On Day One, I signed Executive Order 8 establishing the Commission to Combat Antisemitism. We have made tremendous strides implementing their recommendations, but our work is far from done."

Glenn Youngkin has been a leader among America's governors in taking concrete action to combat antisemitism. You can read more about his administration's efforts on this critical issue at the link below.
---
| | [READ MORE](https://click.go.spiritofvirginia.org/?qs=7be20e8e3fc060d09c35334575a57adb24cd5c3a040cb76fae3a57197e41ffc7f4514458845d9df6143ea69af0e6d67b0c2104ac324bb14d)
---
| |
---
| _Governor Youngkin signs legislation into law in 2023 to formally adopt the International Holocaust Remembrance Alliance Working Definition of Antisemitism. This definition is used as a tool and guide to identify instances of antisemitism and train first responders, educators, and other public servants how to respond to antisemitism and prevent hate crimes from happening. _
---
| [ ](https://click.go.spiritofvirginia.org/?qs=17f7796762197013f80ef7354c77c28d578227d28e45547ece788039498d7e512773c3bd65966e0adeae9d26884932a6cad86e364327fa2d)
---
|
Originally from Seoul, South Korea, Grace Paik Caldwell spent her early years as the daughter of missionaries. In 2008, she moved to the United States to attend Lynchburg's Liberty University and has been making #homehistory with art of serenity and natural landscapes.

On display at the Executive Mansion in honor of Asian American and Pacific Islander (AAPI) Heritage Month, Grace's painting "Weathered" pays homage to the quiet presence of a timeworn Virginia barn. The First Lady and Governor were honored to meet Grace and her husband at the recent AAPI reception.

---
| |
---
| |
---
| | |
---
**Stay up to date with Governor Youngkin!**
---
| | | [ ](https://click.go.spiritofvirginia.org/?qs=e3c32a089536f9e7e9aaf27550c0ee1b062635c77193e9cef858bad250b8f924440991a1e972ce82c719bd46dbfc53b58f8257c69af23f58)
---
[](https://click.go.spiritofvirginia.org/?qs=a364d286db71701758e417454c5c5569db34be26c5f900bdd141bfd160de599d7b05342f1196b74c53cf87c03ae4b6981e73a55ce9afeb64)
---
[](https://click.go.spiritofvirginia.org/?qs=7f83bc37ed237606a50d6d9688a2f87b893d1b197703e4cef66760247623bb7fdb4c2440df3412ad42c4b4430df55572cd09cbe0d9c46f88)
---
**Stay up to date with The First Lady!**
---
| | | [ ](https://click.go.spiritofvirginia.org/?qs=c205bc19245b6838d474ec068c8d1681adf8a08873bc5aaedc5c784d443ef9e8c2f2e5c0bd787bf2078a8f87e0c85f329391d5200472cef5)
---
[](https://click.go.spiritofvirginia.org/?qs=c5bda3df67dcda7444b2b00be3a19d417181566dd9829fd7dbea2d3678fc390265356382d7cf168e9dc354a416081d82f2ade9e12ff2e9fb)
---
| Promises Made, Promises Kept
---

P.O. Box 3950 Merrifield, Virginia 22116 US

You can [update your preferences](https://click.go.spiritofvirginia.org/profile_center.aspx?qs=444fe962af95cd8defcd1c16745475a10239716538025693e9d2416d57a254f5e20ecbf821ad79608ef232289d0a5f84f2a4dd4fb710b31d9ef3c5bc3b3fbf50e2b9457dbf90d740) or [unsubscribe from this list.](https://click.go.spiritofvirginia.org/unsub_center.aspx?qs=444fe962af95cd8dea966cf1bcd89f7f124a7b30487b9e6fe821dc5ab780152da0e725e69bb6a5d0c92fbe57ca4fc532dee0508530c78b6ff28d137353f7e6733d286a67bb289dd5)

name: House GOP Watchdogs
subject: The biggest lie in American politics — andit’s still happening.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Now here’s the cold, hard truth: If we lose the House, they’ll get away with it.

|
---
| | | For years, Friend, the Democrats and the Fake News Media told us we were crazy.

They mocked us. Censored us. Laughed when we raised concerns about Joe Biden's declining condition.

_**But they knew.

They ALL knew.

name: Scalise, Steve
subject: This isn’t a typical political email.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I know you’ve heard from me dozens of times at this point

Hey, it's Steve Scalise.

I know you've heard from me dozens of times at this point. But let me assure you - this isn't your typical political email.

_I 've talked to thousands of Conservatives from across the country and the vast majority of folks **1)** are very concerned about the Fake News Media coverage of President Trump, **2)** want to make the historic Trump Tax Cuts permanent, and **3)** strongly support deporting criminal illegal immigrants ASAP. _

**Those issues are at the top of my list too, but I was blown away by how many people had more to say. **

That's why I'm launching my _**[Pulse of America Check-In](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z1c68u9lrgdt0h797143fk76lbmoja29aiocutfo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1ge1o36c5h2bs)**_ - the FIRST of its kind - to understand where the American People are on the most important issues facing the nation.

If you're receiving this email, I want to hear from you. I'm only reaching out to my closest grassroots advisors and - _based on your previous survey responses and feedback_ - I want you included in my final results.**_JUST RELEASED_****PULSE OF AMERICA CHECK-IN****
****Contact:** [dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z90if9jno7oeeuco0u2f2at3q9vri1egd68eu2pg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1ge1o36c5h2bs)**Response:** INCOMPLETE**Deadline :** 9:00 AM Tomorrow[BEGIN IT HERE ->
](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zd577q66jpjk05q7mhbjno1gl4cp0kioj8mu84s0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1ge1o36c5h2bs)I value your opinion.

My team and I will review your feedback tomorrow morning. What you say will determine the direction of our House Majority. With President Trump counting on us to pass his agenda, we NEED to be on the same page.

**Consider this your direct line of communication with me.**

I make my best decisions when I know what my best supporters think. Can I tell my team to look out for your response tonight?

_**[](http://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zlbrgiou98j3sq4ea73te6bgnj86jilthfjis54g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1ge1o36c5h2bs "Please click any of these secure links to access your survey")**_[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z6jhfj4hgj5e5l3n3jb92mtue9nf96o1qhbr8d30_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1ge1o36c5h2bs)[Please click any of these secure links to access your survey](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zco7l9auiftrrf70frhtpfqkvg12s4tdt5l5ihs0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1ge1o36c5h2bs)
Thank you and God bless,

Steve Scalise
* * *
\- Democrat Leadership formed an _anti-Trump task force_ \- More than a dozen Attorneys General are _suing_ the Trump Administration\- A House Democrat just introduced _7 Articles of Impeachment_[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zb5p865he5s3jfd80kigrpk47jgebkhcjfpruo0g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1ge1o36c5h2bs) If they manage to strip us of our House Majority, they'll have the power to impeach, investigate, and bring his entire legislative agenda to a SCREECHING HALT!
**We're PLEADING WITH YOU to do your part to help SAVE our Pro-Trump House Majority:**[ DO YOUR PART: PITCH IN NOW
](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zds7593u7hvrmg4o80npdkfjhnuagi6j934hosk8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1ge1o36c5h2bs)| | |

name: Fisico via Your America News
subject: Control - Can't Sleep? Do This 20 Minutes Before Bed
body:
Finally, fix your sleep

Tell me if this sounds familiar...

It's 2am and you're still staring at the ceiling...

You just can't seem to shut your brain off...

Your mind races a million miles an hour...

Maybe you can't stop thinking about money issues, health problems, or even something embarrassing you did or said...

Then, perhaps you finally DO fall asleep...

...only to jerk awake at 4am, knowing the next day you're going to feel tired, worn-out, and like a brain-dead zombie.

Does any of that ring a bell?

Well, just months ago... that was me...

I never slept more than 4 hours...

I felt exhausted, groggy, and dog-tired all the next day, downing pots of coffee to get through work...

And I turn into a cranky "you-know-what" when I don't catch my zzz's... so I was getting into all of these stupid little arguments with my wife.

I had to do something... or I would spend the rest of my nights on the couch.

And that's when I stumbled on a discovery from leading MIT sleep researchers... and it changed everything.

You see, this discovery led to my research team and I developing a technique we call the "sleep signal reset."

Just [do this 20 minutes before you hop into bed...](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zva24psb0u88ku2246i3sfcdjrg2vnp1rcq3sde8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1ge9o71c9h2bs)

And you'll gently activate your body's "go-to-sleep" hormones...

So you fall asleep faster than a baby riding in a car...

Sleep through the ENTIRE night...

...and wake up fully rested and chipper, ready to take on the day.

Best of all, it literally takes less than a minute...

It requires no dangerous drugs, meditation, valerian root, blackout shades, blue-blocking sunglasses, or any other weird stuff...

Just [do this about 20 minutes before bedtime](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zm0ft4h5gvttms8vt3fbnqo034kngia1tu2hpd00_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1ge9o71c9h2bs) and you'll get the peaceful, restorative sleep you deserve.

[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zfho2rk1ifdmfgb5sfuiksfvrb2v7q43hdormi70_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1ge9o71c9h2bs)

==> [**Can't Sleep? Do This 20 Minutes Before Bed...)**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z413r2ovdfiq3iontv9799b3vt6g9l166t566618_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s1ge9o71c9h2bs)

name: Prudent Politics

| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[ ](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Q-naKrzrjjBUqVKv-m_HQg~~/AARclBA~/OsZupkiXYjGvBBKhM0SWuoYsb-ZbuKT4iMgTSWIMvxAgKigB9GFzH5eSUq4ohsED0EpV4M6pYr4fBhV0N0Ah9A2rTtgxO_y7k_ZQgJSe-YAZ-TJJgSwP6opoVkvy1vwXbPRIMdvXjbzRuKM4HpJr1ARxUSSnDlRHpTRdFycjLmv5MzhOeE0VWY8JcZqmYpYErhVzEqlAi7sCBff4BpzQsjR7BUAEN28UgZEntrt5OFxI4C09YjetCtHzWqFyGF5ZjztPVlAvW_6cxO0woVX0vCTk1fi0BlLOEe8LA5UC09ujiAR_coW_plctBWSRPgoV6NgvNzj8MZhSIFR6S7uowtCYZy_sMuYc4FAtoFcvUQTXJc6uTq99KmD_nmUWRLYFsxqLC3bAuFuskH35gvXryQ~~)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's [hear.com's](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Q-naKrzrjjBUqVKv-m_HQg~~/AARclBA~/OsZupkiXYjGvBBKhM0SWuoYsb-ZbuKT4iMgTSWIMvxAgKigB9GFzH5eSUq4ohsED0EpV4M6pYr4fBhV0N0Ah9A2rTtgxO_y7k_ZQgJSe-YAZ-TJJgSwP6opoVkvy1vwXbPRIMdvXjbzRuKM4HpJr1ARxUSSnDlRHpTRdFycjLmv5MzhOeE0VWY8JcZqmYpYErhVzEqlAi7sCBff4BpzQsjR7BUAEN28UgZEntrt5OFxI4C09YjetCtHzWqFyGF5ZjztPVlAvW_6cxO0woVX0vCTk1fi0BlLOEe8LA5UC09ujiAR_coW_plctBWSRPgoV6NgvNzj8MZhSIFR6S7uowtCYZy_sMuYc4FAtoFcvUQTXJc6uTq99KmD_nmUWRLYFsxqLC3bAuFuskH35gvXryQ~~) **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **[hear.com's](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Q-naKrzrjjBUqVKv-m_HQg~~/AARclBA~/OsZupkiXYjGvBBKhM0SWuoYsb-ZbuKT4iMgTSWIMvxAgKigB9GFzH5eSUq4ohsED0EpV4M6pYr4fBhV0N0Ah9A2rTtgxO_y7k_ZQgJSe-YAZ-TJJgSwP6opoVkvy1vwXbPRIMdvXjbzRuKM4HpJr1ARxUSSnDlRHpTRdFycjLmv5MzhOeE0VWY8JcZqmYpYErhVzEqlAi7sCBff4BpzQsjR7BUAEN28UgZEntrt5OFxI4C09YjetCtHzWqFyGF5ZjztPVlAvW_6cxO0woVX0vCTk1fi0BlLOEe8LA5UC09ujiAR_coW_plctBWSRPgoV6NgvNzj8MZhSIFR6S7uowtCYZy_sMuYc4FAtoFcvUQTXJc6uTq99KmD_nmUWRLYFsxqLC3bAuFuskH35gvXryQ~~) IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.

What makes [hear.com's](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Q-naKrzrjjBUqVKv-m_HQg~~/AARclBA~/OsZupkiXYjGvBBKhM0SWuoYsb-ZbuKT4iMgTSWIMvxAgKigB9GFzH5eSUq4ohsED0EpV4M6pYr4fBhV0N0Ah9A2rTtgxO_y7k_ZQgJSe-YAZ-TJJgSwP6opoVkvy1vwXbPRIMdvXjbzRuKM4HpJr1ARxUSSnDlRHpTRdFycjLmv5MzhOeE0VWY8JcZqmYpYErhVzEqlAi7sCBff4BpzQsjR7BUAEN28UgZEntrt5OFxI4C09YjetCtHzWqFyGF5ZjztPVlAvW_6cxO0woVX0vCTk1fi0BlLOEe8LA5UC09ujiAR_coW_plctBWSRPgoV6NgvNzj8MZhSIFR6S7uowtCYZy_sMuYc4FAtoFcvUQTXJc6uTq99KmD_nmUWRLYFsxqLC3bAuFuskH35gvXryQ~~) IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that [hear.com's](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Q-naKrzrjjBUqVKv-m_HQg~~/AARclBA~/OsZupkiXYjGvBBKhM0SWuoYsb-ZbuKT4iMgTSWIMvxAgKigB9GFzH5eSUq4ohsED0EpV4M6pYr4fBhV0N0Ah9A2rTtgxO_y7k_ZQgJSe-YAZ-TJJgSwP6opoVkvy1vwXbPRIMdvXjbzRuKM4HpJr1ARxUSSnDlRHpTRdFycjLmv5MzhOeE0VWY8JcZqmYpYErhVzEqlAi7sCBff4BpzQsjR7BUAEN28UgZEntrt5OFxI4C09YjetCtHzWqFyGF5ZjztPVlAvW_6cxO0woVX0vCTk1fi0BlLOEe8LA5UC09ujiAR_coW_plctBWSRPgoV6NgvNzj8MZhSIFR6S7uowtCYZy_sMuYc4FAtoFcvUQTXJc6uTq99KmD_nmUWRLYFsxqLC3bAuFuskH35gvXryQ~~) IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains [hear.com's](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Q-naKrzrjjBUqVKv-m_HQg~~/AARclBA~/OsZupkiXYjGvBBKhM0SWuoYsb-ZbuKT4iMgTSWIMvxAgKigB9GFzH5eSUq4ohsED0EpV4M6pYr4fBhV0N0Ah9A2rTtgxO_y7k_ZQgJSe-YAZ-TJJgSwP6opoVkvy1vwXbPRIMdvXjbzRuKM4HpJr1ARxUSSnDlRHpTRdFycjLmv5MzhOeE0VWY8JcZqmYpYErhVzEqlAi7sCBff4BpzQsjR7BUAEN28UgZEntrt5OFxI4C09YjetCtHzWqFyGF5ZjztPVlAvW_6cxO0woVX0vCTk1fi0BlLOEe8LA5UC09ujiAR_coW_plctBWSRPgoV6NgvNzj8MZhSIFR6S7uowtCYZy_sMuYc4FAtoFcvUQTXJc6uTq99KmD_nmUWRLYFsxqLC3bAuFuskH35gvXryQ~~) founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

**Editor's Note:** Yesterday’s _Flyover_ incorrectly referred to President Trump as “former President Trump.” We apologize profusely for the error—that kind of careless mistake has no place in _The Flyover._

To prevent it from happening again, we drilled into our process to see where it was coming from. We found that the error was generated by an AI engine we use in our preliminary research that wasn’t caught, as it should have been, by our editing team before publication. We’ve taken measures to prevent this from happening in the future and apologize again for the error. _— Cole, CEO_ **Today in History** : On this day in 1883, after 14 years of construction, [the Brooklyn Bridge opened](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1upDAUxfGnMZ2RuRjMFC62oZttt0T-uIa7MRjZziDePpoob5D6J50j_f89l6ehSMf61-yoa0jLgVeJWCvmxSKGM5PDUpLJn6VUxLhjXhcQMHAxcJCLNxTvRTZeB0TAvkHdKTmJqRvU0Gz6EbxEBwKVCwEn5Xo7gRrtYzIWcPQN6feaGEB2ooOhb3t06LxTzvbKPXBkUqCnmnL7P9FRNwzxTi_MrUt7E_VW61lY_4fBzGC-rqvdqNSU77czmOtGhXtzczr4jzCYd3NzkAxmm1P6iPfBbSa_Ik8nHqXJ2p8XxUhlVEyKdTcUv__qryK9NHwFAAD__5fufis), connecting New York City and Brooklyn. The largest suspension bridge at the time, its dedication attracted thousands of onlookers, led by President Chester A. Arthur and Governor Grover Cleveland.

## Trump Sets Tariffs for EU, Apple
President Trump called for [50% tariffs on the European Union](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DuOrDAUBNDVmMzI-AP9AgcvIetJJ0Tm-hrc8gfZplHvfsRsYZJKSjoq1fdzeRoffNq-TETdXF4SXjVga1iWFdEdxQPWmk05a22IIWLZFs64okxRLhdrfPgssrPaIXIUHephkg_2GNSkul07NSgHK-JoRzatYgUYLEjjQDzkiK7z-taY4nJgA1eiFwgIFiZYxQT_cCSSofUtl_6VfWo7uvDJbyw95NgFvbd2VCL-Ez4TPl_X1UNa4S4Jn2-a8JndwQXhcytnPGhByDFispUqdmABTI02U7xzNCeKZ8kHmkTP5HOitZnSfNro60xIh35vMXRF2-PyIfg6TkSyLRoffhe1P9341vwnAAD__x8kiPA) on Friday, while also warning of a tariff of at least 25% on Apple if the company doesn’t start making iPhones in the U.S. The new EU tariffs would start on June 1, and Trump said he wasn’t looking to make a deal with the EU in the next nine days. _“We’ve set the deal,”_ he said. _“It’s at 50%.”_ Earlier in the day, Trump warned Apple that it would be [hit by a 25% tariff](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLtutDAUhJ8GOiNfMJfCxd_Q7d-mRMY-wEmMjeyzi_btI1KlTzfSJ41mvo_H_LAYMG7_7QGG1jRHuEoAIsjzArCeGR2Ukmx-lkIA4YC8zZJLzbhmsp29xfCe29qbFUCCqsGIvh34IHSv691I0YlVcM_H0S9KOevV6AQI3alW28HVaO42rmUruJBaNQocOO96t6jejdBVLQePlHLzmTDSDmt4pxfkxqWjDmYnOkul_lVyquR0XVcTF3e_uHklp-VZMEIpvyK7cSUnys_jZLRnsASxMKkZ2Yzryux5BmAxEStkM7HDfmHcGJ57ilCYPSCjsyy7aCUfej7W2fjzwhCwdH3V8u2wGH4W0p-0voz8DgAA__8cBI92) if it didn’t bring iPhone manufacturing back to the U.S., along with other tech companies, such as Samsung, that sell products in the U.S. that are made overseas. Apple shares fell 3% on the news.
## Beef Prices Hit Record High for Summer
Americans are heading into their Memorial Day cookouts with the average cost of ground beef [hitting a record-breaking high price](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DFutDAQBeDTmM7IGIzZwsXf0O3fpkQwHsCJwcgzLNrbRyRHSDfSSE_vex_P4TmGGPbl_7ih4zkNO14UkRnzMCHORw6ARGnMJxEjxg3zMmiljVRG6mbwY4jvoSm8mxE11gW6yjad6ipjTbE6VC36qRoB9KOtbWus6RoLj3YGjZXuiuDuNGV0U6lKm7qsERA8WJhqCw9sRaPQB065_Exh5xXn-E4vzCWkrYhuZT5I1P-E7oXur-sqYaJbcf-F7u9T6P6UJG-Q_BXJjJCyl2tYVpIwMkeUYfcncX5L4nwuS0SSnOQX4iEhEZP06dqF7ovs_HGFGAO1VjRq2cYQf-rwnzZ8Of0dAAD__-kRiTI) of $5.80 a pound in April, up nearly 50% from five years ago. Economists say they expect beef prices will climb further with increased demand through the summer grilling season. At nearly $6 a pound, the price has risen 14% since last year, after farmers [slashed their cattle herds](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGu4yAQBdCvwR0WDCY4BcU27rLtlhYZD_GswETAJsrfr_zeJ7x-NPee--e23gInPh6_QybfY1kPerdEvVNd70TxWRmptRLqv9Y6UcpUHysosFJZCdO6BU6fdRo2H4mAzEBeu2lWs7bODruPqIIm5ZQ2iPMcNQacyQQNV3eFux3Yn9-UhUkrDdaMhpBwQ4d34_BKFzEp2riXOv4tfPSdYvqUF9URSx6S33t_NmF-CVgELJGPcCCNn7CXcl4IWE6SgKUSlrrJUyW_WbIGbiQz5VI5JHkWBwBrx73nNFS_Pd-cEreLE5N65MDpK7T_aKmXh_8BAAD__-YxfhQ) to a 74-year low due to drought and disease. One Texas rancher said that a year ago, he could buy cattle for about $1,500 per steer. Now, he says, the price has risen to nearly $2,400.
## List: Passengers Rank U.S. Airlines
U.S. airline [passenger satisfaction overall rose](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFugzAYhJ8GNiLb4JgMHrqwpWtH5Jgz_JXByP5JlLevqNQn6Hrf6U76vu7j3VGkbf50KyyHNG54lQhm5PEBhD2TRynJ5aMUBuKKPI9KKN0I3ahunBzF99jVkw2AQlvDStP1opfa6Hqxk5HmEbzQ6J0wwRgtJynDtQOCFwg12XNNaNVJIZVuLy08_OSNf7TG33CtOoGJOOXLd6KNF4T4Tk_ki09rHe3CvJeq_ajUUKmBFywU48kqNWTMR3RMaTtRdlvZU-a_QKub0n3bOMqRNpTGH4XTitwUx1SC82exKUd-4l2poc522l8UI5WrqToxr45-n2r-l7qnVT8BAAD__5h0hhg) six points in 2024, according to a yearlong survey, with travelers citing lower fares and less-crowded planes as key factors. The study, based on responses from 10,224 passengers [who flew major U.S. airlines](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDHOozAUhE8DHcgYDKRwsQ3dv-2W6GEP4UUGIz8nKLdfJXuEbWek0Xzfn5_5hzjwcf9NO2xe43zgkoCckeYFWM_EDiKR0lMkA2FHus9aaVMpU-lu9sThPXeltyug0ZawzdCNamzMYMrNAs6st5tu-rXxMAuNbdMOWvUdEflhLNl-1pTRXaMabdq6hYPzbnBLO7gb-qJT8Jxjqh-Rj7xhDe_4Qqpd3Mtgt5xPKdpfhZ4KPV3XVT_8Ga9_faGn5Sl8QKTQ05kgUiUEkOATfDmOmPJW0Y7EjiriFPhAJZRZVnKZ41FJfvp3maw_Lw6BpR-KTt134vA9kf_L3MvqvwEAAP__1JmFuw) from March 2024 to March 2025, surveyed pre- and post-flight experiences across all cabin classes. JetBlue Airways ranked highest among premium airlines, Delta led in premium economy, and Southwest Airlines was the top choice for economy and basic economy class passengers. [You can see all the rankings here.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFugzAYhJ8GNiLb4JgMHrqwpWtH5Jgz_JXByP5JlLevqNQn6Hrf6U76vu7j3VGkbf50KyyHNG54lQhm5PEBhD2TRynJ5aMUBuKKPI9KKN0I3ahunBzF99jVkw2AQlvDStP1opfa6Hqxk5HmEbzQ6J0wwRgtJynDtQOCFwg12XNNaNVJIZVuLy08_OSNf7TG33CtOoGJOOXLd6KNF4T4Tk_ki09rHe3CvJeq_ajUUKmBFywU48kqNWTMR3RMaTtRdlvZU-a_QKub0n3bOMqRNpTGH4XTitwUx1SC82exKUd-4l2poc522l8UI5WrqToxr45-n2r-l7qnVT8BAAD__5h0hhg)

**➤ President Trump** approved the merger of U.S. Steel and Nippon Steel on Friday, following a review that overturned former President Biden’s blocking of the deal in January. Trump said it would add $14 billion to the U.S. economy. clean_body: Americans are heading into their Memorial Day cookouts with the average cost of ground beef of $5.80 a pound in April, up nearly 50% from five years ago. | | | | | | Saturday, May 24, 2025 ---|--- Editor's Note: Yesterday’s Flyover incorrectly referred to President Trump as “former President Trump.” We apologize profusely for the error—that kind of careless mistake has no place in The Flyover. To prevent it from happening again, we drilled into our process to see where it was coming from. We found that the error was generated by an AI engine we use in our preliminary research that wasn’t caught, as it should have been, by our editing team before publication. We’ve taken measures to prevent this from happening in the future and apologize again for the error. — Cole, CEO Today in History : On this day in 1883, after 14 years of construction, , connecting New York City and Brooklyn. The largest suspension bridge at the time, its dedication attracted thousands of onlookers, led by President Chester A. Arthur and Governor Grover Cleveland. We may have found the world's heaviest sleeper. A Norwegian man reportedly snoozed through a massive container ship crashing into his garden. . ** We're sponsored today by, a leading American cardiologist and surgeon offering health advice to The Flyover readers in today's edition. Don’t feel like reading the national edition of The Flyover? Tune in to The Flyover Podcast! New episodes drop daily—watch on YouTube or listen on Spotify and Apple Podcasts, all in under 15 minutes. | | Trump Sets Tariffs for EU, Apple President Trump called for on Friday, while also warning of a tariff of at least 25% on Apple if the company doesn’t start making iPhones in the U.S. The new EU tariffs would start on June 1, and Trump said he wasn’t looking to make a deal with the EU in the next nine days. “We’ve set the deal,” he said. “It’s at 50%.” Earlier in the day, Trump warned Apple that it would be if it didn’t bring iPhone manufacturing back to the U.S., along with other tech companies, such as Samsung, that sell products in the U.S. that are made overseas. Apple shares fell 3% on the news. Beef Prices Hit Record High for Summer Americans are heading into their Memorial Day cookouts with the average cost of ground beef of $5.80 a pound in April, up nearly 50% from five years ago. Economists say they expect beef prices will climb further with increased demand through the summer grilling season. At nearly $6 a pound, the price has risen 14% since last year, after farmers to a 74-year low due to drought and disease. One Texas rancher said that a year ago, he could buy cattle for about $1,500 per steer. Now, he says, the price has risen to nearly $2,400. List: Passengers Rank U.S. Airlines U.S. airline six points in 2024, according to a yearlong survey, with travelers citing lower fares and less-crowded planes as key factors. The study, based on responses from 10,224 passengers from March 2024 to March 2025, surveyed pre- and post-flight experiences across all cabin classes. JetBlue Airways ranked highest among premium airlines, Delta led in premium economy, and Southwest Airlines was the top choice for economy and basic economy class passengers. | ➤ President Trump approved the merger of U.S. Steel and Nippon Steel on Friday, following a review that overturned former President Biden’s blocking of the deal in January. # Saturday, May 24, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1910, golfer [Jimmy Demaret](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1u6zAMxfGnkbcYFCXHyqDhAhceCqRrR4G1mJioHBsykY-3L9w-Qsf_8jvA-TinM0mR2_WdZo76vCzpxo-tsCrXpEzjxHViypsu20ojKz9p04SA3QG6A_qUScor-SbHT8gn23C0vQ8QfOdsM0UgsHzCTA6tdz743rMDZuwt5eC4kbhj0KG3FhBC2532DBCOo4NgwXjgLLrUVqff_Ut5LXeu7bjMTYmT6roZ98_gYHDgW_uQL1k5C7VLvRoc9jY4vMk8v9J_nqmyNjXm9SGlyHbsjYfrTFJ-QP3bDfeI3wEAAP__QbFwiQ) was born in Houston. ## TX Legislature Passes Abortion, Education Bills
The Texas House passed two [abortion-related bills](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkb2u5CAMhZ-GdIyAQBIKim3S3W23jAh4LkgkjsDzc99-xewjbGPJ8udjH_vP1_blc8nn929_gKP3HbcTXq0AEdSNwIcENYGPjbBdPgDB2zfalFCGC8OV3qLP5WfTQ3S7iFYO4OSsF7FoM8ohObsEaeZJGLEHO4E1do76Li3IaZTR2CG7LiaM0lIKJZabsT1dxDKFUSxSMC0gZsJ6o_Rv_r384BPqLeAxFJeIrsbGX0ytTK3tgkD1cRQMvnQvnWJqpXcv4oMS_2hwKPzyDZlaO8XU2tdgahU9KNVbPlzCR4OONk4v5H7HShlPXqF4gsj3XErjlDzxCAeG6qnxHUqGJ_CAJ1UfcyDeb8mREtShuni9cim5TTPT4vvwuXzM0P-94OnU3wAAAP__1PmcnA) on Thursday. One permits abortions when they'd save the life of a mother whose baby doctors deem won’t survive, and the other prohibits local governments from funding organizations that help pay for out-of-state abortions. A pair of [property tax cut](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2yqyAQgJ8GO5wVQUlBcRu73PaWDoFNYC6KA5to3v6MySOccr_db__-XeerjSmuj792QUPHPc8r7jUhEZaZ0LqAJaD1lXLdrEPCw1aaBQjFQXEhZ29jes-y8eYG_tI1aLpRatBS9V0TzChGFBfsbg4GLUcJvfUwSNUreZarJpqzGSghuw4E6FZdzlCDHlwPugMmAX2kXFoK3_n39M4vLK3LS5NMINoq6_8wMTEx7fve_j_seiaZmM5rmJg-Gt9yihTdCbaSNyz05mQP7p5U-T0XHvKCeV-xVF6RPuhrhvysyF-ZkImpKcZve0wp1mFkEh6LjemzDP3uhS8jfgIAAP__PVyGrg) bills also passed the House, raising the homestead exemption to save Texas homeowners an estimated $500 annually and raising it even higher for homeowners 65 and older. The House also gave initial approval to a bill that would [allow prayer](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkb2u2zAMhZ_G3hTQ-rHlwUMXb7drR4OR6FgoExkSE9-8feEU6At0OySBj_hwfn0tX5g4PW4_8U6TfK95edBRmUSoLEIYNiobYayS646BhL6xyqJBOwVOabtETPxebBunK8Sxa2nqBuvBW2e6dpsAezQuDP2qYTW68xF7R84ZM_oQvW_TdMLAadt1oMFf3HiOHnwfDPgOGgsUk-Ryke3v_5Xf-UXlEvK95WkT2WtjfjR6bvR8HMfl9-tJ57HRMxZJganR8-nV6HnPnCSFM35YiumWKqM8C_3bbflZSaVHkoSscN9Lfp2BOR9qL_imovbnlVNQNWw584nT_ajM6ju4glHDAFFZGEaFa7yq3oNZIw5G97YtU9yPxJxqPzQWbndM_HGR_2vgNek_AQAA__8LHZmg) in public schools, requiring school boards to vote on having a designated time of prayer during the school day. Finally, House and Senate reached a joint agreement on the [$8.5 billion school](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOwyAMhp-GbETGhSYdGG7J1ltvjGhwAhIJFbhN-_an9B7hNluy_0_f_3Mdry6muC3fbiXLrzmPG-01ETOVkclNgUog5yvnencTMb1c5REBjQQjUY_exfQedePtDfxFNWRVp3votTmpJlgzzwgd6gsQdQZ0R9qAQ1QKYELnm2iPMDColQKEvjWXY-2hP08n6BUIDeQj59Jy-OPP6Z2fVNopr02ygflexelL4CBw2Pe9nfNLHxrHgcDhGAUOn1cZ8qOSrLQ5JlkOQemWQrTSxrJOIeck58fm47bIW0ypKdbf95hSrOdOaFhWF9OHzP_r62nxNwAA___AeIAZ) funding bill, with $4.2 billion going toward teacher and staff pay increases over the next two years.
## Austin OKs $104 Million for 1-35 Parks Plan
The Austin City Council on Thursday approved an amended plan for the I-35 [Cap and Stitch](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2O3DAMhU8jdxro1-MpVKRxt2lTGlyJHisrS4bEXdu3DzxBkANsR-Ij-D28X2_TG8QU8_MnrOjomMuUcW8JibBOhOAXrAtCaFTaBh4JD2g0KaEsF5YrMwWI6ZxMF9y7CA_ZoZN3M4jBWC27xYmgVS_vUlltvPRhCPqO7w-j7KPXvRJddNczYZWRUigx3OzjWgcx9F6LQQpmBIZIpd5o-euf01m-sN58WbvkFqKtMf2DqZGpcd_328cB-YJMjVRhnqP_P_Gtlt_oqTE1Rq4tx2OD3GLJ_whT4wb1o_HLwV838NkoZu4jndyXz-xj4vCsiI2XzKUwK59L5bVA2OHkmHDF_FJ01YVtjynF1t-ZEc8VYnoFp-_V_eXUnwAAAP__tr6U8w) Project, which ultimately aims to provide parks, trails, and green space built over top of the roadway. The vote approved a [$104 million](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkUGunDAMhk8TdhklJoFkwaIbdq_bLlFIPIPbDEHEMzxuX_GqqgfozvYn2_r0__iYPgJlWh_fwxMH_ryXacWjZmTGfWIMccF9wZAql7qFiIyfofIECqxUVoKZUqB8TqZJw6yS1w0OujdOOWNb3SyDNUmDmQ14tOjmWcXOGwM-Od_C3KWGhuuYsmC0VqDczfqrdcp1sVVOK2EUJuKy33j58_-ez_LG_RbLs8nDwrxV0X4TMAoYj-O4_Xq_8IICxrAzxYwCxstLwLiVTEzxKsOrMq3yGc6yy7AmGctrjZT_oUh8_p3K-2tNtD4kydbKGLavlcrEcZHbXn5iZAEjdF7Oqu9d3_cyGt1J07VaenReJhN662ZAm3SzD2k7KGeqXS-MejwD5S8j_r8c3gP8DgAA___Wb5pH) initial investment in the project, enough for five structures in the area that could eventually support larger community spaces. The council postponed a separate vote on funding the design for the community spaces, with a commitment deadline of November 2026, as Thursday’s approval squeaked in under the May 31 deadline. The measure [passed 8-3](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDmO7CAQhk-DM1qAwUtA8BJn_dIJrTKU24ywQVC93X7k6SNMWPpK__Z1na8QYjhu_2FHS681zQc-a0QiLDMhuA3LhuArpZrBIeELKs1KKMOF4UrPHkJ8z7rxdhF-lA1a2etBDNq0stmsM30LvXdSj93SdUJpWLp1wc70vWmHsQn2FBNGaSmFEsPFjOc5iKFzrRikYFqgD5TKhbaP_xrf6YHl4tLeRLsR5craf0xNTE1uqXCvFI6TMjWddZiaYnIQmZo-jLtAb-7S_XAhcsi5pAdWLoXme4gxpIOvqfDAW8MdZA6H55UCuY3nkr7RUVOsz8_zt3Y90-K2Q4i_gehvMz6s-gkAAP__bYWHkw) with dissenters advocating for saving money for future projects.
## Blue Origin Reveals its Next Flight Crew
[Blue Origin](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSozAMhp8GOmWMYwIpKK6h22uvZGQssGdtzMhKyL79TcgjbCfNN_ok_f--pi8MMWzrX0w0yGvJ00ZHiSRCPAnh7Ik9oSuSy44zCb2wyKSVbkG1oM3kMMSfydRusMrdm5qGpjO96k17bWo_uHnprO2MIXe_9c5cbWc1LVo7uziLtg7DW6ZabZpGadVf2vu77VV_m6-qb1RlFLkgmS_iP_uX-JOfxJc5pzoOXmQv1fVPpcdKj8dxXM5L37TS41kDvfaYGSXkrdLjzuGJQnCyJYbVS6XHhPwNnOdvEkBYMidiwGSxFHSZATcHKTOBjQ-CzGENGzA9CWOBHUuhbSUu70lotPiPHiQ_OJQEER_b7Gse3H6EGEO5dZVRa8IQz0fkd_E_B_0_AAD__xE5n84), the private space company owned by Jeff Bezos, has announced the crew for its upcoming space tourism flight. Included in the crew is [Amy Jorge](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDvO4yAUhVeDOyxetnFBMQ1dpp3S4nEdkIixgIRk9yNnZgd_eXWl75zv_LltNxNTPO6_zQNUe-95O6DXBK1B2RoYF6AEML62XE_joMHb1LYxwiZMJszE5k1Mn00MXlniVzqAoouQRIqJ0yEoy_ki9tXMK52oJVLIWcJql9lYb-wOQ1QXjExMUEoYkeO0XqckcnacSEqQIOBjy2Vs4V_-nj75BWV0-TEkFVo7K-K_ENOI6d77eFjn9369EdOXD2I6ZWcSYvoLwNWFnBP-L4hrfOMTSs0HdgU6tukJOJd4jwf-auNknocLiGkuxUz5ipgeivJnjynFOi9IkPvDxPTt1H625EuxvwEAAP__SIeIJQ), a STEM middle and high school teacher from Galveston who has led more than 60 space and zero-gravity flight experiments with her students. Blue Origin’s most recent space tourism flight showcased a celebrity-studded, all-female crew, which included Katy Perry. The six-person crew will launch from Van Horn, Texas, on a date yet to be announced.

New episodes drop daily—watch on YouTube or listen on Spotify and Apple Podcasts, all in under 15 minutes. | | TX Legislature Passes Abortion, Education Bills The Texas House passed two on Thursday. One permits abortions when they'd save the life of a mother whose baby doctors deem won’t survive, and the other prohibits local governments from funding organizations that help pay for out-of-state abortions. A pair of bills also passed the House, raising the homestead exemption to save Texas homeowners an estimated $500 annually and raising it even higher for homeowners 65 and older. The House also gave initial approval to a bill that would in public schools, requiring school boards to vote on having a designated time of prayer during the school day. Finally, House and Senate reached a joint agreement on the funding bill, with $4.2 billion going toward teacher and staff pay increases over the next two years. Austin OKs $104 Million for 1-35 Parks Plan The Austin City Council on Thursday approved an amended plan for the I-35 Project, which ultimately aims to provide parks, trails, and green space built over top of the roadway. The vote approved a initial investment in the project, enough for five structures in the area that could eventually support larger community spaces. The council postponed a separate vote on funding the design for the community spaces, with a commitment deadline of November 2026, as Thursday’s approval squeaked in under the May 31 deadline. The measure with dissenters advocating for saving money for future projects. Blue Origin Reveals its Next Flight Crew , the private space company owned by Jeff Bezos, has announced the crew for its upcoming space tourism flight. Included in the crew is , a STEM middle and high school teacher from Galveston who has led more than 60 space and zero-gravity flight experiments with her students. Blue Origin’s most recent space tourism flight showcased a celebrity-studded, all-female crew, which included Katy Perry. The six-person crew will launch from Van Horn, Texas, on a date yet to be announced. | Flying together with our sponsor Is your neck drooping, hair dry and flaky or maybe your nails are getting brittle? name: Randy Villegas
subject: The Central Valley raised me.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
Enough is enough, Peter.
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc757164a-2d44-40f3-a5f7-579acee1ed7b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdbe6719b-7395-481e-8495-236cbc8f2bf0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, The Central Valley raised me – and it’s a place like no other. It’s full of fields and families. Of farmworkers and small business owners. Mechanics, teachers, nurses, students. It’s early mornings, hot summers, and long days fueled by hard work and hope. It’s also been overlooked for far too long. Every day, we do the work that keeps this country running, but Congress keeps leaving us behind. While families like yours and mine struggle to make ends meet, my opponent David Valadao is focused on enabling an extreme, MAGA agenda that puts our community last. He’s voted to gut healthcare, restrict reproductive freedom, and is standing silent while Trump’s reckless tariffs jack up prices even more. Enough is enough, Peter. You have my word that in Congress, I’ll fight for the Valley every single day – not for special interests, but for the people who get up early, work hard, and call this place home. But I can’t do it alone. This campaign is powered by regular people, and if we’re going to flip this seat next November, I’ll need you with me in this fight: [CA-22 will be one of the closest races in the country – and it could decide the majority in Congress. Together, we can flip this seat and bring real representation to the Valley. Will you chip in $10 between my campaign and Blue Amp Action today?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8bd75737-5630-4b21-adb2-100ef7ef98bd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [CHIP IN $10 >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T042e92e5-1194-4c77-aaa6-195ab87b05a1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [CHIP IN $20 >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T196e05ff-e2cd-4adc-9b8c-b36af639a5d0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [CHIP IN MORE >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te2e693cd-b998-4e91-a51d-3393d193eb7a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Thank you, Randy
---

PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/loc_em_fr_20250524_villegas_b1_f1_s1_c1_92op_n-t1?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ted6197d6-bc39-419e-87c1-66728d0e4e07/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC

---

name: Gary Sinise
subject: Final Weekend until the National Memorial Day Parade Starts
body:
20 years of the National Memorial Day Parade| | | [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=4c8e288876cb4b0a88e160919007f175&_e=xlveySwPiNtR6HLiX8sDJuYj1_Vsoad_xY5-_hTWN5Q8jYHKnREsSDotxDpfUDa_ftumKUz7_BADY_CDiJJaqKNVtXouL1E9YrQPy4BBEOtBtdp1oFTtmYEERR-k85D7hTM-u6QkvJR_h7pOXZ6ihh2Qzld0ZnnLI2MnZaqW0GJ_svolUmuupzPapQhq0Hy2WYCY7n4vjB24Rooqj_YveOYXJNj06PpndGlTtN5XeUFZR-5BNwX07RL17kMkIwOJIsfZff_4JE3VCmtsqHL_lO-Ym0zder01p3PxzxRVWfNR_K7LoRoZ_m3rpFHGgJT-)
---
Friend, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 __and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. **Now, I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.** This year will be a remembrance like no other, as we commemorate the 80th anniversary of victory in World War II and the 250th birthdays of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps. **[Friend, the National Memorial Day Parade is ENTIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=4c8e288876cb4b0a88e160919007f175&_e=xlveySwPiNtR6HLiX8sDJuYj1_Vsoad_xY5-_hTWN5Q8jYHKnREsSDotxDpfUDa_ftumKUz7_BADY_CDiJJaqKNVtXouL1E9YrQPy4BBEOtBtdp1oFTtmYEERR-k85D7hTM-u6QkvJR_h7pOXZ6ihh2Qzld0ZnnLI2MnZaqW0GK6fFQ6HgwRQ4yiCrbPCV4sl4wc7zcGEmjWdL-EkUhWelcT8Yzhi7JqK4fLxf45AVL2CRZa1VRS7ry2XkQ85KxD8XTXSEge6K6pdZcLmXmPs5WGPKyar1QoAwebdvv7QbXJwu-Ve6Kh2UYLvIL5MOv_)**
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=4c8e288876cb4b0a88e160919007f175&_e=xlveySwPiNtR6HLiX8sDJuYj1_Vsoad_xY5-_hTWN5Q8jYHKnREsSDotxDpfUDa_ftumKUz7_BADY_CDiJJaqKNVtXouL1E9YrQPy4BBEOtBtdp1oFTtmYEERR-k85D7hTM-u6QkvJR_h7pOXZ6ihh2Qzld0ZnnLI2MnZaqW0GKhMf_3z0tQdHJsO8_v79KNEP2idKeOc4d7sMemmjzW4u7gX48VlOBkVjmQ9ayF3E0xw5ypvYqGbLn44vtmVT2cV-KLjQJdyMaoHPrD1je-ZGwkXBT0XpkMffZFeNhD8Uxg_9h9OGG-e3ygkhVcu77O)
---
[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=4c8e288876cb4b0a88e160919007f175&_e=xlveySwPiNtR6HLiX8sDJuYj1_Vsoad_xY5-_hTWN5Q8jYHKnREsSDotxDpfUDa_ftumKUz7_BADY_CDiJJaqKNVtXouL1E9YrQPy4BBEOtBtdp1oFTtmYEERR-k85D7hTM-u6QkvJR_h7pOXZ6ihh2Qzld0ZnnLI2MnZaqW0GIKFSUklBUnfLviaxO4UoXnmA_9whTIU7YgpLKHzObchZmhOFWNd8I6ImhvKYtoLsoIUmuFx7w8dBe0pIVip_bAKyIFGpFypRc_GDiWIRVy6Xq5_Ldu0K14djJPa3cSupOcakx9S5m8B9aGghMrGkqU)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ **But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded _entirely_ by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country.** Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever.

* Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=4c8e288876cb4b0a88e160919007f175&_e=xlveySwPiNtR6HLiX8sDJuYj1_Vsoad_xY5-_hTWN5Q8jYHKnREsSDotxDpfUDa_T-RSsEL-L0J3N7zohGXGWhpU-kzkfO35lfY4vr1z0DhemVySu37BW5tTQaP0fu0uLuMv7n8iM2ufzqHngzUPnSKmkvEW6BAigAPn7RalYWHru0HB9b4g5rdFwlBqGe2FwsWzLvQRJWRh7FuhLtlnXd9eyd8t51W1ZvmkgFfTCfL0eVI-ulbSlK9WbTYWQLWe7tEKHnoZ2sqw0zSTaFBI5sjxQu62ZDs6F5QC3-hx-aU%3D)[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=4c8e288876cb4b0a88e160919007f175&_e=xlveySwPiNtR6HLiX8sDJuYj1_Vsoad_xY5-_hTWN5Q8jYHKnREsSDotxDpfUDa_ftumKUz7_BADY_CDiJJaqKNVtXouL1E9YrQPy4BBEOtBtdp1oFTtmYEERR-k85D7hTM-u6QkvJR_h7pOXZ6ihh2Qzld0ZnnLI2MnZaqW0GINPLh7dubtGcJ2MGW5vIJbF6ozKjh0eTWp7iyF1Q8aouJUSGQEtVVfDlTn_PoK24U-1njXfbg1-YPFnLeURuXxyvrxS4F2HXXW9hMXHHZkon5-ZgoM0h1Mu4RjUsrk_ZldsCi11YqJ01CGBGwQT2lf) If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. _And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get._ You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult. WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. _But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade._** ** **That's why we are making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's National Memorial Day Parade to honor them one last time. ** So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of victory in Europe and Japan to end World War II - and the 250th anniversaries of the Army, Navy, and Marine Corps - I encourage you to help us honor these brave veterans while we still have them with us.
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=4c8e288876cb4b0a88e160919007f175&_e=xlveySwPiNtR6HLiX8sDJuYj1_Vsoad_xY5-_hTWN5Q8jYHKnREsSDotxDpfUDa_ftumKUz7_BADY_CDiJJaqKNVtXouL1E9YrQPy4BBEOtBtdp1oFTtmYEERR-k85D7hTM-u6QkvJR_h7pOXZ6ihh2Qzld0ZnnLI2MnZaqW0GLhhmBVex2_aykVpvvOS6cqdRvKNIa0RczXl6zdq9D-W7U1LiAGBNFSWgSSDnTvrwf60tIlV4Ojb-kMR1XXxCLXjZa-AVSNMKrOvjXebpO5kWmI55xJRbxCusqk6Zp1tujnSgoTpS_h-WBJilGmcyZK)
---
And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ _**[Friend, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please - if you're able, make a gift to fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now during its 20th anniversary.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=4c8e288876cb4b0a88e160919007f175&_e=xlveySwPiNtR6HLiX8sDJuYj1_Vsoad_xY5-_hTWN5Q8jYHKnREsSDotxDpfUDa_ftumKUz7_BADY_CDiJJaqKNVtXouL1E9YrQPy4BBEOtBtdp1oFTtmYEERR-k85D7hTM-u6QkvJR_h7pOXZ6ihh2Qzld0ZnnLI2MnZaqW0GKA-PrR1Jz6mPPpGkhBgAFnfPDNRc-PUfMIrWiipuCx6nPx9FrBBjiCSZi2O60BoB9cOZecKZjGb-Y8YETUTvHBrtn7Pc-TleKl4gmdyQ7KyeY15RjZbgHlVtfidI7RtWWRsHwMXvvMW-dS-dSsv4J8)**_ Sincerely, Gary SiniseHonorary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade
