clean_body: 20 years of the National Memorial Day Parade| | | - Friend, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. Now, I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event. This year will be a remembrance like no other, as we commemorate the 80th anniversary of victory in World War II and the 250th birthdays of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps. The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event. But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded entirely by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country. Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like: Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever. Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam. Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom. If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get. You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult. WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade. That's why we are making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's National Memorial Day Parade to honor them one last time. So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of victory in Europe and Japan to end World War II - and the 250th anniversaries of the Army, Navy, and Marine Corps - I encourage you to help us honor these brave veterans while we still have them with us. And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more. ** Sincerely, Gary SiniseHonorary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center 1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201

name: Olivia Mendoza, All On The Line
subject: A detrimental threat to voting rights protections
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
The future of voting rights protections depends on how hard we fight
|
---

**“If regular Americans think that this administration is going to protect their rights, they're just wrong.”**
_— Former DOJ Civil Rights Division lawyer_
It’s true, Peter. The Trump administration recently gutted the leadership of the Justice Department’s voting rights unit.
It’s a move that doesn’t just threaten decades of progress. It could unleash a new level of election subversion that aims to strip away our rights.
But this attack didn’t come out of thin air. For years, anti-democracy forces have laid the groundwork to propel an extreme anti-voter agenda across the country, undermining fair representation and the right to vote at every turn.
In going after the Department of Justice’s voting rights unit, the administration strips the division of its ability to pursue active cases as well as enforce civil rights protections and critical election laws.
It’s horrifying to think of what this will mean for the freedom to vote, Peter. As watchdogs and legal experts have noted, these changes "are turning the Civil Rights Division on its head." **Instead of protecting the right to vote, new DOJ leadership has gone after the very principles of the Voting Rights division, attacking the independence and protection that ensures that every eligible voter can make their voice heard.**
[**We can’t just sit back and let this happen. All On The Line is working tirelessly to defend voting rights and fair representation across the country, and a moment like this requires all of us to push back. Will you make a donation to help power this work?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108267376/547420001/-766669670?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_ProtectVR_email_20250524-AOTL-Tier1-ProtectVR-OM_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250524-AOTL-Tier1-ProtectVR-OM_&utm_campaign=ProtectVR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk3NDg2M2I1LTk2MzgtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lcmqbDgnx2gfuzxIdRHpNNOWjWm69ZFiGY-i6cZV2vo=)

Make no mistake: It is devastating to witness the Trump administration’s Justice Department abandon the enforcement of key voting rights provisions.
The good news is, All On The Line has successfully mobilized our supporters to speak out against these kinds of anti-voter attacks before. Public advocacy, combined with the work of our affiliate — the National Redistricting Foundation — to seek enforcement of voting rights protections through the courts, are a critical one-two punch. And we’ve demonstrated that, together, we can overcome these coordinated assaults on our democracy.
**One thing remains clear: We cannot back down. As we prepare to fight back, we need supporters like you who are committed to securing free and fair elections and protecting voting rights.**[**Can we count on you to make a donation today?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108267383/547420008/-766669670?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_ProtectVR_email_20250524-AOTL-Tier1-ProtectVR-OM_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250524-AOTL-Tier1-ProtectVR-OM_&utm_campaign=ProtectVR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk3NDg2M2I1LTk2MzgtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lcmqbDgnx2gfuzxIdRHpNNOWjWm69ZFiGY-i6cZV2vo=)

Olivia

name: Jason Miyares
subject: You’ve been with me, now let’s finish the fight.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Miyares for Virginia |
body:
We’re building something bigger than politics—and I need you on the front lines with me.| | | Friend, You’ve read the emails. You’ve watched the fights. You’ve stood with us when it mattered most.

name: Troy Downing (R-MT)
subject: GOP EMERGENCY: We’re falling behind!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
We need your help to protect Trump’s agenda in Congress. Read on:

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTMwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDUyNF9TUy1VVi4xMTAxMTdfdDE2NDUyNTUtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA1MjRfU1MtVVYuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjQ1MjU1LTI4OTkifQ/xZL1Pz2IIcHE9-FbjpJJJQ) Peter,
I've got some disturbing news to share with you. The latest fundraising numbers are in, and the Democrats are gloating. The Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee **(DCCC)** has topped the National Republican Congressional Committee **(NRCC)** in fundraising... again.
The numbers are stark: the DCCC raked in $8.1 million, while the NRCC brought in $7 million. But that's not all — **_the DCCC now has a whopping $13 million more_** in its war chest than we do.
_**What does this mean?**_**It means the Democrats are building a massive arsenal to take down our conservative champions in the House. They're preparing to unleash a tidal wave of liberal propaganda and voter turnout efforts to flip seats and retake the Majority.**
We can't let that happen. The consequences would be catastrophic: a Democratic majority would rubber-stamp President Trump's impeachment, block his agenda, and push through radical left-wing policies that would destroy our country.
That's why I'm counting on you to help us fight back. We need to close the fundraising gap before the end of May and give our conservative warriors the resources they need to take on the Democrats in the midterm elections and continue passing President Trump’s legislative agenda.
**[Will you contribute $25, $50, or $100 today to help the GOP close the gap? Every dollar counts, and every donation brings us closer to our goal of defending our conservative Majority.](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTMwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDUyNF9TUy1VVi4xMTAxMTdfdDE2NDUyNTUtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA1MjRfU1MtVVYuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjQ1MjU1LTI4OTkifQ/Z8Qs39IkP9n7kRwBIm-03w)** [ DEFEND THE HOUSE MAJORITY
](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTMwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDUyNF9TUy1VVi4xMTAxMTdfdDE2NDUyNTUtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA1MjRfU1MtVVYuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjQ1MjU1LTI4OTkifQ/TaoaxmV5IzqP-L561dgTZA) The stakes are high, but with your help, I know we can overcome this uphill battle. Let's show the Democrats that we won't back down without a fight.
Thanks for all your support,
**Troy Downing** U.S. Congressman, Montana’s Second District Combat Veteran | America First Conservative | | |

name: Douglas Carswell
subject: Does America have a Muslim problem?
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/mseconomicsurge-12849050?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| _**If you're not in front of our Saturday email, you're behind.**_
---
| Dear Friend, **On a brief return to Britain, I was concerned to see that London has undergone a dramatic demographic change.** The city of my birth is visibly more Muslim than it was even four years ago. On the Tube, I saw more hijabs than baseball caps. The Muslim niqab— with its full face covering—is no longer rare.
---
|
---
_London today_
| **For decades, Brits have not been allowed to question the wisdom of importing large numbers of people into a Western society who do not share Western values. **(Brits that do so on social media risk going to prison). Instead, there was a lazy assumption that Muslim immigrants would eventually integrate.

Rather than culturally converge, many Muslims living in Britain have culturally diverged.

**Forty three percent of British Muslims now want “the introduction of Sharia law”.** Support for Sharia was even stronger among Muslims in London (49%), where Muslims now make up 15 percent of the population.

**More British Muslims fought for ISIS than currently serve in the British army.**

The United States has long been a melting pot, with a wonderful history of people from all over the world moving to America and becoming American. As an immigrant myself, I love the idea of people moving to America in order to become American. And becoming an American is about a lot more than getting a US passport.

We need to recognize that some parts of the melting pot might not melt. The US needs to act now to ensure America does not make the mistakes that Europe has made when it comes to mass Muslim immigration.

**Writing for Ayaan Hirsi Ali, I set out in detail some of the steps the Trump administration needs to take, which you can read by clicking on the image below. **
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=ffd7d47823&e=5703353baa)
---
| **The religion of progressive America is cultural relativism – the creed that insists all cultures are of equal worth. **The truth is that Western culture is deeply distinctive.

Western societies are WEIRD; that is to say they are Western, Educated, Industrialized, Rich, and Democratic (WEIRD), as described by psychologists Joseph Henrich, Steven Heine, and Ara Norenzayan in their seminal work _The WEIRDest People in the World: How the West Became Psychologically Peculiar and Particularly Prosperous_.

**Western people are a psychological and cultural outlier, exhibiting traits and behaviors that diverge significantly from those found in most other cultures, particularly those traits in Muslim societies.**

WEIRD individuals tend to prioritize individualism over collectivism, analytical reasoning over holistic thinking, and impersonal trust over clan-based loyalty. WEIRD Westerners are more likely to cooperate with strangers and punish unfair behavior, even at personal cost, compared to participants from other cultures. These traits are not universal norms.

Henrich and co suggest Western cultural distinctiveness owes a lot to the teachings of the medieval Catholic Church, which prohibited cousin marriage.

**Personally, I think Western WEIRDness owes a lot to our inheritance from three cities of antiquity; Athens, Jerusalem, and Rome.**

>From Athens, the West inherited Greek philosophy, which introduced the idea that reason can unlock the mysteries of the world and that natural laws govern its workings, accessible through rational inquiry.

**From Jerusalem came the profound idea that each person is created _b’tzelem Elohim_ —in the image of God.** In Judeo-Christian thought, this imbues every individual with inherent worth, forming the foundation of individualism. It also suggests that each person possesses free will, with the capacity to align with or diverge from the divine will.

>From Rome, the West received its framework of law, interwoven with echoes of Greek philosophical ideals.

**Western cultural norms are not global norms. We need policy makers to wake up and recognize this – and to do so fast. **It is time for a significant shift in US immigration policy, and for the US government to act against anyone promoting murderous leftist ideology on university campuses.

Have an awesome weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=1deab1d9f8&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mcpp-c58f.mailchimpsites.com/manage/preferences?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=23d608f625) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&t=b&e=5703353baa&c=23d608f625).

name: Jon Ossoff for Senate
subject: The cost of a monthly streaming service
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
This is a message for people who understand the stakes of Jon Ossoff's re-election campaign in Georgia.
#

This is a message for people who understand the stakes of Jon Ossoff's re-election campaign in Georgia.
[**We're humbly asking that you make a donation to help him defend this seat.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-may25.ZUBy2n&refcode=em250524-a&t=1&akid=374%2E5691347%2EXQ4qgZ)
Here's why:
For the cost of a monthly streaming service, you can help Jon win what will be one of the closest and most expensive Senate races of the midterms.
Jon is the only Democratic Senator up for re-election in a state Trump won, and that makes him MAGA's #1 target. They have already started spending millions of dollars to defeat him. _Already!_
Every donation we receive helps us fight back and set the record straight — something we have to be doing already.
We have one of our first end-of-month fundraising drives coming to a close soon and every donation helps us get closer and closer to reaching the goals we need to win.
[**So if keeping Jon Ossoff in the Senate is worth a few dollars to you, we’re asking you to contribute today. Our average online contribution right now is about $30. Many give more, some give less. We’re just asking you to chip in what feels right to you today.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-may25.ZUBy2n&refcode=em250524-a&t=2&akid=374%2E5691347%2EXQ4qgZ)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

Thank you for pitching in, and for taking the time to read this message.

name: Gary Sinise
subject: Final Weekend until the National Memorial Day Parade Starts
body:
20th Annual National Memorial Day Parade starts SOON!| | | [](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=caf3ddb89a65426683e69595e1ca1205&_e=uM02JqVUTNGuddK16BqJVIYqiWvucpyyV6-fbK7GKgEFYkhYWiSaFWyyM3sQNWQ-DtozJtXo1RSU5FxpqIqrBozeqerztUZB9xS2mUSNQOQOeoygBwqBoYaYY6QQm5ZiQAB4matJKlqJgUlZwDWxoWkjLFCCEAaZUIk37GkwE-CoAKkf8rmZHjvQ8cmN4-uhqOoLhJADDNSBAYfi6KBaPc0mqNPCbVzCDgEWmti40TemVpHkvRiAG2ODk_-JK9p24rxjzW5TBFOG93QznFjVZfvBLlnqRDwo-Qtf4uZw65jwgr3lnSueE4d_s78yh8GP)
---
Friend, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 __and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. **Now, I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.** This year will be a remembrance like no other, as we commemorate the 80th anniversary of victory in World War II and the 250th birthdays of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps. **[Friend, the National Memorial Day Parade is ENTIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=caf3ddb89a65426683e69595e1ca1205&_e=uM02JqVUTNGuddK16BqJVIYqiWvucpyyV6-fbK7GKgEFYkhYWiSaFWyyM3sQNWQ-DtozJtXo1RSU5FxpqIqrBozeqerztUZB9xS2mUSNQOQOeoygBwqBoYaYY6QQm5ZiQAB4matJKlqJgUlZwDWxoWkjLFCCEAaZUIk37GkwE-B7j-pBCk_Ak7a69fCDzLqy5DccJG_7lu0uL1nHEVC3C-PoJD41F-_gwvAkEgY10jUfkExd20Kqghs1CuVEd4Qqf9yzYrh5w9Y05pw2cW2HRH-9sbRa8JBNRBTQDBmMuFISwRoKh13sg9v8tIr-2j25)**
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=caf3ddb89a65426683e69595e1ca1205&_e=uM02JqVUTNGuddK16BqJVIYqiWvucpyyV6-fbK7GKgEFYkhYWiSaFWyyM3sQNWQ-DtozJtXo1RSU5FxpqIqrBozeqerztUZB9xS2mUSNQOQOeoygBwqBoYaYY6QQm5ZiQAB4matJKlqJgUlZwDWxoWkjLFCCEAaZUIk37GkwE-DP0Zl-JWdWw09aUPIrqlv_LYAL1MSnXSxiprLkuZbcw_-3OolGkEnGLFYwxjn3uKfb4ikKJipOn16nA5agnkicSsVmgnTitd_yFH7J0oxs3d5RsaEjyrMz-m3awxUMRxmN5Gi9D2_7PXO2E-lBmVvw)
---
[](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=caf3ddb89a65426683e69595e1ca1205&_e=uM02JqVUTNGuddK16BqJVIYqiWvucpyyV6-fbK7GKgEFYkhYWiSaFWyyM3sQNWQ-DtozJtXo1RSU5FxpqIqrBozeqerztUZB9xS2mUSNQOQOeoygBwqBoYaYY6QQm5ZiQAB4matJKlqJgUlZwDWxoWkjLFCCEAaZUIk37GkwE-AmNIz4cO4WpelwzQyLS9J9JzykOx5BmUcq7fjp55QtoRM7CKufat50TRG24CqAXbhCQwqTjlGLbREEHjJeWiHe7kpC6xnU1Y4y_B2xteQw0ApeVN68Mdz2j7LKXVd0VNMj0mtaMSTrfATU1z8GJ__A)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ **But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded _entirely_ by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country.** Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever.

* Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

[](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=caf3ddb89a65426683e69595e1ca1205&_e=uM02JqVUTNGuddK16BqJVIYqiWvucpyyV6-fbK7GKgEFYkhYWiSaFWyyM3sQNWQ-2fsGHHqylanM9H94P64bEUBJEZpN5cY4IDqVA8fsAe0ojVgPG1yZIivJYWrWa-BbNXcCmBOEW1NmkIXLvUJdYZHiAnZpMH9-4L1AoYQRujnTanH-zlhJ2voOI71kAu0yPRxyjn-NzJdhX8L4mMoC237pz2Klo5G-9SgpjS7J-sON1dnrjCQ7HQjKboZIqKOHn-H71d5HoXSgUXCeE9cyqVnb-hkmlc59wHqItP9WfPw%3D)[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=caf3ddb89a65426683e69595e1ca1205&_e=uM02JqVUTNGuddK16BqJVIYqiWvucpyyV6-fbK7GKgEFYkhYWiSaFWyyM3sQNWQ-DtozJtXo1RSU5FxpqIqrBozeqerztUZB9xS2mUSNQOQOeoygBwqBoYaYY6QQm5ZiQAB4matJKlqJgUlZwDWxoWkjLFCCEAaZUIk37GkwE-BzreU7RuRvR8_jOpqH1YmTr1zvaGISIecZYGSGjPxLx5e1o4KygPMRRO2fjtGOFSYzfWWjSPRbowmnt7ujWgToUFlqHXCNUnxidiCVSP_S7hx8a7EFEaqzkXTPz7BQ9PTFhxPQQFYwipAjl5Ihc0iW) If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. _And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get._ You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult. WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. _But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade._** ** **That's why we are making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's National Memorial Day Parade to honor them one last time. ** So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of victory in Europe and Japan to end World War II - and the 250th anniversaries of the Army, Navy, and Marine Corps - I encourage you to help us honor these brave veterans while we still have them with us.
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=caf3ddb89a65426683e69595e1ca1205&_e=uM02JqVUTNGuddK16BqJVIYqiWvucpyyV6-fbK7GKgEFYkhYWiSaFWyyM3sQNWQ-DtozJtXo1RSU5FxpqIqrBozeqerztUZB9xS2mUSNQOQOeoygBwqBoYaYY6QQm5ZiQAB4matJKlqJgUlZwDWxoWkjLFCCEAaZUIk37GkwE-C2TQXr3IyAxe-YFzTihMNU_uiQTK8fLSWlhdZaLEtX8TYNVDbe5dv1Xz0vocANa5YRvj393kXJnm1CaD2aaZwTV0qaL3aqQbT8amncrRYdfrbQeNckJ49wMS7igBFmSiJvpBP-Qf_mbN6Cms4wNeWn)
---
And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ _**[Friend, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please - if you're able, make a gift to fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now during its 20th anniversary.](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=caf3ddb89a65426683e69595e1ca1205&_e=uM02JqVUTNGuddK16BqJVIYqiWvucpyyV6-fbK7GKgEFYkhYWiSaFWyyM3sQNWQ-DtozJtXo1RSU5FxpqIqrBozeqerztUZB9xS2mUSNQOQOeoygBwqBoYaYY6QQm5ZiQAB4matJKlqJgUlZwDWxoWkjLFCCEAaZUIk37GkwE-AIZIJcujdw0RLiGBpf91ds-xP5Q9XSv1rbGqVDynse0lOxJW_86Q2H68ttxZ0Z5g-zL6lkgWel-328kMaUrq5TnAOUKK6TVpk_6GyFO1BhIjSDeZGSXwHkD6ljqHhzcGmiu4GWmt2JaA2LEgIeqf3M)**_ Sincerely, Gary SiniseHonorary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade
---
[](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=caf3ddb89a65426683e69595e1ca1205&_e=uM02JqVUTNGuddK16BqJVIYqiWvucpyyV6-fbK7GKgEFYkhYWiSaFWyyM3sQNWQ-DtozJtXo1RSU5FxpqIqrBozeqerztUZB9xS2mUSNQOQOeoygBwqBoYaYY6QQm5ZiQAB4matJKlqJgUlZwDWxoWkjLFCCEAaZUIk37GkwE-CBHOY_wByr-8HMLB4IYxTxSG6-7JianaRN42fVa0QCd5uC1Xd2Jec4SzvY0SEJQebsbzy80FHBrgvPXvoEbFiwWXfeNf5Air3KcEiFMLjL1mk_Ho58LKsl06xVxxFU9tT6m2zLe50-y1G5qvq-wE0f)
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=caf3ddb89a65426683e69595e1ca1205&_e=uM02JqVUTNGuddK16BqJVIYqiWvucpyyV6-fbK7GKgEFYkhYWiSaFWyyM3sQNWQ-DtozJtXo1RSU5FxpqIqrBozeqerztUZB9xS2mUSNQOQOeoygBwqBoYaYY6QQm5ZiQAB4matJKlqJgUlZwDWxoWkjLFCCEAaZUIk37GkwE-CElN2XWGEbb8aNf4jfCC0LtSmBc-MVjXzuw6Y25RWpYmp7kWK9Ljm2AYd7ykGCYJ00trmonK1RMbEXTb8Ec73VsHbsMc_Q_OmgDbPLkU5m1ConHWDJQLJaijLueQipn_Sk7V7dpw2AEwymW9hC9osG)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201

clean_body: 20th Annual National Memorial Day Parade starts SOON!| | | Friend, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. Now, I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event. This year will be a remembrance like no other, as we commemorate the 80th anniversary of victory in World War II and the 250th birthdays of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps. The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event. But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded entirely by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country. Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like: Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever. Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam. Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom. If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get. You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult. WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade. That's why we are making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's National Memorial Day Parade to honor them one last time. So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of victory in Europe and Japan to end World War II - and the 250th anniversaries of the Army, Navy, and Marine Corps - I encourage you to help us honor these brave veterans while we still have them with us. And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more. ** Sincerely, Gary SiniseHonorary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center 1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: My story is not so different
body:
Fellow American, I grew up in a single room behind my parents’ family-owned liquor store, restaurant, and pool hall in Central, South Carolina. I was the first in my family to attend college, and while I was in school, I lost my mother and father within two years of one another. |
---
Fellow American,

I grew up in a single room behind my parents' family-owned liquor store, restaurant, and pool hall in Central, South Carolina.

I was the first in my family to attend college, and while I was in school, I lost my mother and father within two years of one another. I quickly took on the responsibility of helping raise my 13-year-old sister, Darline, and running the family businesses.

[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=5bd37580e25b456fbf82722997f333e6&_e=OnGFpv_pEh2s8XKl_dQBcn5i4RvW0SfrDSrflMc_a-QOCAvWFfwo3MkHpspEzUV598mw4HZ5alXtI5RKJzWQCbcWXKlS7x0COl5pVhusOxER2w0Yhwm2VsrlYfqbLdMI0sUgTd3iU_JfxM9h9O6p2i3AgIA8Iw8pj-NxEWhZwcWJYFJBI0i7NXzPxx09bFXN8gz_G_tyM8XlhfOX-PQGkuIR-FlX9dUx2EHRHL7T9SezwE4pPVongqFTKJ5-gRhOAuL0s7c3Ei9BPSpd8nAZLHtPposb_XBWTcRL29toEEJk7omWxWit5UNWowuHOHCZieoKkHs4gvwZtMbYoLzwqgAZorFsYn5qNmIsYHfETun7kq4QEw7OOpIquQ4u_YAi)
**I had to grow up fast, Fellow American,_and I learned many life lessons at an early age._**

After attending law school, I joined the U.S. Air Force as a member of the Judge Advocate General Corps, where I served as a military prosecutor and defense attorney.

Even after being elected to the United States Senate, I continued to wear the uniform and served in the U.S. Air Force Reserves, where I performed several short deployments in the war zones of Afghanistan and Iraq.

[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=5bd37580e25b456fbf82722997f333e6&_e=OnGFpv_pEh2s8XKl_dQBcn5i4RvW0SfrDSrflMc_a-QOCAvWFfwo3MkHpspEzUV598mw4HZ5alXtI5RKJzWQCbcWXKlS7x0COl5pVhusOxER2w0Yhwm2VsrlYfqbLdMI0sUgTd3iU_JfxM9h9O6p2i3AgIA8Iw8pj-NxEWhZwcWJYFJBI0i7NXzPxx09bFXN8gz_G_tyM8XlhfOX-PQGkuIR-FlX9dUx2EHRHL7T9Sf3z9ufO2MpX3C9QsmpytQk1sw_C07FEAfNJljo7XeU-bt1iKx3sNWDhHgHjbJlmKfW5oCi48_etREKeQO0lTgk0FEMdxLTfGpeyUhn_oKTiFzYMPruKmYQLuV14CpUa-C54IvYpntNuvJpOxlTyAmn)
Fellow American, my story is similar to that of most Americans. I didn't grow up with a silver spoon in my mouth with everything handed to me. I had to grow up fast and work hard. I learned a lot of valuable lessons at a young age and took on a whole lot of responsibility.

But one thing stuck with me over the years -- the perspectives I gained from listening to the hard-working South Carolinians who were regulars at my family's pool hall or my brave colleagues in the military. Their perspectives, whether I agreed with them or not, helped build my foundation for understanding what Americans need.

**It's no secret that our nation is sharply divided right now, but there are some things we should all agree on.**

**We need a country that is a safe place to live and raise a family, and we need a country where the American Dream is alive and possible for everyone, no matter where they start from.**

Fellow American, I'm fighting every day to make those two things a reality. Sadly, there are people across the aisle in Washington who simply can't agree with us on these issues. They are okay with open borders and the flow of violent crime into our neighborhoods and onto our streets. They are okay with punishing hard-working Americans with higher taxes, deepening the burden on them and their families.

**[That's why I'm reaching out with a simple request: if you have a few dollars to spare, would you consider making a contribution to support my campaign by clicking this link or the button below?](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=5bd37580e25b456fbf82722997f333e6&_e=OnGFpv_pEh2s8XKl_dQBcn5i4RvW0SfrDSrflMc_a-QOCAvWFfwo3MkHpspEzUV598mw4HZ5alXtI5RKJzWQCbcWXKlS7x0COl5pVhusOxER2w0Yhwm2VsrlYfqbLdMI0sUgTd3iU_JfxM9h9O6p2i3AgIA8Iw8pj-NxEWhZwcWJYFJBI0i7NXzPxx09bFXN8gz_G_tyM8XlhfOX-PQGkuIR-FlX9dUx2EHRHL7T9SejP7iYX5jh_Nb9aHpEgx2FAH5W8vI5aV1nkfiKqOszaC01G8JDWiolKc4qRr3Eh6J-kYKGUlN0vrU_YhBNBLSr-z6n2evLqCV3XqPLVXoE9C7P7O5AEqHizpSTizJCzCv2S97mBxSTw8ZspzyTtMj7)**

| [** CONTRIBUTE HERE **](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=5bd37580e25b456fbf82722997f333e6&_e=OnGFpv_pEh2s8XKl_dQBcn5i4RvW0SfrDSrflMc_a-QOCAvWFfwo3MkHpspEzUV598mw4HZ5alXtI5RKJzWQCbcWXKlS7x0COl5pVhusOxER2w0Yhwm2VsrlYfqbLdMI0sUgTd3iU_JfxM9h9O6p2i3AgIA8Iw8pj-NxEWhZwcWJYFJBI0i7NXzPxx09bFXN8gz_G_tyM8XlhfOX-PQGkuIR-FlX9dUx2EHRHL7T9ScKbqTA0r2WFjR_YsPZDPoMMFXUzZaImLU7Zvkv9EfV2HbmWNZgC9B2uu7WIXVdLniQmlmbGtlj9CTEiX3nRvge6NTgwV1PIoHpq31pPTOP19mKkCYxEkvkAIqNHPNC1gIb4awvqm2NGCZ7nR-WBx-7)
---

If you're unable to contribute financially, I understand. I'd greatly appreciate it if you could forward this email along to a friend or family member to help amplify my message.

Together, I know we can build the country that protects our communities, rewards hard work, and ensures every hard-working American has a shot at their dreams, just like I was so fortunate to have.

Thank you for taking a moment out of your busy day to read this message.

Sincerely,
Lindsey Graham

[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=5bd37580e25b456fbf82722997f333e6&_e=OnGFpv_pEh2s8XKl_dQBclgy4Rnf4bBzw3xSIuVx_-awE_lko-ck5L-atHtmPmvbw6vnfE0LvoOZ8GdKO8htoWme-9a9bFJiBcU3U1HZG8qoFtYS7tIieJSWB6beyiv5IvmmIH7i7xC2dLLrv5av2Q7P5i29bs-PVUD8IowgT1plxd9pwU4pafW6o1PhGWj4KFvNSNU0T8J75pAiJ8crGbgZvzldDHg149vNK9EDwCk%3D)

[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=5bd37580e25b456fbf82722997f333e6&_e=OnGFpv_pEh2s8XKl_dQBcn5i4RvW0SfrDSrflMc_a-QOCAvWFfwo3MkHpspEzUV598mw4HZ5alXtI5RKJzWQCbcWXKlS7x0COl5pVhusOxER2w0Yhwm2VsrlYfqbLdMI0sUgTd3iU_JfxM9h9O6p2i3AgIA8Iw8pj-NxEWhZwcWJYFJBI0i7NXzPxx09bFXN8gz_G_tyM8XlhfOX-PQGkuIR-FlX9dUx2EHRHL7T9SeDZMcQ-jIZiluiYB4_pAo_McVh1zRH2hGW6QtUvxbqVGQSwXAdtNXFvO7467VY9PiZabmCILGt9JzD00DlSML5aGX5xtb_cH1I7dNf8XgOBQzYudVYw8FZ-3vA-nWdT7XzF8ZN3iDDTOIgkFtMzjm7)
In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges.

| [** SUPPORT SENATOR GRAHAM **](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=5bd37580e25b456fbf82722997f333e6&_e=OnGFpv_pEh2s8XKl_dQBcn5i4RvW0SfrDSrflMc_a-QOCAvWFfwo3MkHpspEzUV598mw4HZ5alXtI5RKJzWQCbcWXKlS7x0COl5pVhusOxER2w0Yhwm2VsrlYfqbLdMI0sUgTd3iU_JfxM9h9O6p2i3AgIA8Iw8pj-NxEWhZwcWJYFJBI0i7NXzPxx09bFXN8gz_G_tyM8XlhfOX-PQGkuIR-FlX9dUx2EHRHL7T9ScMpy9Q-xGSVT1CfOcfdRKAdmqiPwlrWKoX_Lq1RcnR-E_oVw2UjiuFlQW61D36xs8W05fcELmWZb2DngkTwjvT_YlfAIjIdZcpDBjD68zd3WJwSJw9kNR2nSsH7aMnxjnDvcd8-RaJbMbDhIdsnOXQ)

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers
body:
| [View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kMFywiAQhp8GbmZggUQPHKo2ttPaqdNeciRAFBsMgZiMb9_RWq-73-7_za98aF1zkahYIoCDMwkBIPaEAPpq8vF89G-b2ZHV1azPP7y4bmF1R0d4wCet9j_Lr13efy_S3mxf322_G-kDHy7BPuB7aGa9cu11WqyxkawxhGMracHnZMEIF_ggidE1mAVlCkwhLJB6DqIWeUOE4hYa7CQQEEQApwyA0qzmoJqc8oIx0DWbI05uOZnyNjqtaBomFWPX-Ux3HrfyMAwh3cRKBOUUu-x01q09p78z3XkE5V0ZQTkiKLfrKr4IswsrxMpbaWw9VWGTPp97hqM0YXJt61JeIE72_2_wKOE3AAD__2L-bso)
| |
---
| | Friend, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kEGPqywUhn8N7jRwOKAuXNTPaibfnZtMZ9KkK4OArTNSLWqb-fc3mqYbkvOcJ7y8KDf2XfubkTgnAJfOTASA8B0BuJ0ezi_f7v8q_ObNKbzJv06sW_jvqd7hJV-1Ov_knx_y9pVOZ_P-9sfePu7spc-_o33Jz9DIOtX1K42LwGS8NRQDm7EYE5pyiiK4ZBIakaCUhlGKUkkuMG5TRjVtNE9RB10GFAQVgIwDMBY1CKqVDGPOQTc8IUi3nEg56zut2DQ_lPfD4CI9uKDPLvM8TtvDSgLlZPXibaSu1gzzahAoG6_uNmyG4WciUCbIWQuiCTE1JkRobJimMYQ6sYAcEoFCrXfxcpldPQ2L15bwIi-q8LA_EpArdtZ0iyO82L8_yWz9OgMVyOqHZ0-slRtVd75uq60or_OiqvPD7riv36rqVG7zYX-sP792h3A9Ap-Z8dH1fTfJmCA9bx-w1r1n8C8AAP__M7WTcg)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses. And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. [**Today, I'm inviting you to support the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kEGPqywUhn8N7jRwOKAuXNTPaibfnZtMZ9KkK4OArTNSLWqb-fc3mqYbkvOcJ7y8KDf2XfubkTgnAJfOTASA8B0BuJ0ezi_f7v8q_ObNKbzJv06sW_jvqd7hJV-1Ov_knx_y9pVOZ_P-9sfePu7spc-_o33Jz9DIOtX1K42LwGS8NRQDm7EYE5pyiiK4ZBIakaCUhlGKUkkuMG5TRjVtNE9RB10GFAQVgIwDMBY1CKqVDGPOQTc8IUi3nEg56zut2DQ_lPfD4CI9uKDPLvM8TtvDSgLlZPXibaSu1gzzahAoG6_uNmyG4WciUCbIWQuiCTE1JkRobJimMYQ6sYAcEoFCrXfxcpldPQ2L15bwIi-q8LA_EpArdtZ0iyO82L8_yWz9OgMVyOqHZ0-slRtVd75uq60or_OiqvPD7riv36rqVG7zYX-sP792h3A9Ap-Z8dH1fTfJmCA9bx-w1r1n8C8AAP__M7WTcg) And it’s only possible with the help of grandparents and seniors like you. Introducing:_Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children’s show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of the truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children’s show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. clean_body: | Peter, When Rebecca first launched this campaign, it was your energy and support that made us sure we were on the path to something special. But as we head into the summer, we can’t stop now. Derrick Van Orden is one of the most well-funded incumbents in the country thanks to far-right special interests like Elon Musk backing his campaign, and it will take every last ounce of what we have to overcome that power. Thanks to you, we know we have the grassroots fight to finish the job and flip WI-03, but victory will depend on continuing to show up every day – just as we’ve done. = | **= We take great pride in the fact that this campaign is informed and powered by the people. In keeping with Rebecca’s working-class background, you won’t find any big corporate money or dark-money super PAC dollars here. But the only way we can do this is if our supporters step up when we need them most – and now is one of those times. We risk falling behind in the fundraising race, just as the GOP dark money machine is kicking into full gear. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | **=** | ****=** ****** | | ****=** | ****=** ****** | | ****=** | ****=**** We appreciate your support, Peter. name: Left Action
subject: Sign: Tell White House reporters to stop being overly respectful to Trump, and push him harder for answers
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Tell Reporters: “Stop being so overly polite to Trump. You can't do your job when you’re being obsequious”](https://default.salsalabs.org/T211e71ac-124e-441c-98ba-54d76ce2d3f5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb1cc0637-2d91-447e-82b4-ad8ce758f5a0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | It happens again and again -- [a reporter very politely asks Trump a very reasonable question](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9b56ac59-f0e7-4a92-be5c-cf1f3b21a165/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), and if Trump doesn't want to answer it, he just throws out insults, obvious lies, or some other stream of consciousness word salad that bears no resemblance to an actual answer. And because it's not considered "appropriate" to tell the president "you're obviously lying" or "those are just random words, not a response," the question is left unanswered. [**It's time to stop being polite, it's time to demand answers, and it's time to stop giving Trump presidential-level respect he hasn't earned.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9318f20e-ce57-4f00-ae07-c90168ea445a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) We get why reporters would feel the need to be overly polite and deferential with a president. And for most of our nation's history, that was appropriate. But Trump is no ordinary president. He is a serial liar, a thug, and a bully. And if reporters want to get answers from him, they need to hit back hard, using Trump's own tactics. Mock him, belittle him, yell back at him. Do what is needed to get an answer. **This isn't high tea with the queen, it's defending the truth from a wannabe dictator who's declared war on it. And reporters are our last line of defense.** [**Please add your name and tell reporters: "Stop being so overly polite to Trump. It's impossible to do your job when you're being obsequious"**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T74b7d4cd-a7d2-4c1b-af47-0fc6c14ed5a7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9033be3f-41cf-4926-840d-14fe2c240054/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action
---
|
---

* [Go here for more actions you can take](https://default.salsalabs.org/T799d6ae7-e54e-4c0d-82be-29c2987c7463/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Help us out with a donation](https://default.salsalabs.org/T366800fc-f367-4757-9bbd-e40ff84a169e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: A single vote…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

While we were asleep on Thursday, Republicans in Congress successfully
passed their terrible budget bill that will cut taxes for the billionaire
class at the expense of working families.

The “One Big Beautiful Bill” will extend Trump’s 2017 tax cuts for the
wealthiest few, cut Medicaid and SNAP by nearly $1 TRILLION, throw 13
million people off their health insurance, end federal Pell Grants for
more than 1 million college students, drastically roll back clean energy
protections, and more — just to cut taxes even more for people like Elon
Musk.

It passed by a single vote, 215-214, just one day after another Democratic
Congressman sadly passed away. So far this year, three sitting Democratic
House members have died in office – enough to stop this bill from passing.

Imagine if aging Democrats in Congress passed the torch to the next
generation instead of dying in office?

The Democratic Party has long had a gerontocracy problem — they need to
admit it and clean house if they want to stop Trump and the GOP’s
far-right assault on our democracy and working-class people. If they won’t
step down for the good of the Party and country, then they deserve to be
challenged at the ballot box.

Justice Democrats is taking on out-of-touch Democrats in the 2026
primaries by recruiting and supporting a new generation of working-class
progressives, like Michigan State Rep. Donavan McKinney in MI-13.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250524?refcode=em20250524-36705&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36705_1203867_DcNof4&akid=36705%2E1203867%2EDcNof4 ]Will you fund our upcoming primary fights and help us reshape the
Democratic Party with a grassroots donation of $5 or more
today?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250524?refcode=em20250524-36705&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36705_1203867_DcNof4&akid=36705%2E1203867%2EDcNof4 ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250524-36705-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36705_1203867_DcNof4&akid=36705%2E1203867%2EDcNof4

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36705%2E1203867%2EDcNof4

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Rand Paul
subject: Let me give you the cold, hard truth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
Here’s the simple truth: If you borrow money, you need to pay it back. | | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/AzpnMrAP0eEbBNRHtSKGxf5VCX5BM-Ad2ObN_e0BQs8K7x9c6vWp2BZO1Grd6UdUCSEdORw0wQ9Pii0yFv0JnhkqSwros58aCOUNIRL8-e-XyeChoQnl5SkmEP_G_i8I53aWCO-qUzTQdJaLlMlRRJw_omWOu02VzdqjmSdykH7O795Qi5UK3ygjBohDUQfpyz2scsnIQJw-bQWwHtBmDpvlMouc2RDzNRC2cYISV0G1M9An0iqTmhM6Z_TTdaB4TtU7s40uHocpYVEU4SiCaZ7tWEePwq9gIWxltFHgB3_Ge7H-TW6qi-9ONdkdIU8HfFCH17I1yP80gXPskuZh1JYHihqoPgmtXrJilFFWAwFaQ9VvG-mvt0kSKyJvRr_sWCI-67c0nEQMesT-t6XY4R2HoSBwGJx7z8k44ECRFrRXgwQVvwKQWw/moAhgy7vWYvoMnwnnYfv-nDAArg-A9bH/9)
---
Peter, Here's the simple truth: **If you borrow money, you need to pay it back.** It doesn't matter if it's a mortgage, credit cards, or even student loans. **If you borrow money from someone, it 's up to you to pay back your debts. __[I AGREE>>](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/9eZj75u6dOPx3xalleKKrGnIDjQ9EMmDtmNtqRN3SH0ZYOfKaWzp0cfG39-XceOsA8BKrankdgbN2zczpQ_ILSqTUeQss00UGdVUuYSe8cE84lcLjCs_3oGO-_XTLB533DjjkYU88kyVOdmzA6NXvL0dJnoZT-ynePDrzUpmQN4UgBxiXqXZQGgSfaJw4YvRp92ktFpLWP2IZe4kvKGIQsS2c7tA62VMmT2KetJLBfwZYIZHW0y44BcpR_a8wfnRd1nQtQjroQn2_MtAQxF4BfdZQNRXMT3Uq-vAcveRtY5On_nQX9LN3QWO_gMbs-HKpUuleAx0f82Nfp-MsALM-QksFQP3ez36E08Q0zDqz1cWE0VewcjBaTULvjdEgYmRZJfG23X0RraZiKzNmDSRtIldayUInVdrf_TWOHt6bwAMohskqKVlbw/XDjiv9-Mw-Tr-YQ-ZPrqyxJHjO6Ns4oM/9)__** Too many have been misled by Big Government's promises of "free" education, racking up trillions in debt while expecting handouts. This isn't just unfair. It's unsustainable.

---
[ **FIGHT BACK AGAINST BIG GOV** ](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/cX1-eXGQjRME9WAJfAghhE18fZ-XSSLxPIe9ETUqxGDPe6EITbh133lvKeqypMuJAalPGP2PCar-l2VqG9rUfGdJ9jk7nin7CKfqnQ1AVfPNsxNA8f-9Rky174AVMCbFvnIhjO4lyY9bmGWlJf_O4qxz1-xlPxBnY_hDth292KdmSd1wg0JfniHCwN28hzDz2FAe0-4NtTpfZPzvdCAYS6lEL10IxncBfaxSRum8gQb1u46dhc6Rfe7ewnVoZy5oua3ZCecgbOKuodzAlNj19P-68RMsB5-uqsi7e3ASxOBAavrW1s1xp2RBN4Qm1wa58TZZ-LXUWyQ-u0fRUly_BUGVqXHpTvu0YhsTbXmPK1piYiwqxrvCLsZudIw-0Q_jno3-xrjI8t4GQys8CWu3DDWvXkHPBkQUrgXIceOHS8omY25mHuscpQ/QHa6CwyUGxIsqSpwWUayQfwN2pVZqaE4/9)
---
The federal government's reckless push for loan forgiveness shifts the burden onto hardworking taxpayers, many of whom never went to college or already paid off their debts. It's time to stop rewarding irresponsibility and start promoting accountability. **We need to protect our economy and ensure fairness for all.** That's why I'm fighting in the Senate to block blanket loan forgiveness and rein in the out-of-control Department of Education. But I can't do it alone. **_Your support is critical to our mission of restoring fiscal sanity._** **_[Will you chip in $25, $50, or $100 today to help me stand up for personal responsibility and stop the student loan bailout madness?](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/S8r7AVlNMKzUlROlXi5PQ3JgFIkFJjjjHOv72rvF_CWo2lEZZruCW_F0S__ZD_iQiSDZwcwqkevF-GrU-xXKwfHW5jUI0vQW49buXCEuYbq_KBL70Sbfaa7hI_hTSRtSxz8_MMv86XrLHcSwcSOKaonCCcnaLsJrV_gBIn2t1rsjqhubV52CAYB45T3jbRW3ourAGA8VeEbR2sff-kx-Gfj3rW5QAgBQvE4Vl3MzfjwLI31nQXOBUshao9jyn-ngXwR82VfiCyiykmEdDde9BqUnLJXewZREH9whiqyuAV-xLEnsYjNR2GIMjJFWKf_GPaTxYrmQn-poei4d-IZTKaPyKM0qWGbHVXZNjNqpsdKcjJLdLJLDpny4cJB7JwaH7vxzXqGAeKt9ZZtjlXJ_GUBrHDG0zLMSUimr5dZyNA_5mpSqE9-ohA/8s5gETF5RtRrmzgkwJw0hJXQzD4LHZQ-/9)_** Every dollar you contribute fuels our fight against wasteful spending and government overreach. **_[Together, we can demand that borrowers honor their commitments and protect taxpayers from footing the bill.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/Ae8g6qNx8cxWwkxc_j2YV74QpiSML4jdRP_opRmd7XefZNMQtZiqL0lin3XA_woR0sG3duVa6Z08PAuUv4OjwtxtDhoE89ikByjocNpsTkoHbk_vkHE1v19ZFTXKRlnK1F04BVSV4of-YbZbDTx3JMEcnxVYXJtAONSMD-17A1cSblLaGyxYJRiofXXqj8s63DTA8t173zEJP1Xovp1ZNujVvSU19LN9dmwyc8FAVeY3ywVKI8w3oba8fIF-16c8DQ5N3bL2hnJIo_TPraa7-vyfgVUBW2cKqmz5oTgdSId6sl9zEPDu-OqdN4T9J1s9zcAKjsmyFZN8lpL5Vuobqh5b2vSOpb4VElUqiYbPyy1thQCKqLK5vRZwN2tcISkB-See8h0bdvdbRz4vEYAlVTOjC4xnGA_XYgl6TTzEB17OVvgpbWvhyw/shUpasl9HBqDVAfKIeiQKoCX3KhaGIAt/9)_**

clean_body: Here’s the simple truth: If you borrow money, you need to pay it back. | | | Peter, Here's the simple truth: If you borrow money, you need to pay it back. It doesn't matter if it's a mortgage, credit cards, or even student loans. If you borrow money from someone, it 's up to you to pay back your debts. Too many have been misled by Big Government's promises of "free" education, racking up trillions in debt while expecting handouts. This isn't just unfair. It's unsustainable. The federal government's reckless push for loan forgiveness shifts the burden onto hardworking taxpayers, many of whom never went to college or already paid off their debts. It's time to stop rewarding irresponsibility and start promoting accountability. We need to protect our economy and ensure fairness for all. That's why I'm fighting in the Senate to block blanket loan forgiveness and rein in the out-of-control Department of Education. But I can't do it alone. Your support is critical to our mission of restoring fiscal sanity. Every dollar you contribute fuels our fight against wasteful spending and government overreach. | | In liberty, Rand Paul | | | | | | Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate | | P.O. | Peter,

National Republicans are making it clear: they’ve set their sights on the Virginia Governor’s race, and they’re going to pull out all the stops to keep this seat red.

Top Republicans in Washington have announced their support for Abigail’s opponent, and we’ve already seen millions of dollars flowing in. We know this is just the beginning – in the coming months, Republicans will fly in headline names to campaign for Abigail’s opponent and pour millions more into this race against us.

_**Why? Because they know this race is neck-and-neck and that Virginia is a bellwether, so what happens in Virginia could set the stage for the rest of the country.**_

That’s why building our support and momentum now is so important and will help us set the stage for November. If we want to flip this seat blue in November, we need to make sure Abigail has the resources to compete at every level.

[_**So, can you contribute today to help us prepare for this tough race ahead? ## Intifada Is Here, America
Now we know what “globalize the intifada” means. After a pro-Palestinian Marxist was arrested after shooting and killing Yaron Lischinsky, a German-born evangelical Christian, and his American girlfriend, Sarah Milgrim, in front of the Capital Jewish Museum in Washington, D.C., he chanted, “Free, free Palestine.” The murderer, who reportedly traveled from Chicago to kill two [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/A6wz8QGAar8RPyH_CKEAlibTEWHeQXfLAQTqq5cD7Nko18pEemC6Q2dZM3_V7x9UAlLWn6rxQZgz_2CnOKVx8yvbDmUqCgAvtdFmuI1dFsfd-lnsWcmOTcwgpUeh4QJZFq_-lvUn_nKi4fOqUYOXYHJVVrAk2DUqb1GnTU9YntHt9cjoze3pcqZOsKMY6-H4GZLND38PwxBiBlmGrpWlaR6aPR7gA8WkZTCHCrT2Mn7UPOJcqbqjk_sFsOg9EZVOkIBZnbwBMIySFge5IOItLVUURijk9cFyTeHdV26XsOat/nL1_FHqwF4PzhkQldJF8Z3FMoAgSEhFp/9)

## DeSantis Is Right to Kill Property Taxes—It’s Time to Lead the Pack – RedState
By Cliff Maloney Governor Ron DeSantis is doing what most politicians only talk about: dismantling the tax-and-steal state, one layer at a time. His recent push to abolish property taxes in Florida is more than smart policy—it’s a declaration of economic freedom. It sends a clear message to businesses, families, and freedom-minded Americans across [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/ZjXg78uB16qAjH9r-K2HohB9JFFvZ_8e1GL396v0_hRmmF9a4cj-KBIvmZB_3M6KucC2E2pje9ODJ84vJE1XBztlQGUfzkbR9UnVwwMWHWBl9-MjwA152MemUaH9Im_7mYS_NEYHGcGg1FZ28TvLPYW4Y_OC9r8m_kQkDIY9THv0QKZELWCFkehZYLaG0vKVS32g5izCckVcqt82L02WHx0g8fEvI1rAoxC4FzeJEJ0_QLA_vPMbIqd8GsKxvmXxW7-gL0vkT_8DjD18EzZkL3STMk4kHTCAXifIjK9Ze8ePcE2-yESeK_lu7donQ6sWpip2Sr8yrkVUasTZ3xf2NdU7xOTbzuYITyYwHMYPAx7jUfff/MHoiVgOp2G9t9gv-Yy87d0XCqHtGi6Mb/9)

## Maine Weighs Pulling Out of Popular Vote Compact
Just last year, Maine—one of only two states that apportions its Electoral College votes—opted to join the National Popular Vote Interstate Compact. But the New England state is now poised to exit the compact, which would kick in only if enough states voted to reach the magic 270 electoral votes required to elect a president. name: Haley Stevens
subject: Did you see this poll on our race?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
I'm just ahead of my Republican opponent Mike Rogers

| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/2838?t=1&akid=173%2E49239%2EkgGgKQ)
---
Did you see the new polling numbers, null?
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/2866?t=2&akid=173%2E49239%2EkgGgKQ)
**The very first poll out of Michigan's crucial Senate race shows me ahead of my MAGA Republican opponent Mike Rogers!**
This is huge news, and it's clear that we've got grassroots momentum behind us. But we still have a long, tough road ahead, and this new polling only solidifies the fact that the GOP is going to be coming after me as a TOP target for defeat.
**If I'm going to defeat the GOP here in Michigan and keep this Senate seat blue, I need your immediate grassroots support. But with time running out before our midnight deadline, I'm still short of my $15,000 goal.[Will you pitch in $5 or more now to help me close this gap, win in Michigan, and take back the Senate for Democrats?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/2866?t=3&akid=173%2E49239%2EkgGgKQ)**
| | [Donate Now](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/2866?t=4&akid=173%2E49239%2EkgGgKQ)
---
Thank you so much,

Haley Stevens
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** Null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you chip in now to keep Michigan blue and take back the Senate for Democrats?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/2838?t=5&akid=173%2E49239%2EkgGgKQ) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/2838?t=6&akid=173%2E49239%2EkgGgKQ)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=7&akid=173%2E49239%2EkgGgKQ)
Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate.
33717 Woodward Ave #539
Birmingham, MI 48009

**➤➤ BREAKING:****Supreme Court refuses to hear challenge to Maine’s LGBTQ+ protections** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108283314/547452542/-1751156451?refcode=em-5.24.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTNiNzkxNS1hNjM4LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hMNy7S6H0kEsrI3ekAj1s9eHaM4sL6ar_7LXzDFn140=)
* * *
The Supreme Court just declined to hear a case brought by right-wing legal groups attacking Maine’s civil rights law that protects transgender people from discrimination in housing. This is a temporary win — **but it’s also a warning.** Because the legal strategy behind this case is clear: use so-called “religious freedom” claims to carve out broad exemptions from anti-discrimination laws, starting with LGBTQ+ protections and expanding from there. **This wasn’t an isolated lawsuit.** It was backed by the same dark-money networks fueling attacks on voting rights, abortion access, and public education. They want to chip away at civil rights, state by state, court by court — and they’re not stopping here. At DASS, we’re not just electing Secretaries of State — **we’re building the legal infrastructure to protect them and defend democracy in court.** We know more lawsuits are coming. Trump and his allies are testing how far they can go. The only way we stop them is by being ready to fight back in every venue, including the courts. [**That’s why we’re hoping you’ll chip in $3 – or whatever you can – today to support our fight against help us fight back against the next attack on equality and freedom.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108283315/547452543/-1751156451?refcode=em-5.24.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTNiNzkxNS1hNjM4LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hMNy7S6H0kEsrI3ekAj1s9eHaM4sL6ar_7LXzDFn140=) __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | **[Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108283316/547452544/-1751156451?refcode=em-5.24.25-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTNiNzkxNS1hNjM4LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hMNy7S6H0kEsrI3ekAj1s9eHaM4sL6ar_7LXzDFn140=)**

| Friend it's Congresswoman LaMonica McIver.
The Trump administration just charged me with crimes for engaging in congressional oversight. This is a first -- and it's a flashing red light for our democracy.
I conducted oversight at an ICE facility in my district to do my job and my lawful right as a member of Congress.
It's clear: Trump and his administration are more concerned with punishing anyone who dares to speak up than transparency or oversight.
These baseless, politically motivated charges against me make that even more obvious.
We must stand together against an administration that weaponizes law enforcement to persecute its opponents before it's too late. House Democrats stand ready to fight back against Trump's overreach and protect our democracy. [Friend](https://thmnyxhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CNF1QuZKOxkYvsfVs6QfEVZAIJ2XkFQMQos2-lnDIbBivwA_hEmcXVJPMeID1K57WxXhgED9J5VREJXEIXJlii5HYjcwY9N_c7nmC6nE2-Iq8mfcB7OvxwgBqwjrvXLsaXc4HiG12odCo9N4FJ6yLm5-hRM9UC6dnx4-XjZMpRXmjncI1PKBoUSXRw5msIVzX0BgTpV6V0Lc-QKMk0kO7RPWAb-lhZUL&c=gfKibVxaTcUb4lLWO77HXWi-AlLJNrQCTaCU_ff5JMCzPNUV-EBLiw==&ch=brX015xebyYZLh1sCVyJGGA2JkoeZDvjGWMJSXXf4m934GOn8KNa-A==)[ we need your help. Can you split a donation between me and National Ground Game PAC so we have the resources to win this battle for our democracy by taking back the House? Your support will go towards helping flip the House blue and dismantling Trump's dangerous trifecta. We are calling for 23,213 more grassroots donations before our deadline at midnight to show Republicans we're not intimidated.](https://thmnyxhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CNF1QuZKOxkYvsfVs6QfEVZAIJ2XkFQMQos2-lnDIbBivwA_hEmcXVJPMeID1K57WxXhgED9J5VREJXEIXJlii5HYjcwY9N_c7nmC6nE2-Iq8mfcB7OvxwgBqwjrvXLsaXc4HiG12odCo9N4FJ6yLm5-hRM9UC6dnx4-XjZMpRXmjncI1PKBoUSXRw5msIVzX0BgTpV6V0L8fWJsOIVlFz8Z28yZfSFg&c=gfKibVxaTcUb4lLWO77HXWi-AlLJNrQCTaCU_ff5JMCzPNUV-EBLiw==&ch=brX015xebyYZLh1sCVyJGGA2JkoeZDvjGWMJSXXf4m934GOn8KNa-A==)

name: Hakeem Jeffries
subject: stunning rebuke (Medicaid)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada Rosen for Nevada
body:
Republicans just passed the largest cut to Medicaid in American history.
| | |
---
Friend, I’ve had it.
**Republicans just passed their Tax Scam that includes the largest cut to Medicaid in American history.**

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: 78 days in ICE detention
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1648%2E791427%2EWgFK3Y)

It’s now been 78 days since Mahmoud Khalil was arrested by ICE and taken from New York to an immigration detention center in Louisiana.
Just imagine that. 78 days behind bars despite never being charged with a crime or a violation of your permanent residency status. 78 days behind bars simply because you exercised your constitutional right to speak out against the US-backed genocide unfolding in Gaza.
**[This is an unacceptable situation that has gone on for far too long. Add your name today and join me in demanding that DHS release Mahmoud Khalil and end his indefinite political imprisonment.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-may25-khalil/?source=em250524-1-180&akid=1648%2E791427%2EWgFK3Y)
**[Sign on now](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-may25-khalil/?source=em250524-1-180&akid=1648%2E791427%2EWgFK3Y)**
Israel’s assault on Gaza over the last year and a half has shocked the conscience of many. Images of death and destruction have been constant, while humanitarian aid is continually blocked by the Israeli government and Palestinian families are left to starve.
Mahmoud Khalil, a Palestinian himself, had every right to lead protests at Columbia University against what a consensus of scholars now agree is a genocide — a genocide made possible by US weapons and aid.
But the Trump administration has decided to use our immigration system as a tool to enforce their uncompromisingly pro-Israel position. That’s why Mahmoud and hundreds of others who have spoken out have been detained or had their visas revoked.
We must call this what it is: forced disappearance for nothing more than constitutionally protected speech. It is a clear assault on First Amendment rights.
**[If you agree, please add your name to mine to demand that Mahmoud Khalil be released. We cannot be silent in the face of such a blatant act of authoritarianism**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-may25-khalil/?source=em250524-1-180&akid=1648%2E791427%2EWgFK3Y)
**[Add your name](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-may25-khalil/?source=em250524-1-180&akid=1648%2E791427%2EWgFK3Y)**
Thank you in advance for speaking up and adding your voice to mine.
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=2&akid=1648%2E791427%2EWgFK3Y)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=3&akid=1648%2E791427%2EWgFK3Y)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=4&akid=1648%2E791427%2EWgFK3Y)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=1648_791427_WgFK3Y&akid=1648%2E791427%2EWgFK3Y)**.
Ilhan for Congress

Washington D.C., 20033

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana
body:
I’ve already taken it on the chin several times with the Left's lies, and it will only get worse as we get closer to election day. |
---
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=3920e563990a4ab796b501cbc2e6a738&_e=5VJe-7yzSyJXIM9HW8uCM8m90gcIuz7g9Y9PJrDZEzwOSj6zyjjEIzlJATbEfFraH1Gh0J-sBPbuOF7CHebxJCkl2c5j5Zbh1nLwDlxUe3Qmlo67sQLU3kK7c2SKgu5TCrcDWBVcepoVK500ABSdZISTX-YcxmbGLsGSxjUoClFNppl0GIn7Hu_vKms5ZM_6AkKio3m-99WzV8rAPymXIBf7Q9DPkOaBpMzLodZQ6SOWCIEVHCl2dmbZbECne0c985WnDTYrhiCYYATO70fGDeJf9HnSJFmIIl1DqSQDWwOeWEk_noAHyJkfbXOvqlnNLHrxsJUGqTtbkCG-GRnZWi879reW3Hx4JaRTErgPFttb65rFWQ7pSKUtH3Hui6MKjASaEv-vfvy1RwUoXMjH5bSB0-zsGGHY71TbDFpq5Cc%3D) Fellow American, I won’t sugarcoat this. I’m in the fight of my life.

The attacks on President Trump and his most loyal defenders in the Senate have been relentless. They’re rushing millions of dollars into battleground Senate seats across the country.

clean_body: I’ve already taken it on the chin several times with the Left's lies, and it will only get worse as we get closer to election day. | Fellow American, I won’t sugarcoat this. I’m in the fight of my life. The attacks on President Trump and his most loyal defenders in the Senate have been relentless. They’re rushing millions of dollars into battleground Senate seats across the country. I’ve already taken it on the chin several times with their lies, and it will only get worse as we get closer to election day. It will be a bare-knuckle fight to the finish because Montana could determine who controls the Senate Majority. Fellow American, I know by the end of this campaign, I’m going to be black and blue from all the Left’s attacks and the media’s brazen anti-Trump bias. For America, Steve Daines PS: The attacks from Democrats and the biased news media will be unrelenting and they have an endless stream of money. Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track.
