name: Rebecca Weber
subject: It’s never been more important that YOUR voice is heard.
body:
Correcting the Narrative on Transgender Radicalism| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=15f3f32ca7be476ba2e23433ac4b7c34&_e=-0zuU-_tYJnXaTkoxjX4AfUDrTk1gvegKu0nG_bXphZqs97sx1utadb_U2qbmkOjjDR0fyMdeGFpAzx-vAVRA-mUQP-WDVD-7T-NrlUlmY12KyKOdaEOpPs2zx0U3HG0yUS3OiZYTjClQ5Y7vvUD8VEHwXERQ0T59-95lHnDoqTODXsrq3x5I54KPIyHHdk59BDVu_22NRdcCCBrTZZfdrCqhuSvo53879d7vxgyd965CxVZ5f0rhq-QJBEsPKGbgehYw6k0ATECPdJA4TzVtFUH6GF4jtLa_SLs9xCe4ZPKfEQvBPbVmD_Wgzh8852k3CXLeqkm-EHLwUIfCOPa5sNFpbOTR0ZJCVpLCrApHHw%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, **[I need you to take AMAC Action’s PARENTS vs. PROPAGANDA: SURVEY ON TRANS RADICALISM right now.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=15f3f32ca7be476ba2e23433ac4b7c34&_e=-0zuU-_tYJnXaTkoxjX4AfUDrTk1gvegKu0nG_bXphZqs97sx1utadb_U2qbmkOjjDR0fyMdeGFpAzx-vAVRA-mUQP-WDVD-7T-NrlUlmY12KyKOdaEOpPs2zx0U3HG0yUS3OiZYTjClQ5Y7vvUD8VEHwXERQ0T59-95lHnDoqTODXsrq3x5I54KPIyHHdk5tXOThi-YkcjrFh_QpzMd9tCFrg9OAHYaonljxXDER7L-632jT6okvtih-7OWYsztUwabtwbGQBVn-2rtaYaun_jVNn33poc1pSc1GDLvEFO8SIk8R9feXlaQaOLx1C9GwpSSmegQszkLLm4u8mWIiGXW_7v1jIYRIs5uKwFBbQ8%3D)** Because “pro-trans” organizations are pushing the **false narrative** that the majority of Americans **_are backing the radical transgender movement and_** **_want to block President Trump’s executive orders._** This is more than a political fight—this is a battle for parental rights. The Left wants to take parents out of the equation and hand over life-altering decisions to schools, judges, and radical activists.**But AMAC Action believes parents—not woke ideologues—should have the final say in what’s best for their children.** This battle has never been more important, because a poll from one of these “pro-trans” organizations claims they’ve found **_“High Support Among Parents for Transgender, Nonbinary Children”..._**
---
_“Most adults would be willing to take all actions tested to support their child if they came out as transgender or nonbinary, including: encouraging other family members or friends to respect their gender identity (71%); use their chosen name and pronouns correctly (69%); and not vote for political candidates that support anti-transgender policies (65%)”_
---
Worse, here are some of the supposed “findings” from these radical pro-trans organizations:
---
* “38,600 transgender youth live in states that have “banned access” to facilities, such as bathrooms”.
* “120,200 transgender youth live in states that restrict access to school athletics.”
* 38% of transgender adolescents live in states with laws or policies restricting their access to gender-affirming care.

---
As a senior how do you feel about their findings? _Are you concerned about “38,600 transgender youth being banned from locker-rooms”?__**_Or_**_**...****Are you more concerned about the hundreds of thousands of “transgender” adults _WHO ARE_ right now free to use the restroom with REAL women and girls?** _Are you worried about the 120,200 “transgender youth” living in states that “restrict access to school athletics?”_** __Or_ ..._****Are you scared that your daughters or granddaughters might be forced to compete with,_and be injured by,_ a biological male?** _Are you worried that_ 38% _of transgender adolescents live in states with laws or policies restricting their access to gender-affirming care?_**__Or_ ..._****** **Are you horrified that children are undergoing surgeries that leave them unable to have children of their own, and make them dependent on powerful, lifelong pharmaceutical treatments, sometimes without parental consent or knowledge?****I know what side I stand on. I stand on the side of parental rights and the protection of our children.** **And that’s why I need your immediate response:[Take your AMAC Action PARENTS vs. PROPAGANDA: SURVEY ON TRANS RADICALISM _right now_ to stand with conservative seniors who want to protect America’s children _._](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=15f3f32ca7be476ba2e23433ac4b7c34&_e=-0zuU-_tYJnXaTkoxjX4AfUDrTk1gvegKu0nG_bXphZqs97sx1utadb_U2qbmkOjjDR0fyMdeGFpAzx-vAVRA-mUQP-WDVD-7T-NrlUlmY12KyKOdaEOpPs2zx0U3HG0yUS3OiZYTjClQ5Y7vvUD8VEHwXERQ0T59-95lHnDoqTODXsrq3x5I54KPIyHHdk5mdI9YliFEWt0YxB6blWuj9Gc9oOWRdd6Jy6HHBFLgja2FgJH9sT6r-eISFQgGGQjgkbJUJ_IB8jkxzzF_MNKGvaYYYsq-8DNPNvMdygAhjOEzffl61oQuzYNL_UDE7jzN-wxRVxxTwrS6G3pGcR1zMR_7Whdl6dwU8trEuyOe3w%3D)**
---
[ **TAKE THE SURVEY** ](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=15f3f32ca7be476ba2e23433ac4b7c34&_e=-0zuU-_tYJnXaTkoxjX4AfUDrTk1gvegKu0nG_bXphZqs97sx1utadb_U2qbmkOjjDR0fyMdeGFpAzx-vAVRA-mUQP-WDVD-7T-NrlUlmY12KyKOdaEOpPs2zx0U3HG0yUS3OiZYTjClQ5Y7vvUD8VEHwXERQ0T59-95lHnDoqTODXsrq3x5I54KPIyHHdk51JxoH_LeC9e9egjHvBLXFt9oWetFmMjbjr9kb5BzYzJC4sHqIvUBWcqKuaTFObwqo6GISj0C4a_S_6JmvxkDLISnaZCtxmeFZ1m3t8u-Kl-9oBnHPnIyTsjPTdgJEoLCYhYqtrrzyoZ_02Qel_ChDq5z-RIbevgeZeX7BKjSfN0%3D)
---
**My fellow patriot, my name is Rebecca Weber and I’m the Chairwoman of AMAC Action. **** ** “AMAC” stands for Association of Mature American Citizens. And when it comes to standing up for the rights of conservative seniors, “action” is what we’re known for. **With its 2 million members, AMAC is the conservative antidote to left-leaning AARP. And our 75 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates make our advocacy group, AMAC Action, a force to be reckoned with on Capitol Hill.** **[And today I’m asking you to stand with us to correct the narrative being pushed by radical organizations.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=15f3f32ca7be476ba2e23433ac4b7c34&_e=-0zuU-_tYJnXaTkoxjX4AfUDrTk1gvegKu0nG_bXphZqs97sx1utadb_U2qbmkOjjDR0fyMdeGFpAzx-vAVRA-mUQP-WDVD-7T-NrlUlmY12KyKOdaEOpPs2zx0U3HG0yUS3OiZYTjClQ5Y7vvUD8VEHwXERQ0T59-95lHnDoqTODXsrq3x5I54KPIyHHdk5DKGyPbLWGeV0JMG7GC4LTE4eqkNGuz9EOKxEGKVTt4DkYZKgIMJDhDMyERfUoVUQp_j8HLujrbryP9zKcxpdxcQ_52N71zr0ckdh7YXRmZZfKYzWxf1-vV7BIkoCz2Po-D_5YHuYuG25_9x9Cpr7KUKHpiC4GWoS_m4WDjjQB0k%3D)** At AMAC Action we know that patriotic Americans like you and I are horrified by stories of school administrators “socially-transitioning” children at school without so much as a phone call to their parents...We’re horrified by the laws being passed by states like Colorado that deem “misgendering” a form of child abuse... And we’re horrified by court rulings like those in California that have barred parents from joint custody because one parent does not want to allow a child to “transition.”It’s happening all around us—but AMAC Action is committed to fighting **_AGAINST_** the madness.But powerful left-wing organizations across the country are fighting **_FOR_** it...The terrifying reality is that **_the radical ACLU alone has over $200 million to spend each year_** fighting for “transgenderism” and other left-wing radicalism in the courts.And they aren’t just _pushing_ the Leftist transgender movement, they are aggressively _forcing_ it on us and our children. From the classroom to social media and seemingly innocuous children’s television shows -- **_transgender ideology is everywhere._** They want to make us believe WE are the radicals for wanting to protect kids.Enough is enough. ****AMAC Action is countering this radical misinformation from the Trans activists with PARENTS vs. PROPAGANDA: SURVEY ON TRANS RADICALISM.**** While President Trump has directed the federal government to recognize only two sexes -- male and female... ...he needs all the help he can get to take on the radical judges and left-wing officials in states like California and Maine who are fighting every single one of his executive orders.During President Trump’s last term, the ACLU bragged about filing over 400 legal actions against the Trump administration.And I fear that this term their sabotage will be much worse. We need definitive proof that the American people are on his side on this critical, common-sense issue.**[I'm counting on you to take AMAC Action’s PARENTS vs. PROPAGANDA: SURVEY ON TRANS RADICALISM.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=15f3f32ca7be476ba2e23433ac4b7c34&_e=-0zuU-_tYJnXaTkoxjX4AfUDrTk1gvegKu0nG_bXphZqs97sx1utadb_U2qbmkOjjDR0fyMdeGFpAzx-vAVRA-mUQP-WDVD-7T-NrlUlmY12KyKOdaEOpPs2zx0U3HG0yUS3OiZYTjClQ5Y7vvUD8VEHwXERQ0T59-95lHnDoqTODXsrq3x5I54KPIyHHdk5hTPWy-HnYDf3VEiFBjq-qvu15ZLwIVQG96Y7HyXp2tDv4TUF9PzzZFedjYhX9t8BIJU_JMsl_rwKsc9PMVk5JWl1yT_vR_AgbHHHBU3VA6npGceSAoE2AmiiIh6B6tvpMhrB5CEc2M58w4nqwAhsTjG0EwMI8aLxDvAzL656S88%3D)**
---
[ **TAKE THE SURVEY** ](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=15f3f32ca7be476ba2e23433ac4b7c34&_e=-0zuU-_tYJnXaTkoxjX4AfUDrTk1gvegKu0nG_bXphZqs97sx1utadb_U2qbmkOjjDR0fyMdeGFpAzx-vAVRA-mUQP-WDVD-7T-NrlUlmY12KyKOdaEOpPs2zx0U3HG0yUS3OiZYTjClQ5Y7vvUD8VEHwXERQ0T59-95lHnDoqTODXsrq3x5I54KPIyHHdk5u8Bn7vnHRdczOHxYuRi7XTctBzoQ7UMoXDTwtJ5HxnA0fv04DVVUqS7oor8_FjcQa6A1cz6ANgWNPDbgD74vHrtdyrpSOgfXg_lKFL5OJz1EXmwUwxBfPPbJ3vS_0vlFgIPhXOvgvpJg6obQzjBK-TUZ7g-Iw_98GmNiovgY-Zo%3D)
---
Behind this ideology lies a massive, billion-dollar industry that’s pressuring parents into allowing life-altering surgeries for their children—surgeries that leave kids unable to have children of their own and turn them into lifelong medical patients.We will call this what it is—abuse.We will call them what they are–enablers of abuse and enablers of child mutilation.And we need to know that America’s seniors stand with us in this fight.**To secure parental rights, and protect children from radical transgender ideology,[we need your answers to the AMAC Action PARENTS vs. PROPAGANDA: SURVEY ON TRANS RADICALISM.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=15f3f32ca7be476ba2e23433ac4b7c34&_e=-0zuU-_tYJnXaTkoxjX4AfUDrTk1gvegKu0nG_bXphZqs97sx1utadb_U2qbmkOjjDR0fyMdeGFpAzx-vAVRA-mUQP-WDVD-7T-NrlUlmY12KyKOdaEOpPs2zx0U3HG0yUS3OiZYTjClQ5Y7vvUD8VEHwXERQ0T59-95lHnDoqTODXsrq3x5I54KPIyHHdk534VEIyZ8y9yY7WSixdbxQ8N8WTV_x0JuOAQD2IoDfCZMQ_4BrMaqLKuRVPDAYuvHXWFKgyo8lTARveuSkuthSJmxeADbFKwSCd6ziuE9IWaV2bgswGuD6gMIsfgBffBHVcgWdec3chk6en2RVoX4p5lpfJ1hTaPHNvmNzoKrsTM%3D)**Thank you in advance for your help.
---
| | For Freedom,
---
**Rebecca Weber,_Chairwoman_****AMAC Action**

AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. clean_body: Correcting the Narrative on Transgender Radicalism| | | | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, Because “pro-trans” organizations are pushing the false narrative that the majority of Americans are backing the radical transgender movement and want to block President Trump’s executive orders. This is more than a political fight—this is a battle for parental rights. The Left wants to take parents out of the equation and hand over life-altering decisions to schools, judges, and radical activists.But AMAC Action believes parents—not woke ideologues—should have the final say in what’s best for their children. This battle has never been more important, because a poll from one of these “pro-trans” organizations claims they’ve found “High Support Among Parents for Transgender, Nonbinary Children”... “Most adults would be willing to take all actions tested to support their child if they came out as transgender or nonbinary, including: encouraging other family members or friends to respect their gender identity (71%); use their chosen name and pronouns correctly (69%); and not vote for political candidates that support anti-transgender policies (65%)” Worse, here are some of the supposed “findings” from these radical pro-trans organizations: “38,600 transgender youth live in states that have “banned access” to facilities, such as bathrooms”. “120,200 transgender youth live in states that restrict access to school athletics.” 38% of transgender adolescents live in states with laws or policies restricting their access to gender-affirming care. As a senior how do you feel about their findings? Are you concerned about “38,600 transgender youth being banned from locker-rooms”?Or...**Are you more concerned about the hundreds of thousands of “transgender” adults WHO ARE right now free to use the restroom with REAL women and girls? Are you worried about the 120,200 “transgender youth” living in states that “restrict access to school athletics?” Or ...Are you scared that your daughters or granddaughters might be forced to compete with,and be injured by, a biological male? Are you worried that 38% of transgender adolescents live in states with laws or policies restricting their access to gender-affirming care?_Or ...** Are you horrified that children are undergoing surgeries that leave them unable to have children of their own, and make them dependent on powerful, lifelong pharmaceutical treatments, sometimes without parental consent or knowledge?**I know what side I stand on. I stand on the side of parental rights and the protection of our children. And that’s why I need your immediate response: My fellow patriot, my name is Rebecca Weber and I’m the Chairwoman of AMAC Action. “AMAC” stands for Association of Mature American Citizens. And when it comes to standing up for the rights of conservative seniors, “action” is what we’re known for. With its 2 million members, AMAC is the conservative antidote to left-leaning AARP. And our 75 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates make our advocacy group, AMAC Action, a force to be reckoned with on Capitol Hill. At AMAC Action we know that patriotic Americans like you and I are horrified by stories of school administrators “socially-transitioning” children at school without so much as a phone call to their parents...We’re horrified by the laws being passed by states like Colorado that deem “misgendering” a form of child abuse... And we’re horrified by court rulings like those in California that have barred parents from joint custody because one parent does not want to allow a child to “transition.”It’s happening all around us—but AMAC Action is committed to fighting AGAINST the madness.But powerful left-wing organizations across the country are fighting FOR it...The terrifying reality is that the radical ACLU alone has over $200 million to spend each year fighting for “transgenderism” and other left-wing radicalism in the courts.And they aren’t just pushing the Leftist transgender movement, they are aggressively forcing it on us and our children. From the classroom to social media and seemingly innocuous children’s television shows -- transgender ideology is everywhere. They want to make us believe WE are the radicals for wanting to protect kids.Enough is enough. **AMAC Action is countering this radical misinformation from the Trans activists with PARENTS vs. PROPAGANDA: SURVEY ON TRANS RADICALISM. While President Trump has directed the federal government to recognize only two sexes -- male and female... ...he needs all the help he can get to take on the radical judges and left-wing officials in states like California and Maine who are fighting every single one of his executive orders.During President Trump’s last term, the ACLU bragged about filing over 400 legal actions against the Trump administration.And I fear that this term their sabotage will be much worse. We need definitive proof that the American people are on his side on this critical, common-sense issue. Behind this ideology lies a massive, billion-dollar industry that’s pressuring parents into allowing life-altering surgeries for their children—surgeries that leave kids unable to have children of their own and turn them into lifelong medical patients.We will call this what it is—abuse.We will call them what they are–enablers of abuse and enablers of child mutilation.And we need to know that America’s seniors stand with us in this fight.To secure parental rights, and protect children from radical transgender ideology, you in advance for your help. | | For Freedom, Rebecca Weber,Chairwoman**AMAC Action | | | | | AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values. | | 2032 Tally Rd, Suite 1,Leesburg FL 34748 |

name: Sarah McBride
subject: I just introduced the FAIR Leave Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
In the wealthiest country in the world, the ability to get and provide care shouldn’t ever come down to luck.
#
When my husband Andy was battling cancer, we were lucky.
Lucky that our employers gave us the time to focus on what mattered: treatment, care, and being together in the hardest moments of our lives.
But in the wealthiest country in the world, the ability to get and provide care shouldn’t _ever_ come down to luck.
**That’s why I’ve just introduced the FAIR Leave Act — a bipartisan bill to fix a glaring flaw in federal law.**
Right now, if two spouses work for the same employer, they’re forced to _split_ just 12 weeks of leave. That means less time to care for a newborn. Less time to support a parent facing surgery. Less time to grieve, to recover.
**My bill would change that, and give each spouse the full leave they’ve earned.**
In a divided Congress, this kind of collaboration is rare. But we’ve built a bipartisan coalition because this issue is so important and so personal to so many. **Now, we need to build the grassroots support to get it passed. And that’s where you come in.**
[**Can you sign on as a grassroots co-sponsor of the FAIR Leave Act to show Congress there’s grassroots momentum behind this bill?**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/em-fair-leave-act/?source=em20250524-2031&akid=2031%2E21716%2EM9cyLN)
**[Add your name »](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/em-fair-leave-act/?source=em20250524-2031&akid=2031%2E21716%2EM9cyLN)**
Thank you for joining me in this fight,
Sarah
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20250524-1&t=1&refcode2=2031_21716_M9cyLN&akid=2031%2E21716%2EM9cyLN)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=2031%2E21716%2EM9cyLN)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=3&akid=2031%2E21716%2EM9cyLN)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2031%2E21716%2EM9cyLN)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)
Paid for by McBride for Delaware

**SHOCKING REPORT:** **CHINA ATTACKS U.S. WATER SUPPLY** [](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e188346/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazE1LmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA1MjQ/LbmNseWdQdVFMWg/qP3RydmlkPTE0MTMyJkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPTIwMTgtMjAyNTA1MjQmX25saWQ9WjhLM1ZVaFNkaiZfbmhpZHM9bmNvb1h1Z2pvZlllekdscw/gaDHeVA/seqf553b04e) **_FBI's Urgent Warning Has Been All Over The News_** Chinese hackers are coming for the water supply in your hometown. Attacking city water systems, biding their time and waiting for China's signal to strike. Experts warn that Russia and Iran are also targeting attacks on our city water systems. Overflowing, damaging and poisoning the lifegiving systems that we trust to keep us safe. Like it or not, your local tap water may be our country's weakest link. Deteriorating infrastructure. Systems years beyond their expiration dates. Negligent corporations. And God-knows-what in the water we drink. We're up against arsenic, plastics, chlorine, forever chemicals, hormone-altering drug residue and a host of other contaminants. Listen, I'm not trying to be the messenger of doom... **But protecting the water supply in your home is more important than ever.** If you don't take steps to be prepared, you and your family could end up vulnerable. Forced to choose between drinking poisoned, toxic or dirty water, or going without water altogether. It sounds harsh... Mistakes like... **Getting filters that claim to purify your water, but don't prove it.** If a company doesn't have certifications from a third-party lab, show lab tests or reveal how many gallons were tested... that's a bad sign. After a couple gallons, most water filters on the market stop working for scary contaminants and start passing them into your water. **Getting bottled water with a 2-year shelf life and risking plastic leaching into your supply.** Not to mention all the money you'll waste, and the work required to carry cases of water. Plus with bottled water, you never really know what's been filtered out. **Or simply using a pitcher in the fridge... with slapshot filtration power and limited capacity.** Most pitchers hold a couple cups of water at a time. Not nearly enough to drink, cook and clean in an emergency. You'll run out in no time, just when your life depends on it. Well we have great news to share... Folks have been calling... name: Gary Sinise
subject: 20th Annual National Memorial Day Parade starts SOON!
body:
Final weekend to honor our veterans| | | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=f2d13ed22ea64375a64e72ed2a72e375&_e=8TdXeucLoj_VSGRbFyv3tEygBB6r-3Hf0xHN5OghLCdx89h7UGqZOW-nloGnhrGLu9eGVtzVVBMHFPtvbowsySA5L0zUwKAh2pf3VUu7sOnlRRnU9QAH7JCMeHfjF_i2EHr-Ux2IDFnhgjA2x1_Gi58_WmFuPkrD7SGnzWzkpsZawC1E5BiQnBcOXo-vVADZW2ztSurDt-bO13GeiQIeZLXEzSfdNHLN-EcVbAuoFhtZqxgIqKNcD53gTQ6YJM6oD_PBMorpKe0nqqQuqP8j88QuQxJMxrMViMXeav5wsZDYn_XJhZbAJiacd8UfQlyd)
---
Friend, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 __and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. **Now, I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.** This year will be a remembrance like no other, as we commemorate the 80th anniversary of victory in World War II and the 250th birthdays of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps. **[Friend, the National Memorial Day Parade is ENTIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=f2d13ed22ea64375a64e72ed2a72e375&_e=8TdXeucLoj_VSGRbFyv3tEygBB6r-3Hf0xHN5OghLCdx89h7UGqZOW-nloGnhrGLu9eGVtzVVBMHFPtvbowsySA5L0zUwKAh2pf3VUu7sOnlRRnU9QAH7JCMeHfjF_i2EHr-Ux2IDFnhgjA2x1_Gi58_WmFuPkrD7SGnzWzkpsY1PwLFsQCPtfX0kRYzcmncuTPMxBn_HQjzvbFaOtw8gblu4BsdNTa9cF3Q4eN6aP7VI0KwL20PwTEJBD-df9zRvGbfbi0TLUE-K11-pbrGuEzN-7Qs2teoNyvVPtycgPipslB4ay18j9uJ0jS55RhD)**
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=f2d13ed22ea64375a64e72ed2a72e375&_e=8TdXeucLoj_VSGRbFyv3tEygBB6r-3Hf0xHN5OghLCdx89h7UGqZOW-nloGnhrGLu9eGVtzVVBMHFPtvbowsySA5L0zUwKAh2pf3VUu7sOnlRRnU9QAH7JCMeHfjF_i2EHr-Ux2IDFnhgjA2x1_Gi58_WmFuPkrD7SGnzWzkpsbSxHDl-hKtkXZSdNQpvnWA6VhyZGKvzKD_MYNeAM_LnzkN_FdjQjdAFM0mEpKsLWeuf2TPhWRJMv3OyMPeE2dyIq6LzrZHazo_gVXwkKxjfFDUoUECIlQkjIlP_oFiw9as7pYLInoZIRB_xYSZAXtI)
---
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=f2d13ed22ea64375a64e72ed2a72e375&_e=8TdXeucLoj_VSGRbFyv3tEygBB6r-3Hf0xHN5OghLCdx89h7UGqZOW-nloGnhrGLu9eGVtzVVBMHFPtvbowsySA5L0zUwKAh2pf3VUu7sOnlRRnU9QAH7JCMeHfjF_i2EHr-Ux2IDFnhgjA2x1_Gi58_WmFuPkrD7SGnzWzkpsa5gkq9U8CV9o-Mr45K8Zjug7Q7U5msYVkjMX47bRp1an83vCgompswf1eoalBvxYJ8b0QgnJBAH35Ezs-ZzoUjN0SfjMmUeiIRAUkCo5UO-G-lZKwGst8Oux7MAx8WnurZZOVsbX7h3H2Y_0aJAHhv)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ **But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded _entirely_ by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country.** Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever.

* Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=f2d13ed22ea64375a64e72ed2a72e375&_e=8TdXeucLoj_VSGRbFyv3tEygBB6r-3Hf0xHN5OghLCdx89h7UGqZOW-nloGnhrGLFwmX2-qQ3vdkgIn2ebneVdvBpTP1vXbd0NpXoSOq2AZ85W-2uMnece2KEn-IsdmSDjdBEX5GEyD2yCiU0a1T6jhwhBaEgbmV2ytrK5ofENVNDu8ltoKsVc8uFQgUJEriQ1iTSJuZU1T85i6G2i3zZbfJHMyHmqxxVFy2fz8p5ur6scmQMjtSMVXJfIyhn2rVT1kRhIqVb73IXcAfRsKCbezYF0n_NJqUkCeWEmngzac%3D)[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=f2d13ed22ea64375a64e72ed2a72e375&_e=8TdXeucLoj_VSGRbFyv3tEygBB6r-3Hf0xHN5OghLCdx89h7UGqZOW-nloGnhrGLu9eGVtzVVBMHFPtvbowsySA5L0zUwKAh2pf3VUu7sOnlRRnU9QAH7JCMeHfjF_i2EHr-Ux2IDFnhgjA2x1_Gi58_WmFuPkrD7SGnzWzkpsYMnTn-qCxSHWvtxQzjaDmHhtTkst39UkOfviPmFFOl3g74s4Q_evwBMEzlTUqlhPt2FNmfJEjVaMN_w1MH6KNSn-Dyag7E03IV4m2iV9nS86FGGor4llYFdAhNiJbY6Y4osswdfW687JQch6zc3Tbv) If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. _And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get._ You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult. WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. _But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade._** ** **That's why we are making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's National Memorial Day Parade to honor them one last time. ** So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of victory in Europe and Japan to end World War II - and the 250th anniversaries of the Army, Navy, and Marine Corps - I encourage you to help us honor these brave veterans while we still have them with us.
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=f2d13ed22ea64375a64e72ed2a72e375&_e=8TdXeucLoj_VSGRbFyv3tEygBB6r-3Hf0xHN5OghLCdx89h7UGqZOW-nloGnhrGLu9eGVtzVVBMHFPtvbowsySA5L0zUwKAh2pf3VUu7sOnlRRnU9QAH7JCMeHfjF_i2EHr-Ux2IDFnhgjA2x1_Gi58_WmFuPkrD7SGnzWzkpsYWsTEoMuT-c0f7UJxzqThCDSYHIkcRnk1khB6GFG8Q_gUhabfCE716ZTnXSWUOq4IG_V21gF3ZBEwQ7kY3ekUbWM0w9dM4ZBdU9drJc4fUcn66szEKhG9n28AaifcYKo4WW7UrB91WRgC6JbWMgI-v)
---
And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ _**[Friend, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please - if you're able, make a gift to fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now during its 20th anniversary.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=f2d13ed22ea64375a64e72ed2a72e375&_e=8TdXeucLoj_VSGRbFyv3tEygBB6r-3Hf0xHN5OghLCdx89h7UGqZOW-nloGnhrGLu9eGVtzVVBMHFPtvbowsySA5L0zUwKAh2pf3VUu7sOnlRRnU9QAH7JCMeHfjF_i2EHr-Ux2IDFnhgjA2x1_Gi58_WmFuPkrD7SGnzWzkpsZiaflYVY3ZuZ09D642EJNXx9a3OfY9Nk2USis5qb1gEQCxPjdRLP786HD4VE-NrBdQxeqv4wDC6zJxho6VnvE8z8a1ffO4b638imRNrkTYGhIwpW9gfy9247bWq7iAuIfrLyy1oBK4TC7iyYAbbmQF)**_ Sincerely, Gary SiniseHonorary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade
---
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=f2d13ed22ea64375a64e72ed2a72e375&_e=8TdXeucLoj_VSGRbFyv3tEygBB6r-3Hf0xHN5OghLCdx89h7UGqZOW-nloGnhrGLu9eGVtzVVBMHFPtvbowsySA5L0zUwKAh2pf3VUu7sOnlRRnU9QAH7JCMeHfjF_i2EHr-Ux2IDFnhgjA2x1_Gi58_WmFuPkrD7SGnzWzkpsZ-2AFAfcypUfgKYN9Ieu8q18udxDkeoW4NP_LyiocwVE4yVEolJtkORuEdEgCTUGyofwvVEK_t7jfDQ4EE_60issJ1ClYw_80HNK4X_oFY8OgntnI6uII8I9cU9SxGS7sAu1pbufQfzcOIewM9zifM)

[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=f2d13ed22ea64375a64e72ed2a72e375&_e=8TdXeucLoj_VSGRbFyv3tEygBB6r-3Hf0xHN5OghLCdx89h7UGqZOW-nloGnhrGLu9eGVtzVVBMHFPtvbowsySA5L0zUwKAh2pf3VUu7sOnlRRnU9QAH7JCMeHfjF_i2EHr-Ux2IDFnhgjA2x1_Gi58_WmFuPkrD7SGnzWzkpsY1aR7LtKqT3ysLYrgawSC8mkGsOX1735gIhhTacuO-wFOFU6eh3EwZE7jkta-KTCFYAhQm_a8hkNVV6vezZO2QVfHe66leidvJT4zNeMCisAScvGvWvAe2QpJk6CdRhl6rkwum7dsuBKJydSdOaFSA)

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

name: Roy Beck
subject: Trump can’t fix this alone — he needs backup
body:
Birthright Citizenship was never meant for illegal aliens | | |
#
---
---
| | [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=c73b2e992006467fa9d46927ff608e44&_e=5B_Wyp75cicUjaBwdIoU9ehEEaQHSCLP8eQE4uQa3f2Z30B-_dFC4pccF7hadFE0EkvoDLkJgrh_o5UMe5uXomHb4AF375yVl2hg9QKoTx_2tZ5FExIlYswnukNtn6tw-5GeXRYHBq47nggrZlm-ML9IOefZdWjt1is9H1mmp_GX5vgAMqF3rAdbSVMaz-YFqspoF1Sc8MSJr9BTtwegsey5yr0qdHW8fb0VamjpbN_NcYfFTThYIq_j03JAM7QJYcIhshQqsUy9SltoNgxndeIPPJQDwrxwro2qOe5tf8nPDpTdN2mS0sSy5QmYneovTEwRhvnXX4mpoDufNO1kJaNQgEHE8jkpsd6CsoMuZJI%3D)
---
My Fellow Fighter, I’m writing to you today because I believe you’re an America First Patriot who’s sick of the open borders madness.** ****And that’s exactly who I’m hoping to reach with my _Birthright Citizenship Survey_. ** **[**Would you be able to set aside five minutes to fill out the survey linked here?**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=c73b2e992006467fa9d46927ff608e44&_e=5B_Wyp75cicUjaBwdIoU9ehEEaQHSCLP8eQE4uQa3f2Z30B-_dFC4pccF7hadFE0EkvoDLkJgrh_o5UMe5uXomHb4AF375yVl2hg9QKoTx_2tZ5FExIlYswnukNtn6tw-5GeXRYHBq47nggrZlm-ML9IOefZdWjt1is9H1mmp_GX5vgAMqF3rAdbSVMaz-YFqspoF1Sc8MSJr9BTtwegsVrVJaH7GHCcWkedQsEpS5Nj1bkT2q7YwBRNJjtoW5m9bScf4dPLSQ9Kr_FotnUu7KhgHkFslYEUIOzbT8u5IAQDqiGJsXNStul82txewzV7q8B1ErKy7PGdtyf9hPnDVFGBMc6i5OiUUz8YXJ1pxtQ%3D)** We’re launching a nationwide campaign to educate and activate American patriots on the real intention of Birthright Citizenship... ...and the real disaster it has become for American workers and American citizens.**[And that all starts with this Birthright Citizenship Survey that I’m asking you to complete today.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=c73b2e992006467fa9d46927ff608e44&_e=5B_Wyp75cicUjaBwdIoU9ehEEaQHSCLP8eQE4uQa3f2Z30B-_dFC4pccF7hadFE0EkvoDLkJgrh_o5UMe5uXomHb4AF375yVl2hg9QKoTx_2tZ5FExIlYswnukNtn6tw-5GeXRYHBq47nggrZlm-ML9IOefZdWjt1is9H1mmp_GX5vgAMqF3rAdbSVMaz-YFqspoF1Sc8MSJr9BTtwegsaIC9hhkS2sTD3jqtIvnrjbQLEHgjIHuhK2P8ScyihYql7ji4IMgFsZRl7wAnJ_wZ2l06oXDVbCSlTAMGVgw4RtJfz1svh81VQm07Jb9Uboaegv-sjuHu862J7a4oGL6pQJYFHylfl0sp7V6Czjo1K4%3D)** Despite what the mainstream media and too many low-level judges are saying, Birthright Citizenship for tourists and illegal aliens is not written into the Constitution.Rather, the 14th Amendment that contains Birthright Citizenship was enacted to grant full citizenship to the slaves freed by Abraham Lincoln — along with their children and their children’s children. It was not meant to apply to foreign visitors...**And it was _definitely not_ for illegal aliens.**In fact, the text of the 14th Amendment clearly states that it only applies to “persons born or naturalized in the United States, **_AND_** subject to the jurisdiction thereof.” But over time, government bureaucrats stretched the 14th Amendment and automatically gave U.S. citizenship to every birth to illegal aliens, and even to foreign nationals vacationing in the United States.Now, the situation has gotten completely out of hand...**In 2023 alone, there were roughly 350,000 births to illegal aliens in the U.S. Tourists gave birth to another 40,000.** These so-called “anchor babies” can keep illegal alien parents from getting deported and give a legal basis for a whole chain of migrants to push their way into America.Is it any surprise that human traffickers and even high-end birth tourism companies are making billions of dollars?This is not by accident – it’s by design. In fact, the Obama State Department changed U.S. visa rules to explicitly allow women to travel to America for the purpose of giving birth in 2015!Thankfully, the Trump administration overturned this rule and pushed back on illegal immigration on a number of fronts.**_But Trump can’t do it alone._**
---
[ **Take the Survey** ](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=c73b2e992006467fa9d46927ff608e44&_e=5B_Wyp75cicUjaBwdIoU9ehEEaQHSCLP8eQE4uQa3f2Z30B-_dFC4pccF7hadFE0EkvoDLkJgrh_o5UMe5uXomHb4AF375yVl2hg9QKoTx_2tZ5FExIlYswnukNtn6tw-5GeXRYHBq47nggrZlm-ML9IOefZdWjt1is9H1mmp_GX5vgAMqF3rAdbSVMaz-YFqspoF1Sc8MSJr9BTtwegsR4G1B9VgVetD7pYUh5fuyfveQyC18IzLFcO472s4qQ7ZwmUZGJzNuq6k3EfOobYM2SmxSPWtCaoy1YPxaOHoH1E1oR4bE7wwQq8N6gDkSRXoEbWzGKoeBfjMz0GqmmXxHV2mDSv09RY7idphKf3X50%3D)
---
**Fortunately, grassroots organizing is what NumbersUSA does best.** Over the past thirty years, we’ve grown from a small staff into the largest single-issue advocacy group in the United States.Back in 1996, we pioneered the tactic of masses of grassroots voters faxing elected officials directly.In 2007, when Ted Kennedy (remember him?) was trying to grant amnesty to millions of illegal aliens, NumbersUSA mobilized citizens in such numbers that they shut down the Congressional switchboard. The New York Times “blamed” NumbersUSA as the key factor in blocking Kennedy’s decades-long mass amnesty dream.It was a real David-and-Goliath struggle, and we won.Fast forward to 2025, and our populist immigration position is gaining traction in Washington.The DC power brokers are now calling us when they need to mobilize America-First patriots across the country. To be clear, that’s not because they want to talk to me, Roy Beck.It’s because they know that NumbersUSA is the connection point for 8 million members who understand how our immigration system is utterly broken......and what it will take to fix it. We’ve never had a President like Donald Trump who gets this issue on such a visceral level.But it takes more than just one man to reverse this open borders insanity. He needs a lot of congressional action to back him up and to make improvements permanent.**In our decades on Capitol Hill, we have learned that nothing grabs attention like fired-up American patriots just like you.** And there’s no denying the impact when a mountain of responses pours in from across the country.It proves that the immigration action we’re calling for isn’t just coming from me and the great folks at NumbersUSA—**no, it’s the unmistakable _DEMAND_ of the American people.**And at that point, a politician doesn’t need one ounce of courage.Just a pinch of common sense will be enough to realize that voting against the American people is a “one-way ticket to Palookaville.”That’s how you take a nationwide network of Patriots and turn it into victories at the ballot box, in Congress, and for generations of Americans to come.That’s what NumbersUSA is all about. We have the experience, we have the playbook, but we need your help to execute on Birthright Citizenship and many other key immigration issues.Since we don’t take a penny from dark money, corrupt NGOs, or the government, we rely on patriots just like you to transform our vision into concrete action. **[**So after you fill out your survey, please make a generous donation of $35, $50, $100 or even as much as $500 or $1,000.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=c73b2e992006467fa9d46927ff608e44&_e=5B_Wyp75cicUjaBwdIoU9ehEEaQHSCLP8eQE4uQa3f2Z30B-_dFC4pccF7hadFE0EkvoDLkJgrh_o5UMe5uXomHb4AF375yVl2hg9QKoTx_2tZ5FExIlYswnukNtn6tw-5GeXRYHBq47nggrZlm-ML9IOefZdWjt1is9H1mmp_GX5vgAMqF3rAdbSVMaz-YFqspoF1Sc8MSJr9BTtwegsQLBSzP5bPwH4YnKTascYjXqxYuH3Ptd48krPab78aD1CBrccX6-nbZnOYktA2X7YsNMMPAFqsb2r2nicv4_V9ISFuHGmqyIDhlXnlXsfKp3g_zGQW9cpvdWOR48N1divgZQGbcycvGUFPfEs4ipcfU%3D)****If you can’t make a larger donation at this time, I hope you’ll just cover the cost to process your survey—$3.91.** We’ve run enough of these campaigns on Capitol Hill to know that it takes a veritable army of American patriots to get through to these elected officials.And the only way to assemble an army is with a call that goes out all across the nation. **[**Your completed survey and your donation will be an indisputable sign that the time for change has come.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=c73b2e992006467fa9d46927ff608e44&_e=5B_Wyp75cicUjaBwdIoU9ehEEaQHSCLP8eQE4uQa3f2Z30B-_dFC4pccF7hadFE0EkvoDLkJgrh_o5UMe5uXomHb4AF375yVl2hg9QKoTx_2tZ5FExIlYswnukNtn6tw-5GeXRYHBq47nggrZlm-ML9IOefZdWjt1is9H1mmp_GX5vgAMqF3rAdbSVMaz-YFqspoF1Sc8MSJr9BTtwegsd3BiuY_3ttBnKNWwjuGb9nL094mbiVxkXHIebgUIEV_UoPJpCRhp4wEaKnxupR-C_AqY-4WVph0QneN3jyOEekPtDzCS7lsRbiEfMinCtkc1K4fkyrbkWS4qstGTk8zbxK5GC6f9f8XbbIB95SHhnE%3D)**
---
Thank you and God bless you today!
---
| | Roy Beck

clean_body: Birthright Citizenship was never meant for illegal aliens | | | | | My Fellow Fighter, I’m writing to you today because I believe you’re an America First Patriot who’s sick of the open borders madness. And that’s exactly who I’m hoping to reach with my Birthright Citizenship Survey. We’re launching a nationwide campaign to educate and activate American patriots on the real intention of Birthright Citizenship... ...and the real disaster it has become for American workers and American citizens. Despite what the mainstream media and too many low-level judges are saying, Birthright Citizenship for tourists and illegal aliens is not written into the Constitution.Rather, the 14th Amendment that contains Birthright Citizenship was enacted to grant full citizenship to the slaves freed by Abraham Lincoln — along with their children and their children’s children. It was not meant to apply to foreign visitors...And it was definitely not for illegal aliens.In fact, the text of the 14th Amendment clearly states that it only applies to “persons born or naturalized in the United States, AND subject to the jurisdiction thereof.” But over time, government bureaucrats stretched the 14th Amendment and automatically gave U.S. citizenship to every birth to illegal aliens, and even to foreign nationals vacationing in the United States.Now, the situation has gotten completely out of hand...In 2023 alone, there were roughly 350,000 births to illegal aliens in the U.S. Tourists gave birth to another 40,000. These so-called “anchor babies” can keep illegal alien parents from getting deported and give a legal basis for a whole chain of migrants to push their way into America.Is it any surprise that human traffickers and even high-end birth tourism companies are making billions of dollars?This is not by accident – it’s by design. In fact, the Obama State Department changed U.S. visa rules to explicitly allow women to travel to America for the purpose of giving birth in 2015!Thankfully, the Trump administration overturned this rule and pushed back on illegal immigration on a number of fronts.But Trump can’t do it alone. Fortunately, grassroots organizing is what NumbersUSA does best. Over the past thirty years, we’ve grown from a small staff into the largest single-issue advocacy group in the United States.Back in 1996, we pioneered the tactic of masses of grassroots voters faxing elected officials directly.In 2007, when Ted Kennedy (remember him?) was trying to grant amnesty to millions of illegal aliens, NumbersUSA mobilized citizens in such numbers that they shut down the Congressional switchboard. The New York Times “blamed” NumbersUSA as the key factor in blocking Kennedy’s decades-long mass amnesty dream.It was a real David-and-Goliath struggle, and we won.Fast forward to 2025, and our populist immigration position is gaining traction in Washington.The DC power brokers are now calling us when they need to mobilize America-First patriots across the country. To be clear, that’s not because they want to talk to me, Roy Beck.It’s because they know that NumbersUSA is the connection point for 8 million members who understand how our immigration system is utterly broken......and what it will take to fix it. We’ve never had a President like Donald Trump who gets this issue on such a visceral level.But it takes more than just one man to reverse this open borders insanity. He needs a lot of congressional action to back him up and to make improvements permanent.In our decades on Capitol Hill, we have learned that nothing grabs attention like fired-up American patriots just like you. And there’s no denying the impact when a mountain of responses pours in from across the country.It proves that the immigration action we’re calling for isn’t just coming from me and the great folks at NumbersUSA—no, it’s the unmistakable DEMAND of the American people.And at that point, a politician doesn’t need one ounce of courage.Just a pinch of common sense will be enough to realize that voting against the American people is a “one-way ticket to Palookaville.”That’s how you take a nationwide network of Patriots and turn it into victories at the ballot box, in Congress, and for generations of Americans to come.That’s what NumbersUSA is all about. We have the experience, we have the playbook, but we need your help to execute on Birthright Citizenship and many other key immigration issues.Since we don’t take a penny from dark money, corrupt NGOs, or the government, we rely on patriots just like you to transform our vision into concrete action. you can’t make a larger donation at this time, I hope you’ll just cover the cost to process your survey—$3.91. We’ve run enough of these campaigns on Capitol Hill to know that it takes a veritable army of American patriots to get through to these elected officials.And the only way to assemble an army is with a call that goes out all across the nation. Thank you and God bless you today! | | Roy Beck Founder and President NumbersUSA | | | P.S. I need to hear what you’re seeing where you are — and how you’re thinking about Birthright Citizenship and immigration as a whole. Take the Survey | | | NumbersUSA is a nonpartisan, nonprofit organization that believes better immigration policy is possible and needed. As America’s largest single-issue advocacy group, NumbersUSA is focused exclusively on immigration reform. NumbersUSA empowers over 8 million grassroots supporters spread across every congressional district to impact immigration policy with information, tools, access, and influence. | | | ---|---|--- NumbersUSA Education & Research Foundation1201 Wilson Blvd 25th FloorArlington, VA 22209

| **Meet Jim:** Congressman Jim Baird is a decorated Vietnam War Veteran and the proud representative for Indiana's 4th Congressional District in our nation's capital. A lifelong resident of West Central Indiana, Jim grew up on his family's farm and had the values of faith, family, and hard work instilled in him at an early age. He is an unwavering defender of America's Constitutional liberties and has spent the vast majority of his life serving our country. After earning both his bachelor's and his master's at Purdue University, Jim was assigned to the 523rd Transportation Company at Cha Rang Valley in Vietnam. He fought in two of the deadliest battles of Operation Lam Son 719 and lost his left arm during a convoy ambush in March of 1971. In a true embodiment of American sacrifice and patriotism, Jim Baird has put his life on the line time and time again fighting communism abroad. His belief in the American Dream and our American way of life go far beyond words. For the entirety of his life, Jim has fought the good fight for our country both physically and spiritually. And he wears his love for the world's greatest country on his sleeve each and every day that he shows up for work in Washington, D.C. Previously, Jim Baird spent eight years in the Indiana House of Representatives serving District 44 from 2010 to 2018. Prior to that, he was Putnam County Commissioner from 2006 to 2010. A fiscal conservative and America First Republican, Jim is incredibly proud to fight every day in DC to advance the best interests of Indiana's families through Congress. A loving husband to his wife Danise, a devoted father to his children, and the world's best pop-pop to his grandkids, Jim spends most of his free time in the company of his loved ones or tending to the family farm.

For America, Team Baird | | | | | Meet Jim: Congressman Jim Baird is a decorated Vietnam War Veteran and the proud representative for Indiana's 4th Congressional District in our nation's capital. A lifelong resident of West Central Indiana, Jim grew up on his family's farm and had the values of faith, family, and hard work instilled in him at an early age. He is an unwavering defender of America's Constitutional liberties and has spent the vast majority of his life serving our country. After earning both his bachelor's and his master's at Purdue University, Jim was assigned to the 523rd Transportation Company at Cha Rang Valley in Vietnam. He fought in two of the deadliest battles of Operation Lam Son 719 and lost his left arm during a convoy ambush in March of 1971. In a true embodiment of American sacrifice and patriotism, Jim Baird has put his life on the line time and time again fighting communism abroad. His belief in the American Dream and our American way of life go far beyond words. For the entirety of his life, Jim has fought the good fight for our country both physically and spiritually. And he wears his love for the world's greatest country on his sleeve each and every day that he shows up for work in Washington, D.C. Previously, Jim Baird spent eight years in the Indiana House of Representatives serving District 44 from 2010 to 2018. Prior to that, he was Putnam County Commissioner from 2006 to 2010. A fiscal conservative and America First Republican, Jim is incredibly proud to fight every day in DC to advance the best interests of Indiana's families through Congress. A loving husband to his wife Danise, a devoted father to his children, and the world's best pop-pop to his grandkids, Jim spends most of his free time in the company of his loved ones or tending to the family farm. | | | A personal message from Rep. Jim Baird: Peter, serving as your Representative in Indiana's 4th Congressional District has been the honor of my life. For nearly all the time I've been on this Earth, all I've wanted to do is serve the country that has given everything to me. So when it comes to my service in Washington, it's the people's best interests that dictate every single decision I make on Capitol Hill. I can't thank you enough for your continued support in the good fight to restore glory to the world's greatest country in 2025 and beyond. | | | If you're NOT in a position to donate, please refrain from doing so. I would never want you to cause financial strain for yourself or your family. There are a multitude of other ways you can contribute to the fight for IN-04 and the American people. Please click the link below and sign up to VOLUNTEER for Team Baird today! | | | OUR STORE IS OPEN! We have great deals running all year long on official Team Baird merch. Shop today and don't apologize for being loud and proud in your love for our great country! | | | | | | If you would like to donate by mail, please write the check out to: Committee to Elect Jim Baird PO Box 203, Greencastle, IN 46135 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright (C). All rights reserved. | |

body:
Not only will this budget cut off health care coverage, but it will force some hospitals and clinics to close.
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=342%2E181023%2E9-GtMO)
Team, while Michiganders were asleep earlier this week, John James and House Republicans voted for a disastrous budget bill in Washington, D.C.
This bill cuts funding for Medicaid. One in four Michiganders counts on Medicaid for health coverage.
**John James should be ashamed of his vote.**
Not only will this budget cut off health care coverage, but it will force some hospitals and clinics to close.
And it doesn’t just come after health care, either. This budget cuts funding for SNAP, Pell Grants, affordable housing, and more. It attacks reproductive rights. And it adds to our country’s debt.
**If John James is siding with Donald Trump and the extreme GOP over the needs of Michiganders, then he has no place to lead our state as governor.**
[**Help us hold John James accountable to his vote. When Michiganders head to the polls, they need to know that he voted to cut their health care. **Everyday Americans like you have worked hard to earn Social Security.** Right now, millions of people across the country rely on these benefits just to get through each month.
**But every year, out-of-touch politicians and elites in DC try to DESTROY Social Security.** Whether it’s increasing the retirement age, introducing means testing, or reducing benefits for certain Americans altogether — it’s all a direct threat to your hard-earned money.

name: Crypto Corruption Alert via Our Revolution
subject: PROTEST at Trump's Corrupt Meme Coin Dinner
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

On Thursday night, Our Revolution’s Citizen Action Team joined Senator
Jeff Merkley outside Trump’s outrageous Meme Coin Gala, calling out the
blatant corruption of political access being sold off to the highest
bidder.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26721?source=email-20250524&t=1011&akid=8543%2E5885482%2EGEf6w_ ][IMG]

This was no ordinary Trump fundraiser. This was a direct cash grab —
arranged by Trump’s business buddies to personally enrich his family. The
attendees? The top 220 buyers of the $Trump cryptocurrency, many of them
foreign nationals who paid over a million dollars per ticket.

Peter Willis, this is the
new frontier of political corruption in America: a scammy and dangerous
shift toward untraceable funds flooding our politics. And it’s not just
Republicans on the take.

On Monday, 16 Senate Democrats joined Republicans to vote for the
so-called “GENIUS Act,’ a crypto deregulation bill that would open the
floodgates to foreign cash and anonymous campaign donations. It’s a dream
come true for billionaires, scammers, and authoritarians everywhere.

This bill can still be stopped. Our Revolution is urgently organizing with
allies in Congress and around the country to stop our democracy becoming
hostage to crypto-scammers and dark-money billionaires. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26721?source=email-20250524&t=1012&akid=8543%2E5885482%2EGEf6w_ ]Will you add
your name right now and demand Congress reject Trump's dangerous crypto
scheme by opposing the GENIUS Act?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26721?source=email-20250524&t=1013&akid=8543%2E5885482%2EGEf6w_ ]ADD YOUR NAME

Thursday’s Meme Coin Gala was more than a grift. It was a warning sign of
the threat posed by this crypto deregulation bill: If we don’t act, the
ultra-wealthy will have an entirely new, nearly untraceable mechanism to
rig the system to line their pockets — and Trump's crypto coronation came
less than 24 hours after Republicans sold out Medicaid to pay for tax cuts
for his rich donors.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26721?source=email-20250524&t=1014&akid=8543%2E5885482%2EGEf6w_ ][IMG]

Senator Merkley stood with Our Revolution activists on the streets outside
Trump’s golf course because he recognizes the stakes: democracy itself is
threatened when billionaires and foreign entities gain unfettered channels
to secretly influence elections.

As Congress prepares to head home on recess, Our Revolution’s Citizen
Action Team is going to be on the ground in their districts, flooding
their offices with calls through phone-banks to make sure lawmakers hear
directly from all of us — not just big-money crypto-lobbyists.

Peter Willis, our
strongest leverage comes from you, our members and supporters. Can we
count on you? [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26721?source=email-20250524&t=1015&akid=8543%2E5885482%2EGEf6w_ ]Join thousands of progressives in signing our urgent
petition now, demanding Congress reject Trump’s dangerous crypto agenda by
voting NO on the GENIUS Act.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26721?source=email-20250524&t=1016&akid=8543%2E5885482%2EGEf6w_ ]ADD YOUR NAME

When we organize, we win!

clean_body: [ stdin# ][IMG] On Thursday night, Our Revolution’s Citizen Action Team joined Senator Jeff Merkley outside Trump’s outrageous Meme Coin Gala, calling out the blatant corruption of political access being sold off to the highest bidder. [ ][IMG] This was no ordinary Trump fundraiser. This was a direct cash grab — arranged by Trump’s business buddies to personally enrich his family. The attendees? The top 220 buyers of the $Trump cryptocurrency, many of them foreign nationals who paid over a million dollars per ticket. Peter Willis, this is the new frontier of political corruption in America: a scammy and dangerous shift toward untraceable funds flooding our politics. And it’s not just Republicans on the take. On Monday, 16 Senate Democrats joined Republicans to vote for the so-called “GENIUS Act,’ a crypto deregulation bill that would open the floodgates to foreign cash and anonymous campaign donations. It’s a dream come true for billionaires, scammers, and authoritarians everywhere. This bill can still be stopped. Our Revolution is urgently organizing with allies in Congress and around the country to stop our democracy becoming hostage to crypto-scammers and dark-money billionaires. [ ]Will you add your name right now and demand Congress reject Trump's dangerous crypto scheme by opposing the GENIUS Act? [ ]ADD YOUR NAME Thursday’s Meme Coin Gala was more than a grift. It was a warning sign of the threat posed by this crypto deregulation bill: If we don’t act, the ultra-wealthy will have an entirely new, nearly untraceable mechanism to rig the system to line their pockets — and Trump's crypto coronation came less than 24 hours after Republicans sold out Medicaid to pay for tax cuts for his rich donors. [ ][IMG] Senator Merkley stood with Our Revolution activists on the streets outside Trump’s golf course because he recognizes the stakes: democracy itself is threatened when billionaires and foreign entities gain unfettered channels to secretly influence elections. As Congress prepares to head home on recess, Our Revolution’s Citizen Action Team is going to be on the ground in their districts, flooding their offices with calls through phone-banks to make sure lawmakers hear directly from all of us — not just big-money crypto-lobbyists. Peter Willis, our strongest leverage comes from you, our members and supporters. Can we count on you? [ ]Join thousands of progressives in signing our urgent petition now, demanding Congress reject Trump’s dangerous crypto agenda by voting NO on the GENIUS Act. [ ]ADD YOUR NAME When we organize, we win! name: Deb Haaland
subject: You deserve to know why I keep emailing you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
No one in this world does anything alone.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=2159%2E400544%2EMShw-O)
I know my campaign staff and I reach out to you a lot.
We ask you for your support often. And I believe you deserve to know why:
**It’s because no one in this world does anything alone.**
That’s a life lesson I’ve learned over and over, and it rings truer than ever as we work hand in hand to build a brighter, fairer New Mexico.
I learned this while working at the local bakery, first as a sales clerk and later as a cake decorator. Keeping the bakery humming alongside me were the bakers, the dishwashers, the delivery truck drivers, and the farmers who made our operation possible.
I saw teamwork in action again when I led the Department of the Interior. I had the honor of leading a staff of over 600,000 public servants who worked in every corner of our nation and even across the globe. Each person played their own unique and important role to advance a mission that was bigger than any one of us.
Leaning into the beauty of community is how we accomplish big things.**That’s why I keep emailing to ask you to make your very first $5 donation to our campaign.** This campaign can only succeed if thousands of people – including folks like you in communities across this country – pitch in what you can to make this campaign operation run.
**[Any amount you can afford will make an important difference. If your budget allows for it, please chip in your first-ever $5 donation to our campaign today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250524_1_teamwork?amount=5&refcode=em20250524-2159&refcode2=2159_400544_MShw-O&akid=2159%2E400544%2EMShw-O)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250524_1_teamwork?amount=5&refcode=em20250524-2159&refcode2=2159_400544_MShw-O&akid=2159%2E400544%2EMShw-O)**
Be fierce,
Deb
P.S. The importance of teamwork isn’t the only lesson I still live by from my days working at my local bakery. To this day, I still love to bake birthday and wedding cakes for friends and family. 🎂💛
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20240524-1&t=2&refcode2=2159_400544_MShw-O&akid=2159%2E400544%2EMShw-O)**
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=3&akid=2159%2E400544%2EMShw-O)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=4&akid=2159%2E400544%2EMShw-O)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO

subject: Texas Senate seat FLIPPABLE - go go go go go!
body:
Texas could be the tipping point for the entire U.S. Senate - but only if we build the Democratic warchest right now. We can’t afford to wait. Rush $10 or more right now to help flip Texas and take back the Senate. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-flipasenateseat?refcode=050625_2]

Texas Republicans aren’t just picking a Senate nominee.
They’re deciding how deep they want to sink into extremism.
🔴John Cornyn wants to drag the party back to the Bush era.
🔴Ken Paxton wants to torch what’s left and build a MAGA empire on the ashes.

But here’s the real headline:
If we flip this seat, we flip the U.S. Senate.
We cannot wait to see who wins this ugly primary. We need to start fundraising NOW - so that when the time comes, the Democratic nominee has a warchest of funding ready to go. name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Re: Tax cuts for billionaires and healthcare cuts for our families
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Yesterday, I voted NO on Republicans’ harmful budget reconciliation bill. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWk67WbpX-cmhkSq6gFjAXnEzTv30sZRM0Fw6aJzFiEIeRdiudsbgaeeC3FCv8guJ4Mx-Fei0X4VEHkBZKhV0k1YC3GGlz6fqRrfMVUewwt0ZhtqtWjn5fT1psMABhqEiG_Q2xxOxNrinauSjPmlG0rGwiknLEh80ZnqiJkYs01WCrz-_cnx3CCmHaWRcLsxt-slpXECka7rjWE_lzoNxmKGpbORkEwJet-hg8pnE-ZouHRhupxUzE76A9XeLDzjNf/4gr/3cKBTtfUSteqGuXXFl4ZFg/h0/h001.A0iKVO_otgS4690C3QkMM2D-iQGhoYawqGjEmeSNS3I)
---
Friend, Last week, the Republican majority in the House of Representatives passed a shameful budget bill with tax cuts for billionaires and healthcare cuts for our families. **I voted no, and I will keep fighting to block this bill as it heads to the Senate.** Because if it passes the Senate and gets signed into law, it will kick tens of millions of Americans off food assistance, healthcare, and assistance with energy bills. It will take food out of the mouths of hungry kids and thousands of Americans will needlessly die. **We cannot accept their pro-death agenda. We must fight for our shared humanity.** [**Will you join me in the fight and chip in today so I can keep building the movement in Congress to invest in life and divest from war and destruction?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsGS6wul8IzF2EfTbi9OsgSKh73buZuhpkwWhUVzLrOZeqAcNanFVmweJkte-2f-MU_EE5jG2Ev1_eQ-SKD7t9oDk7lIhFUEvJGrpfHUGieNPBQsR5v4uFSVNVygHYTIztEbhWKsoYF2qS3GN2OlF-6ifq0sKtxIc3w3VOLWfSvTWHIjxXaXyRjPtsITA9rCC75p70rC33uVhOj70AhNv_O0pZMEcsTrIQE4_mfQtQ2Rosiuvas8zB3oMk2o9TA_pmn_wYGHepRKI1dWrW0AK7UvtQSK4jtlBpHuGbvRWRkJeflJ9FQAS0g7QFHQ6xXSh-VHSqNzwN0Lvl1vB4NgqahgQEiL41Nb-kfgoW-6vTz2OaQG-BkzkYLtulHqpLp1Ek769yH7BZCk6gnl5ipYejpmGH7MSncY1QcPlRfg9Coufc3PJHO-2G3a8AB9ADEkv4/4gr/3cKBTtfUSteqGuXXFl4ZFg/h1/h001.EY0q8yc8OKCAWJ58EGBUaGHoOYd3S7bPhjzX486xaq8) This budget bill cuts more than $1 trillion of taxpayer money from life-saving programs, while handing trillions of dollars to billionaires, weapons corporations and the military, ICE and private prisons, and corporate polluters. This is the exact opposite of what our government should be doing. **We live in the richest country in the world, yet we have some of the highest poverty rates among advanced democracies.** We have the resources to house and feed everyone and provide universal healthcare, all of which are human rights. Poverty is a policy choice, and we can end it together. **I will keep leading the fight in Congress for transformative policies to end poverty** , including sending monthly direct payments to families, ending utility and medical debt, and ensuring access to utilities like water and power. [**Will you chip in today to join me in the fight for a liberated future, where everyone has what they need to thrive?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsGS6wul8IzF2EfTbi9OsgSKh73buZuhpkwWhUVzLrOZeqAcNanFVmweJkte-2f-MXEFNCcvDxyISMnZAzXGhaA7z-XDYbRjL2bl_LDwcqZDsbw4T_hZ8r5UmSFBpUXVGFEAzCnJ1J07rkbkAm-VPTlQxxGrz7YucFy5FzwQM4ASOQt0IJA3I7hq7USZlCRk_egMHUF-7ArClYgDMvlFKeP-UIb1eLIl3djnsiJ1Mw_T0WsUUq7-PIiwC4sVSxbRRBEl1J3vT7v8kHtyldxqQvSuZxF3Fvo4kN8YAk4PKIWdmnVuX5tZW_0v4411ATa0Kc4U-5NJ60c3j_b7Es4z4V3fBOw9uG7Ou1ovEZvQEW9wHecNquy2P8a6yQFCDqg6rkRoXb-tXpcU7Mz2I_GolAm3G0AZPH9MvV7ArOcezaK8adiTxZ5749wMO6k7g7KgLU/4gr/3cKBTtfUSteqGuXXFl4ZFg/h2/h001.pm66jpsc5ketMo2GWEtL7YbWXtq5ZNfGxz1BtEBwXVA) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $15 now](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsGS6wul8IzF2EfTbi9OsgSKh73buZuhpkwWhUVzLrOZeqAcNanFVmweJkte-2f-MVvZ7hMGJmazCY95iOojXneG0GkhXqcD2ogG4HYMr-qBxgLYbLxU8x0jGCPc1-U578_CSGUHrlZaZlcs8sc2EhtS51tJGWb-W48ZyL-O-8HMg2ggZAjjFzD5IVSE6jGBlsv7GfvGj_NLPxUPutGsckPrmHTuvq15DBzgYnkqjEItoAvNUQDyap315DIPhQOTxYLZxVbiUmHQlIxRS2rwq89vJX-J0pOQAg_G8uynnTdqMwfMBsWud9ZMxra0fpvOAmcxtkxQ_iAF_95A1Khul5XV56PncO8rTDv_WCmUK0qNcqlhpTZ33RFo7i5iqnvdpUK09HpdSe8we3oL6YTGSLpgCcLT0G8pvn4bTbKSfNezkncrSqfwPzvR6MA6y5SKevFB3AmZnRR5js6blXeiCpy3DyjVTog_osoE05NJpSXQA/4gr/3cKBTtfUSteqGuXXFl4ZFg/h3/h001.Z_eiWoC9i-C5K1gvP2oxhQCmt88zpf_ht7-yQQvVefY)

If passed as-is, this Billionaire Budget will cut off utility assistance to lower-income Americans, cut environmental justice and clean energy funding, weaken crucial environmental protections, and take away opportunities for people to object to corporate polluter projects that are decimating our planet and making our families sick.
As a community activist and lawmaker, I’ve fought for years for the human right to drink clean water and breathe clean air. **I will keep fighting for environmental justice.**
I’ve passed legislation through the House of Representatives to stop water and power shutoffs, and secured more than $1.1 billion in federal funding to assist lower-income households in paying off their water bills and reconnection fees.
I’ve also introduced transformative legislation to address environmental racism, limit harmful emissions, empower frontline communities most impacted by pollution and climate change, and hold corporate polluters accountable.
**I will not back down in the fight for a humane and just immigration system rooted in dignity, with real pathways to citizenship.**
As a former immigration attorney now serving in Congress, I’ve introduced legislation to release people from ICE detention, and to protect immigrant families by ensuring due process in immigration removal proceedings. Our movement is building to protect the right to due process and free speech for all.
**Together, we will continue pushing for a true democracy that puts people over profits, and a liberated future where everyone can thrive.** We’re up against powerful people, but there are so many more of us. Major change has only happened when the people come together.
Together we have power.

clean_body: Yesterday, I voted NO on Republicans’ harmful budget reconciliation bill. | | | Friend, Last week, the Republican majority in the House of Representatives passed a shameful budget bill with tax cuts for billionaires and healthcare cuts for our families. I voted no, and I will keep fighting to block this bill as it heads to the Senate. Because if it passes the Senate and gets signed into law, it will kick tens of millions of Americans off food assistance, healthcare, and assistance with energy bills. It will take food out of the mouths of hungry kids and thousands of Americans will needlessly die. We cannot accept their pro-death agenda. We must fight for our shared humanity. This budget bill cuts more than $1 trillion of taxpayer money from life-saving programs, while handing trillions of dollars to billionaires, weapons corporations and the military, ICE and private prisons, and corporate polluters. This is the exact opposite of what our government should be doing. We live in the richest country in the world, yet we have some of the highest poverty rates among advanced democracies. We have the resources to house and feed everyone and provide universal healthcare, all of which are human rights. Poverty is a policy choice, and we can end it together. I will keep leading the fight in Congress for transformative policies to end poverty , including sending monthly direct payments to families, ending utility and medical debt, and ensuring access to utilities like water and power. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Thank you for continuing to defend our rights and our shared humanity. Each of us has human dignity and worth, and we belong here. You are not alone. WIth you in this fight, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Fri, May 23, 2025 Subject: Tax cuts for billionaires and healthcare cuts for our families To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, Yesterday, I voted NO on Republicans’ harmful budget reconciliation bill, which passed through the House of Representatives. They’re betraying our families,giving a $5.5 trillion handout to the rich and corporations while cutting more than $1 trillion from life-saving programs including Medicaid and SNAP. This will kick tens of millions of Americans off their healthcare, food assistance, and energy assistance. Cutting off essential services is a form of violence: If this budget passes the Senate, thousands of Americans will needlessly die. Already, most Americans live paycheck to paycheck, and many are struggling to put food on the table and pay their bills. Instead of investing in our communities’ needs, Republicans’ anti-life budget would spend hundreds of billions of dollars** moreon war, deportations, and immigration detention. This is an outrage. I’m fighting back, and I’m hoping you’ll join me. I will keep pushing to block this bill from being signed into law, as it now heads to the Senate. And I’ll keep leading the fight in Congress to cut military and ICE funding and instead invest in human rights like utilities and healthcare.** We live in the richest country in the world, with the resources to guarantee all Americans what they need to thrive. But we have some of the highest poverty rates among advanced democracies—because poverty is a policy choice. I’m leading legislation to end poverty by sending money directly to unhoused youth and to all families with children, and pushing to end medical debt. I promise I will not waver in the fight for marginalized and working class people. I never take money from corporate PACs, and I never will. If passed as-is, this Billionaire Budget will cut off utility assistance to lower-income Americans, cut environmental justice and clean energy funding, weaken crucial environmental protections, and take away opportunities for people to object to corporate polluter projects that are decimating our planet and making our families sick. As a community activist and lawmaker, I’ve fought for years for the human right to drink clean water and breathe clean air. I will keep fighting for environmental justice. I’ve passed legislation through the House of Representatives to stop water and power shutoffs, and secured more than $1.1 billion in federal funding to assist lower-income households in paying off their water bills and reconnection fees. I’ve also introduced transformative legislation to address environmental racism, limit harmful emissions, empower frontline communities most impacted by pollution and climate change, and hold corporate polluters accountable. I will not back down in the fight for a humane and just immigration system rooted in dignity, with real pathways to citizenship. As a former immigration attorney now serving in Congress, I’ve introduced legislation to release people from ICE detention, and to protect immigrant families by ensuring due process in immigration removal proceedings. Our movement is building to protect the right to due process and free speech for all. Together, we will continue pushing for a true democracy that puts people over profits, and a liberated future where everyone can thrive. We’re up against powerful people, but there are so many more of us. Major change has only happened when the people come together. Together we have power. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Thank you so much for fighting alongside me for justice and dignity for all. With you in the fight against fascism and for a better future, Rashida * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . Peter -

And people are taking notice. Over 130 current and former elected officials, unions and community leaders across the state are stepping up to endorse Jena’s campaign—because they know she has the experience, courage, and commitment to get the job done.
Before the end of May, we are trying to get 500 more community endorsements from supporters like you.
It couldn’t be easier to get involved, Peter. Click this link and fill out the quick endorsement form, and you’ll have done your part to help us get 500 endorsements before 5/31. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/X2R814ZkoUO_3vTXWDTXng2]

Your voice matters. Public endorsements show the momentum behind this campaign and send a clear message that Colorado is ready for bold, pro-democracy leadership. That is why we are trying to get 500 new community endorsements before the end of the month.

Peter, We won’t sugarcoat it — the past few months have been brutal. Trump’s back in power. Republicans are pushing their billionaire-first agenda from every branch of government. And working families? They're being left behind — _**again.**_ We know how heavy this moment feels. That’s not an accident — it’s the strategy. The GOP wants us to be too overwhelmed to fight back. But we can’t afford to check out now. Not when Trump and his allies are steamrolling ahead, handing out tax breaks to billionaires, gutting health care for workers and families, and laying the groundwork to sow even more chaos in 2026. They want us discouraged. They want us divided. body:
| |

Peter,

Yesterday, we reached out to you because Trump is defunding PBS.

Today, we want to tell you about one of our favorite PBS shows that was based right here in PA 🖤💛

[**But before we do – will you take a moment and share your favorite PBS show with us?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108295591/547478303/-1705150723?source=EM_NBI_PADM_20250524_ENG_MrRogers_0_3MO_PADems_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDU0ZDdlNC1iNDM4LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XuBDjyvx_w5pURks00Ts1mqkjX691CsrkGI9nfVY65E=&emci=2254d7e4-b438-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=2454d7e4-b438-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=25616296)

**Mr. Rogers' Neighborhood was filmed right here in PA – hosted by Pittsburgh native Fred Rogers!!**

This was a show so many kids (both across the country and here in PA) tuned into every morning. This program taught empathy, compassion, and kindness, and addressed important topics that weren’t always present in children’s programming.

But now, Trump is trying to make education and compassion the enemy by gutting PBS funding. Limiting access to educational television is an attempt to control what our kids learn, and we can’t stand for it.

As we prepare to fight back against Trump’s anti-democratic policies, we want to hear from you. [**Click here to share your PBS story with us!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108295592/547478304/-1705150723?source=EM_NBI_PADM_20250524_ENG_MrRogers_0_3MO_PADems_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDU0ZDdlNC1iNDM4LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XuBDjyvx_w5pURks00Ts1mqkjX691CsrkGI9nfVY65E=&emci=2254d7e4-b438-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=2454d7e4-b438-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=25616296)

body:

---
| **Dear Friend,** We just made history. This week, the House of Representatives passed the **Big Beautiful Bill** , a bold step toward restoring common sense, securing our values, and putting the American people back in charge — not bureaucrats or Beltway insiders. This victory is proof that when we stand firm on principle, we win. But make no mistake: the radical Left is furious. They're mobilizing their war chest, attacking our campaign, and doing everything they can to block this bill in the Senate and take back the House in November. We can’t let them. That’s why I’m asking for your help right now. We need to raise **$15,000 before midnight** to defend this win, fight back against the smear machine, and keep our momentum going. **Donate $25, $50, or $100 today.** You’ve stood with me before. Now, as we take this victory into the next battle, I’m counting on you again. Let’s keep fighting — together.
---

Mark Harris
