## The "Check & Balance" is so far Out of Balance it has become a whirling dervish carnival ride out of control and starting to throw the riders out in the spin cycle.
---
## The three branches of government are Executive, Legislative and Judicial.
## For Texans, that means our Governor, our Legislature and our Courts, respectively.
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud.secureclick.net/c/33448?id=2172071.798.1.7573adb05c0058512963e03fe015fb99) The X.com platform may be the best source of in depth independent citizen journalism on this subject. In fact, it must be working because Main Stream NEWS media outlets are now starting to cover exactly what we have been reporting ALL SESSION LONG.
---
**Sunlight and oxygen are the most effective disinfectants.** Before you accept a single excuse from ANYONE in this Texas 89th Legislature, let's get a few facts clearly stated: 31 Texas Senators: 20 Republicans, 11 Democrats 150 Texas House Reps: 88 Republicans, 62 Democrats **Republicans have a CLEAR and convincing majority in BOTH houses of the legislature.** _So...how did Democrats and their agenda prevail this session?_ **Here's how:** The HOUSE Republican Caucus met before the session and chose a Republican for House Speaker. Rather than ratify Representative Cook, 36 reps ran out of the room and made a dirty deal with the Democrats to choose Representative Burrows as what we now call RINO Speaker. As this was happening, we addressed the Texas Governor who holds the ultimate VETO power to make a public statement to all House Republicans that the Governor would veto the bills of any republican house member that BROKE the caucus rules and did to vote for the caucus choice, Cook. Abbott did nothing and let the RINO/Democrat Cabal rule over the Texas House. **THIS put the HOUSE in control of the Legislature.** We then publicly asked the Lt Gov Dan Patrick to simply do the same and tell the House that the Senate would simply NOT ratify ANY legislation coming out of the HOUSE, effectively a knock out punch to the RINO/DEMOCRAT cabal. Patrick did worse than nothing...Patrick starting making back room deals with lobbyist controlled Burrows and the RINOs. Now...you are naive and ignorant to think that Texas Governor Greg Abbott, Lt. Governor Dan Patrick & House Speaker Dustin Burrows are NOT fully committed to each other in a very sick and salacious loving relationship behind closed doors fueled by lobbyist dollars. THIS 89th Legislature SHOULD have been Texas most shining moment as a state. Instead, it has betrayed the voters in every possible way. If it were a person, it would be a boy that was groomed, transgendered into a woman, that lived its life as a butch lesbian pretending to be a man. **WE the VOTERS, Texans, sent them to Austin with a referendum for the TRUMP 47 Agenda. They have done everything to work against it.** YES...that is how messed up this ridiculous Texas Legislative Session has proven itself to be. Examine the record.
---

## Its almost like these perps want us to literally and viscerally hate them.
## These guys don't belong in public office any more.
## They belong on the damn gong show.

In politics money talks and TLR uses a megaphone. Texans for Lawsuit Reform (TLR): A Front Group for Corporate Interests
Editorial by Steven Hotze, M.D.,
Publisher, CRTX News Your State Representative needs to hear from you. Tell them to vote “No! on SB 30 and SB 39. You can click here to find your legislator at: https://wrm.capitol.texas.gov/home Call their office and tell them to vote “No!” on SB30 and SB39. TLR, co-founded by Houston businessman Dick Weekley, is not a grassroots movement, but a front group for corporate interests. Weekley’s TLR PAC, funded by wealthy businessmen, including insurance companies and corporations, raised and spent over $20 million in the 2024 elections, supporting Republican candidates and legislators, so that they would introduce bills like Senate Bill 30 (SB30) and Senate Bill 39
(SB39) to protect corporate profits over legitimate injury claims of Texans. The Republicans, whom TLR supported that were elected, received over $12.5 million in donations. See below for a list of these Republicans. Is your State Representative or State Senator on the list of those who the TLR tried to buy off? Not all of them support TLR’s legislation, the TLR simply tries to buy their support. Most of these legislators support your constitutional rights, but they need to hear from you. Call them to encourage them to vote “No!” on TRL’s power play! TLR’s agenda prioritizes shielding negligent corporations, like reckless trucking firms or polluters, from having to compensate for injuries inflicted upon Texans. TLR should be renamed “Texans for Corporate Greed and Immunity,” because it consistently protects corporate interests by undermining the constitutional rights of those harmed by corporate misconduct. TLR’s spent millions in donations, over $20 million to Republican candidates in 2024 alone, to buy influence to advance their corporate agenda, not conservative values. By backing SB 30 and SB 39, TLR and Weekley undermine the constitutional rights of Texans to be compensated for injuries caused by negligent actions of individuals or businesses. Your State Representative needs to hear from you. Tell them to vote “No! on SB 30 and SB 39. You can click here to find your legislator at: https://wrm.capitol.texas.gov/home Call their office and tell them to vote “No!” on SB30 and SB39. SB 30 was voted out of Texas House Judiciary and Civil Jurisprudence Committee on Wednesday, May 20, 2024 and is in the House Calendars Committee which sets the bills for a vote before the House. SB 39 is still in the House Judiciary Committee. Call the offices of your Republican members and tell them to vote “No!” on both SB30 and SB39. You can click here to find your legislator at: https://wrm.capitol.texas.gov/home You can monitor this legislation for committee hearings and votes on
SB30and on SB39 at (https://capitol.texas.gov (https://capitol.texas.gov/)). Why SB 30 and SB 39 Must Be Opposed 1\. Violation of the Texas Constitution
| 1. | Violation of the Texas Constitution
---|---
Both SB 30 and SB 39 undermine Article 1, Section 13 of the Texas Constitution, which guarantees that “All courts shall be open, and every person for an injury done him, in his lands, goods, person or reputation, shall have remedy by due course of law.”This constitutional provision ensures that you and other Texans have access to courts and meaningful compensation for injuries that have been inflicted upon you. SB 30caps health care expenses, denying full compensation for their injuries caused by corporate negligence, such as refinery workers maimed in explosions or families harmed in motor vehicle accidents. SB 39was written to “protect Texas trucking,” by restricting lawsuits against trucking companies, shielding corporations from liability for having negligently caused injuries to individuals. The Texas Supreme Court has struck down similar caps on compensation as unconstitutional (Lucas v. United States, 1988). These bills undermine our open courts provision in the Texas Constitution.
1\. SB 30 and SB 39 Harm Vulnerable Texans
1. | SB 30 and SB 39 Harm Vulnerable Texans
---|---
By capping medical expense recovery, SB 30 punishes uninsured Texans (over 4.3 million, including 623,000 children) and deters healthcare providers from treating them, leaving injured victims of corporate negligence with crushing bills. SB 39 limits lawsuits against trucking companies, even when their negligence causes catastrophic injuries or deaths on Texas roads. It protects corporate profits over families devastated by preventable crashes, undermining justice for those harmed by reckless corporate behavior.
Insurance Profits Soar, Yet No Relief for Texans
The Texas insurance industry, a key TLR backer, made an estimated $3.5 billion in profits in 2023 and $6.7 billion in 2024, an increase of over 90%, driven by premium hikes and investment gains. TLR admits that SB 30 will not lower insurance rates, nor will SB 39. These bills are not about helping you, the consumer. These bills shift the financial burden of corporate negligence onto victims, forcing families, healthcare providers, or taxpayers to cover costs, while insurers pocket record profits. SB 30 and SB 39 are about insulating corporations from liability for having caused negligent injuries, enabling them to make more profits at the expense of injured Texans.
1\. Trump’s Executive Order Requires that Truck Drivers Speak English; SB 39 Blocks Trump’s Order
1. | Trump’s Executive Order Requires that Truck Drivers Speak English; SB 39 Blocks Trump’s Order
---|---
President Trump signed an executive order making sure all commercial truck drivers speak English, but right now, Republican’s who support SB39 are opposing Trump's order for Texas.
SB 39 blocks admission of whether or not truck drivers speak English.
Texas Sheriffs oppose this bill because it makes Texas less safe.
You must act now to protect our constitutional rights and ensure justice for all Texans, not just corporate giants.
Call or email your state representative today, and tell him or her to oppose SB 30 and SB 39. Click on the following link to find your state representative: https://wrm.capitol.texas.gov/home
As conservatives, we must stand for our constitutional rights that guarantee liberty, justice, and the rule of law. Let’s defeat SB 30 and SB 39 to protect Texans from TLR’s profit-driven assault on our Texas Constitution.
Editorial by Steven Hotze, M.D.,
Publisher of CRTX News
---

body:
| | |
**Republicans are actively working to harm our communities in order to line the pockets of their billionaire donors.** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsCgbBF5rm9TF3OCm2PlAzc830mH0SaEU79yenHkofnNxmYVU0KaNelsGDLQBgZYnw_TLU4ud3LTKaTO7PuapHWBtSwDuHOU_1PJDmfavtIPtXTRGvcIMY05elkbawsMZDiy41p53tMMfOHspKEeESnidPCcbL-q3RiajoZge479oT-fhhPELA1wYoNq_kRghXNJElvDBQEAhip-I0qdSQrjGiZ1mwEXZi6tkW4Gtz99jTYBF0lfyMXhnxCF6qfqvAEZeSGxO2UD5gz6cqpg_fSiP85V16Ea51_nrHOkoMBlIuUDV7TNkwM5snz5sdIGDzsTzsXAwSzVKTiRhLyn2qyqpHuYYX0tQIF85Ps7LhfGQ/4gr/HGsdUZcFR2uH2eE8ogyrWg/h0/h001.qDIesciTFqxYURgGdC-T5Hi-D5Ku8M2r7vsE1jLKZcE)**[We have a strategy to STOP them at the local level and beyond! Chip in to help us take our communities back for the people!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsCgbBF5rm9TF3OCm2PlAzc830mH0SaEU79yenHkofnN3OEGsTH4qpa5WG2Q5KUZqEBbgWGSSjpTSpKFLiQ4A9W-GBbbjeY4LJZX-rmUv3XHjX0h-TR182CLVacIRwyMSSKS__O2XESeI-SfaVofaUuXYO81kon9wmJ6Yv-jSOmmONnBzbTlt-9RY7y8e0c1fOZWL5_npgNGB3HMDG-lqP24zXZuCD9OR91Slrz1wvVv8tFlrdHwATptw5vBQH18scwU2hwUsz2phga_Jm3c_QYKtDP45Z6wQSWg4qhsMlAzU1sOI1q8sCUEh69yj-a8uCLZV6K9V15KffmMP7Y7YWyNwlTKthipK_tll0rAoa17g/4gr/HGsdUZcFR2uH2eE8ogyrWg/h1/h001.hMVftWnx3sFd0PGe6SIFw2-nj4HHVduVFHv0XuDElGY)**

* * *
Republicans are pushing for significant cuts in healthcare through Trump's "big, beautiful bill," which could have devastating effects on entire communities in order to give the wealthiest among us more tax cuts.
These proposed changes, opposed by most Americans, threaten to strip away essential healthcare services for over 70 million people and gut the healthcare systems entire communities rely on.
The looming cuts underscore the urgent need to build Democratic power at every level of government. Local governments play a crucial role in shielding communities from the harsh impacts of harmful MAGA-driven policies.
**By strengthening local leadership, we can prioritize fairness and access to essential services, while also laying the groundwork for Democratic victories up and down the ballot in future elections.**

name: David Hogg
subject: This helps me sleep at night
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
I take this job pretty seriously.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250524-1&t=1&akid=2170%2E587540%2EjTgaJO)
Peter, I take this job pretty seriously.
I spend a lot of time thinking about how to help every single one of the candidates we endorse win their elections. And you want to know one thing that helps me sleep at night?
It’s knowing that, since our launch in 2023, **almost 14,000 of our grassroots supporters** have signed up to make monthly recurring donations to Leaders We Deserve.
**[These donations are crucial to sustaining a movement like ours, so today I wanted to reach out and ask if you would set up a monthly recurring donation too.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250524_1_monthly?refcode=em20250524-2170&amount=5&recurring=1&refcode2=2170_587540_jTgaJO&akid=2170%2E587540%2EjTgaJO)**
_Use the links in this email to start a recurring donation to Leaders We Deserve._
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250524_1_monthly?amount=5&refcode=em20250524-2170&recurring=1&refcode2=2170_587540_jTgaJO&akid=2170%2E587540%2EjTgaJO)**
Here’s why these recurring donations are so helpful:
* **They allow us to set a baseline** for what we’ll bring in in a given month so that we can budget that money toward our most pressing priorities.
* **They help us get to work well before Election Day.** A month before the election is too late to hire and train organizers, buy TV ads, and compete with more established, well-financed campaigns.
* **They help create a snowball effect for our candidates.** A lot of donors and organizations look at how much early money candidates raise to inform whether they should get involved, and recurring donations let us back young, progressive candidates early on to show their credibility.

**[So Peter, if you’re ready to elect more of the Leaders We Deserve, please sign up to make a monthly recurring donation of any amount that works for you today. It will help more than you know!](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250524_1_monthly?refcode=em20250524-2170&amount=5&recurring=1&refcode2=2170_587540_jTgaJO&akid=2170%2E587540%2EjTgaJO)**
Thanks again for all your support,
David Hogg
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250524-1&t=2&refcode2=2170_587540_jTgaJO&akid=2170%2E587540%2EjTgaJO)**

name: Letitia James
subject: Does anyone else see the irony here?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY 2026
body:
Let me be clear: I will not be bullied
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108296422/547480620/-1997846894?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1950-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYmI2NmZkOS1iNjM4LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3Q_rUhlxtveUmA_ZQGxLowR-91mwUOLDOKXAgACXCZI=)

Peter, Donald Trump called me a “totally corrupt politician” and demanded that I resign.
Does anybody else see the irony here?
**This is the same man who ran a fraudulent university. The same man who used his charity like a personal piggy bank. The same man who's faced dozens of criminal charges – including trying to overturn a free and fair election.**
And he’s calling me what?
Let me be very clear: I will not be bullied. I will not be silenced. And I will not back down from holding the powerful accountable – no matter who they are or how powerful they might be.

One of the most common questions I receive from readers are to ask _how_ they can be more involved and more informed? Well, before diving into our weekly recap of _Let 's Address This_ -- a quick call to action to do just that.
## **Call to Action**
Trust in corporate media is at historic lows, so I'm investing in partners to help remain better inoculated against misinformation and disinformation. Yes, consider this an endorsement! The [Ground News](https://substack.com/redirect/e2e17446-c942-4549-adad-2a75c59dd957?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) website and app helps me separate the bias and hidden agendas in the media.
Click below on my exclusive link and get 40% off -- bringing the cost to just $5/month.
[Get 40% Off Ground News](https://substack.com/redirect/beb98289-b054-4a0b-b28f-3520766b85c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
## **This Week 's Articles and Podcast**
Now let's Dive Into Our Recap of _Let 's Address This, _as we covered a lot this week:
* [Why I Publish Daily, Or Sometimes More](https://substack.com/redirect/f9db5157-888d-43d1-8c72-d53ebc1e23cb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (A deeply personal note to my readers)
* [Qasim Rashid Show Episode 171](https://substack.com/redirect/02ea7c23-172e-40e7-80ac-7522d7fcdbcd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (Women's health, Eugenics, MOVE, & fascism)
* [The Cruelty of Medicaid Cuts](https://substack.com/redirect/dd53e18b-627a-4968-acb3-039e35c65cf6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (What $800B in cuts mean & how to stop them)
* [Malcolm X Turns 100 & the History of Black Muslim Activists](https://substack.com/redirect/9d30a081-7b25-4be2-bf63-4d6fe4dd7878?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (Substack Live!)
* [Republicans Gut Medicaid and Medicare](https://substack.com/redirect/4f6ef5ad-04df-467e-b194-8f76aae7ce31?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (Remember Luigi Mangione?)
* [Israeli Military Opens Fire at Dozens of Diplomats](https://substack.com/redirect/69e8d69b-efe5-4ceb-9921-d78459dcd3cd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (Where are the UN sanctions?)
* [Trump Keeps Losing In Court](https://substack.com/redirect/4008465a-2802-4425-aac0-284ee340fee4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (Let's take a moment to celebrate the wins)

name: Chrissy Houlahan
subject: [SIGN NOW] NO military parade for Trump’s birthday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
body:
Add your name before midnight!
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108297238/547483766/-1072566757?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmEzYjQzYS1iODM4LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mJ0qawRUI6gWxFvMP7CnweEtLTYr5BOH5HzDFyeimZU=&emci=cf3d624a-8936-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=6ba3b43a-b838-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=21278485)
---
Derek: Every year, on June 14, veterans and servicemembers across the country raise a glass to the U.S. Army on its birthday. Fun fact? The U.S. Army is celebrating its 250th birthday, making it one year older than the United States.
What’s the opposite of a fun fact? President Trump, in true Donald Trump fashion, is making this day about himself. His birthday is also on the 14th so he’s ordered a military parade from the Pentagon, running past the White House lawn, which will cost more than one hundred million dollars ... while at the same time is firing thousands of veterans across the government and slashing services for housing and healthcare that they’ve earned.
Not to mention selecting the deeply unqualified Pete Hegseth as his Secretary of Defense, someone who has recklessly and repeatedly put the lives of servicemembers at risk and undermined our own national security.
So let’s be clear. **This parade _cannot_ be both a celebration of Donald Trump's actions that directly harm our troops and veterans AND a celebration of our Army's service. **
That's why I'm saying "NO" to a military parade for President Trump's birthday – and I'm counting on you to join me, Derek. During this critical time, we need a surge of grassroots supporters like you to make your voice heard in support of our troops. **Will you add your name to our petition and say "NO" to a military parade for Trump's birthday?**
_[**Tell Congress: NO military parade for Trump’s birthday**!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108297239/547483767/-1950269821?ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk1134-su-nd&sustainers=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmEzYjQzYS1iODM4LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mJ0qawRUI6gWxFvMP7CnweEtLTYr5BOH5HzDFyeimZU=&emci=cf3d624a-8936-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=6ba3b43a-b838-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=21278485)_
| | [Sign the Petition](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108297240/547483768/-1950269821?ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk1134-su-nd&sustainers=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmEzYjQzYS1iODM4LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mJ0qawRUI6gWxFvMP7CnweEtLTYr5BOH5HzDFyeimZU=&emci=cf3d624a-8936-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=6ba3b43a-b838-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=21278485)
---
As a third-generation veteran, I take our nation’s responsibility to respect and honor those who bravely served us all very seriously. And I won’t stand idly by as Donald Trump turns what should be a celebration of our troops into a celebration of his dangerous agenda.
Thank you for adding your name.

There's work to be done,

Chrissy
| Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
P.O. Box 222
Devon, PA 19333

subject: “The House’s Republican edge is gone. But the gerrymander lives.”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
Make a donation to help fight for fair maps and fair representation
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108297638/547485018/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc2YTNiNDNhLWI4MzgtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eGyF63IJ-16QYq0tDVc3wDPxA-5bhzdw4kFMtoh8x6g=&emci=8cf63898-5337-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=76a3b43a-b838-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, here’s a headline from the _Washington Post_ that caught our attention: **The House’s Republican edge is gone.
But the gerrymander lives.** For more than two decades, the status quo in the House was a clear bias favoring Republicans — thanks largely to egregious partisan gerrymanders in many states. This led to elections in which Republicans would win a wide majority of seats _without_ winning a majority of votes. **We founded the NDRC to root out that unfairness and ensure our representation better reflected the will of the people. And we’re proud of the progress we’re making with your support.** In the 2022 and 2024 elections, Republicans won narrow majorities in the House, but in this case, it was because they also won narrow majorities of votes. The mathematical bias they had enjoyed cycle after cycle has been reduced – and we want to thank you for your continued support that made that progress possible. But today, redistricting reform has never been more important. Many voters still live in extremely gerrymandered districts and lack fair representation. And in states across the country, partisan forces are actively trying to roll back fair maps. To quote the _Washington Post_ author directly, **“The need to curb gerrymandering, then, is as urgent now as when it previously distorted the House as a whole.”** **The NDRC’s work to defeat gerrymandering and establish fair maps is critical right now. **[**Make a donation to ensure we can continue our fight for a truly representative democracy across the country.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108297640/547485025/469381256?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_WashingtonPostNOR_email_20250524-NDRC-Tier1-WashingtonPostNOR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250524-NDRC-Tier1-WashingtonPostNOR_&utm_campaign=WashingtonPostNOR&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc2YTNiNDNhLWI4MzgtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eGyF63IJ-16QYq0tDVc3wDPxA-5bhzdw4kFMtoh8x6g=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: Make a donation to help fight for fair maps and fair representation | Peter, here’s a headline from the Washington Post that caught our attention: The House’s Republican edge is gone. But the gerrymander lives. For more than two decades, the status quo in the House was a clear bias favoring Republicans — thanks largely to egregious partisan gerrymanders in many states. This led to elections in which Republicans would win a wide majority of seats without winning a majority of votes. We founded the NDRC to root out that unfairness and ensure our representation better reflected the will of the people. And we’re proud of the progress we’re making with your support. In the 2022 and 2024 elections, Republicans won narrow majorities in the House, but in this case, it was because they also won narrow majorities of votes. The mathematical bias they had enjoyed cycle after cycle has been reduced – and we want to thank you for your continued support that made that progress possible. But today, redistricting reform has never been more important. Many voters still live in extremely gerrymandered districts and lack fair representation. And in states across the country, partisan forces are actively trying to roll back fair maps. To quote the Washington Post author directly, “The need to curb gerrymandering, then, is as urgent now as when it previously distorted the House as a whole.” The NDRC’s work to defeat gerrymandering and establish fair maps is critical right now. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thank you, The NDRC Team = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

That’s why I’m running. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Randy | With deep ties to our community and a lifelong commitment to justice and equity, Randy is running for Congress in California’s 22nd District to bring bold, compassionate leadership to Washington. To support Randy's campaign = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Paid for by Villegas for Congress Villegas for Congress PO Box 1346 Visalia, CA 93279 United States

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: President Trump's Agenda Advances
body:
[Your politics and policy brief for May 24, 2025](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/d696e47168a8f315)

Peter-

This week, the House of Representatives advanced major pillars of President Trump’s agenda included in the One Big Beautiful Bill. This mammoth legislative package is chock full of commonsense policies to extend the Trump tax cuts, bolster border security, and boost domestic energy production. I am proud to have secured very important wins in this bill that will become law once the Senate sends it to President Trump’s desk for his signature. I’m urging the Senate to act quickly so we can get these critical policies codified into law as soon as possible.

As always, thank you for your support. My primary is less than one year away, and it will determine whether I can continue fighting for your priorities in Congress. I am running for re-election because there is still so much more work to get done for Texas and America. I am proud of my record of legislative accomplishments for my district, state, and country since taking office. It’s going to take resources to make sure voters in my district hear about this record between now and next March, as well as making sure we are debunking the lies that continue to be spread about me and my record in Congress. Your donations are critical to my campaign, and I am grateful for any contribution you can make:

[CONTRIBUTE NOW >>](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/d696e47168a8f315)

ONE BIG BEAUTIFUL BILL HEADS TO THE SENATE

[Rep. Dan Crenshaw discusses the Big Beautiful Bill after its passage in the House]

[CLICK HERE TO WATCH](https://www.dailymotion.com/video/x9jzepo)

This week, after marathon committee meetings, midnight debates on the House floor, and what seemed like endless delay tactics from Democrats, President Trump’s Big Beautiful Bill passed the House.

What does this mean for average American families? Fundamentally it means their taxes won’t drastically increase in December, which is what will happen automatically unless we take action to extend the 2017 Trump tax cuts.

The bill included much more than that, though, and represents the lion’s share of President Trump’s agenda that he promised on the campaign trail in 2024. We also reined in major spending programs by well over a trillion dollars. We reformed government programs like Medicaid to ensure these programs are solvent for the people who actually need them.

The reality of legislating is crafting the most conservative bill that can actually get the votes and become law. We accomplished that with this bill. It is a huge win for House Republicans, President Trump, and most importantly the American people. The Senate should act immediately to get this Big Beautiful Bill to President Trump’s desk so he can sign it into law and start delivering these wins for the country.

A MAJOR VICTORY IN THE FIGHT AGAINST RADICAL TRANSGENDER IDEOLOGY

[Long Overdue: House Republicans vote to end federal funding for transgender procedures]

[CLICK HERE TO READ THE DAILY WIRE STORY](https://www.dailywire.com/news/long-overdue-house-republicans-vote-to-end-federal-funding-for-transgender-procedures)

One of the most important policies included in the Big Beautiful Bill is one that has been a top priority for me for years now - defunding taxpayer supported gender transition procedures and treatments on minors. This represents the most significant victory against radical transgender ideology that Congress has ever achieved.

My policy is simple - Medicaid, the Affordable Care Act, and the Children’s Health Insurance Program will no longer cover life-altering and dangerous transgender medical procedures on kids once this bill becomes law. It will save countless kids from irreversible self-harm, and will send a signal to the American people that their government will no longer be willing participants in this pseudoscience.

Gender transition procedures are the lobotomy of our generation. So-called ‘gender-affirming care’ isn’t healthcare—it’s fringe science with no proven benefit and massive risks. I’m proud to have spearheaded the policy to ban funding of these procedures for the last few years and urge my colleagues in the Senate to act swiftly to pass this into law.

[CLICK HERE TO WATCH](https://x.com/DanCrenshawTX/status/1925258300104614139)

PAYING TEXAS BACK FOR SECURING THE BORDER

[Heres the Truth - SAVE Act doesnt stop women from voting]

[READ MORE HERE](https://www.fox26houston.com/news/big-beautiful-bill-texas-border-spending-reimbursement)

Another policy closer to home that I have been working on for several Congresses also made it into President Trump’s legislative package - reimbursing Texas for doing the federal government’s job of securing the border.

For too long, Texas taxpayers have been footing the bill for securing America’s border which is supposed to be the federal government’s job. It is not fair to Texans and it allowed politicians in Washington to abdicate their responsibility to do anything about border security. Texas state officials stepped up when the Biden administration wouldn’t even do the bare minimum. And it wasn’t cheap. Over $11 billion was spent on necessary measures that protected not only our state, but the entire country.

That’s why I introduced the State Border Security Reimbursement Act back in 2021 — to make the federal government acknowledge the massive burden an open border has put on Texas from a financial and security standpoint. It’s been a long fight, but the Texas Republican delegation is bringing home a win. Reimbursement funding is now included in President Trump’s One, Big, Beautiful Bill, and it will significantly defray the burden Texas and other border states were forced to take on.

CRENSHAW CAMPAIGN MERCH MEMORIAL DAY SALE

[ENDEX FITNESS](https://endexfitness.com/)

Built for grit — with breathable, sweat-wicking fabric and flexible stretch — Endex gear moves when you move, and holds strong when it counts.

100% made in the USA. All sales go to support Dan Crenshaw's campaign and Republican races across the country.

Get 15% off now through Memorial Day. Veterans, active duty military, and first responders get an additional 15% off.

[SHOP THE MEMORIAL DAY SALE](https://endexfitness.com/)

SOCIAL MEDIA

[Here’s the facts, not fear mongering: We’re not giving tax cuts to the rich and we’re not kicking children off of Medicaid. We’re keeping taxes low for everyone and solving waste, fraud, and abuse. So Democrats, just say what you mean: you want to raise taxes on everyone.](https://x.com/DanCrenshawTX/status/1925352088038494427)

[Highlighting some excellent work by Mexico’s Navy @SEMAR_mx . They took down a violent cartel cell in Michoacán a few days ago—9 arrests, and 12 sicarios killed in the shootout. What many don’t realize is that we finally have a Mexican President who is willing to take on the cartels, and willing to work with President Trump. There’s a lot of opportunity now. That’s a big reason why I’m leading the efforts in Congress to ensure they have the resources they need. We have to treat the cartels like the threat they are: a terrorist insurgency right on our border.](https://x.com/DanCrenshawTX/status/1924625129625293273)

[Absolutely heartbreaking. The cartels’ fentanyl trafficking isn't just Mexico’s problem—it’s ours. You have to crush the supply side, not just talk about the demand problem. You crush it by making it too dangerous for the cartels to keep producing fentanyl.](https://x.com/DanCrenshawTX/status/1924571593503629610)

NEWS

DAILY WIRE: [Republicans Hail Major Reasons ‘Big, Beautiful Bill’ Is Key To Unleashing ‘Golden Age’](https://www.dailywire.com/news/republicans-hail-major-reasons-big-beautiful-bill-is-key-to-unleashing-golden-age?author=Jayden+Jelso&category=Exclusive&elementPosition=14&row=3&rowHeadline=Latest+News&rowType=Vertical+Carousel&title=Republicans+Hail+Major+Reasons+%E2%80%98Big%2C+Beautiful+Bill%E2%80%99+Is+Key+To+Unleashing+%E2%80%98Golden+Age%E2%80%99)

NATIONAL REVIEW: [Pro-Palestinian Man Charged with Murder in Shooting Deaths of Two Israeli Embassy Aides in D.C.](https://www.nationalreview.com/news/two-israeli-embassy-aides-murdered-outside-capital-jewish-museum-suspect-chanted-free-palestine/)

FOX NEWS: [Trump signs executive orders bolstering nuclear industry, domestic uranium mining](https://www.foxnews.com/politics/trump-signs-executive-orders-bolstering-nuclear-industry-domestic-uranium-mining)

That's it for this week's campaign brief. Thank you for reading.

In service,

[Congressman and Former Navy SEAL](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/d696e47168a8f315)

Dan Crenshaw

[CONTRIBUTE NOW >>](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/d696e47168a8f315)

Dan Crenshaw for Congress, 12645 Memorial Drive, STE F1

Houston, TX 77024

He’s running for the Senate now because Georgians need a leader who will fight for them, fight for President Trump’s agenda, and put America First. **Join the mission by pitching in $10 to help John defeat Jon Ossoff and win the #1 Senate race in the country.**

We’re setting a goal of raising $75,000 from grassroots supporters in the next 24 hours to maintain our momentum and overtake Jon Ossoff in the polls. # [Don't fall for the predictable playbook Dems will use to quash questions about Biden](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=164349564&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY0MzQ5NTY0LCJpYXQiOjE3NDgxMDU5MTksImV4cCI6MTc1MDY5NzkxOSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMwNzI3ODAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Q3u9VkI2DB5NUUX9HeKdbz8EAOYrtk8lKUIy1eBqrnQ)
### It begs the question; if Biden somehow managed to win a second term, would we have gotten the news about his cancer today?
| | [Julio Rosas](https://substack.com/@julioarosas)
---
| May 24| | | ∙| | Guest post
---|---|---

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/politibrawl/p/dont-fall-for-the-predictable-playbook?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/41c086b4-d00a-45d0-85f3-03ecb421d030?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
It is no surprise Biden world would pull out all the stops to get ahead of the negative press that is _finally_ circulating in the mainstream media about how the White House hid former President Joe Biden's decline in health.
From 2019 until the past few weeks, it was mainly conservative media outlets who were publishing stories about the public examples of Biden's mental acuity and physical health drastically diminishing. While there were a few stories chronicling the national security concern within the mainstream press, the overall narrative coming from our supposed betters was that **[questioning Biden's health](https://substack.com/redirect/5dbad164-8df8-4fcb-895e-fe599d6d7580?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** or pointing out the public examples was a conspiracy theory.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..I2kB5F8Psj9Zk0YusZ5sL1u4TFKiI_B4Os2YCR9369Q?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=164349564)
The Left is only now acknowledging that Biden was indeed greatly diminished because of Jake Tapper's and Alex Thompson's new book, which has new reporting from within the Democratic Party that confirms what Republicans were saying about Biden was true.
**A message from our sponsor (piece continues below)**
* * *
**[Together with The Capitalist](https://substack.com/redirect/b2f84810-9ed5-4d05-beb3-c255255ad638?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# Finance for America-loving capitalists
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b2f84810-9ed5-4d05-beb3-c255255ad638?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**Why do so many financial news sources lean left?**
Don't get your financial news from socialists and people who hate what America was built on: capitalism, free enterprise and the American Dream.
**[Subscribe to The Capitalist now for free](https://substack.com/redirect/b2f84810-9ed5-4d05-beb3-c255255ad638?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to stay informed on only the most important stories effecting your wallets and 401Ks, none for the clutter and noise you see on other publications.
[Subscribe to The Capitalist](https://substack.com/redirect/b2f84810-9ed5-4d05-beb3-c255255ad638?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**(Continued)**
The audio from Special Counsel Robert Hur's interview with Biden was released on Friday, once again embarrassing Biden and the Democrats who lashed out at Hur for his report. Hur's detailed even more evidence of the President's cognitive decline.
The book has given Democrats the greenlight to say **[they were wrong to let Biden run](https://substack.com/redirect/0870131a-cea6-4917-9b46-381054a4f9cc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for a second term, despite seeing him wither away with each passing year.
Many Democrats, already soured on Biden after President Donald Trump's victory in November, have let their criticism towards the man fly with revelations from the book and Hur's audio. While it is hard to believe there are a lot of people who truly felt Biden was fine and could serve another term, they do exist.
All of that to say is Biden and company have all but been excommunicated from their party, but it must feel that way since Biden was supposed to be the grandpa that everyone loved. "Everyone is supposed to hate Trump, not Biden," they must think.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..I2kB5F8Psj9Zk0YusZ5sL1u4TFKiI_B4Os2YCR9369Q?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=164349564)
Which is why the news on Sunday that Biden has an aggressive form of prostate cancer that has metastasized to the bone seems all too coincidental. To be clear, I do not know for sure Biden's team decided to reveal the news two days before Tapper's and Thompson's book is released to the public in order to gain sympathy and bury bad headlines, but the timing seems almost too good to be true.
Now Democrats who want to move past this wide-reaching scandal have the means to do so, regardless if Americans are going to buy it. Barely a few hours into the news being public, the playbook was already in use. It goes something like this:
"With this devastating news, we must give Biden some time to navigate this struggle without being hammered about what might have happened during time as president. Shame on anyone who would bring up old news to a man battling cancer."
It's so cynical, and yet predictable that it almost feels wrong to know that is what Democrats are now going to say. David Axelrod was among the first to voice such a sentiment.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..I2kB5F8Psj9Zk0YusZ5sL1u4TFKiI_B4Os2YCR9369Q?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=164349564)
Conversations about Biden's cognitive issues "should be more muted and set aside for now as he's struggling through this," the Democratic operative told CNN.
Biden's cancer and his diminished mental capacity are two different things. Forgetting the cancer might have been _present_ while he was still _president_ , what is reported in the book truly solidifies the need for an inquiry into who was actually in charge of the White House from 2021-2025. It is clear Biden's inner circle ran things and he was nothing more than a figurehead. A figurehead who was falling apart in front of our very eyes.
What the Democrats foisted upon the country and wanted to do so again for another four years is sickening. It is my belief many, if not all, Democrats who are trashing Biden today always knew he was not fit to serve another term.
It begs the question of if Biden somehow managed to win a second term, would we have gotten the news about his cancer today?
The fact we all know the answer to that question shows how Democrats deserve their historically low approval rating.

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Uvalde
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Friends,
On May 24, 2022, the community of Uvalde, Texas was changed forever when a shooter opened fire at Robb Elementary School, taking the lives of 19 students and two teachers.
Now, 21 families will never be whole again. Nineteen fourth graders will never have the chance to grow up, and those who survived will face a lifetime of recovery. We must never forget the innocent victims whose lives and futures were stolen from them.
I had the opportunity to visit Uvalde and meet with many of the families. It was an emotional day as we honored the victims and survivors of this unspeakable tragedy.
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may25.7MLdP7&refcode=em250524-1-b-gg&t=1&akid=10467%2E3935704%2E1Jy231)
Unfortunately, Texas is all too familiar with the horrors of gun violence. Since Governor Greg Abbott took office, gun deaths have increased 60 percent. This is unacceptable, and it’s why we launched GIFFORDS Texas. With this initiative, we are taking on the gun lobby and working with local advocates and policymakers to reverse the state’s worsening gun violence epidemic.
With our continued efforts, I truly believe we can make our country a safer place. We can be a nation where children and teachers don’t fear for their lives when they go to school. I won’t rest until that future becomes a reality. Please, keep standing with me in this important fight.
Sincerely,
Gabby Giffords
* * *

**GIFFORDS PAC works to reduce gun violence and save lives by empowering voters with information and supporting candidates who will fight for safer gun laws. Please, consider making a contribution today to fuel this lifesaving work.**
**[CONTRIBUTE TODAY](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may25.7MLdP7&refcode=em250524-1-b-gg&t=2&akid=10467%2E3935704%2E1Jy231)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=10467%2E3935704%2E1Jy231) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Team Warner
subject: With dark money spending at a record high, this could be Senator Warner’s most expensive reelection race he’s ever faced
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
We need to be prepared.

|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108299742/547492465/-1745651324?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_NewsHook_250524_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDhlMDgyYS1iYzM4LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BUKqJzNWrIw1tfhceSRQPa6SxbZulS3osq_jMpxLwUw=) Derek,

The Brennan Center for Justice reported that dark money hit a record high in 2024 federal races, to the tune of _$1.9 billion._

Here’s what that means for us: with dark money spending at an all-time high and billionaires being willing to spend _anything_ through _any_ dark money channel to buy a policy from the Trump administration, we need to expect that these same powerful folks will put up a superPAC against Senator Warner.

[_**That’s why we’re asking you today: can you chip in to support Mark’s campaign in what might be his toughest and most expensive race ever?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108299743/547492466/-1745651324?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_NewsHook_250524_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDhlMDgyYS1iYzM4LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BUKqJzNWrIw1tfhceSRQPa6SxbZulS3osq_jMpxLwUw=)

We wouldn’t ask if it wasn’t important, Derek.

It’s clearer than ever: there’s a lot on the line next year. Your rights. Your freedoms. Your bank accounts. Look no further than this past week.

Donald Trump blatantly defied the Constitution, accepting a luxury jet from Qatar while simultaneously pushing his “Big Beautiful Bill” through the House, ripping away health care from _millions_ of Americans so he can give the wealthiest few huge tax breaks.

Simply put, we need to protect Mark’s seat and take back the Senate for Democrats to rein in the Trump administration – but an influx of dark-money spending in Virginia could put that all at risk.

We need to be prepared. Your donation today will make a huge difference in our fight to overcome the GOP spending coming Mark’s way.

[_**So please, Derek, pitch in $5, $10, or anything you can afford to protect this seat and help Democrats take back the Senate >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108299744/547492467/-1745651324?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_NewsHook_250524_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDhlMDgyYS1iYzM4LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BUKqJzNWrIw1tfhceSRQPa6SxbZulS3osq_jMpxLwUw=)

Thank you,

Team Warner ****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108299745/547492468/-1745651324?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_NewsHook_250524_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDhlMDgyYS1iYzM4LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BUKqJzNWrIw1tfhceSRQPa6SxbZulS3osq_jMpxLwUw=)****

name: Lauren Lalonde, Campaign Manager
subject: Here’s what we have on file for you in 2025:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We have just a few days to go until our May end-of-month fundraising deadline, so we took a look at our supporter records since the start of this year.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250524-5081-footer&t=1&akid=5081%2E420207%2E2-ezWW)
Peter,
We have just a few days to go until our May end-of-month fundraising deadline, so we took a look at our supporter records since the start of this year. Here's what we have on file for you:
**2025 Supporter Record for Peter** **Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com **2025 Donor?:** No, not yet! [**Suggested donation: $3**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250524-1?refcode=em20250524-5081&amount=3&refcode2=5081_420207_2-ezWW&akid=5081%2E420207%2E2-ezWW)
---
_FYI: If you donated recently, in the mail, or with a different email address, your record might not yet reflect your contribution. Thank you for your support!_
[**Unfortunately, fundraising has been a little slow this month, and as of right now, we're tracking behind on our May fundraising goal. Can you chip in for the first time in 2025 to help us reach this goal?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250524-1?refcode=em20250524-5081&amount=3&refcode2=5081_420207_2-ezWW&akid=5081%2E420207%2E2-ezWW)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250524-1?amount=3&refcode=em20250524-5081&refcode2=5081_420207_2-ezWW&akid=5081%2E420207%2E2-ezWW)**
Since Pramila's first run for Congress, our campaign has been funded by grassroots donations and individual donors — not corporate PACs or lobbyists. Every dollar you chip in directly supports our work for Washington's 7th congressional district and our progressive movement.
With Donald Trump back in the White House, we have no time to waste. Our team is working every single day to build the movement we’ll need to resist his authoritarian agenda and create a government that finally puts working people first.
**But we have a lot more to do if we're going to deliver on that — starting with pushing back against the corporate interests who have stood in the way of our progressive agenda, retaking the House majority, and electing even more bold progressives to Congress who will support transformative policies like Medicare For All and College For All.**
**[All of our organizing work is only made possible because of the individual contributions from folks like you. So, we're asking you to chip in for the first time in 2025 today to keep our work going, especially during this critical time before our end-of-month fundraising deadline.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250524-1?refcode=em20250524-5081&amount=3&refcode2=5081_420207_2-ezWW&akid=5081%2E420207%2E2-ezWW)**
We know how much we can do together as a grassroots movement against corporate influence. Let's keep it going.
In solidarity,
Lauren Lalonde, Campaign Manager
Pramila for Congress
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250524-5081-footer&t=2&refcode2=5081_420207_2-ezWW&akid=5081%2E420207%2E2-ezWW)**

name: Ted Cruz
subject: WHY is it now a puzzle to find a game on TV?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
body:
Fans are growing frustrated and for good reason. Read more >>>

| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz.)
---
| | Fellow Conservative,
Every sports fan has run into this, no matter what their favorite contest or team.

**It shouldn 't feel like solving a puzzle to find these games that are increasingly being shifted onto various streaming platforms - but it certainly does!**

I grilled representatives of America's major sports leagues last week. MLB, the NBA, and the NHL were all represented. The NFL declined to speak at the hearing.

_I let these sports executives know that fans are growing extremely frustrated with their streaming practices and for good reason._ It can be next to impossible to find some games at all and many games that used to be free or easy to find are now spread across pricey apps and exclusive deals. ** ****We should not be allowing these streaming services to control our access to sports.** Sports organizations receive special treatment under the law - from anti-trust protection non-profit status to taxpayer financing of stadiums - and fans are right to ask if these teams have a civic responsibility to their communities that includes making games accessible. _ __What do you think? Are you sick and tired of this shift we 've seen in streaming services?_

[**Let me know and please pitch in if you can to fuel our fight at Team Cruz >>>**](http://trk.tedcruz._MRGDw) For Liberty,

Ted Cruz
---
[](http://trk.tedcruz.-oh4OznfiA)
---

Houston, TX 77265

name: Gov. Ron DeSantis
subject: Florida was the nation’s wake-up call
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Restore Our Nation (RON PAC)
body:
In just one week, Florida’s state agencies helped federal authorities arrest more than 1,100 illegal aliens. | | | [](http://links.email.ronpac.com/s/c/4O_6t412E0O_AHK2_xjcZvAP8LDorJ8eQXINItvmVQHxAcwPh4wEoddEe1LuMR2BjFl9wCYSj8qe87eYvxnI8CodtgpwuGHLbQlQ2dymBayjQPvHLMBkJj1rQkvzVZSCYQ4KyB3XgzYe-ZFCDPwue79H8AUetAWmPb_yDFcahWbz-ZiNTf8ekBPAhb6KEEszPrdNxPZNIMRbR55fs5HLpNUtT8NonzHqcuYTVBZTg6nNnd-tj7XK4lPScTc0_GfHTyWjdr_IvYRBfqP6Sy33ERMvv192FYJ4eKe6CtGFvvhjFoJx4YdL3dZ0Q1KqlpdEB1YxEL5PrRfDFV0EYQ5V1aCAMr6BsrEYcoj0ldtmEQlOeyVcT2P35zJrFOLl7X3uXdy7g5pAAg2M5Mru2UfX6qNwXbYKnf-vHw/BOPzn_p9WuGzZo-lD_TLrft2dSlp8gnN/9)
---
Friend, Florida is the tip of the spear in the battle to secure our borders and enforce our laws. Under my leadership, we’ve taken **bold, decisive action** to protect our communities and uphold the rule of law. It started with Operation Tidal Wave, a historic crackdown that led to the arrest of over 1,100 illegal aliens in just five days. **This wasn’t just a win for Florida—it was a wake-up call for the nation.**
---
[ **FIGHT TO SECURE OUR BORDERS** ](http://links.email.ronpac.com/s/c/3fXvj_JEXj2nFbPKL6mssGHj2sZEqYfXD4Mo1G3KSFmeu4FAoKw5338T0aWuyhlva_oObo9v5WNuXpdVvXyYS3ak3VEZyzmyNNOLxjWY1QvktwP7Kk0Y89WQCR4BFaPau8H-t0BdzrakcK4K2juuQIRtlPnIHMJg8ahfuCII9uK-8B0qZL6bJJTNMcMQOWB03l19Yy67pr8f0LriucpCBm_x7S8IZrm3d8PVGSHx0UZ13MqxZLZ3f9TEx8lEpk3URstA30n7AzzVosveMtV_qr0kXD769-ekjts07Ahpje70DBqynkC1LTewB0R_CzCbB_dY__eQO3kQoUuDEuIcJHzqHVoqHWkA_KB-vjvzLZZoesx7awbRsyc_mw7LNbBqxz-iWZKdV-uvZh6eHdjRAP5PFb-xBPn7BQ/ztZM-AcmThqMxEtrjH-mB-M1QEVLgMw9/9)
---
How did we do it? Florida banned sanctuary cities, ensuring no corner of our state harbors lawbreakers. We deputized more state and local law enforcement officers to work hand-in-hand with ICE, multiplying our strength. And we passed the strongest immigration enforcement legislation in the country, sending a clear message: __Florida will not tolerate illegal immigration.__ **Operation Tidal Wave was so successful that the federal government is now racing to replicate our model nationwide, with plans to roll out a similar program in the next 60 days.**** **
---
[ **EXPAND OPERATION TIDAL WAVE NATIONWIDE** ](http://links.email.ronpac.com/s/c/ZONTW0P5hfOyD4msrI01ZdgJeI_YvCbOoWKNBiZ3wbx0l1rbuvvB2EQ749wJO5I860cpyA_ELg5qN4cOPQhJLq6Wu8jcRLQdFBpNFU62dAGT5O8Sa9kJKTLrsg8nqpioOQIhf8DldzoAlhXJajgfrwI5bS7eyACnN7tEs4ivVwaDqFF0BdBRcqLSclYz5jPnuoXylCZ3QTOMHYNqf0GCu-iQ6NOJVTAow_83aRSQCyIpY9_TS7sFgiR3MrmTtODXM8BcYA0FhCzUm-S4sn6My9X5B_XZhbhc5QEw5BCVpUAG3m35lM-8q8T8gJ-dZBajYFPmEMcMMQO4i3rTp1t67wHn9qLXmgYtMJJWjBceqtTozEtJZrUC7YZkL-5-FPYBCzqbXIySlRqzTMuRFPZCySOKJxKmVJc1ag/uHZo9trBEpwXrGMshHYfNkVVxnNWDdwM/9)
---
Florida is leading the way, showing the country what it means to prioritize the safety and security of our citizens, but this fight is far from over. The radical left and open-border activists are pushing back, trying to undermine our efforts and flood our nation with unchecked illegal immigration. We can’t let them win. clean_body: In just one week, Florida’s state agencies helped federal authorities arrest more than 1,100 illegal aliens. | | | Friend, Florida is the tip of the spear in the battle to secure our borders and enforce our laws. Under my leadership, we’ve taken bold, decisive action to protect our communities and uphold the rule of law. It started with Operation Tidal Wave, a historic crackdown that led to the arrest of over 1,100 illegal aliens in just five days. This wasn’t just a win for Florida—it was a wake-up call for the nation. How did we do it? Florida banned sanctuary cities, ensuring no corner of our state harbors lawbreakers. We deputized more state and local law enforcement officers to work hand-in-hand with ICE, multiplying our strength. And we passed the strongest immigration enforcement legislation in the country, sending a clear message: Florida will not tolerate illegal immigration. Operation Tidal Wave was so successful that the federal government is now racing to replicate our model nationwide, with plans to roll out a similar program in the next 60 days. Florida is leading the way, showing the country what it means to prioritize the safety and security of our citizens, but this fight is far from over. The radical left and open-border activists are pushing back, trying to undermine our efforts and flood our nation with unchecked illegal immigration. We can’t let them win. That’s why I’m calling on YOU to stand with me today. This is a defining moment. Florida has lit the fuse, and the nation is watching. Will you join me in this historic fight? For Florida and our future, Governor Ron DeSantis P.S. The success of Operation Tidal Wave is just the beginning. With your support, we’ll keep the pressure on and make Florida’s model the gold standard for the nation. | | | | | | Paid for by Restore Our Nation (RON PAC). Not Authorized by any Candidate or Candidate’s Committee. www.ronpac.com | | P.O. Box 3696 Tallahassee, FL 32315 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Ernest Lineberger
subject: Special Update from Ernest Lineberger, May 24, 2025
body:
Special Event – Plus More

Hi Friends of Lineberger for US Congress!

Many of you have asked me to let you know about protests and
other events.

https://mobilize.us/s/jCn739

This is the link to our June 14th “No Kings Day” Flag Day event in Flower
Mound 2 – 4 PM.
This peaceful protest will focus on opposition to the Trump 2.0
administration authoritarian practices as he acts like a king rather than a
servant of the people. As you recall, Donald Trump, who never served in
our military, called our military heroes suckers and losers, and is working
to take away the liberties our veterans fought to preserve, is causing our
military to perform an authoritarian style military parade on June 14th,
Flag Day, the birthday of the US Army, in honor of his (DJT’s) birthday at
a cost of many tens of millions of dollars. What a waste! This ‘No Kings
Day’ protest rally is our statement against this waste and against most of
the Trump 2.0 agenda.

Many more details available via the mobilize link.

This is part of a nationwide protest event with many other events across
the country and nearby.

Just before the event above, I plan to be at the No Kings Denton rally in
Denton Square from 11 to 1 pm.

Sanger has a similar event at Sanger Square 1:30 – 2:30

Plus, there are others in Frisco, Arlington, Dallas, Ft Worth, and
McKinney.

Here are some other events on my calendar:

May 26, Monday, Memorial Day
8 AM, Lewisville City Hall Memorial
10 – 11 AM, Trophy Club Memorial Day Ceremony, 1130 Trophy Club
Dr.

May 28, Wednesday, 9- 10:30 AM, Denton County State of Homelessness, 1
Courthouse Dr

May 31, Saturday, Afternoon TBD, Denton County Democratic Party Office Open
House

June 3, Tuesday, 9-10 AM, Denton County Commissioners Court

June 4, Wednesday, 6 PM, Little Elm Veterans Social

June 6, Friday, 4 – 6 PM, Hands Off protest at VA Clinic, Denton, 2322 San
Jacinto Blvd

June 7, Saturday, 11 – 3 (?), Carrollton Pride Festival, Horizon Unitarian
Universalist Church, 1641 W Hebron

June 7, Saturday, 6 – 9 PM, Our Daily Bread Fundraiser in Corinth

June 8, Sunday, 4-7 PM, Dems of 380 meet at The Brass Tap, Cross Roads

June 14, Saturday, No Kings Protest Rallies (See first paragraph above)

If you watch any news, you know that the US House under majority Republican
leadership passed their ‘Big Beautiful Bill’ by a one vote margin last
week. ONE VOTE! First, they only have the majority by a very few number
of seats. Second, they use that majority to force so many outrageous
actions that support the Trump 2.0 administration to take away our rights,
take away our services, all to give Trump more autocratic power and enrich
the already wealthy at the expense of the common person. I’m here to flip
this MAGA seat BLUE as part of a nationwide effort to take back the house
majority and make it work for the benefit of us common Americans, as it
should, and as the constitution states.

To win, we have a very steep hill to climb. The good news is that I have
been climbing it since November 2023. I work daily to increase my name
recognition by attending events as well as digital advertising. We will be
ramping up. You can help by volunteering and donating, both are important
to keep us moving. If you have skills and time that you can lend for
organizational support, that would be huge. You can also share our
campaign information with your circle.

You can learn more details about me and my campaign at
https://www.linebergerforuscongress.com/

Putting People’s Needs First!
Before Wealthy Greed or Party Politics.
Ernest Lineberger
Democratic Candidate for US House (Texas CD26)

[https://secure.winred.com/house-freedom-action/20250512_flex7773_hfa_w_html_trumpmilitary?utm_campaign=034000000040020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455837373733&recurring=true&amount=25&utm_term=lrm-active]

_PATRIOT, _

On June 14th, President Trump is calling for a MILITARY PARADE to
HONOR our fallen soldiers and CELEBRATE our country.

_Why June 14th?_

>> IT’S THE 250TH ANNIVERSARY OF THE U.S. ARMY.

>> IT COMES JUST WEEKS AFTER MEMORIAL DAY.

>> AND IT’S OUR COMMANDER-IN-CHIEF’S 79TH BIRTHDAY!

THE DEMOCRATS AND FAKE NEWS HAVE GONE COMPLETELY RABID.

THEY ARE ENRAGED THAT PRESIDENT TRUMP IS MAKING OUR MILITARY GREAT
AGAIN:

❌ Banning DEI from the Pentagon

❌ Removing transgender ideology from our ranks

✅ Focusing on WARFIGHTING and EXCELLENCE

_And the result, {{defaultIfEmpty (capitalizeFirst first)
"Patriot"}}?_

MILITARY RECRUITMENT HAS SKYROCKETED TO RECORD LEVELS!

We’re on track of being the MOST FEARED and RESPECTED nation in the
world...

AND THE DEMOCRATS CAN’T STAND IT.

They’ve called for President Trump to CANCEL this parade. They say
celebrating our military heroes is too “expensive” and a waste of
taxpayer dollars.

Hold on...

_AREN’T THEY THE ONES WHO GLADLY SPEND BILLIONS HARBORING ILLEGAL
ALIENS AND GANG MEMBERS IN OUR COUNTRY?!_

Here’s the bottom line:

WE MUST TAKE PRIDE IN OUR MILITARY AND COUNTRY AGAIN.

So if you can’t make it down to D.C. on June 14th...

If you can’t make your voice heard at Trump’s military parade...

PLEASE JOIN US IN HONORING AND CELEBRATING OUR MILITARY BY SUPPORTING
OUR REPUBLICAN VETERANS IN THE HOUSE FREEDOM CAUCUS
[https://secure.winred.com/house-freedom-action/20250512_flex7773_hfa_w_html_trumpmilitary?utm_campaign=034000000040020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455837373733&recurring=true&amount=25&utm_term=lrm-active].

Eli Crane. Mark Green. Scott Perry. Clay Higgins. Andrew Clyde.
Chairman Andy Harris.

THEY ALL SERVED OUR COUNTRY IN UNIFORM, AND NOW THEY’RE LEADING THE
BATTLE TO SAVE AMERICA FROM THE HALLS OF CONGRESS
[https://secure.winred.com/house-freedom-action/20250512_flex7773_hfa_w_html_trumpmilitary?utm_campaign=034000000040020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455837373733&recurring=true&amount=25&utm_term=lrm-active].

So please – if going to President Trump’s military parade isn’t
in the cards for you this year, make your impact felt on this historic
day by supporting our vets leading the Freedom Caucus.

WILL YOU DONATE $25 OR MORE TO KEEP OUR

HFC VETS FIGHTING STRONG?

Thank you in advance for your support.

_With Honor,_

_Allison Weisenberger._

_Executive Director, House Freedom Action_

SUPPORT HFC VETS

PLEASE JOIN US IN HONORING AND CELEBRATING OUR MILITARY BY SUPPORTING OUR REPUBLICAN VETERANS IN THE HOUSE FREEDOM CAUCUS []. Eli Crane. Mark Green. Scott Perry. Clay Higgins. Andrew Clyde. Chairman Andy Harris. THEY ALL SERVED OUR COUNTRY IN UNIFORM, AND NOW THEY’RE LEADING THE BATTLE TO SAVE AMERICA FROM THE HALLS OF CONGRESS []. So please – if going to President Trump’s military parade isn’t in the cards for you this year, make your impact felt on this historic day by supporting our vets leading the Freedom Caucus. WILL YOU DONATE $25 OR MORE TO KEEP OUR HFC VETS FIGHTING STRONG? Thank you in advance for your support. With Honor, Allison Weisenberger. Executive Director, House Freedom Action SUPPORT HFC VETS [] MAKE YOUR IMPACT FELT ON THIS HISTORIC DAY [] FOLLOW US HERE [] [] [] [] [] PAID FOR BY HOUSE FREEDOM ACTION. name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: The largest Medicaid cut in history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
If we’re going to protect and expand our access to healthcare, we need to elect a Democratic majority that will fight for it.
Republicans in Congress just passed a Trump-backed budget that includes the **_largest_ Medicaid cut in history**. If it passes the Senate, they will slash hundreds of billions of dollars from the program that **over 72 million Americans depend on** for healthcare. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108302046/547500611/1276597034?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.05.24_Medicaid_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNWYwOWRkYy1jMjM4LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dS6aEXaTQr7mITbbwy87qK8uZ8sllkLT8ioyvEbuXfA=) _— Mother Jones_ This isn’t about fiscal responsibility — it’s about greed. While families lose access to care, Trump is handing billionaires like Elon Musk massive tax breaks — all paid for by gutting Medicaid, Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Programs (SNAP), and other programs working people count on to survive. [**_If we’re going to stop this — if we’re going to protect and expand our access to healthcare — we need to take back the House and the Senate. Will you chip in today?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108302048/547500614/1276597034?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.05.24_Medicaid_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNWYwOWRkYy1jMjM4LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dS6aEXaTQr7mITbbwy87qK8uZ8sllkLT8ioyvEbuXfA=) | | [DONATE NOW >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108302050/547500617/1276597034?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.05.24_Medicaid_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNWYwOWRkYy1jMjM4LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dS6aEXaTQr7mITbbwy87qK8uZ8sllkLT8ioyvEbuXfA=)
---
The GOP plan is a disaster for working families and will ensure the economy is rigged even further against everyday Americans. Plain and simple, it forces families to choose between care and groceries while billionaires pocket more tax breaks.
I’ve spent my career fighting to expand health care access, and I’m not stopping now. But I can’t do this work alone.
We need to flip the House and the Senate — because as long as Trump and his allies hold power, they _will_ keep coming after the care millions depend on.
[**_Will you rush a donation of any amount to help me fight back, and elect a Democratic majority that will protect our right to healthcare?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108302052/547500619/1276597034?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.05.24_Medicaid_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNWYwOWRkYy1jMjM4LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dS6aEXaTQr7mITbbwy87qK8uZ8sllkLT8ioyvEbuXfA=)

clean_body: If we’re going to protect and expand our access to healthcare, we need to elect a Democratic majority that will fight for it. Republicans in Congress just passed a Trump-backed budget that includes the largest Medicaid cut in history. If it passes the Senate, they will slash hundreds of billions of dollars from the program that over 72 million Americans depend on for healthcare. = — Mother Jones This isn’t about fiscal responsibility — it’s about greed. While families lose access to care, Trump is handing billionaires like Elon Musk massive tax breaks — all paid for by gutting Medicaid, Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Programs (SNAP), and other programs working people count on to survive. = | | = The GOP plan is a disaster for working families and will ensure the economy is rigged even further against everyday Americans. Plain and simple, it forces families to choose between care and groceries while billionaires pocket more tax breaks. I’ve spent my career fighting to expand health care access, and I’m not stopping now. But I can’t do this work alone. We need to flip the House and the Senate — because as long as Trump and his allies hold power, they will keep coming after the care millions depend on. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for standing with me. — Kirsten * = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I am truly honored to have won reelection, and I promise to continue the critical work toward bipartisan solutions for New Yorkers as we enter this new term. While we had many victories in New York this election season, our fight to retake control of the Senate is far from over. = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: This is my story.
body:
Fellow American, I grew up in a single room behind my parents’ family-owned liquor store, restaurant, and pool hall in Central, South Carolina. I was the first in my family to attend college, and while I was in school, I lost my mother and father within two years of one another. |
---
Fellow American,

I grew up in a single room behind my parents' family-owned liquor store, restaurant, and pool hall in Central, South Carolina.

I was the first in my family to attend college, and while I was in school, I lost my mother and father within two years of one another. I quickly took on the responsibility of helping raise my 13-year-old sister, Darline, and running the family businesses.

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=3aa19793720142a28de0626143c664d9&_e=ekQS5Ep8GBBkslCFI5KcYvVRCyw4pkg5X_kuVsEbKGkAUFrIYINy8HvcZ8MwecKrfwNIYFqr6jOgABrraaxAiPmIyEzAsr9W85mBLOzP7jfJxaCiHAPqnU29v_H-S02HAijAyd3fJwTQ_uUDfkrXaQUBCfMDu6Qjt36wi4RiDhV1nSOcdELcQhpHSidIaJ88gRXrkuNTnpJt0AQeN7gkSI9mvMPq6arst2vDZcEHqdeT4a_mXv2Kx4VwCFMWy9CjBq0kZL_ZtwP_E-JviYdG6vnAegjBQksdOrbikHyPpFmxI3viCMUFggCVCx317YXB1xK1_viRMi3esLzHp3wwo0O93ENBKRnr8qM0_KowAtWSIabEOwwtT4d1emZEtdf4)
**I had to grow up fast, Fellow American,_and I learned many life lessons at an early age._**

After attending law school, I joined the U.S. Air Force as a member of the Judge Advocate General Corps, where I served as a military prosecutor and defense attorney.

Even after being elected to the United States Senate, I continued to wear the uniform and served in the U.S. Air Force Reserves, where I performed several short deployments in the war zones of Afghanistan and Iraq.

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=3aa19793720142a28de0626143c664d9&_e=ekQS5Ep8GBBkslCFI5KcYvVRCyw4pkg5X_kuVsEbKGkAUFrIYINy8HvcZ8MwecKrfwNIYFqr6jOgABrraaxAiPmIyEzAsr9W85mBLOzP7jfJxaCiHAPqnU29v_H-S02HAijAyd3fJwTQ_uUDfkrXaQUBCfMDu6Qjt36wi4RiDhV1nSOcdELcQhpHSidIaJ88gRXrkuNTnpJt0AQeN7gkSI9mvMPq6arst2vDZcEHqdcnA3vRJ3gHiHS3KhRoTioxO87UcdKnN7SRQJZGMBbk5PMyqJCDR-p0DwhdRX9Rs1N31aBAicYD2PdTYBVxQlH2ZUB68D4IbY6yw2QL3kW4AzWdBUmLpdUgzsAcfye_kEvIU2WfszON1VSdpxvcylUe)
Fellow American, my story is similar to that of most Americans. I didn't grow up with a silver spoon in my mouth with everything handed to me. I had to grow up fast and work hard. I learned a lot of valuable lessons at a young age and took on a whole lot of responsibility.

But one thing stuck with me over the years -- the perspectives I gained from listening to the hard-working South Carolinians who were regulars at my family's pool hall or my brave colleagues in the military. Their perspectives, whether I agreed with them or not, helped build my foundation for understanding what Americans need.

**It's no secret that our nation is sharply divided right now, but there are some things we should all agree on.**

**We need a country that is a safe place to live and raise a family, and we need a country where the American Dream is alive and possible for everyone, no matter where they start from.**

Fellow American, I'm fighting every day to make those two things a reality. Sadly, there are people across the aisle in Washington who simply can't agree with us on these issues. They are okay with open borders and the flow of violent crime into our neighborhoods and onto our streets. They are okay with punishing hard-working Americans with higher taxes, deepening the burden on them and their families.

**[That's why I'm reaching out with a simple request: if you have a few dollars to spare, would you consider making a contribution to support my campaign by clicking this link or the button below?](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=3aa19793720142a28de0626143c664d9&_e=ekQS5Ep8GBBkslCFI5KcYvVRCyw4pkg5X_kuVsEbKGkAUFrIYINy8HvcZ8MwecKrfwNIYFqr6jOgABrraaxAiPmIyEzAsr9W85mBLOzP7jfJxaCiHAPqnU29v_H-S02HAijAyd3fJwTQ_uUDfkrXaQUBCfMDu6Qjt36wi4RiDhV1nSOcdELcQhpHSidIaJ88gRXrkuNTnpJt0AQeN7gkSI9mvMPq6arst2vDZcEHqddeUWxREk7_Ur79iC9jNoBeRyNGBjZ8r1C-jdYH6jGPYZXqPP0VcylWLrkfZAGHPb-jEKB6wio7A-eGIrlbgYOfZmmYvK5lcMZYwDx0e1gJRipT8a-1V84PZ6sFhx53JWaCxaqn27lhRaZT4EtxQnTR)**

| [** CONTRIBUTE HERE **](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=3aa19793720142a28de0626143c664d9&_e=ekQS5Ep8GBBkslCFI5KcYvVRCyw4pkg5X_kuVsEbKGkAUFrIYINy8HvcZ8MwecKrfwNIYFqr6jOgABrraaxAiPmIyEzAsr9W85mBLOzP7jfJxaCiHAPqnU29v_H-S02HAijAyd3fJwTQ_uUDfkrXaQUBCfMDu6Qjt36wi4RiDhV1nSOcdELcQhpHSidIaJ88gRXrkuNTnpJt0AQeN7gkSI9mvMPq6arst2vDZcEHqdf_Q2PywL2fMf1hSV7cwNHrELDUHxaTPcLWU4M1tvlHSywQtIrtsyfgf9S6doujfaat36nE5QjjDXo6NThwrYlcxtB3T3Gei8D2i05oYlzf2mE3jqEnF-cfVABs3CUDYEwqS5j5TiRHyOQym3Y2UzXY)
---

If you're unable to contribute financially, I understand. I'd greatly appreciate it if you could forward this email along to a friend or family member to help amplify my message.

Together, I know we can build the country that protects our communities, rewards hard work, and ensures every hard-working American has a shot at their dreams, just like I was so fortunate to have.

Thank you for taking a moment out of your busy day to read this message.

Sincerely,
Lindsey Graham

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=3aa19793720142a28de0626143c664d9&_e=ekQS5Ep8GBBkslCFI5KcYrUYXziN5FcG_x_bS8FY5SAxjhxoNIevOhmd8jYtCnVW7-q-AM0_07sh8JcuauAkGxKbEIay-nzeLCAeSkDnFeGLAcrjXQXRv3M2YvLf3DigX8-wMYcvvR4urcN92wX5dR4qJVaVoG-xPbuwqg57JYzBZ1VL-0TLHYjK4p432eKV7pArv3lxIdnWporW0IvX9eQo8NL4L3korZrtGUIh6Ao%3D)

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=3aa19793720142a28de0626143c664d9&_e=ekQS5Ep8GBBkslCFI5KcYvVRCyw4pkg5X_kuVsEbKGkAUFrIYINy8HvcZ8MwecKrfwNIYFqr6jOgABrraaxAiPmIyEzAsr9W85mBLOzP7jfJxaCiHAPqnU29v_H-S02HAijAyd3fJwTQ_uUDfkrXaQUBCfMDu6Qjt36wi4RiDhV1nSOcdELcQhpHSidIaJ88gRXrkuNTnpJt0AQeN7gkSI9mvMPq6arst2vDZcEHqdf4ktfggO8qoH4paLF18jF6rvQA5Iis51KGQTkfG9sjLzSnwsgvRjHl8pFGtforc_HBVSOy7yKRn-ccXUZv4rB8tYq3Z9630pac0RIYHplWalKqNJ68YS1xw_kSfk6B3DIfksRfRGdu_4HzX5mYWnD0)
In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges.

| [** SUPPORT SENATOR GRAHAM **](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=3aa19793720142a28de0626143c664d9&_e=ekQS5Ep8GBBkslCFI5KcYvVRCyw4pkg5X_kuVsEbKGkAUFrIYINy8HvcZ8MwecKrfwNIYFqr6jOgABrraaxAiPmIyEzAsr9W85mBLOzP7jfJxaCiHAPqnU29v_H-S02HAijAyd3fJwTQ_uUDfkrXaQUBCfMDu6Qjt36wi4RiDhV1nSOcdELcQhpHSidIaJ88gRXrkuNTnpJt0AQeN7gkSI9mvMPq6arst2vDZcEHqdeGDd_GzuxwNapusz0eonklQDOhzJiuSz_ktIoUwAHXxA2E617KDfhl-cKxIUQ8Ucv_dEW3W6ogT3k5yJE8IUGCVkpkvCZ-FrA-JFdY2tWGEFjCnrElQuf8nXwfByIJMGAKnPYVttbBB2wttZrNKv0Q)
