name: Laura Friedman
subject: Quick update for you, friend:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108302215/547501447/-319689629?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTM5ZThmOGYtYzMzOC1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=RzBctwY7zphs5lKUW309amYr2ATBYadRTQxheFqjPrA=) Friend, Follow up soil testing has been standard procedure after nearly every major wildfire in California for the past two decades. But right now, Donald Trump’s FEMA is neglecting its standard process — and it risks exposing entire communities to long-term health threats. Now, the _Los Angeles Times_ has found troubling results in our soil: **Even before this report, I've been sounding the alarm on the possibility of toxic chemicals being in our soil, and it’s why I led seven of my colleagues in a letter to FEMA asking that they follow their own precedent and test and remediate burn areas.** Know that I’m on this. I’m going to be even more aggressive holding FEMA accountable and ensuring that this administration gives Los Angeles the recovery support we deserve. We need to make sure that victims can be confident that the homes they rebuild are safe. We’ve got a long way to go to get back to normalcy. But every day I’m working to ensure that Los Angeles and everyone who calls it home comes back stronger and healthier than before. Laura

clean_body: | = Friend, Follow up soil testing has been standard procedure after nearly every major wildfire in California for the past two decades. But right now, Donald Trump’s FEMA is neglecting its standard process — and it risks exposing entire communities to long-term health threats. Now, the Los Angeles Times has found troubling results in our soil: Even before this report, I've been sounding the alarm on the possibility of toxic chemicals being in our soil, and it’s why I led seven of my colleagues in a letter to FEMA asking that they follow their own precedent and test and remediate burn areas. Know that I’m on this. I’m going to be even more aggressive holding FEMA accountable and ensuring that this administration gives Los Angeles the recovery support we deserve. We need to make sure that victims can be confident that the homes they rebuild are safe. We’ve got a long way to go to get back to normalcy. But every day I’m working to ensure that Los Angeles and everyone who calls it home comes back stronger and healthier than before. # [I've Seen This Playbook Before--And It Doesn't End Well](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=164366183&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY0MzY2MTgzLCJpYXQiOjE3NDgxMDc0MjQsImV4cCI6MTc1MDY5OTQyNCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE4Njc3NDEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.FPYHT7zGHwubzEfXYrqLaTiAmmlbivBTzTto5cOdd24)
### Ask Anyone from Latin America, Special Guest Marilyn Kunce
| | [Lucas Kunce](https://substack.com/@lucastyree)
---
| May 24
---
| [](https://substack.com/@lucastyree)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=164366183&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY0MzY2MTgzLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0ODEwNzQyNCwiZXhwIjoxNzUwNjk5NDI0LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTg2Nzc0MSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Xw1KNOD6UHt5b5CYz1JKW1JqxSiecSvVu-t7CEjPr14&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

Today my wife, Marilyn, writes about the parallels she sees between US Democracy's trajectory and the collapse of democracies in Latin America, where she grew up.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9sdWNhc2t1bmNlLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.hryI9BJllFBZhnO98WXwBv9RDLZooSH00ekcsgaEbgI?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=164366183)
* * *
I grew up believing that American democracy, for all its flaws, was unshakable. I grew up in Mexico, where we watched American democracy like the north star: a place where institutions held firm, where presidents were figures to look up to, and where the rule of law meant something. Messy, yes, but solid. In Latin America, checks and balances and peaceful transitions of power were not realities we lived, but ideals we hoped to one day reach. I believed it when I worked in spaces where people still fight for the right to be heard. And I still believed in American Democracy during the chaos of the 2020 election, when institutions strained under pressure but--just barely--held.
But I've also worked closely with partners in Latin America, and let me tell you something we didn't want to admit, but are slowly realizing: what's happening here in the U.S. isn't new. It's not even surprising. To Latin Americans, it's familiar. Latin America has lived through the very crises we now flirt with in the United States. And it is a clear warning to us that our future risks looking like their past.
Lucas's Substack is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9sdWNhc2t1bmNlLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.hryI9BJllFBZhnO98WXwBv9RDLZooSH00ekcsgaEbgI?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=164366183)
In Argentina, the generals seized power in 1976 under the banner of restoring order and rooting out internal enemies. **They framed the democratic system as weak and corrupt, declared themselves the sole protectors of national security,** and launched a brutal campaign known as the Dirty War. Tens of thousands of people--students, union organizers, journalists--were disappeared, tortured, or killed, often without trial or evidence, all justified by vague warnings of leftist subversion and moral decay. **The rhetoric was fear-driven** , the tactics cloaked in legality, and **the press tightly controlled**. While the scale and violence differ, the echoes are chilling. Donald Trump, too, has declared himself as the only one who can "fix" a supposedly broken nation (make America great again!), stoked fears of internal enemies like immigrants, protestors, and political opponents, and encouraged violent crackdowns "to restore law and order." He labeled journalists the "enemy of the people," flirted with the idea of deploying troops against civilians, and pardoned loyalists convicted of abuse of power. In both cases, the leader's authority grew in direct proportion to the public's fear. Fear they themselves helped to cultivate.
Venezuela's fall arrived slowly, dressed in the language of democracy. When Hugo Chavez was elected in 1998, he came to power through the ballot box, not a coup. He promised to upend a corrupt elite and give power back to the people. But once in office, he systematically **dismantled the institutions that could check him. He rewrote the constitution to expand executive power, packed the courts with loyalists, and pushed out independent media under the guise of national sovereignty**. Over time, dissent became disloyalty, and loyalty became law. Nicolas Maduro carried this legacy forward, leading the nation into economic ruin, political persecution, and mass exile. The script is unsettlingly familiar. Donald Trump governed with a similar distrust for democratic constraints: praising strongmen, attempting to overturn an election he lost, and filling key institutions--courts, intelligence, even the post office--with people chosen not for competence, but for **allegiance**. Casting every challenge as treason and every loss as illegitimate, Venezuela shows us how fragile democracy becomes when a leader treats the system like an obstacle instead of a responsibility, and how much damage can be done.
The most urgent example may be unfolding right now in El Salvador, where President Nayib Bukele has rebranded authoritarianism for the digital age. Elected in 2019 on a wave of frustration with crime and corruption, Bukele styled himself as a populist outsider, a man of the people who would clean house. But like the strongmen before him**, once in power, he moved swiftly to weaken the institutions that might constrain him**. He removed Supreme Court justices who opposed him, **rewrote the rules to allow for his reelection, and imposed an open-ended "state of exception" that's led to mass arrests without due process**. Journalists critical of his administration have faced surveillance and threats, while independent media outlets have been pushed into exile. Through it all, Bukele has kept one constant: popularity. And that's what makes him dangerous. He's shown how easily democracy can be hollowed out when institutions are attacked not with brute force, but with memes and hashtags, and when power is concentrated behind the smiling face of someone who claims to speak for the people.
The comparison to Trump is not rhetorical, it's structural. Trump, too, ran as an outsider, delegitimized elections, demanded personal loyalty, and flirted openly with authoritarian ideas. He has used social media not just to connect, but to control the narrative, to attack judges, mock the free press, spread lies that fueled an insurrection, to promote his businesses, and to dismiss anyone who disagrees with him. El Salvador serves as a modern-day reminder that democracy can erode slowly under applause.
What makes this moment so hard to grasp is the deeply ingrained belief that it _can 't happen_ in the United States. I didn't grow up inside that belief. I grew up watching from the outside, in a country where democracy has often been fragile, interrupted, or undermined.
From that distance, American democracy looked almost mythic. Older, stronger, protected by its Constitution and its culture of independence. That myth, I now realize, is one of the greatest threats the U.S. faces. Because believing you're immune makes you slow to recognize the symptoms. The playbook unfolding here--the attacks on the press, the distrust in elections, the cult of personality--is familiar to those of us who have seen it before. It may come in a catchy slogan of greatness, wrapped in hashtags, but it's the same sickness.
Here is the thing: it doesn't have to go that way. History doesn't just warn us, it gives us a way out.
Democracy can be defended; it can even emerge stronger. But it won't happen if people keep clinging to the idea that this country is too exceptional to fail. It's not. If anything, the comfort of that idea--the sense that America is somehow beyond the reach of history--makes it more vulnerable.
I say this as someone who has long admired America, who moved here believing in its promise. And who now hopes, urgently, that Americans can see what many around the world have learned the hard way that democracy is not guaranteed, and its decline is not always dramatic. That's the con. That's how democracies have died. Sometimes, while everyone insists "it could never happen here." Yet it does, loudly, publicly, and with applause. Just like Trump's supporters cheer every time he says he's the only one who can save us.
-Marilyn Kunce

That's how democracies have died. Sometimes, while everyone insists "it could never happen here." Yet it does, loudly, publicly, and with applause. Just like Trump's supporters cheer every time he says he's the only one who can save us. -Marilyn Kunce Lucas's Substack is a reader-supported publication. * * *
Peter — Donald Trump is reportedly planning to accept a lavish private jet from the government of Qatar — a move many are calling a clear bribe.
**Here’s the kicker:** for this jet to be securely used as Air Force One, it would take years to retrofit and could cost up to **$1 BILLION — _paid for by YOU, the taxpayers._**
Meanwhile, Trump and his MAGA allies like Elon Musk are slashing vital programs millions rely on, from food assistance to health care to the Child Tax Credit.
Trump is once again putting his personal wealth and ego ahead of American democracy and national security — **and if the past is prologue, he’ll stick us with the bill**.

| | Peter, Mike needs to hear from you.

**_[Peter, will you take a few minutes to take Mike’s survey before tonight? He wants to hear what issues in the budget plan passed by the House concern you the most.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108302686/547503077/1268990539?source=EM_NBI_MT_20250524_PT_IssuesSV_0_New_TeamThompson_NA_NA_2&refcode2=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTFmOWVkMC1jNTM4LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZvTgezbiP3LqyMtJn4fQCpX0k2QZaK2K3cVyajgBHZE=&emci=811874c7-c538-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=ee1f9ed0-c538-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=2678920)_**

* * *
_**Mike’s Original Email:**_

Peter, they did it. In the early hours of Thursday morning, House Republicans passed a budget that puts money in the pockets of the ultrawealthy and hinders the working class.

This budget will still have to pass in the Senate, but if passed, the package will cut billions of dollars from Medicaid, food assistance, affordable housing, and more. Americans across the country are in danger of losing critical resources.

**_[Peter, I need to hear from you. Please take this survey and share your thoughts with me today on which issues concern you the most.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108302687/547503078/1268990539?source=EM_NBI_MT_20250524_PT_IssuesSV_0_New_TeamThompson_NA_NA_2&refcode2=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTFmOWVkMC1jNTM4LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZvTgezbiP3LqyMtJn4fQCpX0k2QZaK2K3cVyajgBHZE=&emci=811874c7-c538-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=ee1f9ed0-c538-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=2678920)_**
**[Take the Survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108302688/547503079/1268990539?source=EM_NBI_MT_20250524_PT_IssuesSV_0_New_TeamThompson_NA_NA_2&refcode2=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTFmOWVkMC1jNTM4LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZvTgezbiP3LqyMtJn4fQCpX0k2QZaK2K3cVyajgBHZE=&emci=811874c7-c538-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=ee1f9ed0-c538-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=2678920)**
I will continue to fight against these attempts to pass this budget that will close hospitals, lose coverage for half of America’s children, along with the elderly and other vulnerable populations.

* * *
[](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx8kLFugzAURb8Gb0H2ww4weIhaMVSlUqZKWSzj9xysmhLBa0j-vqIf0PmeqyOdz971PuX0ff3wE1l-xNkhYQqeCR04aQ6gD2CcFmgHia0SZFWtG6WglUqMVgZfEQ6tqpsmBgkYPAwK6lYaMCFqkSxIMNKA3n-gShOOOgREY5oYGl0XWhImnpeSR2J6-DXm53ynpQzzJLIdmW9rUZ0K6Arotm0r_ZBB8vK1AwV08H5-qfbtTZ37y2Xnqm6df5ZALmFRvfIYMxMSgu79E8xJLBZvW8o5rcfdf518yn86_rfB3cJvAAAA__-3Hl5-) Who would have thought that a candy could save anyone struggling with tooth decay and inflamed gums? [**This natural, soft candy**](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx8kLFugzAURb8Gb0H2ww4weIhaMVSlUqZKWSzj9xysmhLBa0j-vqIf0PmeqyOdz971PuX0ff3wE1l-xNkhYQqeCR04aQ6gD2CcFmgHia0SZFWtG6WglUqMVgZfEQ6tqpsmBgkYPAwK6lYaMCFqkSxIMNKA3n-gShOOOgREY5oYGl0XWhImnpeSR2J6-DXm53ynpQzzJLIdmW9rUZ0K6Arotm0r_ZBB8vK1AwV08H5-qfbtTZ37y2Xnqm6df5ZALmFRvfIYMxMSgu79E8xJLBZvW8o5rcfdf518yn86_rfB3cJvAAAA__-3Hl5-) has stunned both scientists and people all around the world: simply let it melt in your mouth, after brushing your teeth, to get rid of cavities almost overnight. body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108303124/547504700/1722609566?refcode=250524_MaryTrump_DDF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWI0Nzc5Yy1jNzM4LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BSeGZvS5tzPN1I2AyHxQnj3eqVwkK3g4_tF2F9YezWg=) Friends, I never needed political pundits or psychologists to tell me that my uncle Donald shouldn’t be anywhere near the Oval Office. I spent much of my childhood in the very house where Donald grew up. The cruel, weak, and deeply insecure man who brought our democracy to the brink of disaster is the same man I have always known. _Seeing him sworn in for a second time was an absolute gut punch._ This fight is personal for me, and as more people lose their jobs or have their rights and freedoms trampled, it’s becoming personal for them, too. **I’m committed to fighting back, but I’m under no illusion about the uphill battle we face. We need everyone to speak up.[Will you split a $25 donation between my org Democracy Defense Fund and Seth Moulton to push back against my uncle and his dangerous, hateful agenda?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108303125/547504701/-204460493?refcode=250524_MaryTrump_DDF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWI0Nzc5Yy1jNzM4LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BSeGZvS5tzPN1I2AyHxQnj3eqVwkK3g4_tF2F9YezWg=)** I launched the Democracy Defense Fund to build a grassroots movement to secure our electoral system from Donald and the authoritarian traitors who seek to destroy it. In order to finally defeat Donald once and for all, we must:
1. _**Flip the House.** The GOP’s majority is historically small and ripe for the taking, and if we retake the House, we can put a critical check on Donald’s power._

2. _**Take Back the Senate.** We need a Democratic majority in the Senate to fight back against judicial appointments and prevent Donald from securing a generation of MAGA rule._

3. _**Take the fight to the States.** We must continue to win critical gubernatorial elections and invest in flippable down-ballot races that have the potential to push back on Donald’s dangerous agenda through state legislatures._

4. _**Win in 2025.** Virginia, New Jersey, Louisiana, and Mississippi all have important legislative elections in 2025, and both New Jersey and Virginia will also hold gubernatorial elections._

**Winning big in these races would shift the narrative of GOP dominance and give Democrats serious momentum heading into a pivotal 2026 election cycle.** [**Can I count on you to help me build and grow the grassroots network we need to fight back against Donald, Elon Musk, and the GOP? If so, please split $25 between my org Democracy Defense Fund and Seth Moulton today!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108303126/547504702/-204460493?refcode=250524_MaryTrump_DDF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWI0Nzc5Yy1jNzM4LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BSeGZvS5tzPN1I2AyHxQnj3eqVwkK3g4_tF2F9YezWg=) In solidarity, Dr. Mary L. Trump

Peter, Before being elected as Vermont’s Congresswoman, I was a middle school history teacher. I know there is an urgent need to document this moment in our country’s history. Our awareness of what’s going on in Washington cannot be brushed under the rug. Stephen Miller — a Trump aide and probably the most joyless man in America — said that Trump is considering **suspending the writ of _habeas corpus_.** I’m sorry. _What? _ If our right to challenge unlawful detainment in court is suspended, that means that _any of us_ could be locked up with absolutely _zero cause_. This is Trump trying to centralize more power. Peter, there is **nothing** more important than our liberty. So this moment must be remembered — when a wannabe authoritarian threatened the rights of all Americans. The absurdity can get exhausting, but I’m not letting that distract me. I’m focused on what matters: **delivering for Vermonters, defending our rights, and alleviating suffering for regular working families.** While Republicans stay silent about Trump’s chaos and threats against our rights, I’m committed to calling them out every step of the way. **[I don’t work for billionaires, Peter. I work for people like you. clean_body: | = Peter, Before being elected as Vermont’s Congresswoman, I was a middle school history teacher. I know there is an urgent need to document this moment in our country’s history. Our awareness of what’s going on in Washington cannot be brushed under the rug. Stephen Miller — a Trump aide and probably the most joyless man in America — said that Trump is considering suspending the writ of habeas corpus. I’m sorry. What? If our right to challenge unlawful detainment in court is suspended, that means that any of us could be locked up with absolutely zero cause. This is Trump trying to centralize more power. Peter, there is nothing more important than our liberty. So this moment must be remembered — when a wannabe authoritarian threatened the rights of all Americans. The absurdity can get exhausting, but I’m not letting that distract me. I’m focused on what matters: delivering for Vermonters, defending our rights, and alleviating suffering for regular working families. While Republicans stay silent about Trump’s chaos and threats against our rights, I’m committed to calling them out every step of the way. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Becca mailto:beccabalintvt@beccabalint.com | Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont P.O. Box 291 Burlington, VT 05402

I’ll be honest, Peter: Holding CA-27 will be anything but easy.

With your help, I shocked the GOP establishment and became one of the only Democrats to flip a red seat in 2024. That was just the beginning.

**Now, I’m facing unprecedented attacks from the extreme right. They know their House majority is hanging by a thread, and seats like mine _will_ determine the balance.**

Here’s the good news: If we hold onto our early momentum in this race, we’ll rebuild the coalition we need to defend this Frontline seat and give Democrats a fighting chance at flipping the House.

Despite the noise, I’m working day and night in Congress – from introducing legislation to improve wildfire resilience, to launching the Build America caucus to cut through Washington gridlock.

**[As a first-time Congressman in a GOP-controlled House, I’m in a uniquely vulnerable spot. name: Randy Bryce
subject: The Iron Stache is back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio House Democratic Campaign Committee, 545 E Town St
body:
|
---
Team, It’s Randy Bryce: You might remember me as the “Iron Stache,” the union Ironworker, veteran, and Democrat who took on Paul Ryan and helped escort him out the door. You were an important part of the movement we started to build in 2018, but we have more work to do. That’s why I’ve officially launched my campaign for Congress in Wisconsin’s 1st Congressional District against MAGA crony and Paul Ryan protege, Bryan Steil. Take a look at my launch video, “Job’s Not Finished”, and let me know what you think: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108303791/547507337/-1361539196?refcode=250524_Bryce_Iron&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzI2YzY5MC1jOTM4LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6OmRLi2mqN4GWZLf-deu-mP1t-UgnJlvWV9251ODJVY=) | **[WATCH HERE>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108303792/547507338/909998827?refcode=250524_Bryce_Iron&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzI2YzY5MC1jOTM4LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6OmRLi2mqN4GWZLf-deu-mP1t-UgnJlvWV9251ODJVY= "https://secure.actblue.com/")**
---
Let’s be honest: There’s a war on the Middle Class and it didn’t start with Trump - but it sure is getting worse. With the help of yes-men like Steil, the billionaires are winning and on the backs of working people.
As our jobs continue to be shipped overseas, wages still stagnant, and unions are gutted, Trump and Steil continue to attack what’s left of the American Dream. They are coming for our healthcare, our retirement, and our public schools.
_**I couldn’t stand by and watch the problems facing the Middle Class continue to get worse while Bryan Steil sits back and does nothing - except keep voting to let it happen. So I decided to throw my hat back in the ring and show them what we can do together.**_
I’ve spent my life on construction sites – not in backrooms with lobbyists. I don’t have a trust fund. I’ve beaten back cancer. I’ve taken care of a sick parent. I’ve served my country in the Army. I know what it means to struggle – and I know what it means to fight.
Bryan Steil has sold us out to the billionaires.
He’s voted to rip away healthcare from seniors and the disabled. He’s stood by while MAGA extremists tore apart our farm economy, wrecked our supply chains, and pushed tax breaks for the ultra-rich, all while plotting to SLASH Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security.
Me? I’m in construction, not demolition. And I believe in building something that lasts:
— Jobs with dignity
— Healthcare as a human right FOR EVERYONE
— And PROTECTING Social Security, Medicaid, and Medicare from destruction
But I can’t do this alone. This campaign is powered by people, not Super PACs. That’s how we took on Paul Ryan. And it’s how we’re going to defeat Bryan Steil.
Make no mistake about it, this IS a winnable seat. This is a battleground district that is moving our way, and people are FED UP with Steil.
_**If Democrats want to retake the House, flipping WI-01 is the BEST place to start.**_
[**Can you make a donation RIGHT NOW to my campaign and Ohio House Dems so we can build this thing from the ground up? We’ve set an ambitious goal of adding 200 Grassroots Donors before midnight tonight – and I’m counting on you to help us get there. $25, $50, or even $100 will help us start this campaign on the right foot.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108303793/547507339/-1361539196?refcode=250524_Bryce_Iron&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzI2YzY5MC1jOTM4LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6OmRLi2mqN4GWZLf-deu-mP1t-UgnJlvWV9251ODJVY=)
| [**$15 »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108303794/547507340/909998827?amount=15&refcode=250524_Bryce_Iron&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzI2YzY5MC1jOTM4LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6OmRLi2mqN4GWZLf-deu-mP1t-UgnJlvWV9251ODJVY= "https://secure.actblue.com/")
---
| [**$25 »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108303795/547507341/909998827?amount=25&refcode=250524_Bryce_Iron&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzI2YzY5MC1jOTM4LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6OmRLi2mqN4GWZLf-deu-mP1t-UgnJlvWV9251ODJVY= "https://secure.actblue.com/")
---
| [**$50 »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108303796/547507342/909998827?amount=50&refcode=250524_Bryce_Iron&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzI2YzY5MC1jOTM4LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6OmRLi2mqN4GWZLf-deu-mP1t-UgnJlvWV9251ODJVY= "https://secure.actblue.com/")

| [**Other »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108303797/547507343/909998827?refcode=250524_Bryce_Iron&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzI2YzY5MC1jOTM4LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6OmRLi2mqN4GWZLf-deu-mP1t-UgnJlvWV9251ODJVY= "https://secure.actblue.com/")
---
The other side has the billionaires. But we’ve got each other, and we’ve got the people-powered coalition that’s going to make history.
And if we stick together? There’s not a damn thing we can’t do.
Thanks for believing in this campaign.
In solidarity,

clean_body: | Team, It’s Randy Bryce: You might remember me as the “Iron Stache,” the union Ironworker, veteran, and Democrat who took on Paul Ryan and helped escort him out the door. You were an important part of the movement we started to build in 2018, but we have more work to do. That’s why I’ve officially launched my campaign for Congress in Wisconsin’s 1st Congressional District against MAGA crony and Paul Ryan protege, Bryan Steil. Take a look at my launch video, “Job’s Not Finished”, and let me know what you think: = | = "" Let’s be honest: There’s a war on the Middle Class and it didn’t start with Trump - but it sure is getting worse. With the help of yes-men like Steil, the billionaires are winning and on the backs of working people. As our jobs continue to be shipped overseas, wages still stagnant, and unions are gutted, Trump and Steil continue to attack what’s left of the American Dream. They are coming for our healthcare, our retirement, and our public schools. I couldn’t stand by and watch the problems facing the Middle Class continue to get worse while Bryan Steil sits back and does nothing - except keep voting to let it happen. So I decided to throw my hat back in the ring and show them what we can do together. I’ve spent my life on construction sites – not in backrooms with lobbyists. I don’t have a trust fund. I’ve beaten back cancer. I’ve taken care of a sick parent. I’ve served my country in the Army. I know what it means to struggle – and I know what it means to fight. Bryan Steil has sold us out to the billionaires. He’s voted to rip away healthcare from seniors and the disabled. He’s stood by while MAGA extremists tore apart our farm economy, wrecked our supply chains, and pushed tax breaks for the ultra-rich, all while plotting to SLASH Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security. Me? I’m in construction, not demolition. And I believe in building something that lasts: — Jobs with dignity — Healthcare as a human right FOR EVERYONE — And PROTECTING Social Security, Medicaid, and Medicare from destruction But I can’t do this alone. This campaign is powered by people, not Super PACs. That’s how we took on Paul Ryan. And it’s how we’re going to defeat Bryan Steil. Make no mistake about it, this IS a winnable seat. This is a battleground district that is moving our way, and people are FED UP with Steil. If Democrats want to retake the House, flipping WI-01 is the BEST place to start. = | = "" | = "" | = "" | = "" The other side has the billionaires. But we’ve got each other, and we’ve got the people-powered coalition that’s going to make history. And if we stick together? There’s not a damn thing we can’t do. Thanks for believing in this campaign. In solidarity, Randy “Iron Stache” Bryce = = = "" = = OHDC 545 E. Town St. Columbus, OH 43215 United States Paid for by the Ohio House Democratic Campaign Committee, 545 E Town St. Columbus, OH 43215.

clean_body: THIS SEAT could make or break the House majority | = | Hi there — We’ve been telling you that California is the center of gravity in the fight for control of the U.S. House — and now we’re sounding the alarm about a critical frontline race in CA-27. This seat is currently held by George Whitesides, and it is one of the TOP vulnerable blue districts in California that Republicans are targeting with everything they’ve got. Here’s what you need to know: 🚨 Republicans only need a net gain of a handful of seats to hold their fragile House Majority; 🚨 CA-27 is a top-tier target, and right-wing super PACs are already flooding the zone; 🚨 If we lose this one seat, our chances of flipping the House from red to blue drop to almost zero. That’s why we’re reaching out today to ask for your support. We must protect every inch of blue territory — and that starts by defending CA-27. = = = = = = George Whitesides flipped this seat in 2024 — but it was close. VERY close. Don’t believe us?Take a look: = Now, Republicans are betting that a wave of dark money and voter suppression will be enough to take it back. We can’t let that happen. name: Vivek for Ohio
subject: My pandemic-pushing opponent
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
body:
While families begged for normalcy, she doubled down on mandates, closures, and fear.

[](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTI5JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDUyNF9RSS1ERC4xMTQ1MTBfdDE2NDQxNjMtMzYyMyZleF90aWQ9MjAyNTA1MjRfUUktREQuMTE0NTEwX3QxNjQ0MTYzLTM2MjMifQ/a9uJA4QzqUmv3wWSE3cE3g)During COVID, the public schools were shut down across Ohio - forced into isolation, screens, and chaos.
Chronic absenteeism exploded. Learning gaps widened. Mental health crises surged. Kids in working-class families fell further behind, while some private schools stayed open and did just fine.
And the person responsible for leading that shutdown? One of my opponents, Democrat Amy Acton.[](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTI5JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDUyNF9RSS1ERC4xMTQ1MTBfdDE2NDQxNjMtMzYyMyZleF90aWQ9MjAyNTA1MjRfUUktREQuMTE0NTEwX3QxNjQ0MTYzLTM2MjMifQ/njgca05QQat6PXLGCZo65w)While families begged for normalcy, she doubled down on mandates, closures, and fear. And now, she wants a promotion - from the architect of school closures to the Governor's Mansion.

Not on my watch.

Ohio's students deserve an apology. But let's be honest: we won't get one. The Left never admits when they're wrong - they just double down.

**That 's why I'm stepping up. I'm running for Governor to empower parents, protect kids, and make sure Ohio NEVER shuts down its classrooms again.**

But I can't win this fight alone. We need to get our message out - on TV, online, everywhere - and that takes serious resources.

**[So, I 'm humbly asking: Will you chip in just a few bucks to my campaign today?](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTI5JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDUyNF9RSS1ERC4xMTQ1MTBfdDE2NDQxNjMtMzYyMyZleF90aWQ9MjAyNTA1MjRfUUktREQuMTE0NTEwX3QxNjQ0MTYzLTM2MjMifQ/27zr-vzZMrEkMxYQsqOf8A)**

The media will protect Amy Acton and her failed lockdown legacy. The Democrats will fund her.

But the people of Ohio remember what happened - and we won't let it happen again.

Gratefully,

**Vivek Ramaswamy**
Candidate for Governor of Ohio
* * *
[](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTI5JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDUyNF9RSS1ERC4xMTQ1MTBfdDE2NDQxNjMtMzYyMyZleF90aWQ9MjAyNTA1MjRfUUktREQuMTE0NTEwX3QxNjQ0MTYzLTM2MjMifQ/NHs0F_Coo2WC_s0ZID21nQ)This is Vivek. I'm building a movement to make Ohio the state of American excellence -- Reviving our schools. Reclaiming our values. Restoring pride in our country.

But I can't do it alone. I need your voice behind me.
[If you believe in this mission, please endorse my campaign today:](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTI5JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDUyNF9RSS1ERC4xMTQ1MTBfdDE2NDQxNjMtMzYyMyZleF90aWQ9MjAyNTA1MjRfUUktREQuMTE0NTEwX3QxNjQ0MTYzLTM2MjMifQ/RiyVMLjho8JaQd8aM_AVOg)[ENDORSE VIVEK
](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTI5JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDUyNF9RSS1ERC4xMTQ1MTBfdDE2NDQxNjMtMzYyMyZleF90aWQ9MjAyNTA1MjRfUUktREQuMTE0NTEwX3QxNjQ0MTYzLTM2MjMifQ/4uvfd035IK8cJSbhTDHOyg)| | |

name: Katie Porter for Governor
subject: 1 week left
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
Three quick reasons that your donation matters.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39749%2E3422442%2E3TyTrW)
Dear Derek,
We have just 7 days to hit our May fundraising target of $100,000 over email. **[Can you chip in today to help us reach our goal?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250524_1_ak?refcode=em20250524-39749&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39749_3422442_3TyTrW&akid=39749%2E3422442%2E3TyTrW)**
Here are 3 quick reasons that your donation matters:
1. **One of our Republican opponents has already raised at least $680,000** , even though he’s only been in this race for a month.
2. **We refuse donations from corporations, lobbyists, and executives at Big Pharma, Big Oil, and Big Banks** , so unlike other campaigns, we rely solely on grassroots contributions to power our work.
3. **There’s still a lot of uncertainty in this race.** Katie leads in polls, but a sizable number of voters are still undecided. Your donation can really make a difference.

We wouldn’t ask for your help if it wasn’t really important. **[Ahead of our May fundraising deadline, will you chip in $5 or whatever you can spare?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250524_1_ak?refcode=em20250524-39749&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39749_3422442_3TyTrW&akid=39749%2E3422442%2E3TyTrW)**
Thanks for reading,
Team KP

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250524-39749&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39749_3422442_3TyTrW&akid=39749%2E3422442%2E3TyTrW)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4g-emails?source=39749&t=4&akid=39749%2E3422442%2E3TyTrW)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4g-unsubscribe?source=39749&t=5&akid=39749%2E3422442%2E3TyTrW)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Governor 2026
PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

Fellow Conservative,

I'm Adam Schwarze, a former Navy SEAL, Marine Corps veteran, and proud Minnesotan. As a combat veteran who has fought and bled in defense of our nation, I’m writing to you, in your capacity as a mother or a father, grandmother or grandfather, who fights daily for your family, to ask for your support in my run for the U.S. Senate. If you’re not from Minnesota, that’s OK I need you to keep reading this email. Because much of what’s happening in Minnesota now - _**a state run by Tim Walz, Kamala Harris’ radical VP nominee- is happening elsewhere in the United States, perhaps even in your community.**_

Our communities aren’t like they were when I grew up in the late 80s and into the 90s. Would you feel comfortable with one of your beloved children or grandchildren playing outside, out of sight, for extended periods? **The days when that was possible seem like a distant memory to me.**

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=a8260ff0dfcd4f3485e6632f2c7d9895&_e=JquNVtTdK_gTUYC8InyolzHqF99qxO__iyYJ7GXsXtLWaBPGYuNX9sC1m3UItybD5LdfQI8RVtm7ACLcltAAofhRlcWwC7E9UUA3_gF7qEd1nVIG3Bgb9gf72d-y51U_pzQ12PnZREWUrNzXaTGxl5R4WR2-rlWnyM_4K4QQkJUr6BjRXojPr_NahvYAzp3xj_ukHkwhZVHZrhKQlhwooMWfvABt6SGjiWOmTmIXarnYN9Id1tG_OnWwBltweNBOGEnp-ajLbLjWOUt7dh6IoGD43oaI5yvOYx41FA0iX7GEnJFJoTUsIHKTL-0hgtx1_8cPFJXZEmYX017RkB7ieYpqllljOm7BmJEQfFRxE90vasEvCkVHSWAisTIST29HrtguRMVHqf4VUCShFGr89kyqE3VVH7L_IFWPz_lEf9YikRciplm27VTgwQNLSZMS)

But they shouldn’t be a memory. Americans should feel safe to let their children and grandchildren play outside without fear. **Every man, woman, and child should have the opportunity to live in a community where their safety isn’t constantly under assault from criminal illegal aliens or violent left-wing factions of the Democrat party.**

President Trump and Republicans in Congress are making substantial progress toward ensuring a strong and secure southern border. But they need reinforcements. **There is simply too much to do and too little time. Should we try and fail to keep our Senate majority in next year’s midterms, they won’t be able to finish all the work needed to make America safe again.**

_**President Trump needs reinforcements - and not just any reinforcement. He needs another Navy SEAL, like me, in the Senate to join the ranks of public servants like Sen. Tim Sheehy.**_****

That’s why I’m coming to you with a simple favor. **[I’m asking you for $2 today to help me double the number of Navy SEALs in the Senate](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=a8260ff0dfcd4f3485e6632f2c7d9895&_e=JquNVtTdK_gTUYC8InyolzHqF99qxO__iyYJ7GXsXtLWaBPGYuNX9sC1m3UItybD5LdfQI8RVtm7ACLcltAAofhRlcWwC7E9UUA3_gF7qEd1nVIG3Bgb9gf72d-y51U_pzQ12PnZREWUrNzXaTGxl5R4WR2-rlWnyM_4K4QQkJUr6BjRXojPr_NahvYAzp3xj_ukHkwhZVHZrhKQlhwooMWfvABt6SGjiWOmTmIXarnYN9Id1tG_OnWwBltweNBOGEnp-ajLbLjWOUt7dh6IoHYwhnIfEUwLUd8pxpzamKQkzlDkgKvydRFoeCthG3TlM_tMG0ko5730sgBWDuMPzs0EjBXl_ctPrqod_Yni4AeoufEeOzeqHtTJkr1I8DwoLpTpygyHhUCNW8-hggoodvnOKXhWuK4HLw1f6ltX9PBrSciya28d0J-pOy-ECGlJ)**.

Sen. Sheehy is already one of the most effective members of the Senate, and he’s only been in office for five months—imagine what two Navy SEALs could do working in tandem.

[**CHIP IN $2
DOUBLE THE SEAL POPULATION **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=a8260ff0dfcd4f3485e6632f2c7d9895&_e=JquNVtTdK_gTUYC8InyolzHqF99qxO__iyYJ7GXsXtLWaBPGYuNX9sC1m3UItybD5LdfQI8RVtm7ACLcltAAofhRlcWwC7E9UUA3_gF7qEd1nVIG3Bgb9gf72d-y51U_pzQ12PnZREWUrNzXaTGxl5R4WR2-rlWnyM_4K4QQkJUr6BjRXojPr_NahvYAzp3xj_ukHkwhZVHZrhKQlhwooMWfvABt6SGjiWOmTmIXarnYN9Id1tG_OnWwBltweNBOGEnp-ajLbLjWOUt7dh6IoAXq53A0Ksv8b5dVnrCYpRthTiemLgeftdsn-rtEVuBYYCd52sXZn7T3lov0pvaJx_qsZA0XqgZYMz-decZ0D2VVL0qopziuIE8N23NBqZHUcHnACuaqgEMMAl7FROCznBhJgRu5cCaEEPAqDOO_3SuEnZZx0l-h_GWm1oM8bEU2)
I grew up in a working-class family, playing hockey and learning the value of duty from my parents. On my 18th birthday in October 2001, mere weeks after 9/11, _**I joined the Marine Corps to defend our country. I joined our Armed Forces out of fidelity to a country I love and because I had always wanted to be a part of something greater than myself.**_ As a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran, I deployed nine times to over 70 countries, putting my life on the line to keep families like yours safe.

No two missions were the same. But one thing that never changed, no matter where I was, was that I carried prayers for a safe return from my mom and dad. Now, I’m stepping up again—into the unknown - this time to protect Minnesota and America from the radical policies tearing apart our communities.

**I’m running against Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, whose far-left agenda has made our streets less safe and our values less secure. You saw the chaos in Minneapolis in 2020—riots, violence, and a governor’s team that sided with lawsuits against our police instead of protecting our neighborhoods.** As a mom, you know how important it is to feel safe in your community. That’s not the Minnesota you fought for or your family deserves.

[**CHIP IN $2
DOUBLE THE SEAL POPULATION**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=a8260ff0dfcd4f3485e6632f2c7d9895&_e=JquNVtTdK_gTUYC8InyolzHqF99qxO__iyYJ7GXsXtLWaBPGYuNX9sC1m3UItybD5LdfQI8RVtm7ACLcltAAofhRlcWwC7E9UUA3_gF7qEd1nVIG3Bgb9gf72d-y51U_pzQ12PnZREWUrNzXaTGxl5R4WR2-rlWnyM_4K4QQkJUr6BjRXojPr_NahvYAzp3xj_ukHkwhZVHZrhKQlhwooMWfvABt6SGjiWOmTmIXarnYN9Id1tG_OnWwBltweNBOGEnp-ajLbLjWOUt7dh6IoHb4bLOlVLGi28mdq41c9Y-Lqbde9VIPD-42znCX0rJx5pTM-QNVbYGEe-oJIjG0OXgS7IcmZWtSMSJhr87r5GOYmF15ttFeJUn2VVzhb_-kxBHSFes5_hb4PkTvCNCMos2QQFxBVNB78nf6oy7FzPzWcw5w0oozvHL14SkhBbdg)

I’m in this fight to restore the Minnesota I grew up in and love more than almost anything else. I want to:
* **Back the blue** to keep your neighborhoods safe and secure.
* **Cut taxes** so your family can keep more of what you earn.
* **Protect our schools** from radical ideas, ensuring kids grow up with the values you teach them.
* **Defend our freedoms** , from the Second Amendment to the faith we hold dear.

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=a8260ff0dfcd4f3485e6632f2c7d9895&_e=JquNVtTdK_gTUYC8InyolzHqF99qxO__iyYJ7GXsXtLWaBPGYuNX9sC1m3UItybD5LdfQI8RVtm7ACLcltAAofhRlcWwC7E9UUA3_gF7qEd1nVIG3Bgb9gf72d-y51U_pzQ12PnZREWUrNzXaTGxl5R4WR2-rlWnyM_4K4QQkJUr6BjRXojPr_NahvYAzp3xj_ukHkwhZVHZrhKQlhwooMWfvABt6SGjiWOmTmIXarnYN9Id1tG_OnWwBltweNBOGEnp-ajLbLjWOUt7dh6IoBiS15YgixBA5ztXszPzoOKslfoZr6dNwLWRyrIVX4x5gDGkIm_Ao-GBMkOP4FwFkPIH4hDoVm9CSrYF6x1CAofJg5wHMf7FqoDy03K8WRytIbjy7m4eKj3iibroWNek-oTuUPK_4BXLmVAW0iicPJQwA3ocrOcMN0Qwi9WZlHmz)

[**HELP ME GET MY CAMPAIGN OFF THE GROUND
CONTRIBUTE $2 OR MORE**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=a8260ff0dfcd4f3485e6632f2c7d9895&_e=JquNVtTdK_gTUYC8InyolzHqF99qxO__iyYJ7GXsXtLWaBPGYuNX9sC1m3UItybD5LdfQI8RVtm7ACLcltAAofhRlcWwC7E9UUA3_gF7qEd1nVIG3Bgb9gf72d-y51U_pzQ12PnZREWUrNzXaTGxl5R4WR2-rlWnyM_4K4QQkJUr6BjRXojPr_NahvYAzp3xj_ukHkwhZVHZrhKQlhwooMWfvABt6SGjiWOmTmIXarnYN9Id1tG_OnWwBltweNBOGEnp-ajLbLjWOUt7dh6IoEc5QLIwh32DGFpwGEEFLhJOBCWiFb7py1StYDF0v-DEfEJV-sUgExo5B52Wx5-WPdjX7i8cZTVKwevFB2zv8l1zAJ0K6QTau7sjJGZln1PHIY8IqOqaaNDn8HaNBUn_2wyUFrBLo320P7u_TJVuWA6Q56kAh5cR0VMKn95QkGH6)
I never planned to run for Senate, but I knew I had to act when I saw our state sliding left—higher taxes, unsafe streets, and policies that hurt families.

This won’t be an easy fight. The Democrats have big money and a radical agenda to push. That’s why**[I’m asking you, in your capacity as a parent or grandparent, who knows what it means to protect what matters most, to chip in $10, $25, or even $50 today.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=a8260ff0dfcd4f3485e6632f2c7d9895&_e=JquNVtTdK_gTUYC8InyolzHqF99qxO__iyYJ7GXsXtLWaBPGYuNX9sC1m3UItybD5LdfQI8RVtm7ACLcltAAofhRlcWwC7E9UUA3_gF7qEd1nVIG3Bgb9gf72d-y51U_pzQ12PnZREWUrNzXaTGxl5R4WR2-rlWnyM_4K4QQkJUr6BjRXojPr_NahvYAzp3xj_ukHkwhZVHZrhKQlhwooMWfvABt6SGjiWOmTmIXarnYN9Id1tG_OnWwBltweNBOGEnp-ajLbLjWOUt7dh6IoLweso6FILVXnmS5G_z10DgM6jDm9kD7W5p5hB9rBa5PDyZ74QTi4Oi3qxsMhjWRDbaZI6RiwwmdRvMMa3L0aRY1BKbMhQSA7hJjWTzfFWGkS7UjLIu8duflrs8SPoEws-TOsCynC2_fC4JEOZ-p5t2qG31vP51VUyvQq5Qw07K_)**

Your support will help me stand up for every Minnesota family.

I’m a fighter—a son, a veteran, and a man ready to defend Minnesota’s families. Together, we can build a safer, stronger future where your kids and grandkids can thrive.

With respect and gratitude,
Adam Schwarze
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota

**P.S. In 2008** , Minnesota’s Senate race was decided by just 312 votes. Every dollar and every voice counts. Please join me today to protect our families and our values!

[**HELP ME GET MY CAMPAIGN OFF THE GROUND

name: Team Emily
subject: Protecting the Puget Sound
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108304980/547511359/2145945666?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.05.24_PugetSound_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzEyNjg1Ni1jZDM4LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AmwE6sk_jltunSx_rZTDLwe5K1TLqRluf10TqIOtVdo=&emci=1a126856-cd38-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=2c126856-cd38-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=23483442) | ICYMI, Peter: Emily joined Congresswoman Marilyn Strickland to re-launch the Puget Sound Recovery Caucus! This is a critical step forward in the fight to protect and restore one of our region’s most treasured and vital ecosystems. The Puget Sound is more than breathtaking scenery. It’s home to salmon and orcas, the backbone of Tribal treaty rights, and essential to our economy, clean water, and way of life. But this ecosystem faces growing threat, from polluted runoff and habitat loss to the impacts of climate change. That’s why Emily is stepping up to lead. Working alongside Rep. Marilyn Strickland, Emily will help ensure the federal government remains a committed partner in restoring the Sound, revitalizing salmon populations, and building climate resilience. As Emily said: **_“The Puget Sound is a cornerstone of our region’s natural beauty, and a vital ecosystem whose health is inextricably linked to our communities, culture, and economy.”_** This is a moment that calls for urgent, sustained action—and strong public support. [_**Will you chip in today to help power Emily’s fight to protect Puget Sound and deliver environmental justice for our region?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108304981/547511360/1131891713?amount=25&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.05.24_PugetSound_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzEyNjg1Ni1jZDM4LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AmwE6sk_jltunSx_rZTDLwe5K1TLqRluf10TqIOtVdo=) [CONTRIBUTE NOW →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108304982/547511361/1131891713?amount=6&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.05.24_PugetSound_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzEyNjg1Ni1jZDM4LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AmwE6sk_jltunSx_rZTDLwe5K1TLqRluf10TqIOtVdo=) Thanks for stepping up in this generation-defining fight. —Team Emily

name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: We want your feedback, friend
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/95655/images/kaptur-email-header-2.png]

Friend,

When I go to work in Washington and fight for Northern Ohio, I'm fighting for my lifelong home, too. I'm fighting for my friends, my neighbors, and the community that raised me.

So when I say that your opinion matters to me, I mean it. Making your voice heard in Congress is the purpose of my work.

Right now, my team and I need your feedback. With the most radical members of the GOP in control in Washington, our work is more urgent than ever. I want to make sure that your priorities are represented in Congress.

Friend, what are the most important issues you'd like to see us focus on right now? Please take our Priorities Survey to let us know — it will only take two minutes! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/WIGJ8Tjd1k2W_M640mjsig2]

TAKE THE SURVEY → [https://secure.ngpvan.com/WIGJ8Tjd1k2W_M640mjsig2]My team and I will read every response, and your opinion will shape our work. Thank you, friend.

— Marcy
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/95655/images/kaptur-email-headshot.jpg]

About Marcy Kaptur
Marcy Kaptur is a fighter for high-wage jobs, growing a workforce to meet the needs of the 21st century, and protecting our region’s most vital natural resource, the Great Lakes. She’s worked with both parties to secure investments in our communities and has been a true friend of veterans, seniors, first responders and working people. She’s a voice for us all in the People’s House.
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaptur25_em?refcode=emailfooter&refcode2=f88b837a-cd38-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b] Give Monthly [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaptur25_em?recurring=true&refcode=footermonthly&refcode2=f88b837a-cd38-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b]
Follow Marcy
https://twitter.com/Marcy_Kaptur [https://twitter.com/Marcy_Kaptur] https://www.facebook.com/marcykapturforcongress [https://www.facebook.com/marcykapturforcongress]
Checks may also be mailed to:
Kaptur for Congress - PO Box 899, Toledo, OH 43697 Paid for by Kaptur for Congress Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/tcAb-PaXtEayL-mWUU_QGw2?unsubscribedata=A7xiYcntFvOqLN62NaZjaYH9jRD%2Bge067pqYbunJssXZC%2BPwi%2F2e1ipS8VmvQ27n827Cue00%2BMbVKGYXdftGUtN3FTy7ido%2FNgWjdCYkeVuU1sJ4tLIYrmgm71y6eBbD1l75QnC7q%2FHJHb52z%2BL26o57zuEeWgRKag2HDCrZlFlzBv3LCFFhgOOjySeUouaZYHamQqwaRxBCebkoEl5y%2BiJkJ%2BGFjwLqvq%2FjUMI%2B6plpCqgTC6C37CjAR851aWN9%2BhdoGt0zKrT5a6AlDbkM70K82eLBR6vwhdDP%2FW%2F8%2F%2FVvsIk7AVHKYIUSrz6ATwvKv8eR3q4ALsH7N3%2FkpmCqSPzD7ge99CQPFXRgEMLI4BuCNRQLRMHHcZP3GHNY8V4BgWCF27c9VwdSpYBGYw%2BC6qTfgsDDatxhPPMWuK2TllM%3D] . Thank you, friend. — Marcy [] About Marcy Kaptur Marcy Kaptur is a fighter for high-wage jobs, growing a workforce to meet the needs of the 21st century, and protecting our region’s most vital natural resource, the Great Lakes. She’s worked with both parties to secure investments in our communities and has been a true friend of veterans, seniors, first responders and working people. She’s a voice for us all in the People’s House. Donate Now [] Give Monthly [] Follow Marcy [] [] Checks may also be mailed to: Kaptur for Congress - PO Box 899, Toledo, OH 43697 Paid for by Kaptur for Congress Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so here [] . body:
I'm going to speak bluntly, because this is important: [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108305249/547512295/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGM2MDQ3My1jZTM4LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SOB9hE3__hiE2zyFHfAEr1IwcVPTX-tAXjoFxOrL04o=&emci=b0733e5b-f537-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=f8c60473-ce38-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=15820338)
---

Peter,

**[Before I ask you to chip in $5, or anything you can to help keep this campaign in fighting shape year-round](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108305250/547512296/-1351093942?refcode=em25_250524_sotr_fndd_gq_act___ks_ettx&&&&utm_campaign=em25_250524_sotr_fndd_gq_act___ks_ettx&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&refcode2=f8c60473-ce38-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&refcode2=f8c60473-ce38-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGM2MDQ3My1jZTM4LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SOB9hE3__hiE2zyFHfAEr1IwcVPTX-tAXjoFxOrL04o=)** , **I want to personally give you a behind-the-curtain look at what’s ahead in 2026,_because the stakes couldn’t be higher_.**

All 435 House seats will be up for grabs, and once again, only about 30 of those seats will determine which party controls the House in the next Congress. This seat is one of them and we have another fight on our hands to defend it. **If we can, we can take the House out of the death grip of today’s extreme Republican's hands.**

_Here’s the deal:_

🚨This is NOT a safe Democratic seat. Every major race rating group has flagged this district as one to watch, and if Republicans recruit a well-funded candidate, this could easily turn into one of the most competitive races in the country. I know because that’s what’s happened every other year.

🚨Democrats are currently favored to flip the House, but that’s just a snapshot of the polling, and we can’t rest on our laurels. Midterm elections are in part a referendum on the president and the direction of the country—a strong Democratic showing in 2026 would send a clear message to Trump that we reject his chaos, tariffs, and tax cuts for the rich that hurt the rest of us.

🚨Republicans like Elon Musk are spending more and more to influence elections—and this race will be no exception. I don’t rely on billionaires to win my race, and 80% of my campaign’s resources come from people like you.

Peter, mega-donors like Elon Musk are dropping millions like it’s pocket change, which means flipping the House and holding this seat is going to take serious resources—and the work starts now.

**[I need your help to build another winning campaign, protect this seat, take back the House in 2026, and keep fighting for you. Can you chip in before midnight to help us gear up for this fight?>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108305251/547512297/-1351093942?refcode=em25_250524_sotr_fndd_gq_act___ks_ettx&&&&utm_campaign=em25_250524_sotr_fndd_gq_act___ks_ettx&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&refcode2=f8c60473-ce38-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&refcode2=f8c60473-ce38-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGM2MDQ3My1jZTM4LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SOB9hE3__hiE2zyFHfAEr1IwcVPTX-tAXjoFxOrL04o=)**

name: Schiff HQ
subject: We hope this isn’t a bad time
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8612%2E5257348%2EV1LS3B)
Sorry to bother you today, Derek. We’ll keep this quick.
We expect our fundraising to slow down even more over Memorial Day weekend — and since we’re already at risk of falling short of our goal, we wanted to reach out to our team today.
Right now, Adam is doing everything he can in the Senate to stand up to Donald Trump and his corrupt administration, defend the rule of law, and deliver for Californians.
He’s also supporting Democratic candidates across the country to ensure we elect more Democrats to the Senate who will stand up for our democracy and fight to make progress for working families.
But this work takes resources, Derek. _A lot of them._ That’s why we’re counting on you to help us reach our goal.
**[Every dollar that you give helps support Adam’s work in the Senate and his fight to elect Senate Democrats in 2026. body:
When Trump won in 2016, Democrats controlled just 29 chambers. Now, thanks to the work of the DLCC and the support of our grassroots donors, Democrats control nearly 40 state legislative chambers. | | |
---
| |
---|---

| 🛑**If you want to keep fighting for our democracy, our rights, our freedoms, and our future, please keep reading.** 👇
---
When Trump won in 2016, Democrats controlled just 29 chambers. Now, thanks to the work of the DLCC and the support of our grassroots donors, Democrats control nearly 40 state legislative chambers.

Without Congress, these majorities are providing a much-needed check to oppose the worst of the current administration.

**Expanding Democratic power in statehouses across the country is the best way to counteract the damage of a second Trump presidency.**
---
We’re committed to building our largest membership team in DLCC history to fight back against the dangerous extremism of Trump and his allies.

As one of our most dedicated supporters, we need you on this team, standing alongside us.

Donations from our members each year directly fuel our work to:

✅ Compete in majority-making special elections
✅ Chip away at Republican supermajorities
✅ Identify and flip vulnerable GOP-held seats
_And so much more..._
---

name: Derek Tran
subject: A day of remembrance -- and resolve
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108305715/547513934/2039042026?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDFmZGJlNWYtZDEzOC1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qJpy_pL_GaP7iYgsYPAhSd63KzLzpDsbrZ89lC53jJo=)
Heading into the Memorial Day weekend, I’m reflecting on the meaning of service. I’m the son of Vietnamese refugees, and my parents’ sacrifices have shaped me into the man I am today. When I turned 18, I enlisted in the US Army so I could give back to the country that gave my family a second chance. My gratitude on Memorial Day isn’t out of tradition -- this day holds deep personal meaning for me as a veteran. Every year on this day, I pause to honor the brave men and women who didn’t come home, and to thank their families who continue to carry their sacrifice. My years in uniform taught me many lessons that I carry with me every day. It showed me that freedom comes at great cost and we owe a debt of gratitude to those who stood on the line for us. Today in Congress, I carry that same sense of duty. My first bill in Congress was the _Protect Veteran Jobs Act_ \-- a bill to reinstate veteran workers who were wrongfully fired from federal jobs. In California’s 45th district alone, over 18,000 veterans live and work among us. Our veterans have always had our backs and it’s time we step up to have theirs. So, for this upcoming Memorial Day, I want to thank my neighbors and supporters for the way you have stood up for each other and for our heroes. As we gather with loved ones this weekend, let us remember those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country. Let us also remember the families they left behind. Thank you for standing with me and for the privilege of letting me serve you. I’m grateful to do this important work on behalf of our veterans and our community. Wishing you a safe and reflective Memorial Day. Thank you, [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108305721/547513939/2039042026?refcode=em-5.24.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDFmZGJlNWYtZDEzOC1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qJpy_pL_GaP7iYgsYPAhSd63KzLzpDsbrZ89lC53jJo=) -Derek

**In 2024,** we held this seat despite the millions of dollars that flooded our state from Republican mega-donors and a nationwide rightward swing.

**In 2026,** Michigan will be a critical battleground again, and defending MI-03 will be critical if we want to flip Michigan BLUE at every level and be a check on the Trump administration.

Patriot,
---
All of my life, those closest to me – and even those who only knew me from politics – have known me to be a _helper_.
---
I helped take down the mob in New York...
---
I helped unify our city and our country as America’s mayor after tragedy struck on September 11th...
---
I helped keep our streets and our citizens safe...
---
And I helped successfully defend President Trump from one of the Left’s most vicious witch hunts imaginable.
---
Those were the headlines that defined me to so many Americans like _YOU_.
---
But over the last year, I’ve instead woken up in the mornings to headlines like these:
---

**_“Giuliani losing his home amidst 2 indictments...”_**
_[MSNBC]_

**_“Giuliani bankruptcy case dismissed, opening door to creditors pursuing collection”_**
_[CNBC]_

**_“Giuliani Disbarred from the Practice of Law in New York” _**
_[New York Times]_

---
**And sadly, as I stare down the Democrats’ _FINAL_ sham indictment against me, I am now the one forced to ask _you_ to help _me_. **
---
That’s truly something I NEVER wanted to have to say,Friend...
---
_Asking for help as opposed to offering it unsettles me to my core._
---
But I hope you understand that you truly are my FINAL HOPE.
---
_**Right now in Arizona, the Democrat Attorney General is seeking to use a _state-level_ charge that President Trump cannot pardon in order to throw me in prison until I’m 100 years old!** _
---
My crime? Refusing to forsake the TRUTH and standing by the side of my dear friend and our 45th and 47th President – Donald J. Trump.
---
_And the punishment the Left wants in return? My personal, professional, and financial ruin along with me taking my last breath in a prison cell!_
---
Make no mistake, if we can’t beat this sham case here and now, if we fail to secure true justice and my ultimate vindication, then this scheme of the Left’s can be used against every last red-blooded patriot as the Deep State’s bulletproof measure to TAKE DOWN their political enemies.
---
And the _ONLY_ way to defeat a regime like the Deep State is to **NEVER,_EVER_ SURRENDER** to it.
---
_...Just ask President Trump!_
---
The Democrats unjustly filed my MUGSHOT under **booking # 2313757.**

clean_body: ......................... ........................ | Patriot, All of my life, those closest to me – and even those who only knew me from politics – have known me to be a helper. I helped take down the mob in New York... I helped unify our city and our country as America’s mayor after tragedy struck on September 11th... I helped keep our streets and our citizens safe... And I helped successfully defend President Trump from one of the Left’s most vicious witch hunts imaginable. Those were the headlines that defined me to so many Americans like YOU. But over the last year, I’ve instead woken up in the mornings to headlines like these: “Giuliani losing his home amidst 2 indictments...” [MSNBC] “Giuliani bankruptcy case dismissed, opening door to creditors pursuing collection” [CNBC] “Giuliani Disbarred from the Practice of Law in New York” [New York Times] And sadly, as I stare down the Democrats’ FINAL sham indictment against me, I am now the one forced to ask you to help me. That’s truly something I NEVER wanted to have to say,Friend... Asking for help as opposed to offering it unsettles me to my core. But I hope you understand that you truly are my FINAL HOPE. Right now in Arizona, the Democrat Attorney General is seeking to use a state-level charge that President Trump cannot pardon in order to throw me in prison until I’m 100 years old! My crime? Refusing to forsake the TRUTH and standing by the side of my dear friend and our 45th and 47th President – Donald J. Trump. And the punishment the Left wants in return? My personal, professional, and financial ruin along with me taking my last breath in a prison cell! Make no mistake, if we can’t beat this sham case here and now, if we fail to secure true justice and my ultimate vindication, then this scheme of the Left’s can be used against every last red-blooded patriot as the Deep State’s bulletproof measure to TAKE DOWN their political enemies. And the ONLY way to defeat a regime like the Deep State is to NEVER,EVER SURRENDER to it. ...Just ask President Trump! The Democrats unjustly filed my MUGSHOT under booking # 2313757. So, to show these left-wing crooks that good and honest Americans like YOU will also never surrender as they destroy the life of an INNOCENT man, I’m humbly asking for your support to raise $231,375.70 for my Legal Defense Trust to win this last fight for my freedom and justice. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

## ‘Woke’ council plans approved to prioritise wildlife and green spaces
A council's "woke" plans to prioritise wildlife and green spaces have been approved, with critics slamming it as "virtue-signalling". Darlington Borough Council has approved a declaration of a Nature Restoration Emergency despite fierce opposition from Conservative councillors who branded it "woke". The declaration, which sets out an ambition for nature recovery by 2040, was passed [...] [Read more](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/pjrZ3iUftjGmrU5KEVsJ_RLq1eq7iXUvRZ_pS_9HV031456qS_zBBalqoehFRgUJestCX6Y6WOCwppvax71bGmNblzuAHVSan_yduOfuElniAmmckol8YGjsLvvjjR0OrCisSPM8g3kFyvzR_ENjX54yAh6G57MkTW_BxLX_E2gZXom7M9ozBGpnUquchbFaF_vYN6Xs9HAmuBxacM9lqnwG8IKXwgjNX_5WzBO9y-MGgBdsPr15aun0mxPlsYnhZLLLii05uESc7zq-5PJwLcQKg1RVgzstf-Gb7bSPbr3oXkXG0dhgkzQ_V4si_oi20Z0PyfIXjbDh7zPZcfyGbvJxB-y9aHaoBLiKlMZBTw/38WonIXgPAj-bVSobwID9dKpIaEZPfKk/9)

If you are looking for hopeful signs in the battle against illegal immigration, they can be found. Crossings at the southern border, of course, have dropped off to near zero. USA Today reports, U.S. Border Patrol reported about 8,400 migrant encounters at the southern border in April, down from nearly 129,000 encounters during the same [...] [Read more](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/wyvJ92Uq60IVRK5mV5mwV5zvfedpPmI90jmaN1SoU6FNT0qFHjttwNDuHVHEDOepa22k1jh_4iDp7ejity9WR7YmKS6JUVsU3-USeNgxt02Om3fOPS7gRrZ2NELDXVHGUHTZ7e3f-20LbvW9zjFB6xniE0AuIaKQaDuypFAGRqSdcLjfyFra-I0Y7hROTxSFoglMy6XN8upJV0EiJBhPTe12IWu5xKor2IE2Didakr_6NzRop7BW6SgOs-NKxq3pKtFYGrpu7yfaZHPGeIX0hHH7H1wOG1YiquOjSV-vuL0sddAaV9Xf3_cRwvZNr6DrH1PKtg/-k1GT2Ttp0GX6cxKmfN1S6uoN-Eay6LQ/9)

## In Honoring America’s War Dead This Memorial Day, Be a Person, Tribe, Nation Worthy of Their Sacrifice – RedState
The hallowed grounds of Arlington National Cemetery held deep reverence for me long before I first walked them as a young adult two decades ago. For anyone who visits this place, reminders abound of its solemn creed: dignity and respect. ## The MAHA Approach to Infertility
Can America become a leader in helping infertile couples? More and more couples are struggling with infertility, unable to conceive. According to the World Health Organization, about 1 in 6 people are affected by infertility. body:
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=7a6872131692475eb2df70dda7344ca9&_e=8I5hIrDTek5potqn2HTrFXDoJSqf6RJlpeg9uXgnmS3MLIpdItMDMo1mZ6RIpbRDTkWXIo0Pq-iYs_-gB0X_zTnccOREgB0t5lROjYxvikIs1SUwMbYTVbyVMgdyV2Q6aN1lfNBdF9hc6901z9u0bHNtnaNaQHVkeBNYWTcBuO5RvxJ8H4weNSut-1jmRn4LpQbiwTHBA487D4NMu9hg1_IC5houAcZoY-xDFZlXx08iMvYkR0PWASWM5IUmOCc40PvjmJqKHWUQeprkSXT6jB_ibM6aiZ-rJEOKnzBBLA9TQZD7qi7D223WtOCDVyKEDQMVKOiLDofPPALUkmmR2Mg23UMI1vscDFkb_LZ7XOY%3D)
Fellow Patriot,

I learned firsthand how our culture despises achievement and wishes to destroy anyone willing to challenge the status quo, big government, or the Fake News media machine.

When I was ousted from Project Veritas, two big things (one you haven't heard about) happened to me.

FIRST: The media launched a vicious smear campaign against me like I've never seen before. **Make no mistake:** _They identified this as an opportunity to "cancel" me forever_ and tried everything in their power to destroy me and everything I've ever stood for.

They failed.

SECOND: I received an OVERWHELMING amount of support from patriots across the country. These brave men and women defended me, but more importantly, they stood up for the principles of liberty and free speech.

**One of my top supporters was The Atlas Society.**

Jennifer Grossman, the CEO of The Atlas Society, proudly stood by my side and even invited me to speak with a gathering of the organization's top student leaders about free speech and how Howard Roark, the fictional hero of _The Fountainhead_ by Ayn Rand, remains my inspiration to act with integrity.

Which is why I am personally reaching out to you.

I told Jennifer I would help The Atlas Society raise $25,000 in the next 48 hours by personally contacting my online supporters. [Please consider making an URGENT donation of any amount to The Atlas Society by clicking here.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=7a6872131692475eb2df70dda7344ca9&_e=8I5hIrDTek5potqn2HTrFXDoJSqf6RJlpeg9uXgnmS3MLIpdItMDMo1mZ6RIpbRDTkWXIo0Pq-iYs_-gB0X_zTnccOREgB0t5lROjYxvikIs1SUwMbYTVbyVMgdyV2Q6aN1lfNBdF9hc6901z9u0bHNtnaNaQHVkeBNYWTcBuO4mALXWaR_yJRAIGRWPXHNNnd_ZXE80d1gbIZY_s07aO9U746qlTavMrkT5y7cVm9OnNPSQA3zCDgvIEl_4H8xJkyK4upXgzZUpMoJ6ys8xo4RrJpKYwKs3CYxIbhm6R_zIDSunjluclCVxBG_frZYLN_SpIysCroWTUv0tFgxVXiGDR2yPgBYCDEq_-UxX80w%3D)

[Donate >>](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=7a6872131692475eb2df70dda7344ca9&_e=8I5hIrDTek5potqn2HTrFXDoJSqf6RJlpeg9uXgnmS3MLIpdItMDMo1mZ6RIpbRDTkWXIo0Pq-iYs_-gB0X_zTnccOREgB0t5lROjYxvikIs1SUwMbYTVbyVMgdyV2Q6aN1lfNBdF9hc6901z9u0bHNtnaNaQHVkeBNYWTcBuO75Ax_gAIQELJQhB-2-c0xpKH49V2srOo6ZGwmVLC_6pAh6-mca4a4lbIr8g7APzH3j5a2MLmF5MB3TO560pWb1l5NKCq0odmH-Z1BF1MwuNgqN1RGBQf45ZDye1joydEq1_OL0O3Gl1CR2C5V4gVCd5d3jV0QAYbA0_gZq8JCIB6LzQbavLeU4bgopSGY8A97mtuZI7W4mKy6hsUCdDMny)

Let me tell you more about The Atlas Society and how they are fundamentally changing the direction of our country.

_I will also tell you HOW The Atlas Society is spreading its message in what I consider one of the most innovative methods I 've EVER seen a nonprofit organization engage in before._

_**_So keep reading_!**_

My mentor, Andrew Breitbart, reminds us that politics is downstream from culture. But what is culture downstream from? Answer: Philosophy. That's where The Atlas Society shines, engaging young people with the virtues of reason, achievement, and benevolent self-interest in wildly creative, artistic ways.

Have you ever read Ayn Rand's _Atlas Shrugged_ or _The Fountainhead_?

These books changed how I saw the world and my role in it.

But they are 700+ pages long!

**Jennifer shared this terrifying statistic with me:** Daily reading of books among young people has fallen from 70% in the late 1970s to 12% today.

So, how do we preserve Rand's role as the greatest all-time recruiter for liberty? That's where The Atlas Society gets creative! They leverage art and technology to create programming for "_skimmers, swimmers, and deep divers_."

**Skimmers:** Social media memes and animated videos -- every single one of their 50 posts a week gets 40K comments, shares, and likes. The "Draw My Life" videos on concepts like Capitalism, Property Rights, and Free Speech reach MILLIONS of viewers. Links invite young people on a journey for deeper intellectual exploration.

**Swimmers:** Graphic novel adaptations of Ayn Rand's shorter books, Pocket Guides that distill big concepts like Postmodernism and Socialism into a 90-minute read. Weekly podcasts with top entrepreneurs and thought-leaders, and discussion groups like "Morals & Markets."

**Deep Divers:** They recruited an all-star academic faculty of philosophers and economists who guide students on a deeper study of Rand's philosophy, publish independent work, and provide programming at their summer conference for students (the Galt's Gulch Summit, where I spoke!).

Jennifer and The Atlas Society are accomplishing great things for our country, and I hope you will be one of the FIRST supporters of mine to make a donation and help me reach our $25,000 goal. Please use one of these links to donate:

Ultimately, here is what The Atlas Society is fighting FOR:
* Free market capitalism
* Rational self-interest
* Respect for achievement and success
* Free speech
* The future of young people and our great country

And here is what The Atlas Society is fighting AGAINST:
* Cancel Culture
* Our Educational system indoctrinating young people to embrace socialism
* Our sick culture that demonizes success and embraces twisted ideas
* Big government

I am inviting you to support The Atlas Society with a donation of ANY amount.

Deep Divers: They recruited an all-star academic faculty of philosophers and economists who guide students on a deeper study of Rand's philosophy, publish independent work, and provide programming at their summer conference for students (the Galt's Gulch Summit, where I spoke!). Jennifer and The Atlas Society are accomplishing great things for our country, and I hope you will be one of the FIRST supporters of mine to make a donation and help me reach our $25,000 goal. Please use one of these links to donate: Ultimately, here is what The Atlas Society is fighting FOR: Free market capitalism Rational self-interest Respect for achievement and success Free speech The future of young people and our great country And here is what The Atlas Society is fighting AGAINST: Cancel Culture Our Educational system indoctrinating young people to embrace socialism Our sick culture that demonizes success and embraces twisted ideas * Big government I am inviting you to support The Atlas Society with a donation of ANY amount. As a personal favor to me, please make your donation within the next 48 hours so I can help Jennifer reach our goal of $25,000. Thank you for everything, James O'Keefe P.S. Here is a picture of me speaking with The Atlas Society's top student leaders. These students inspire me. Sadly, young people are learning to embrace socialism, reject critical thinking skills, and shed their creativity. Well, NOT these students. The Atlas Society is teaching students that they CAN accomplish great things, become leaders, and inspire others to do the same. Thank you, James The Atlas Society is a 501(c)(3) Not For Profit Organization. All donations are tax-deductible. 1038 Miwok Dr Lodi, CA 95240 _

name: Dr. Ami Bera
subject: unconscionable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bera for Congress
body:
| Hi Peter,

This week, the House just advanced Donald Trump’s “Big, Beautiful Bill,” which includes over **$1 trillion in cuts** to Medicaid and food assistance. These programs are lifelines for working families, seniors, and children across this country.

Let me be clear: _slashing Medicaid and SNAP to hand out tax breaks to billionaires like Elon Musk and Jeff Bezos is unconscionable._

[**Will you add your name now to demand Congress reject Trump’s cruel budget and protect health care for all?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108306593/547516918/-297205735?source=EM_NBI_AB_20250524_PT_BBB_0_1YO_Bera_NA_NA_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTg5YWI4ZC1kNjM4LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YZ46wBY2ouFn_aeZOKMM8s2uqC1uS6uhxx0Jkix8JVw=&emci=205179c9-2038-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=2a89ab8d-d638-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=32394541)
