name: Trisha Calvarese
subject: My name is Trisha Calvarese (D), and I'm running to defeat Lauren Boebert
disclaimer_text: paid for by billionaires like Elon Musk, who are willing to do – and spend – whatever it takes to defeat us
body:
Working families deserve a voice in Congress.

| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/2820?t=1&akid=171%2E49239%2EYMk3Df)
---
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/2821?t=2&akid=171%2E49239%2EYMk3Df)
null, my name is Trisha Calvarese (D), and Haley Stevens let me know I could reach out. I just launched my campaign for Congress to defeat Lauren Boebert (R), flip the House blue, and stand up for working families in my hometown.
**In a second, I want to tell you a little more about myself and why I’m in this race. But first, I need you to know that if we win here, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to take back the House.[So if you’re ready to join our movement, please split $5 or more now between my campaign and Haley Stevens' to defeat Boebert and build a better future for Colorado.](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/2821?t=3&akid=171%2E49239%2EYMk3Df)**
My story begins in the rural Eastern Plains. My dad was a dedicated civil servant, and my mom was a child-care provider. From the beginning, they’ve been my models of what servant leadership means.
When they both became terminally ill with cancer less than two years ago, I returned home to provide end-of-life care for them. It was the toughest thing I’ve ever done.
It opened my eyes to how broken our systems are – and I couldn’t believe that our members of Congress weren’t doing more to fix them. **So that’s what I’m doing: I’m running for Congress to stand up for the dignity and care of families in my hometown.**
That means protecting Social Security and Medicare. It means working to bring down the cost of everything from prescription drugs to groceries. It means creating good-paying jobs and opportunities right here at home.
I know the road ahead won’t be easy. Lauren Boebert is bought and paid for by billionaires like Elon Musk, who are willing to do – and spend – whatever it takes to defeat us. But if there’s anything I’ve learned from growing up in Colorado, it’s this: There are things money can’t buy, greed can’t steal, and corruption can’t crush. It's us. We the people. This is our seat.
**So, null, I’m asking you to join our movement today:[Will you please split $5 between my campaign and Haley Stevens' to defeat Lauren Boebert, take back the House for Democrats, and give working families the voice they deserve in Congress?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/2821?t=4&akid=171%2E49239%2EYMk3Df)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/2822?t=5&akid=171%2E49239%2EYMk3Df)
---
| | [Donate $25](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/2823?t=6&akid=171%2E49239%2EYMk3Df)
---
| | [Donate $50](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/2824?t=7&akid=171%2E49239%2EYMk3Df)
---
| | [Donate Another Amount](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/2821?t=8&akid=171%2E49239%2EYMk3Df)
---
Thank you for your early support. There’s a lot of work ahead of us, but I’m so grateful to have you by my side. Together, I know we can win this thing.
Trisha Calvarese
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you chip in now to keep Michigan blue and take back the Senate for Democrats?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/2820?t=9&akid=171%2E49239%2EYMk3Df) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/2820?t=10&akid=171%2E49239%2EYMk3Df)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=11&akid=171%2E49239%2EYMk3Df)
Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate.
33717 Woodward Ave #539
Birmingham, MI 48009

With only two states with Governors races in 2025, all eyes are on Jersey to see if we’ll stand up for Jersey Values, or let the far-right agenda win again.

As the “Lower Taxes, Lower Costs” Governor, I will fight tooth and nail to deliver results, solve problems, and get things done for the people of our state, all while always protecting our Jersey Values.

**[Click here to help us meet our goal and show off our grassroots momentum!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108306633/547517043/-486314421?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_JG_20250524_FR_ReportingDeadline_0_3MO_JoshGottheimer_NA_NA_1.1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTM3ZjI0MS1kNzM4LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gcga5SkfLgwRsCec63yAXuAVxMwRm0gLz6D7Jatv9mU=&emci=f836f241-d738-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=0537f241-d738-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=37438246)**

Josh

Josh is running to be the next Governor of New Jersey in 2025 – the “Lower Taxes, Lower Costs Governor.” Since 2016, his campaign lawn signs have always said the same thing: “Lower Taxes. Jersey Values” – and that’s what he’s done, from expanding the Child Tax Credit to fighting to restore SALT to clawing dollars back to Jersey for first responders. name: Bonta HQ
subject: The impact of Trump’s tariffs on California businesses
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
The AG is keeping up the fight to stop Trump’s illegal and erratic tariffs from hurting consumers and businesses in our state.
# [](https://act.robbonta.com/go/3?refcode=em20250524&t=1&akid=1802%2E1088799%2EyqIHhx)
As President Trump continues his chaotic tariff war, sending shockwaves through businesses all over the world, **Rob met with California business leaders in the Bay Area yesterday to discuss the negative impacts** these tariffs could have on our state’s economy, working families, and businesses.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250524?refcode=em20250524-1802&refcode2=1802_1088799_yqIHhx&akid=1802%2E1088799%2EyqIHhx)
You may remember that Rob sued the Trump administration last month to stop its illegal and erratic tariffs. If allowed, these tariffs will wreak havoc on the U.S. financial system and cause widespread harm, especially to California’s economy, which is now _the fourth-largest economy in the world._
The tariffs challenged under Rob’s lawsuit are currently projected to:
* Shrink the U.S. economy by $178 billion;
* Cost California consumers $25 billion;
* Result in the loss of over 64,000 jobs throughout California.

That’s why the AG made it a priority to hear directly from leaders on the front lines concerned about the disastrous impact of tariffs on their industries and businesses.
These folks are the bellwethers for our state and have sounded the alarm, and as Rob told them, **California will continue to fight on all fronts to end President Trump's illegal tariffs** and restore certainty and vibrancy to our economy.
**[But he can’t do it alone. As Rob focuses on stopping these disastrous tariffs from hurting California, will you power our grassroots campaign with a contribution of $5 now?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250524?refcode=em20250524-1802&amount=5&refcode2=1802_1088799_yqIHhx&akid=1802%2E1088799%2EyqIHhx)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250524?refcode=em20250524-1802&amount=5&refcode2=1802_1088799_yqIHhx&akid=1802%2E1088799%2EyqIHhx)**
Thanks for all you do to support the Attorney General as he fights for us,
Bonta HQ

name: Ellen R. Malcolm, EMILYs List
subject: When the news makes you want to scream...
body:
Here's my prescription, Peter: Turn your heartbreak into action. |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108307182/547519154/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE559_20250524_ERMRemarks_ALL&sourceid=1056216&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWQ0Y2JjMC1kOTM4LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ab6lq_QIVyn5DsxMredSjzW1_WLCqDudy7YGW4w5dMI=) Dear Peter,

When we started EMILYs List 40 years ago, we had a dream: that if we helped women gain political power, they would change the world. And they have.

But let me be honest with you — this dream didn't start with optimism. It started with anger. We were _pissed off_. We were sick of the old boys' club ignoring women candidates and shutting us out of power. So in 1985, we built something different: a network of people who believed in the power of early money, bold strategy, and big dreams.

Now we're facing a very different kind of fight — a nightmare, really. Donald Trump and his MAGA allies are hell-bent on tearing down our democracy, brick by brick. Every headline is more devastating than the last — and every day brings a fresh round of rage, fear, and heartbreak.

[**So here's my prescription, Peter: Turn that heartbreak into action.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108307183/547519155/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE559_20250524_ERMRemarks_ALL&sourceid=1056216&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWQ0Y2JjMC1kOTM4LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ab6lq_QIVyn5DsxMredSjzW1_WLCqDudy7YGW4w5dMI=) | [DONATE TO HELP WOMEN WIN](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108307184/547519156/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE559_20250524_ERMRemarks_ALL&sourceid=1056216&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWQ0Y2JjMC1kOTM4LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ab6lq_QIVyn5DsxMredSjzW1_WLCqDudy7YGW4w5dMI=)
---
Every time Trump makes you scream at the TV, throw $10 in your cookie jar. Every time you want to cry, or can't believe what you're reading, add another $10. And at the end of the month? Send the contents of that jar to EMILYs List, and we'll put it straight to work making change.

Here's how:

We're going to **send a shockwave through MAGA world** by helping Democratic pro-choice women win in 2026 — from local legislative races, to state court seats, to taking back the U.S. House.

We'll deliver so many victories that Republicans will have no choice but to face the truth: that they've lost the support of voters, that Donald Trump is a failed leader, and that unless they take action to stop him, they too will suffer grave political consequences. We want wins so big this cycle that they'll isolate Trump, block his dangerous agenda, and begin to rebuild our democracy. And with your cookie-jar support, I am absolutely sure we can do it.

This plan is already underway, Peter. We're already recruiting incredible candidates. We're training staff. We're reaching out to voters. And yes, we're raising the early money that will help women WIN in the weeks, months, and years ahead.

But we can't do any of it without you.

This is the strategy. This is the moment. And this is your call to act — not just once, but every time it feels like too much. Because if we act together, we will win.

[**So, Peter, please chip in now to build the most important political turnaround of our lifetimes.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108307185/547519157/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE559_20250524_ERMRemarks_ALL&sourceid=1056216&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWQ0Y2JjMC1kOTM4LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ab6lq_QIVyn5DsxMredSjzW1_WLCqDudy7YGW4w5dMI=)

clean_body: Here's my prescription, Peter: Turn your heartbreak into action. | = Dear Peter, When we started EMILYs List 40 years ago, we had a dream: that if we helped women gain political power, they would change the world. And they have. But let me be honest with you — this dream didn't start with optimism. It started with anger. We were pissed off. We were sick of the old boys' club ignoring women candidates and shutting us out of power. So in 1985, we built something different: a network of people who believed in the power of early money, bold strategy, and big dreams. Now we're facing a very different kind of fight — a nightmare, really. Donald Trump and his MAGA allies are hell-bent on tearing down our democracy, brick by brick. Every headline is more devastating than the last — and every day brings a fresh round of rage, fear, and heartbreak. = | = Every time Trump makes you scream at the TV, throw $10 in your cookie jar. Every time you want to cry, or can't believe what you're reading, add another $10. And at the end of the month? Send the contents of that jar to EMILYs List, and we'll put it straight to work making change. Here's how: We're going to send a shockwave through MAGA world by helping Democratic pro-choice women win in 2026 — from local legislative races, to state court seats, to taking back the U.S. House. We'll deliver so many victories that Republicans will have no choice but to face the truth: that they've lost the support of voters, that Donald Trump is a failed leader, and that unless they take action to stop him, they too will suffer grave political consequences. We want wins so big this cycle that they'll isolate Trump, block his dangerous agenda, and begin to rebuild our democracy. And with your cookie-jar support, I am absolutely sure we can do it. This plan is already underway, Peter. We're already recruiting incredible candidates. We're training staff. We're reaching out to voters. And yes, we're raising the early money that will help women WIN in the weeks, months, and years ahead. But we can't do any of it without you. This is the strategy. This is the moment. And this is your call to act — not just once, but every time it feels like too much. Because if we act together, we will win. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = With determination and gratitude, Ellen R. Malcolm Founder and Chair Emerita, EMILYs List = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Box 96612 Washington, DC 20077 United States | ---|---

* **TOP NEWS**

"**A &M Chancellor John Sharp reflects on legacy as he is set to retire: 'We ain't nobody's little brother anymore**'," Houston Chronicle's**Nicole Hensley** and**John Wayne Ferguson** \-- "Texas A&M System Chancellor**John Sharp** found dilapidated military buildings scattered among acres of cacti and weeds when he visited the flagship's Riverside campus roughly a decade ago. His colleague called it a "s---hole" with potential, and the lifelong politician with a knack for cultivating ideas knew a good deal when he saw one.

So he took the A&M president to lunch at Whataburger and proposed a swap: a system office for the university's field in Bryan. The deal benefited both parties, and in 2019, Sharp reopened the space for the new "RELLIS" research facility. The hub for tech development hosts a combat testing center for the Army Futures Command and is the future site of at least [four advanced nuclear reactors](https://substack.com/redirect/831a69db-8196-4a70-a89b-56514aafa699?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/beb9c64d-5b4b-425e-92d7-7c3bbb8fb3c6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
When [Sharp retires next month](https://substack.com/redirect/87f08d80-5f99-4f6e-a97f-0f401f5bc239?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), he says he will count the research center as one of his defining achievements from his 14 years at the head of the Texas A&M System. During that time, the network of 11 universities, eight state agencies and a health science center grew into one of the biggest public research and development arms in the country -- and A&M supporters say Sharp cemented himself as one of the most transformative chancellors in the system's history.

"A&M was lucky to have him at the moment in time when he came," Deputy Chancellor**Billy Hamilton** said. "He is one of the handful of truly unique leaders of the state."
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/beb9c64d-5b4b-425e-92d7-7c3bbb8fb3c6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Much has been written about John Sharp, his love for the Aggies and his personification of Texas. He speaks with a drawl and has an affinity for barbecue and the aforementioned iconic fast-food chain. He's a storyteller who often lacks a filter. His [friendship and onetime rivalry](https://substack.com/redirect/ef194b23-e55b-49b4-adb6-098062f6338e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) with former Gov. **Rick Perry** is well-documented for their beginning as college roommates. Some of Sharp's escapades as a Texas A&M student are urban legend. You might have heard about the time he [scraped crickets off the ground](https://substack.com/redirect/98aedc0b-57b5-4ee3-a358-b18f99ec82bf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and stuffed them in his mouth to scare off a group of angry bikers.

It has all added to his prominence in the Texas Legislature, where he spent three decades as a Democratic staffer, state representative, state senator, railroad commissioner and comptroller. His outspokenness seemed to work in tandem with his reputation as an executor of big picture goals, and as someone who wasn't afraid to cross the aisle to do it.

Sharp said his skills as a dealmaker proved useful during his time as chancellor. Despite a [changing perception of higher education](https://substack.com/redirect/37f29ebf-893f-4815-883e-bc72c31a4f0f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that sometimes placed faculty and administrators at odds with Republicans holding the purse-strings, Sharp is credited with ushering in a renaissance of funding for organizations across the Texas A&M System.

Research spending boomed, as did capital construction. He oversaw $12 billion in building projects, compared to $3 billion in the prior time frame. The investments deepened the system's commitment to rural areas, Sharp said, but they also pushed Texas A&M into bigger cities. The system now has a presence in Houston, at both the [Texas Medical Center](https://substack.com/redirect/bd8bf740-cbd3-4ca5-95d9-32ad743aa734?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and [NASA's Johnson Space Center](https://substack.com/redirect/f4064169-9c39-4eff-a469-1cc5255bd3ef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).

For Sharp, there's pride in knowing that people view Texas A&M differently now.

"We ain't nobody's little brother anymore," he said." [Hou Chron](https://substack.com/redirect/7c112d33-977a-498c-8c0c-5c4411d9279f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) ($)

TOP NEWS "A &M Chancellor John Sharp reflects on legacy as he is set to retire: 'We ain't nobody's little brother anymore'," Houston Chronicle'sNicole Hensley andJohn Wayne Ferguson \-- "Texas A&M System ChancellorJohn Sharp found dilapidated military buildings scattered among acres of cacti and weeds when he visited the flagship's Riverside campus roughly a decade ago. His colleague called it a "s---hole" with potential, and the lifelong politician with a knack for cultivating ideas knew a good deal when he saw one. So he took the A&M president to lunch at Whataburger and proposed a swap: a system office for the university's field in Bryan. The deal benefited both parties, and in 2019, Sharp reopened the space for the new "RELLIS" research facility. The hub for tech development hosts a combat testing center for the Army Futures Command and is the future site of at least . When , he says he will count the research center as one of his defining achievements from his 14 years at the head of the Texas A&M System. During that time, the network of 11 universities, eight state agencies and a health science center grew into one of the biggest public research and development arms in the country -- and A&M supporters say Sharp cemented himself as one of the most transformative chancellors in the system's history. "A&M was lucky to have him at the moment in time when he came," Deputy ChancellorBilly Hamilton said. "He is one of the handful of truly unique leaders of the state." Much has been written about John Sharp, his love for the Aggies and his personification of Texas. He speaks with a drawl and has an affinity for barbecue and the aforementioned iconic fast-food chain. He's a storyteller who often lacks a filter. His with former Gov. Rick Perry is well-documented for their beginning as college roommates. Some of Sharp's escapades as a Texas A&M student are urban legend. You might have heard about the time he and stuffed them in his mouth to scare off a group of angry bikers. It has all added to his prominence in the Texas Legislature, where he spent three decades as a Democratic staffer, state representative, state senator, railroad commissioner and comptroller. His outspokenness seemed to work in tandem with his reputation as an executor of big picture goals, and as someone who wasn't afraid to cross the aisle to do it. Sharp said his skills as a dealmaker proved useful during his time as chancellor. Despite a that sometimes placed faculty and administrators at odds with Republicans holding the purse-strings, Sharp is credited with ushering in a renaissance of funding for organizations across the Texas A&M System. Research spending boomed, as did capital construction. He oversaw $12 billion in building projects, compared to $3 billion in the prior time frame. The investments deepened the system's commitment to rural areas, Sharp said, but they also pushed Texas A&M into bigger cities. The system now has a presence in Houston, at both the and . For Sharp, there's pride in knowing that people view Texas A&M differently now. "We ain't nobody's little brother anymore," he said." Fellow American,

In just a short time, RFK Jr. has hit the ground running as Secretary of Health and Human Services--and Washington insiders are _panicking_.

While the media launches attacks, **RFK Jr. is delivering results:**
* Worked with President Trump to _slash prescription drug prices_
* Launched the _MAHA initiative_ to tackle the _chronic disease epidemic_
* Directed the CDC to study _potential links between vaccines and autism_
* _Banned eight artificial food dyes_ in medications and the national food supply
* Worked with Republican governors to _ban soda from the food stamp program_
* Proposed an initiative to _ban fluoride from drinking water_
* Ordered major _agency restructuring and budget cuts_
* Promoted a focus on _mental health, addiction, nutrition, and physical activity_ as pillars of the department's new priorities

The liberal media and Washington swamp are furious. But we know these are the changes America needs.

| Update 24 May, 2025
---
| |
---
If you see something, say something--and take action. Thankfully, I serve on the House Armed Services Committee (HASC), where I can directly contribute to strengthening our national security. While I'm a strong advocate for limited government, my foremost priority in Congress is ensuring the safety and security of the American people--both at home and abroad.
Sadly, the previous administration made decisions that cost American lives and left us more vulnerable. Fortunately, President Trump has made law and order, as well as national security, a top priority. His "peace through strength" policies are making a significant impact both at home and abroad. However stay vigilant, we still have a long way to go to turn things around.
---
| |
---
| What can we do? We can live a life worthy of their sacrifice. On this Memorial Day, we pause to remember and honor the brave men and women who made the ultimate sacrifice in service to our country. While spending time at cookouts or at the beach with family and friends this weekend, take time to honor and remember them with a prayer, a moment of silence, a flag raised high, or a quiet reflection. With much gratitude, we truly are the home of the free because of the brave.
---
| The One Big Beautiful Bill Act Passes the House!
---
| |
---
| America First! I had a busy day all over the Virginia 5th District that started Friday morning when I left my house 5am to wave good morning and engage with folks on their way to work in Albemarle County. My "YES" vote made the difference on the Big Beautiful Bill that passed by just one vote! Thank goodness my predecessor is no longer in DC because he said he would have voted "NO" with the democrats. This would have caused President Trump's Big Beautiful Bill that includes much of the America First agenda to have failed. After the vote, many of my fellow conservative colleagues expressed their gratitude for my congressional run and my support of the bill.
EVERY House Democrat united to vote against:

* Reducing the deficit by $1.6 trillion
* Funding Trump's Remain in Mexico Policy
* Lowering costs $13,000 more in take home pay for American families
* Saving the average American family $1,700
* No more $200 fee for suppressors
* Defunding planned parenthood
* No tax on tips
* No tax on overtime
* Terminating the Green New Scam "EV" chargers and Luxury "clean" vehicles
* Tax cuts on retired seniors' Social Security benefits
* Expanding the child tax credit
* Expanding 529 Education Saving Accounts
* Tax deductions on American-made vehicles
* Tax cuts for American workers
* $10 billion in tax cuts to farmers
* Preventing over 2 million family owned farms from being burdened by the death tax.
* Providing critical funding for rural schools
* Increasing mining of domestic critical minerals to decrease our reliance on foreign adversaries such as China.
* Replenishing the depleted Strategic Petroleum Reserve
* Completing the border wall
* Deporting one million illegal immigrants per year
* 10,000 new immigration officers
* Stopping the flow of fentanyl
* Removing 1.4 million illegal immigrants from Medicaid
* Adding work requirements for Medicaid
* A pay raise for service members
* Ending taxpayer funded gender transition surgeries
* Modernizing 40-year-old Air Traffic Control systems
* Investing in the Golden Dome Defense System
* Expansion of our naval fleet
* Restocking America's arsenal
* Increasing American energy production
* Lowering costs
* AND more!

I am honored to be the first Republican endorsed by President Trump for re-election in 2026 and proud to continue standing with him in support of the America First Agenda.
---
| RIP Sarah Milgrim and Yaron Lischinsky
---
| |
---
| I am heartbroken beyond words by the devastating loss of Sarah Milgrim and Yaron Lischinsky, whose lives were so cruelly and unjustly taken. Sarah and Yaron were two vibrant, beautiful souls--full of promise and love--on the brink of a new chapter together, just days away from their engagement.
This tragedy is unfathomable. Our hearts ache for their families, friends, and all who knew and loved them. May their memory be a blessing, and may those left behind find strength in the light Sarah and Yaron brought to the world.
We all must unite in the fight against the evil of antisemitism. The man accused of fatally shooting these two Israeli Embassy staff members outside a Jewish museum in Washington, D.C., reportedly told police after his arrest, 'I did it for Palestine, I did it for Gaza.' Federal authorities announced charges on Thursday, describing the killings as a targeted act of terrorism. The question remains: will he face the death penalty?
---

clean_body: | | | | == | == | Update 24 May, 2025 | | If you see something, say something--and take action. Thankfully, I serve on the House Armed Services Committee (HASC), where I can directly contribute to strengthening our national security. While I'm a strong advocate for limited government, my foremost priority in Congress is ensuring the safety and security of the American people--both at home and abroad. Sadly, the previous administration made decisions that cost American lives and left us more vulnerable. Fortunately, President Trump has made law and order, as well as national security, a top priority. His "peace through strength" policies are making a significant impact both at home and abroad. However stay vigilant, we still have a long way to go to turn things around. | | | What can we do? We can live a life worthy of their sacrifice. On this Memorial Day, we pause to remember and honor the brave men and women who made the ultimate sacrifice in service to our country. While spending time at cookouts or at the beach with family and friends this weekend, take time to honor and remember them with a prayer, a moment of silence, a flag raised high, or a quiet reflection. With much gratitude, we truly are the home of the free because of the brave. | The One Big Beautiful Bill Act Passes the House! | | | America First! I had a busy day all over the Virginia 5th District that started Friday morning when I left my house 5am to wave good morning and engage with folks on their way to work in Albemarle County. My "YES" vote made the difference on the Big Beautiful Bill that passed by just one vote! Thank goodness my predecessor is no longer in DC because he said he would have voted "NO" with the democrats. This would have caused President Trump's Big Beautiful Bill that includes much of the America First agenda to have failed. After the vote, many of my fellow conservative colleagues expressed their gratitude for my congressional run and my support of the bill. EVERY House Democrat united to vote against: Reducing the deficit by $1.6 trillion Funding Trump's Remain in Mexico Policy Lowering costs $13,000 more in take home pay for American families Saving the average American family $1,700 No more $200 fee for suppressors Defunding planned parenthood No tax on tips No tax on overtime Terminating the Green New Scam "EV" chargers and Luxury "clean" vehicles Tax cuts on retired seniors' Social Security benefits Expanding the child tax credit Expanding 529 Education Saving Accounts Tax deductions on American-made vehicles Tax cuts for American workers $10 billion in tax cuts to farmers Preventing over 2 million family owned farms from being burdened by the death tax. Providing critical funding for rural schools Increasing mining of domestic critical minerals to decrease our reliance on foreign adversaries such as China. Replenishing the depleted Strategic Petroleum Reserve Completing the border wall Deporting one million illegal immigrants per year 10,000 new immigration officers Stopping the flow of fentanyl Removing 1.4 million illegal immigrants from Medicaid Adding work requirements for Medicaid A pay raise for service members Ending taxpayer funded gender transition surgeries Modernizing 40-year-old Air Traffic Control systems Investing in the Golden Dome Defense System Expansion of our naval fleet Restocking America's arsenal Increasing American energy production Lowering costs AND more! I am honored to be the first Republican endorsed by President Trump for re-election in 2026 and proud to continue standing with him in support of the America First Agenda. | RIP Sarah Milgrim and Yaron Lischinsky | | | I am heartbroken beyond words by the devastating loss of Sarah Milgrim and Yaron Lischinsky, whose lives were so cruelly and unjustly taken. Sarah and Yaron were two vibrant, beautiful souls--full of promise and love--on the brink of a new chapter together, just days away from their engagement. This tragedy is unfathomable. Our hearts ache for their families, friends, and all who knew and loved them. May their memory be a blessing, and may those left behind find strength in the light Sarah and Yaron brought to the world. We all must unite in the fight against the evil of antisemitism. The man accused of fatally shooting these two Israeli Embassy staff members outside a Jewish museum in Washington, D.C., reportedly told police after his arrest, 'I did it for Palestine, I did it for Gaza.' Federal authorities announced charges on Thursday, describing the killings as a targeted act of terrorism. The question remains: will he face the death penalty? | | | Virginia November Elections | | It's time to lock arms and support fellow veteran and US Marine Winsome Sears for Governor, our entire statewide ticket, and House of Delegates candidates to secure victory this November. ==] | MagAMAZING Week! | | == | MagAMAZING Week! 🏛️ U.S. House Passes One, Big, Beautiful Bill 📵 Trump Signs First Lady-Sponsored Take It Down Act 🍎 MAHA Report 🛡️ Golden Dome 🇿🇦 South Africa Visit ⚛️ Nuclear Renaissance 🎖️ Medals of Sacrifice 💰 Memorial Day Gas Prices-- 20-Year Low Watch Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt's MAGA Minute! == | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Textbook Medical Tyranny | | | Thank God we didn't get the shot. It should have been our choice, not the government's. We'll never forget how Fauci kept changing his stance--first, we needed masks, then we didn't, and then we were told to wear two. He promised the vaccine would work, but then we were told we needed a booster, and then another. They expected us to believe that if we didn't wear a mask, we'd get the virus--unless, of course, we were sitting down to eat. Do you remember how we couldn't go to church, but we could still go to a liquor store? Now, apparently, the incidence of myocarditis cases in young people is way up in young people who took the vaccine. This was medical tyranny, plain and simple. | | | | A Haircut with Jimmie and Vicki in Bedford County | | | Bedford County | | | We discussed Memorial Day, politics, The Big Beautiful Bill, and more over breakfast in Bedford County Friday at County Line & Mini Mall & Cafe. | | | Early Morning Start. | | | ==, Louisa County | | My Monday started right here in Virginia's 5th District -- with a great visit from my friend ==, who stopped by while I was out early in Louisa County waving "Good Morning" to commuters on their way to work. It is an honor to be your representative. Afterwards I drove to Washington D.C, to cast votes and work hard to help pass the One Big Beautiful Bill Act. President Donald J. Trump's One Big Beautiful Bill is a once-in-a-generation opportunity to deliver on the promises Republicans have made to the American people. That's why advocacy groups and stakeholders across the country are rallying behind it -- urging Congress to act without delay. Take a look at what they're saying: == | 13th Annual Rice Volunteer Fire Department Fundraiser | | | | | | | | | | | | | It was all about supporting our local heroes at the 13th Annual Rice Volunteer Fire Department Fundraiser -- hosted for the second time at the beautiful Barn at Poor House Farm. Tracy and I had an incredible time connecting one-on-one with so many constituents. A heartfelt thank you to Andy Ellington and his amazing team for everything they do to keep our community safe. We're also grateful for the opportunity to join == in addressing such a fantastic crowd -- the largest turnout to date! While the final fundraising total is still being calculated, the energy and support were truly inspiring. They raffled off 30 guns, a new record. If you'd like to contribute, please reach out to Andy Ellington at (434) 603-2016. You can follow them on Facebook here: == Senator Luther Cifers' Fundraiser W/ Del. Lee Ware | | | | We had a fantastic time in Cumberland County, joining Senator Luther Cifers, Delegate Lee Ware, and many other wonderfull folks for a "Fun-Filled Day of Picking, Grinnin', and Winning" at Strawberry Farm. A heartfelt thank you to Senator Cifers--not only for your warm welcome and the opportunity to address the crowd, but also for your steadfast leadership and commitment to our conservative values in Richmond. Thank you Lee Ware as well for fighting for us in Richmond and thank you for your words of wisdom. Luther and Lee are absolutely right: teamwork is essential. name: Prudent Politics
subject: I want you to see this...
body:
Please read the following message.

------------------------------------------------------------
https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xueok4Iteknop5I0ITmb2x9eej&s=CDFNCPLBMALHNOMM

Friend,

We recently wrapped up one of Turning Point USA’s latest stops on the American Comeback Tour at UC San Diego...

I wish you could have been there to see it.

Another packed quad. Students eager to listen. Flags waving. Cheers for America. Energy you could feel in your bones.

Not in Texas... Not in Florida... California.

The “Deep Blue” stronghold the Left said we’d never touch.

But we did. And we’ll keep going. Because of patriots like you.
https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xueok4Iteknop5I1ITmb2x9eej&s=CDFNCPLBMALHNOMM

As I stood there looking out at the crowd — hundreds of young patriots rising up in a place the Left said they owned — I couldn’t help but think...

Nearly 13 years ago, all of this felt... impossible.

Back then, Turning Point USA wasn’t the cultural phenomenon it is today.

It wasn’t an office. It wasn’t a team. It was just me.

No money. No connections. Just a desk and an old computer in a dusty garage in the Chicago suburbs.

But what I did have was a vision...

It was 2012. The Left controlled every classroom, every campus, and nearly every corner of our culture.

Their narrative was everywhere: America was evil... Faith was “oppressive”... Freedom was outdated... The Conservative movement was dead...

And most of all, young people belonged to the Left.

I didn’t believe that. I couldn’t accept that. I couldn’t just stand by and watch the Left win.

Back then, it was no wonder WHY we were losing young people to the Left...

The Conservative movement felt stale... Conservative organizations felt like a snooze... And it felt like no one had an idea of how to reach America’s youth...

I believed if we were ever going to win young people back for America, we needed excitement. Energy. Passion. And ZEAL for our ideas.

My dream was to launch a conservative youth movement that would inspire young people to stand for truth — and LOVE this country again.

I didn’t know what I was going to call this dream... this feeling... this movement.

So, I picked up the phone, called my dad, and said, “I think I’m supposed to start something, but I don’t have a name for it...”

He replied... "How about Turning Point?"

And just like that, a fire was lit. Turning Point USA was born. On the promise that we could TURN this country around, one young heart at a time.

The early days were brutal.

I remember driving across the Chicago suburbs to small Tea Party meetings talking about “generational theft”...

I remember my first Turning Point USA speaking event in Peoria, Illinois during the summer of 2012, where just six people showed up...

And I remember the look in their eyes — those early patriots —when I told them the vision:

“We’re going to create a youth movement that LOVES America.”

“We’re going to go on campus and win hearts and minds.”

“We’re going to push back — and we’re going to WIN.”

They didn’t laugh... They didn’t walk out...

They believed. And Friend — so did patriots like you.

You see, this isn’t my story. This is YOUR story.

Because without patriots like you... there is no Turning Point USA.

Without you... there is no American Comeback story.

Without you... there is no cultural shift happening right now in schools, churches, homes, and on every campus across our great nation.

You were there when the campus quads and halls were empty... stood by us when our signs got torn down.

You had our backs when the mob showed up — when they shouted, screamed, and tried to wipe us off the map.

You didn’t give up. And neither did we.

But we were never supposed to be winning...

The Left thought they owned this generation. They thought their indoctrination had worked. But they were wrong.

I remember standing at tables on hostile campuses with nothing but flyers and hope, praying to have a conversation that would light a spark.

I went where I was told a young conservative didn’t belong. And I kept going back.
https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xueok4Iteknop5I2ITmb2x9eej&s=CDFNCPLBMALHNOMM

And then... something happened... The students started listening.

They started to question everything, think for themselves, and no longer be afraid to stand up.

Then, they started showing up. In DROVES.

And now? We’re not just watching history unfold... you and I are making it.

Friend, just LOOK at the movement we’ve built:

🔥 A network of 820,000+ conservative student activists
🔥 1,800+ college and high school chapters
🔥 All 50 states. No territory unclaimed.

🔥 16 BILLION+ total views across online platforms

🔥 5 MILLION+ daily viewers online
🔥 Over 10 million young people turned away from the Left
🔥 Students rising up — even in DEEP blue states

Friend, we’re not just winning arguments and “owning the libs” anymore...

We’re winning hearts. We’re changing minds. We’re turning the tide.

This generation wasn’t “lost.” They were LIED to.

But because of patriots like YOU — they’re hearing the truth. They’re finding their voices. They’re discovering their courage. They’re falling in love with this country again!
https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xueok4Iteknop5I3ITmb2x9eej&s=CDFNCPLBMALHNOMM

Friend, praise God!

And you know what? This generation is just getting started.

But let me say this clearly: The battle is far from over.

The Left is on the ropes — but still dangerous.

They’re doubling down with new tactics. They’re more aggressive than ever in our schools, our media, our digital spaces.

They’re coming after our students harder than ever before — because they know we’re winning.

We cannot give them back an inch.

So now, as we look back on how far we’ve come... It’s time to fight even harder.

We’re going to press in. We’re going to drive deeper into enemy territory.

We’re going to reach more students, train more leaders, and destroy more strongholds of Leftist control.

Not with violence. Not with hate. But with truth. With courage. And with patriots like YOU standing shoulder-to-shoulder with us.

Friend, I want you to feel proud as you read this today.

Because this movement — the energy, the fire, the growth, the headlines — it belongs to patriots like you...

The grassroots patriots who lit the match... fanned the flames... stood in the gap.

And now, we’re raising up the most Conservative, most Patriotic, most fired-up youth generation in 50 years.

That’s not hype. That’s reality. And it’s only possible because of our proud supporters, people like you, who never gave up.

I can’t say thank you enough to the patriots who’ve fought alongside us... those who loved this country enough to invest in its future... those who believed this country was worth saving.

Let’s keep our foot on the gas. Let’s keep changing minds. Let’s keep winning this culture war.

Because we were never supposed to be winning... And yet here we are.

For America,

Charlie Kirk
Founder & CEO
Turning Point USA
https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xueok4Iteknop5I4ITmb2x9eej&s=CDFNCPLBMALHNOMM

P.S. Friend, thank you for reading what was admittedly a long email.

But I wanted you to know how far we’ve come and how thankful I am for patriots like you!

And if this email stirred something in you... If you’d be proud to be a part of the movement that’s going to save our GREAT nation...

If you want to see even MORE students come alive for truth, for God, and for America...

Then I have good news.

Right now, through the month of May, every single donation to Turning Point USA is being MATCHED, dollar-for-dollar, up to $2.5 MILLION.

Why? Because an extremely generous Turning Point USA supporter wanted to rally as many grassroots patriots as possible to DEFEAT the Left in our culture... for good.

That means your impact gets DOUBLED.

That means two times the students you’ll reach. Two times the truth heard. Two times the hearts and minds you’ll win over for AMERICA.

So, if you’ve been waiting for the right moment to take your stand — this is it. This is your chance to pour fuel on the fire that patriots like you helped start.

You just won’t be supporting a cause anymore — you’ll be powering a cultural REVOLUTION.

Let’s carry the momentum through to every campus, every platform, every cultural stronghold until we WIN. Double the impact of your gift to Turning Point USA today. (https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xueok4Iteknop5I5ITmb2x9eej&s=CDFNCPLBMALHNOMM
Join Turning Point USA & DOUBLE Your Impact (https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xueok4Iteknop5I6ITmb2x9eej&s=CDFNCPLBMALHNOMM

4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044

PrudentPolitics.com

525-K East Market Street # 114
City: Leesburg
State: Virginia
Zip Code: 20176

You can read our Privacy Policy by clicking here (https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xueok4Iteknop5I7ITmb2x9eej&s=CDFNCPLBMALHNOMM

Click Here to unsubscribe from future emails (https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/public/unsubscribe.jsp?gid=6400000706&uid=64007911625&mid=6400021972&sig=GPEBCGJBPNILLDPI&l=D0I2xueok4Iteknop5I&slt=4)

This message was intended for dpwillis67@gmail.com

OMG’s hidden camera caught genetic counselor James Welch confessing to rigging research, swapping “race” for “ancestry” to sneak DEI studies past DOGE oversight, **spitting in the face of President Trump’s orders to end this divisive garbage**.

He bragged NIH’s intramural programs can “do anything” with funding, **mocked RFK Jr. as the “weird cousin,” and even plotted to plaster Putin’s face over Trump’s portrait at NIH!**

**When I confronted him outside NIH headquarters, he bolted like a coward,** but I chased him, camera rolling, shouting, “You’re about to have a worse day!” **That’s the fire I bring to O’Keefe Media Group’s fight for truth.**

This isn’t a stunt—**it’s a war on corruption**.

My American Swiper program trains undercover journalists to infiltrate the swamp—government agencies, universities, corporations—and expose Deep State Goons like Welch.

He’s not alone; the system’s crawling with bureaucrats twisting science for political agendas, some even skirting the Hatch Act.

My tip line’s exploding with 200+ leads a week from insiders spilling secrets—each one’s a ticking time bomb ready to blow the lid off another scandal. [**But I can’t do it without you**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxUz8GOmzAQBuCnMTeQPRgDBw67jbKHaqutWqntaeXYQ3DLYGKbpPv2lVEUqdf__-yZ0bTObvwYWPvMACZnIwNg9RMDuPy6Udh-0-eXkl5eobyoL9TkFj7d6RUeeDH65-vTt_D29ftzfOPWrT_-Xq7iwdPHig98H1ohaTfntD0UdqhHy2WBg2hlJ0Tf97KYhq7vTnJURnA7KuxGjaNqlBAAFupRdIUbgEPDG5DAGyGh6nslsO1NC5w3wgCTfJ9TacLgjBYx3XQI3lNlPBXzMKW0xn2xI4NjRLMFrPSC1qcsGBz9H8QRCa3T5-C3NUd0Lhc3lWbSEUs6lTtk9XFL9B79Fgyy-vCfYqBymb_ZaC_vidG0andeWH2gEwOlyW9LYvUBmrtIGPIL4I2E91sQRRjsenPz7KJqmeTn_cB8znWAfwEAAP__LIaQig).

Training a Swiper is no small feat.

It takes thousands for cameras, secure comms, travel, and legal defenses to protect our journalists from retaliation.

The Department of Health and Human Services, NIH’s overlord, is a maze of bias, and DOGE’s cracking down, but we need to scale up to match their audacity.

[**Your donation turns patriots into truth warriors**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxUz8GOmzAQBuCnMTeQPRgDBw67jbKHaqutWqntaeXYQ3DLYGKbpPv2lVEUqdf__-yZ0bTObvwYWPvMACZnIwNg9RMDuPy6Udh-0-eXkl5eobyoL9TkFj7d6RUeeDH65-vTt_D29ftzfOPWrT_-Xq7iwdPHig98H1ohaTfntD0UdqhHy2WBg2hlJ0Tf97KYhq7vTnJURnA7KuxGjaNqlBAAFupRdIUbgEPDG5DAGyGh6nslsO1NC5w3wgCTfJ9TacLgjBYx3XQI3lNlPBXzMKW0xn2xI4NjRLMFrPSC1qcsGBz9H8QRCa3T5-C3NUd0Lhc3lWbSEUs6lTtk9XFL9B79Fgyy-vCfYqBymb_ZaC_vidG0andeWH2gEwOlyW9LYvUBmrtIGPIL4I2E91sQRRjsenPz7KJqmeTn_cB8znWAfwEAAP__LIaQig), arming them with evidence—recordings, documents, confessions—that spark investigations. **Our work’s already got DOGE and the Department of Education probing dozens of institutions!**

name: Deb Haaland
subject: I am 35 years sober
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
You must face hard truths if you want to make change.
Hi Peter, it’s Deb Haaland.
Heartland Patriots said I could reach out, and I’m so grateful for the chance to connect with you.
I want to tell you about a milestone I’m proud of: **I have reached 35 years of sobriety.**
Most people running for office wouldn’t choose to speak candidly about alcohol addiction. But I’m not like most people running for office. My story is different.
I was about 23 years old when I made the brave decision to get sober. It was a struggle at first, but I persevered because I was committed to doing all I could. I went to AA meetings and probably read 20 books on addiction.
My struggles made me fierce, which is why I chose to speak openly about my sobriety in my very first campaign ad when I ran for Congress, which aired 7 years ago this week. And I’m so glad I did. I'll never forget the day we went to the Marigold Parade in the South Valley, and people came up to me right and left and thanked me for saying that in my ad. They shared stories about themselves, their parents, and their loved ones struggling with addiction, and it brought tears to my eyes that people felt represented by someone like me.
**My journey to sobriety taught me that you must face hard truths if you want to make change, which is why I’ll never shy away from the tough fights that lie ahead for New Mexico.**
Crime, poverty, homelessness, and addiction are weighing heavy on New Mexico, and I intend to tackle those challenges head-on as governor. I promise to be honest about topics other politicians might try to sweep under the rug, because I believe if we’re brave, we can heal.
Thank you for hearing my story, Peter. And I want to thank Heartland Patriots for their support. That’s how we’ll win this race — by sharing our stories, lifting each other up, and being fierce enough to fight for the bright future New Mexicans deserve. **[If you can, I’d be grateful if you’d split a $10 donation between my campaign for governor and Heartland Patriots today. Every donation helps reach voters and win.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88697?refcode=em20250524-8948&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8948%2E614464%2ERBfLn8)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88698?refcode=em20250524-8948&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=2&akid=8948%2E614464%2ERBfLn8) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88698?refcode=em20250524-8948&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=3&akid=8948%2E614464%2ERBfLn8) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88698?refcode=em20250524-8948&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=4&akid=8948%2E614464%2ERBfLn8) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88698?refcode=em20250524-8948&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=5&akid=8948%2E614464%2ERBfLn8) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88698?refcode=em20250524-8948&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=6&akid=8948%2E614464%2ERBfLn8) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88698?refcode=em20250524-8948&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=7&akid=8948%2E614464%2ERBfLn8) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88697?refcode=em20250524-8948&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=8948%2E614464%2ERBfLn8)
---
Thank you for everything.
Deb

body:
As we approach our end-of-month deadline, I’ve been reflecting on why I decided to run for Governor—and I wanted to share a bit of that with you.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108308081/547522402/-735451259?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-05-24_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjE5ZTczZjMtZTMzOC1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8ehXqj5fvzDlQ9nSQZbs-CgKM_Y5mBaaIsl0hWsVWh4=)

| Peter,

As we approach our end-of-month deadline, I’ve been reflecting on why I decided to run for Governor—and I wanted to share a bit of that with you.

It wasn’t for a title or to check a box. I got into this race because I know how much better Virginia can be—for our kids, our neighbors, and our future.

From my time serving Virginia’s Seventh District in Congress, I’ve seen firsthand how much good we can do when we come together to solve problems and put people over politics. That’s the kind of leadership I believe in—and it’s the kind I’ll bring to the Governor’s office.

With the chaos and division coming out of Washington, Virginia needs steady, thoughtful leadership more than ever. Leadership that puts our communities first, that protects our rights, and that focuses on the issues that actually matter to families across the Commonwealth.

That’s what Virginians deserve and that’s what this campaign is all about. But with just days left to reach our May fundraising goal, I’m counting on your support to keep us on track.

[_**If you’re able, please consider making a contribution to my campaign before our May deadline. Whether it's $5, $50, or more, every donation adds up, and it's how we can afford to reach voters all over the Commonwealth.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108308082/547522403/-735451259?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-05-24_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjE5ZTczZjMtZTMzOC1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8ehXqj5fvzDlQ9nSQZbs-CgKM_Y5mBaaIsl0hWsVWh4=)

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: What is a VDR?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
Powered by People is an extraordinary organization, comprised of volunteers all throughout the state. I'm an unpaid volunteer myself.
We train our volunteers to become Volunteer Deputy Registrars in Texas. After the 2013 _Shelby v. Holder_ decision which gutted the Voting Rights Act, no state has taken it harder than Texas.
Texas has the most onerous voter ID laws, one ballot drop off location per county (including Harris County with nearly 5 million people in the middle of a pandemic) 750 polling place closures, no online voter registration, no automatic voter registration...
Our volunteers meet young prospective voters literally where they are, very often on college campuses, and in addition to helping them through the registration process they personally stay in touch with them – like a voting sherpa – to guide them through the process of voting.
And because we're a partisan organization, we will share which candidates represent your values on a woman's ability to make her own decisions about her own body, reducing shootings in our schools, raising the minimum wage, making sure that you can see a doctor. I mean the basic things that, regardless of party or any other difference, are what Texans want right now.
But none of this happens without grassroots financial support. Every dollar we raise goes directly to volunteer training, voter outreach, and expanding our organizing capacity across Texas. And all while we’re up against one of the most voter-hostile environments in the country.
[**If you believe in this vision, chip in whatever you can today.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250524.mRCjo3&refcode=ema20250524-240126&t=1&akid=240126%2E444211%2EptWITX)
Thank you,
Beto

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pbp-em-2023-footer?refcode=em20250524-240126-footer&t=2&refcode2=240126_444211_ptWITX&akid=240126%2E444211%2EptWITX)**
Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople.org](http://www.poweredxpeople.org?akid=240126%2E444211%2EptWITX), not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We are powered by grassroots supporters like you. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=240126%2E444211%2EptWITX).

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for re-election so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in the United States Senate. The Radical Left has him circled as a prime target to defeat in the 2026 Midterm Elections. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=8a1378abcbf947bb8db792852a0799b2&_e=pBsGbZQjkH1PnOPI7tttP2FzJ3HHxytEcv7xG-KNwXu2DzukxlSZ0eLQdB8OUsHZyf7F6_Bp2sMzxTBCGlnREmsYjKvrLFQYWNVBNObqyQMZIBoCDZE0rpeIhPcE0u-bDShRzNveiQxrWIlDePIGBi0AGYvY6oH9AYGlaBVv0hArShOISdqFO9pkuauyX4nSUKzLDKtQXDToPiWdu-6yAvfO2ZyIOnmiWCOVoTYlw53mEeJQJdjI78rtq-uUGeSoOFjeQ7MztIp0j5T84F7P7rn1UH83NOOxsPgdD9Julh5kqwu6uQPhN5DhhW1UTrH5mwr2qB3oc78M1fBr97Lj9g%3D%3D)

College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces. In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud. In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson. In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others. In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime. Now, Coach Tuberville is running for re-election so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in the United States Senate. The Radical Left has him circled as a prime target to defeat in the 2026 Midterm Elections. Can he count on your support? PAID FOR BY TUBERVILLE VICTORY FUND PO Box 590012, Birmingham, Alabama 35259 Copyright (C) 2024 Tuberville Victory Fund, All rights reserved.

name: SIGN THE THANK YOU LETTER (VPP)
subject: Justice Sotomayor just issued a stark warning
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
You need to read this
| **Justice Sotomayor just issued a dire warning about where our country is headed:** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90349?t=6&akid=19945%2E878179%2EjMeMY5) Sonia Sotomayor has been on the frontlines of the fight against Trump — from SLAMMING the immunity decision to standing up for reproductive rights!

[**As one of the few defenders of our democracy left on the Supreme Court, we’re sending Sotomayor a letter thanking her for her incredible work. ONLY 30 SPOTS LEFT: SIGN YOUR NAME NOW! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90349?t=7&akid=19945%2E878179%2EjMeMY5) | [**Donate $3 to sign the letter now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90349?t=8&akid=19945%2E878179%2EjMeMY5)
---
TO: Justice Sonia Sotomayor
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: Thank you for taking a stand. **Dear Justice Sotomayor,

Thank you for standing up for our democracy against Donald Trump’s increasingly extremist agenda and unconstitutional power grab.**

Your scathing dissent against the MAGA Justices’ immunity decision was historic, and you haven’t backed down even a little bit since then.

**As Trump tries to seize more and more control from Congress and the courts, your resilience is needed now more than ever.**

I’m sick and tired of the GOP letting him off scot-free — so I’m doing everything in my power to elect Democrats and ensure we appoint more amazing Supreme Court Justices like YOU in the near future.

[**I know you’re facing relentless attacks from Trump and his MAGA minions, so I’m signing this thank you letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to help Democrats keep fighting for justice »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90349?t=9&akid=19945%2E878179%2EjMeMY5) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90355?t=10&akid=19945%2E878179%2EjMeMY5)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
—The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=19945%2E878179%2EjMeMY5). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=19945%2E878179%2EjMeMY5).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=19945%2E878179%2EjMeMY5) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=19945%2E878179%2EjMeMY5). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=19945%2E878179%2EjMeMY5)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=19945%2E878179%2EjMeMY5)

**by David Shuster**
Years ago, during the Monica Lewinsky scandal, Bill Clinton infamously said during his deposition about the affair, "it depends on what the definition of is is." Clinton was impeached.
**Too bad that particular option isn 't legally or practically available for Donald Trump's Press Secretary, Karoline Leavitt.** For, with Leavitt, every time she opens her mouth to opine on the The Republican Party's tax and spending bill, what she means**depends on what the definition of "saves" is**.
At her May 22, 2025 press briefing, Leavitt stated, "This [budget] bill saves 1.6 trillion dollars for the American taxpayer. This bill saves 1.6 trillion dollars." Which is true, in the same sense that it's true you could fly if you stepped off the top of the Statue of Liberty.
In fact, the GOP tax and spending bill _would add an estimated 3.3 trillion dollars to the national debt_. Within the bill, there are cuts to Medicaid, student loan funding, climate change projects, [and food assistance](https://substack.com/redirect/9849b50b-6932-4eb5-9bd5-2fb38952ce6c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). But those cuts, or savings as Leavitt insisted, don't hold a candle to the costs of extra defense spending and tax cuts for the very wealthiest of Americans.
Still, Leavitt's very dextrous verbal gymnastics continued. She declared, "This is a very good bill for the American people, the American taxpayer." Baghdad Bob couldn't have read those talking points any better.
In Trump/Leavitt world, perhaps only wealthy taxpayers actually qualify as the "American people." According to the non-partisan Congressional Budget Office, the top 20% of American taxpayers will receive approximately a 3.7% increase in after-tax income from the Trump tax cuts.
**Yet, the bottom 20% of taxpayers will lose $800**. Why? Because, their tax cut is so small it's hard to see, and now they'll they'll be saddled with finding a way to pay for new costs from their loss of Medicaid or Medicare benefits.
Oh, and based on the new work requirements Republicans are enacting just to receive Medicaid, millions of people are going to lose their health coverage altogether. Just a small matter that will add enormous additional costs when cheaper preventative medicine is ignored, right up to the moment someone without health insurance, due to this bill, must visit an ER.
The bill has another problem that is spooking global financial markets -- the aforementioned debt. When the U.S. government spends more money than it collects, this creates a deficit. To cover this deficit, the government must borrow more money.
The U.S. Treasury department acquires the funds to do this by selling various types of debt securities. Investors purchase the securities, and the U.S. Government promises to repay the investors with interest in the future.
These debt securities include treasury bills, which mature within one year; treasury notes which mature between two and ten years; and treasury bonds which are long term, and mature in 20 to 30 years. These U.S. debt securities **have long been considered the safest assets in the world** , because the risk of the U.S. lacking the ability to repay its investors has been very low. For decades, the United States has been big, stable, and reliable, the very opposite of what we've become under Donald Trump.

[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.7qKHabD_JSe5vKKcjryj-NhNA3iZpEB5tFiHkJ1yXEE?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=164378026)
But recently, Moody's lowered the U.S. credit rating. And the bond market followed suit by raising yields. In other words, Bond traders see a growing risk of the United States defaulting on its debt obligations. So, the people who buy and sell these securities made the U.S. borrowing costs in the bond market (the yields) more expensive.
And when the bond market makes it costlier for the U.S. government to borrow money, these borrowing costs also go up for both American consumers and businesses. We are already seeing this happen, with borrowing costs increasing for credit cards, auto loans, mortgages, and business loans.
Several Wall Street analysts say market investors and traders have also been alarmed by Donald Trump's lack of credibility. His tariff policy has been akin to the children's game "red light/green light." He can't even seem to explain what tariffs actually do, much less his reasoning for placing them on various countries. Whimsical doesn't even begin to do a description justice.
Recently, when Trump was asked about the government's debt and fiscal responsibility, he declared, "I am a fiscal hawk. There's nobody like me as a fiscal hawk." Uh-huh. Clearly, Trump was channeling Karoline Leavitt's very agile verbal gymnastics.
[The bond market is clearly calling out Trump's BS](https://substack.com/redirect/04d47061-c60c-4a6c-b741-9985f5ac0e51?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). A growing number of investors and traders around the globe are losing confidence in the full faith and credit of the United States under Trump. So, the odds of a U.S. financial meltdown are increasing.
**Though with Trump and Leavitt, of course, it 'll depend on what their definition of "meltdown" is**. They and their wealthy friends will be just fine.
_David Shuster is an Emmy award winning broadcast journalist who is best known for his work at NBC News and as an anchor MSNBC. He is a contributor to Blue Amp and has his own Substack[you can subscribe to here](https://substack.com/@davidshuster)._
