name: Former Navy SEAL Adam Schwarze
subject: Those days seem like a distant memory to me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
With a gift of just $2, you could help us double the population of Navy SEALs in the U.S. Senate. | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=afcca4bb00854cf782f889f54e71091d&_e=FfFLVjYy-R1HQX3zfoz_PD88saOdWTP9Jo6wgPP9Zt3wXfC9D0y1JxGIylmQ_xPv1M8Kn228wwK1x8Nk9eLS3i6xgwscrWL0gbdSFJcYUwVWyEgNGrZ3O693ukJ-MPKxIb19dItFQh_JZbdRPskbZwlgk9ehIlXL5K4gL6836CD910FDPL1hC89TN6TNDiiR3aSIwV0_MvZsrFsoApbAg3jGw73oWvjvxyEre_8_0yISBKnflHupeBNlMxYowwBMi3Yrr6L2pfwO5esf5VxRlpdSbXfeC2MRgCYZ_bAsISgg8Zn7wxo22TC4quGgBanK4HMbeEuZSa0rYSvrNLfatTe1noNxLfDenb6pM6zsHCH1dDGFcMs3-92vxDVNtFYKEvCfxLk4JgjS__uHR7S7YNvqsfHLcPomMZ4JE22Z_n4QwN77g43J0mJkA2vVHiGv)

---

Fellow Conservative,

I'm Adam Schwarze, a former Navy SEAL, Marine Corps veteran, and proud Minnesotan. As a combat veteran who has fought and bled in defense of our nation, I’m writing to you, in your capacity as a mother or a father, grandmother or grandfather, who fights daily for your family, to ask for your support in my run for the U.S. Senate. If you’re not from Minnesota, that’s OK I need you to keep reading this email. Because much of what’s happening in Minnesota now - _**a state run by Tim Walz, Kamala Harris’ radical VP nominee- is happening elsewhere in the United States, perhaps even in your community.**_

Our communities aren’t like they were when I grew up in the late 80s and into the 90s. Would you feel comfortable with one of your beloved children or grandchildren playing outside, out of sight, for extended periods? **The days when that was possible seem like a distant memory to me.**

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=afcca4bb00854cf782f889f54e71091d&_e=FfFLVjYy-R1HQX3zfoz_PD88saOdWTP9Jo6wgPP9Zt3wXfC9D0y1JxGIylmQ_xPv1M8Kn228wwK1x8Nk9eLS3i6xgwscrWL0gbdSFJcYUwVWyEgNGrZ3O693ukJ-MPKxIb19dItFQh_JZbdRPskbZwlgk9ehIlXL5K4gL6836CD910FDPL1hC89TN6TNDiiR3aSIwV0_MvZsrFsoApbAg3jGw73oWvjvxyEre_8_0yISBKnflHupeBNlMxYowwBMi3Yrr6L2pfwO5esf5VxRlpdSbXfeC2MRgCYZ_bAsIShv_gEdIoqoewNrGzbTXzeQGa6ZpfEtqOUEx1d4OaYG_EmWlgjakKZ5ptKrebwxTk2AXuqT2uvA2mat1e8le8P61pCM_Br1B8kqi0G00oSHxpDqV6sNyGxXXbKVLQ4woeRXEN2CptMTuG93uVJLMfIO)

But they shouldn’t be a memory. Americans should feel safe to let their children and grandchildren play outside without fear. **Every man, woman, and child should have the opportunity to live in a community where their safety isn’t constantly under assault from criminal illegal aliens or violent left-wing factions of the Democrat party.**

President Trump and Republicans in Congress are making substantial progress toward ensuring a strong and secure southern border. But they need reinforcements. **There is simply too much to do and too little time. Should we try and fail to keep our Senate majority in next year’s midterms, they won’t be able to finish all the work needed to make America safe again.**

_**President Trump needs reinforcements - and not just any reinforcement. He needs another Navy SEAL, like me, in the Senate to join the ranks of public servants like Sen. Tim Sheehy.**_****

That’s why I’m coming to you with a simple favor. **[I’m asking you for $2 today to help me double the number of Navy SEALs in the Senate](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=afcca4bb00854cf782f889f54e71091d&_e=FfFLVjYy-R1HQX3zfoz_PD88saOdWTP9Jo6wgPP9Zt3wXfC9D0y1JxGIylmQ_xPv1M8Kn228wwK1x8Nk9eLS3i6xgwscrWL0gbdSFJcYUwVWyEgNGrZ3O693ukJ-MPKxIb19dItFQh_JZbdRPskbZwlgk9ehIlXL5K4gL6836CD910FDPL1hC89TN6TNDiiR3aSIwV0_MvZsrFsoApbAg3jGw73oWvjvxyEre_8_0yISBKnflHupeBNlMxYowwBMi3Yrr6L2pfwO5esf5VxRlpdSbXfeC2MRgCYZ_bAsISj0CdnU3cSbucYiPrHROYii3HjVBPyiOPAI48P_mSr6VHvW90HiQAnZoJHgrfyjD4gW_E_VKAqEUWeAmpMfOHFvqfHLVJ3p34qrk2u8L8ioEcDCIEL7WbV4i6uJ3vCxVCMcgenv563C80ErexV6O8-s)**.

Sen. Sheehy is already one of the most effective members of the Senate, and he’s only been in office for five months—imagine what two Navy SEALs could do working in tandem.

[**CHIP IN $2
DOUBLE THE SEAL POPULATION **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=afcca4bb00854cf782f889f54e71091d&_e=FfFLVjYy-R1HQX3zfoz_PD88saOdWTP9Jo6wgPP9Zt3wXfC9D0y1JxGIylmQ_xPv1M8Kn228wwK1x8Nk9eLS3i6xgwscrWL0gbdSFJcYUwVWyEgNGrZ3O693ukJ-MPKxIb19dItFQh_JZbdRPskbZwlgk9ehIlXL5K4gL6836CD910FDPL1hC89TN6TNDiiR3aSIwV0_MvZsrFsoApbAg3jGw73oWvjvxyEre_8_0yISBKnflHupeBNlMxYowwBMi3Yrr6L2pfwO5esf5VxRlpdSbXfeC2MRgCYZ_bAsIShtHRsnQF3GLPurPxZMF5jixw5vdUuT7VrWyXvX1uY5RUbu0lCGuYGxXy78RlsgN_6eW1Z-eZ0l4OEbNKMUMmS4Tzy700tPgXAQveWfTJWkqK4hd4D2Ot6F-hIo8BnpuCrw0j_8WDUTsfzl1nDgvfpD)
I grew up in a working-class family, playing hockey and learning the value of duty from my parents. On my 18th birthday in October 2001, mere weeks after 9/11, _**I joined the Marine Corps to defend our country. I joined our Armed Forces out of fidelity to a country I love and because I had always wanted to be a part of something greater than myself.**_ As a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran, I deployed nine times to over 70 countries, putting my life on the line to keep families like yours safe.

No two missions were the same. But one thing that never changed, no matter where I was, was that I carried prayers for a safe return from my mom and dad. Now, I’m stepping up again—into the unknown - this time to protect Minnesota and America from the radical policies tearing apart our communities.

**I’m running against Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, whose far-left agenda has made our streets less safe and our values less secure. You saw the chaos in Minneapolis in 2020—riots, violence, and a governor’s team that sided with lawsuits against our police instead of protecting our neighborhoods.** As a mom, you know how important it is to feel safe in your community. That’s not the Minnesota you fought for or your family deserves.

[**CHIP IN $2
DOUBLE THE SEAL POPULATION**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=afcca4bb00854cf782f889f54e71091d&_e=FfFLVjYy-R1HQX3zfoz_PD88saOdWTP9Jo6wgPP9Zt3wXfC9D0y1JxGIylmQ_xPv1M8Kn228wwK1x8Nk9eLS3i6xgwscrWL0gbdSFJcYUwVWyEgNGrZ3O693ukJ-MPKxIb19dItFQh_JZbdRPskbZwlgk9ehIlXL5K4gL6836CD910FDPL1hC89TN6TNDiiR3aSIwV0_MvZsrFsoApbAg3jGw73oWvjvxyEre_8_0yISBKnflHupeBNlMxYowwBMi3Yrr6L2pfwO5esf5VxRlpdSbXfeC2MRgCYZ_bAsISj-lU0lj5VWhSVcsXab_gNQpGcst0McW6nK0HiLP4MPCk_hjduvCNLmtz467_mQShj2zcoQwgtReo5_pceGYC0sUc4ETcq8afZY7a-HndY_oZweoQ0ax5f6T0Z2IsFO2U9FNxV0w9XJB-gVRva7693I)
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=afcca4bb00854cf782f889f54e71091d&_e=FfFLVjYy-R1HQX3zfoz_PD88saOdWTP9Jo6wgPP9Zt3wXfC9D0y1JxGIylmQ_xPv1M8Kn228wwK1x8Nk9eLS3i6xgwscrWL0gbdSFJcYUwVWyEgNGrZ3O693ukJ-MPKxIb19dItFQh_JZbdRPskbZwlgk9ehIlXL5K4gL6836CD910FDPL1hC89TN6TNDiiR3aSIwV0_MvZsrFsoApbAg3jGw73oWvjvxyEre_8_0yISBKnflHupeBNlMxYowwBMi3Yrr6L2pfwO5esf5VxRlpdSbXfeC2MRgCYZ_bAsISjY3KeRkbO4gkU00yD49ZobZiQ3gwyBMK-N2DfJGV_lpCFJd9ZxVxKth7H73CoeYyVuhYsv1SNyN7egdU2okf8oOMGPQkRbUD8UnlMgPk_bLeiuOhufUPRlMcchhs1bSdcUIOVp6Hu0aZbdhtwm9M3z)
I’m in this fight to restore the Minnesota I grew up in and love more than almost anything else. I want to:
* **Back the blue** to keep your neighborhoods safe and secure.
* **Cut taxes** so your family can keep more of what you earn.
* **Protect our schools** from radical ideas, ensuring kids grow up with the values you teach them.
* **Defend our freedoms** , from the Second Amendment to the faith we hold dear.

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=afcca4bb00854cf782f889f54e71091d&_e=FfFLVjYy-R1HQX3zfoz_PD88saOdWTP9Jo6wgPP9Zt3wXfC9D0y1JxGIylmQ_xPv1M8Kn228wwK1x8Nk9eLS3i6xgwscrWL0gbdSFJcYUwVWyEgNGrZ3O693ukJ-MPKxIb19dItFQh_JZbdRPskbZwlgk9ehIlXL5K4gL6836CD910FDPL1hC89TN6TNDiiR3aSIwV0_MvZsrFsoApbAg3jGw73oWvjvxyEre_8_0yISBKnflHupeBNlMxYowwBMi3Yrr6L2pfwO5esf5VxRlpdSbXfeC2MRgCYZ_bAsISgIPR9ag55ABH1mG9IQrTwaNa2G9ux-BEX2fKU9t1w_Hy70kRiGpUehl_iy7At_BdMgmSgOMgx8A_m80-8LGouPfuqUw0z2Qur5_kl7_0VOEfmMQAO0y4UKHq5Q1heRgUOFL48OVWMGjMMnmJTTXu8J)

[**HELP ME GET MY CAMPAIGN OFF THE GROUND
CONTRIBUTE $2 OR MORE**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=afcca4bb00854cf782f889f54e71091d&_e=FfFLVjYy-R1HQX3zfoz_PD88saOdWTP9Jo6wgPP9Zt3wXfC9D0y1JxGIylmQ_xPv1M8Kn228wwK1x8Nk9eLS3i6xgwscrWL0gbdSFJcYUwVWyEgNGrZ3O693ukJ-MPKxIb19dItFQh_JZbdRPskbZwlgk9ehIlXL5K4gL6836CD910FDPL1hC89TN6TNDiiR3aSIwV0_MvZsrFsoApbAg3jGw73oWvjvxyEre_8_0yISBKnflHupeBNlMxYowwBMi3Yrr6L2pfwO5esf5VxRlpdSbXfeC2MRgCYZ_bAsIShl1xWhYYUF52kg7iHOvQkFqI4C1nbw18M1B5KdZa3e5LmbCR8wNMnTp0AcGko6z2K8iT-fKM8Oh3X34bBP8ZnFiqNb5powA_OCmNCzH76h93Fm-cW_kMXcgX-Fhl0em-nhR7XjuUnj8FaaE9mBW4E4)
I never planned to run for Senate, but I knew I had to act when I saw our state sliding left—higher taxes, unsafe streets, and policies that hurt families.

This won’t be an easy fight. The Democrats have big money and a radical agenda to push. That’s why**[I’m asking you, in your capacity as a parent or grandparent, who knows what it means to protect what matters most, to chip in $10, $25, or even $50 today.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=afcca4bb00854cf782f889f54e71091d&_e=FfFLVjYy-R1HQX3zfoz_PD88saOdWTP9Jo6wgPP9Zt3wXfC9D0y1JxGIylmQ_xPv1M8Kn228wwK1x8Nk9eLS3i6xgwscrWL0gbdSFJcYUwVWyEgNGrZ3O693ukJ-MPKxIb19dItFQh_JZbdRPskbZwlgk9ehIlXL5K4gL6836CD910FDPL1hC89TN6TNDiiR3aSIwV0_MvZsrFsoApbAg3jGw73oWvjvxyEre_8_0yISBKnflHupeBNlMxYowwBMi3Yrr6L2pfwO5esf5VxRlpdSbXfeC2MRgCYZ_bAsIShHoG_lPYmeHBl2soHomLOqN2h1uZEx1MZfyYvggvRJ0qKSM9VwV97qDe3GD_XFadYEGm-UeAizftAj9L1VmQC-krEtcsnlJZcJwqZfJuHuwk73GQFEB_SXvYdDFFcyB_6Nw1JqwoxOhtdMfP6kCm2x)**

Your support will help me stand up for every Minnesota family.

I’m a fighter—a son, a veteran, and a man ready to defend Minnesota’s families. Together, we can build a safer, stronger future where your kids and grandkids can thrive.

With respect and gratitude,
Adam Schwarze
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota

**P.S. In 2008** , Minnesota’s Senate race was decided by just 312 votes. Every dollar and every voice counts. Please join me today to protect our families and our values!

clean_body: With a gift of just $2, you could help us double the population of Navy SEALs in the U.S. Senate. | Fellow Conservative, I'm Adam Schwarze, a former Navy SEAL, Marine Corps veteran, and proud Minnesotan. As a combat veteran who has fought and bled in defense of our nation, I’m writing to you, in your capacity as a mother or a father, grandmother or grandfather, who fights daily for your family, to ask for your support in my run for the U.S. Senate. If you’re not from Minnesota, that’s OK I need you to keep reading this email. Because much of what’s happening in Minnesota now - a state run by Tim Walz, Kamala Harris’ radical VP nominee- is happening elsewhere in the United States, perhaps even in your community. Our communities aren’t like they were when I grew up in the late 80s and into the 90s. Would you feel comfortable with one of your beloved children or grandchildren playing outside, out of sight, for extended periods? The days when that was possible seem like a distant memory to me. But they shouldn’t be a memory. Americans should feel safe to let their children and grandchildren play outside without fear. Every man, woman, and child should have the opportunity to live in a community where their safety isn’t constantly under assault from criminal illegal aliens or violent left-wing factions of the Democrat party. President Trump and Republicans in Congress are making substantial progress toward ensuring a strong and secure southern border. But they need reinforcements. There is simply too much to do and too little time. Should we try and fail to keep our Senate majority in next year’s midterms, they won’t be able to finish all the work needed to make America safe again. President Trump needs reinforcements - and not just any reinforcement. He needs another Navy SEAL, like me, in the Senate to join the ranks of public servants like Sen. Tim Sheehy.** That’s why I’m coming to you with a simple favor. . Sen. Sheehy is already one of the most effective members of the Senate, and he’s only been in office for five months—imagine what two Navy SEALs could do working in tandem. I grew up in a working-class family, playing hockey and learning the value of duty from my parents. On my 18th birthday in October 2001, mere weeks after 9/11, I joined the Marine Corps to defend our country. I joined our Armed Forces out of fidelity to a country I love and because I had always wanted to be a part of something greater than myself. As a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran, I deployed nine times to over 70 countries, putting my life on the line to keep families like yours safe. No two missions were the same. But one thing that never changed, no matter where I was, was that I carried prayers for a safe return from my mom and dad. Now, I’m stepping up again—into the unknown - this time to protect Minnesota and America from the radical policies tearing apart our communities. I’m running against Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, whose far-left agenda has made our streets less safe and our values less secure. You saw the chaos in Minneapolis in 2020—riots, violence, and a governor’s team that sided with lawsuits against our police instead of protecting our neighborhoods. As a mom, you know how important it is to feel safe in your community. That’s not the Minnesota you fought for or your family deserves. I’m in this fight to restore the Minnesota I grew up in and love more than almost anything else. I want to: Back the blue to keep your neighborhoods safe and secure. Cut taxes so your family can keep more of what you earn. Protect our schools from radical ideas, ensuring kids grow up with the values you teach them. Defend our freedoms , from the Second Amendment to the faith we hold dear. I never planned to run for Senate, but I knew I had to act when I saw our state sliding left—higher taxes, unsafe streets, and policies that hurt families. This won’t be an easy fight. The Democrats have big money and a radical agenda to push. That’s why Your support will help me stand up for every Minnesota family. I’m a fighter—a son, a veteran, and a man ready to defend Minnesota’s families. Together, we can build a safer, stronger future where your kids and grandkids can thrive. With respect and gratitude, Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota P.S. In 2008 , Minnesota’s Senate race was decided by just 312 votes. Every dollar and every voice counts. Please join me today to protect our families and our values! FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA** | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate

Enough!!!
Republicans have declared war on working families — and they’re not being subtle about it.
They’re slashing Social Security.
Shredding Medicare.
Handing billionaires one tax break after another while millions lose their health care.
And every time their MAGA puppets throw Congress into chaos, it’s part of the plan: Break the system, then seize more power.
So we’re drawing the line. If 10,000 grassroots donors give $10 today, we can flood the battlefield with the resources we need to fight back and FLIP THE HOUSE.
Let the GOP know: We’re not backing down. We’re coming for every last seat they’ve hijacked. Chip in $10 right now to help us crush their agenda and take back control. >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-house?refcode=052425_3]

Contributions or gifts to The Real Texas PAC are not tax deductible. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, treasury funds, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. subject: Shocking Report: China Attacks U.S. Water Supply
body:
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e9595906/VaHR0cHM6Ly9vZGIubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvNmFDQm1RVGdUUA/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA1MjQ/LbmNsRW02dTVSOA/qP2hpZHM9bmNwTFB1ZDZZZkxyRDRscw/gaDJO1w/serefc4b04c)

**SHOCKING REPORT:** **CHINA ATTACKS U.S. WATER SUPPLY** [](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e9595906/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazE1LmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA1MjQ/LbmNsRW02dTVSOA/qP3RydmlkPTE0MTMyJkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPTIwMTgtMjAyNTA1MjQmX25saWQ9VlFtVVJyNTI5cyZfbmhpZHM9bmNwTFB1ZDZZZkxyRDRscw/gaDJO1w/s6q098e6140) **_FBI's Urgent Warning Has Been All Over The News_** Chinese hackers are coming for the water supply in your hometown. Attacking city water systems, biding their time and waiting for China's signal to strike. Experts warn that Russia and Iran are also targeting attacks on our city water systems. Overflowing, damaging and poisoning the lifegiving systems that we trust to keep us safe. Like it or not, your local tap water may be our country's weakest link. Deteriorating infrastructure. Systems years beyond their expiration dates. Negligent corporations. And God-knows-what in the water we drink. We're up against arsenic, plastics, chlorine, forever chemicals, hormone-altering drug residue and a host of other contaminants. Listen, I'm not trying to be the messenger of doom... **But protecting the water supply in your home is more important than ever.** If you don't take steps to be prepared, you and your family could end up vulnerable. Forced to choose between drinking poisoned, toxic or dirty water, or going without water altogether. It sounds harsh... But the truth is that even good people with good intentions can make serious mistakes. Mistakes like... **Getting filters that claim to purify your water, but don't prove it.** If a company doesn't have certifications from a third-party lab, show lab tests or reveal how many gallons were tested... that's a bad sign. After a couple gallons, most water filters on the market stop working for scary contaminants and start passing them into your water. **Getting bottled water with a 2-year shelf life and risking plastic leaching into your supply.** Not to mention all the money you'll waste, and the work required to carry cases of water. Plus with bottled water, you never really know what's been filtered out. **Or simply using a pitcher in the fridge... with slapshot filtration power and limited capacity.** Most pitchers hold a couple cups of water at a time. Not nearly enough to drink, cook and clean in an emergency. You'll run out in no time, just when your life depends on it. Well we have great news to share... Folks have been calling... Folks have been emailing... Folks have been leaving Facebook messages asking about our just-released... **NEW AND IMPROVED...** [**NEW Ultra-Fast MegaFlow Ultimate Water Filtration System!**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e9595906/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazE1LmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA1MjQ/LbmNsRW02dTVSOA/qP3RydmlkPTE0MTMyJkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPTIwMTgtMjAyNTA1MjQmX25saWQ9RXE3RnlaOXpZSiZfbmhpZHM9bmNwTFB1ZDZZZkxyRDRscw/gaDJO1w/s2u1f9b8569) **4X Faster Flow Rate for Perfect, Delicious Drinking Water** [](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e9595906/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazE1LmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA1MjQ/LbmNsRW02dTVSOA/qP3RydmlkPTE0MTMyJkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPTIwMTgtMjAyNTA1MjQmX25saWQ9cFp4UE1jdXEyRSZfbmhpZHM9bmNwTFB1ZDZZZkxyRDRscw/gaDJO1w/s6v78afa99b) **But hurry – we have limited stock, and this MegaFlow Ultimate Water Filtration System is first-come first-served. We only have a small number of units to go around.** [**Get Your MegaFlow Ultimate Water Filtration System Rushed To You At This Special Pricing Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e9595906/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazE1LmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA1MjQ/LbmNsRW02dTVSOA/qP3RydmlkPTE0MTMyJkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPTIwMTgtMjAyNTA1MjQmX25saWQ9ZzN3cjJ3YXplbiZfbmhpZHM9bmNwTFB1ZDZZZkxyRDRscw/gaDJO1w/s0r24576e37) The best part is... **_This advanced filtration technology filters the nastiest, filthiest, bacteria-riddled and parasite infested water using no chemicals, no electricity and no moving parts!_** It's powered by the same technology that the U.S. Military and NASA trust to filter their water. But now available for you in your home. You're among the first to get access to these advanced, carbon-block water filters designed to filter water on your countertop at a sub-micron level without power or water hookup. **So you can reduce...** Harmful Bacteria – up to 99.9999%
Life-Threatening Viruses – up to 99.99%
Disease-Carrying Cysts – up to 99.9% Plus, this table-top unit targets 140+ dangerous contaminants from your tap water, including bacteria, viruses, toxic chemicals, arsenic, heavy metals, pharmaceuticals, VOCs and more. All in the same, best-selling system thousands of Americans trust in their homes. **The NEW & improved Filtration System may look the same...** But on the inside, these proprietary filters pack an even bigger punch than before. They're MORE reliable and easier to replace, too. So you get safer, cleaner water for you and your family. **But we have very limited stock, and we've been sold out of this filtration powerhouse for a while.** In fact, it's been a very long while. Months and months, actually. [**Now we've just got a fresh batch in.**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e9595906/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazE1LmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA1MjQ/LbmNsRW02dTVSOA/qP3RydmlkPTE0MTMyJkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPTIwMTgtMjAyNTA1MjQmX25saWQ9TlZGQWtZNkZucSZfbmhpZHM9bmNwTFB1ZDZZZkxyRDRscw/gaDJO1w/s9o74c2cc5b) And if you need to take it with you? No problem. You're not tied to it like a whole-house filtration system. That kind of thing won't do you any good if you need to bug out. **And YES there's an interest-FREE payment plan!** Yes, right now, you can get your MegaFlow Ultimate Water Filtration System on a convenient, no-credit-check, interest-FREE payment plan. We know you're good for it. You'll have the **peace of mind** knowing that you're doing everything you can to keep your family safer, by securing your MegaFlow Ultimate Water Filtration System today for fresher, cleaner water for years to come. [**Get Your MegaFlow Ultimate Water Filtration System Rushed To You At This Special Pricing Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e9595906/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazE1LmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA1MjQ/LbmNsRW02dTVSOA/qP3RydmlkPTE0MTMyJkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPTIwMTgtMjAyNTA1MjQmX25saWQ9akNNcmtrcXM5ZyZfbmhpZHM9bmNwTFB1ZDZZZkxyRDRscw/gaDJO1w/sau07a6c6cc) To your survival, Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters P.S. Derrick loves the convenience of his MegaFlow Ultimate Water Filtration System: _"It was so easy to install. Within minutes we had water that tasted so good, we couldn't believe it. We don't like the chlorine in tap water and we got tired of lugging around cases of bottled water."_ **Customers Love Their Ultimate
Water Filtration System!** [](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e9595906/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazE1LmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA1MjQ/LbmNsRW02dTVSOA/qP3RydmlkPTE0MTMyJkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPTIwMTgtMjAyNTA1MjQmX25saWQ9UVJ0Q1piVTNtWCZfbmhpZHM9bmNwTFB1ZDZZZkxyRDRscw/gaDJO1w/sap5519dc8b) **_Cyndi L._**_
"No question... beats the competition. After reviewing several other companies and seeing that I was not the only one thinking this way, as everyone was sold out of products, I decided to go with 4Patriots. They seem to be good people who are very helpful and their products seemed above average to others."_ _**Michael B.**
"Saves me a ton of money and grocery-store headaches. During the pandemic, water wasn't always available. Not so with the Purifier. We love it and I have 5 gallons of water on hand all the time."_ _**Faith P.**
"Water you can actually trust. This is so much better than storing gallons and gallons of bottled water. This enables us to make existing, natural water sources drinkable. I feel really good knowing that in an emergency situation, we'd be able to filter our water."_ _**Carol B.**
"Stop worrying about what's in the water! We use our system for drinking and cooking but you can use it almost anywhere. It's easy to use and it doesn't take long to filter. The water tastes pure and delicious."_ _**Rick O.**
"Easiest way to upgrade your drinking water. We chose this one because it handles everything and it's affordable. You never know when things will go out on you."_ _**Thomas P.**
"Finally, I don't have to keep refilling my pitcher all day. I'm very happy with my water filter. Not only does our water now taste good (it tasted dirty from the tap) but the large capacity tank means I'm not refilling small pitchers repeatedly during the day."_ [**Get Your MegaFlow Ultimate Water Filtration System Rushed To You At This Special Pricing Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e9595906/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazE1LmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA1MjQ/LbmNsRW02dTVSOA/qP3RydmlkPTE0MTMyJkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPTIwMTgtMjAyNTA1MjQmX25saWQ9SnljMjM0aE0zNSZfbmhpZHM9bmNwTFB1ZDZZZkxyRDRscw/gaDJO1w/s2qa7ccb61e)

name: President Trump
subject: God spared my life for a reason.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Never Surrender, Inc
body:
Here’s why:
| | | | [](https://link.email.donaldjtrump.)
---
**Thank you for taking the time to read this message.**
Just months ago, in a beautiful Pennsylvania field, an assassin’s bullet ripped through my ear.
But I knew then, and I believe now more than ever, that God spared my life for a reason: **to Make America Great Again.**
In just 100 days, we’ve delivered historic wins—**what many are calling the most successful start to any presidency in history.**
But with our success has come an unhinged backlash, fueled by radical Democrats.
It’s not about me. It’s about their fear of **YOU** and this moment. They don't want to fix this country. They want to erase everything we’ve built!
**That’s why I need you. We must defend every seat in Congress—and expand our majority in the House and Senate.**
**_[This is your moment to make a difference. Whether it’s your time, your voice, or your contribution. We need all hands on deck.>](https://link.email.donaldjtrump.)_**
[CONTRIBUTE NOW TO DEFEND OUR MAJORITY →](https://link.email.donaldjtrump.)
Together, we will continue winning—and of course, Make America Greater than ever before.
Thank you, and God bless you.
Donald J. Trump 47th President of the United States

name: GOTV PAC
subject: You have every right to be frustrated
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3182025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3182025&amount=25]
Peter,
This has been a tough year to be a Democrat. After 2024, we know a lot of folks feel frustrated, disappointed, even betrayed. Trust us, we feel it too.
So many Democratic donors poured their hearts and our dollars into campaigns that left them feeling like they'd thrown good money out the window.
Donors are right to ask hard questions, demand better answers, and hesitate to give again.
Why did the Harris campaign spend who knows how much money advertising on the Las Vegas Sphere??
We don't know, but here's the thing: At GOTV PAC, we're committed to ensuring your donation goes further, especially in this uncertain economy. We cut out middlemen and bloated consultant commissions by running in-house phone bank operations to reach overlooked voters in the most competitive of races. Strategic places where Democrats can win with the right investments.
So, Peter, if you're able to, can you chip in $10 or more today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email05242025&amount=25] We're currently running phone bank operations for the San Antonio Mayoral race and in key Virginia districts ahead of the upcoming June elections in both territories. Your help could be all the difference in ensuring we're able to elect strong Democrats who are ready to take on the MAGA agenda.
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=Email05242025] DONATE $35 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?express_lane=true&amount=35&refcode=Email05242025]
DONATE $60 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?express_lane=true&amount=60&refcode=Email05242025] DONATE $120 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?express_lane=true&amount=120&refcode=Email05242025]
OTHER AMOUNT → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email05242025]
Together, we can turn this frustration into real, lasting change.
GOTV PAC
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email05242025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email05242025&amount=25]
Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]
PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
GOTV PAC
712 H St NE
PMB 96591
Washington, DC 20002
United States
Get Out the Vote PAC is registered with the Federal Election Commission as a hybrid Political Action Committee (PAC) with FEC ID C00839407. Our mission is to Flip the House by supporting targeted Congressional districts and down-ballot races within those districts. Our internal research evidences that the impact of a Dollar invested in this manner amplifies the top and bottom of the ticket.

name: Democratic National Committee
subject: How we’ve put grassroots donations to work this year:
body:
---
Derek — We're reaching out to ask if you can make a donation to the DNC today. But before we do, we want to tell you a little bit about what the donations from this grassroots team have already made possible and how we'll put future contributions to work. In the last few months, we’ve...
* Held over 100 People’s Town Halls in 48 states, including in deep red districts — proving that Democrats will show up and listen to the American people, even if Republicans won’t.

* Invested in Nebraska, which led to a huge win in the Omaha mayoral race — Democrat John W. Ewing defeated long-serving Republican incumbent Jean Stothert and became the first Black mayor of Omaha.

* Announced our plans to send more than $1 million a month to our state parties so we can organize everywhere, year-round, in every ZIP code.

And this is just the beginning. We are committed to continuing to organize and mobilize against Trump while electing Democrats at every level of government — leaders who will check Trump’s power in their cities, districts, and states. **That is the kind of work grassroots donations fund. And you might be surprised to hear this, but most of our grassroots donations come from emails just like this one. So now that we have explained where your donation has gone and where it is going, we're hoping you'll join thousands of Democrats making their first or next donation to the DNC. Use this link:** **[Can Democrats running for office up and down the ballot count on you to contribute $3 to the Democratic National Committee today? We’ll put your contribution directly to work electing Democrats.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025?refcode=em_20250524_3529_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3529_22930333_78-xgZ&akid=3529%2E22930333%2E78-xgZ)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250524_3529_fr&refcode2=3529_22930333_78-xgZ&akid=3529%2E22930333%2E78-xgZ)**

# ACTION ALERT: VOTE YES ON SB 315
|
---
SB 315 (Kolkhorst / Harris Davila) would establish that Texans have a property right for their DNA, making it illegal to alter or modify someone’s DNA without their consent.
This bill is in the Calendars Committee waiting to be placed on the House calendar for a floor vote. **TAKE ACTION NOW BY URGING MEMBERS OF THE HOUSE CALENDARS COMMITTEE TO PLACE SB 315 ON THE GENERAL STATE CALENDAR FOR A FLOOR VOTE!**
**1- Email the Calendars Committee Members**

|
---
| | [ Click here to generate an email to all committee members! ](mailto:todd.hunter@house.texas.gov,toni.rose@house.texas.gov,terry.canales@house.texas.gov,stan.gerdes@house.texas.gov,cody.harris@house.texas.gov,ana.hernandez@house.texas.gov,ann.johnson@house.texas.gov,jeff.leach@house.texas.gov,janie.lopez@house.texas.gov,ramon.romero@house.texas.gov,carl.tepper@house.texas.gov?subject=Vote%20YES%20on%20SB%20315&body=Dear%20Representative%2C%0A%0AI%20am%20writing%20to%20you%20today%20to%20ask%20you%20to%20please%20place%20SB%20315%20on%20the%20General%20State%20Calendar%20immediately.%0A%0AThis%20bill%20would%20protect%20Texans%E2%80%99%20medical%20liberty!%0A%0AThank%20you%2C%0A%5BYOUR%20NAME%5D)
---
|
---
___The button above_ _will populate with a sample message. You are welcome to use it as is_** _by signing your name._**
_If this button does not work on your device, please copy and paste all of the emails below in the TO: field of your draft to send just one email to all committee members at once:_____[](mailto:gary.vandeaver@house.texas.gov)[todd.hunter@house.texas.gov](mailto:todd.hunter@house.texas.gov); [toni.rose@house.texas.gov](mailto:toni.rose@house.texas.gov); [terry.canales@house.texas.gov](mailto:terry.canales@house.texas.gov); [stan.gerdes@house.texas.gov](mailto:stan.gerdes@house.texas.gov); [cody.harris@house.texas.gov](mailto:cody.harris@house.texas.gov); [ana.hernandez@house.texas.gov](mailto:ana.hernandez@house.texas.gov); [ann.johnson@house.texas.gov](mailto:ann.johnson@house.texas.gov); [jeff.leach@house.texas.gov](mailto:jeff.leach@house.texas.gov); [janie.lopez@house.texas.gov](mailto:janie.lopez@house.texas.gov); [ramon.romero@house.texas.gov](mailto:ramon.romero@house.texas.gov); [carl.tepper@house.texas.gov](mailto:carl.tepper@house.texas.gov)[](mailto:lauren.simmons@house.texas.gov) [](mailto:lauren.simmons@house.texas.gov)_[](mailto:kevin.sparks@senate.texas.gov)_**SAMPLE EMAIL MESSAGE:

This bill is in the Calendars Committee waiting to be placed on the House calendar for a floor vote.
